Naturally, the caravan leader has received instruction from Liu Zhen to be polite towards Zhao Hai and the others. He didn’t order Zhao Hai around and just instructed him to follow the caravan.

Zhao Hai didn’t communicate with the other people in the caravan. He didn’t want to have anything to do with these people. At the same time, the others ignored him. This allowed Zhao Hai and the others to quietly follow behind the caravan. This caused them to look out of place. They didn’t talk to any Blood Knife Gang member while the Blood Gang members also left them on their own.

chapters.title: Chapter 2216: Attacked
chapters.body:
Chapter 2216: Attacked

At the speed that the caravan was going in, it would reach Demonheart City in about half a month. Although there were plenty of places to rest along the way, it was impossible for them to stay at safe places every night. This was where they needed to be extra careful as they might get attacked.

It has been three days since the caravan left Split River City. The three days passed with no issues. They all found good places to rest and were safe. All this time, Zhao Hai and the people from the Blood Knife Gang didn’t interact. The Blood Knife Gang members were all doing their own things. They would interact with each other and laugh, but they ignored Zhao Hai and the others.

Naturally, Zhao Hai didn’t mind this. He knows that they were essentially strangers to the cultivators of the Blood Knife Gang. In the same way, Zhao Hai didn’t have any intentions of interacting too much with the Blood Knife Gang.

On the fourth day, they traveled the entire day. But when night came, they weren’t able to find any accommodations nearby. They could only rest in the wild. The people from the Blood Knife Gang connected the carriages end to end. It was clear that the Blood Knife Gang members were very experienced. They had people carrying spatial equipment that stored their tents. As soon as the carriages were lined up in a circle, the tents were immediately set up. Then people began to take out pots and pans to cook.

The people from the Blood Knife Gang naturally didn’t think about Zhao Hai and the others. They were busy with their own things. As they were doing their own jobs, they looked at Zhao Hai and the others from time to time. It was as if they were waiting for Zhao Hai and the others to become a joke.

Seeing the Blood Knife Gang members, Zhao Hai didn’t say anything. Instead, he took out three beastskin bags and placed them on the ground. Then he looked at Ma Long and Liu Cai, “We’ll use these to rest for tonight. Are you fine with that?”

Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded at the same time. Ma Long opened his mouth and said, “Didn’t we sleep on beast skin before? It’s more comfortable sleeping in beast skin.” Liu Cai agreed.

Zhao Hai smiled faintly as he looked towards the cultivators of the Blood Knife Gang. Then he said, “Rogue cultivators are used to sleeping on beast skin. Senior Brother Ma, let’s go find a beast and return. Let’s make something delicious.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Ma Long chuckled, “We’ll go. Rogue cultivators are master cooks when it comes to wild cooking. Let’s show them our skills.”

Liu Cai smiled, “I can go look for wild plants. I used to forage a lot. I haven’t eaten wild food for some time, I was hoping to eat one soon.” After that, the two moved and left the camp, leaving Zhao Hai behind.

The Blood Knife Gang members also saw Ma Long and Liu Cai leaving. They were stunned for a moment, then their expressions changed. There was a bit more vigilance in their faces.

Looking at their appearance, Zhao Hai immediately knew what they were thinking. These Blood Knife Gang members were already vigilant towards them. After seeing Ma Long and Liu Cai leaving, they must be thinking that the two were up to something, so they immediately became on guard.

Zhao Hai didn’t say anything and stayed calm. He sorted the embers and went up and picked a bunch of dry firewood. When Ma Long and Liu Cai returned to the camp, Ma Long was carrying a goat demon beast while Liu Cai had a pile of wild vegetables and fruits.

Zhao Hai added more fuel to the fire while Ma Long skinned the goat demon beast. Ma Long removed the internal organs, washed it, and skewered it with a long wooden stick. Then he put the meat in front of the fire to cook. On the other hand, Liu Cai washed the vegetables and placed them on the side, ready to eat at any time.

Looking at the two, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and then took out a few pots of liquor. Then he smiled and said, “Fortunately, I brought a lot of wine. Eating meat without wine would be disappointing.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai didn’t expect Zhao Hai to have wine on him. So, when they saw him take out the wine, Liu Cai couldn’t help but laugh, “Good, it’s nice to have wine. We need to drink a lot.”

The three chatted as the goat was roasting. When the Blood Knife Gang members saw the three, they couldn’t help but feel envy. They immediately sent people to hunt beasts as well as people to forage for vegetables.

Zhao Hai didn’t care about the Blood Knife Gang members. When the meat was cooked, Zhao Hai and the others took a piece for themselves. In addition to the wild vegetables and the wine, the three chatted happily.

However, half an hour after they started drinking, Zhao Hai stopped. Then he looked at the other two and said, “Something’s not right. Be alert.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Ma Long and Liu Cai stared. Then their complexion changed. Ma Long looked around and said, “Did you sense anything?”

Zhao Hai replied, “Haven’t you paid attention? It’s been half an hour since the cultivators from the Blood Knife Gang went out to hunt and forage. They still haven’t returned.” ŗåΝоᛒĚṢ

Upon hearing this, Ma Long and Liu Cai’s expressions changed. Then their mood dropped. Ma Long said, “Although there are no powerful beasts nearby, ordinary beasts are quite common. If they went out to hunt, they should have returned by now. It seems like they’ve met some danger.”

Liu Cai nodded. He looked at the surroundings and then looked at Zhao Hai, “What do we do now? Do we remind them?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “There’s no loss if we remind them. The people who came to attack won’t care if we’re from the Blood Knife Gang or not. They would still attack us. If those who went out were really in danger, then our situation is as bad.” After saying that, he stood up and walked towards the Blood Knife Gang members.

The Blood Knife Gang members were currently surrounding a bonfire and chatting. They didn’t think that they would be attacked. They were surprised to see Zhao Hai coming towards them.

Zhao Hai looked at the team leader and said, “I have something to tell you.”

The team leader stood up and cupped his fist towards Zhao Hai, “So it’s Mister Zhao. Does mister have any orders?”

Zhao Hai could hear some thorns in the man’s words, but he didn’t react to it. He only looked the team leader in the eyes and said, “I don’t dare give you orders. But I have something to tell you alone. I hope you don’t mind.”

As soon as he heard this, the team leader couldn’t help but frown, “Mister, all of us are brothers here. There’s no secret that they couldn’t hear.”

Zhao Hai looked at the team leader and said, “Since the team leader said so, then I can only be impolite. Team leader, how long has it been since the others went out to hunt? Don’t you think it’s strange that they still haven’t returned?”

As soon as he heard Zhao Hai, the team leader couldn’t help but get stunned. Then his expression changed as he felt that something was wrong. However, he didn’t want to look soft in front of Zhao Hai, so he responded, “Mister Zhao doesn’t need to worry himself over this. There are a lot of us, so there are more mouths to feed. It’s normal if they spend more time hunting.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai coldly snorted inwardly and said, “Since team leader says so, then I have nothing more to say.” Then he turned around and returned to Ma Long and Liu Cai. The expressions of the two weren’t good. They also heard the conversation.

Zhao Hai returned to Ma Long and Liu Cai’s side and sat down. Then he said, “That guy is too prideful. He already found out that something was wrong, but he doesn’t want to admit it. Forget it. Ignore them. Let’s take care of ourselves. If they can’t handle it, we’ll leave.”

The two nodded. Although they were still eating and drinking, their eyes were now more vigilant than before.

When Zhao Hai left, the Blood Knife team leader immediately said, “Call everyone and tell them to be careful. There might be something wrong.”

Hearing their team leader, the Blood Knife Gang members couldn’t help but stare. Then their expressions changed at the same time. They immediately complied and passed down the warning that the team leader gave. As the team leader looked over at Zhao Hai and the others, a strange glint appeared in his eyes.

At this moment, a sound of wind was suddenly heard. When he heard this, Zhao Hai’s expression couldn’t help but change. Then he said, “There are arrows, be careful.” After he said that, he stood up and jumped. At the same time, he formed his hands into claws and covered the skies with claw qi.

Liu Cai and Ma Long also jumped and defended. In Liu Cai’s hands were two shields. The shields weren’t big and could even be considered as bucklers. The edges of the shields were jagged and sharp. Liu Cai used his techniques to move around to defend himself.

On the other hand, Ma Long held an executioner’s blade. The blade was quite wide and had three iron rings on its spine. Every time the blade was swung, a grating sound could be heard. Ma Long was also swinging his blade to defend.

When the three made their moves, the Blood Knife Gang members also took action. But since they were unprepared, their response was slower.

At this time, wolf tooth arrows began to rain down on the Blood Knife Gang’s convoy. The frequency of the arrows was very fast. Moreover, their penetrating power was very strong. Even if Zhao Hai was prepared, he still had to exert some effort to defend. There was no need to mention how badly the people from the Blood Knife Gang were faring.

After the first wave of arrows passed, Zhao Hai felt the air around him turn instantly cold. Then his complexion changed. He put his hands together and muttered, “Burning Demonfire!” Along with his voice, a black flame appeared in his hands. Although the flame was black, it was extremely hot. As soon as the flame appeared, the temperature of the surroundings immediately rose. But despite this, Zhao Hai still could feel a piercing cold.

chapters.title: Chapter 2217: Disclosing Secrets
chapters.body:
Chapter 2217: Disclosing Secrets

Zhao Hai’s expression was ugly to look at. He was sure that someone had used a freezing talisman on them. Otherwise, it would be impossible for the other party to release such a huge-scale technique. Only a talisman could create this effect.

Ma Long and Liu Cai gathered beside Zhao Hai. Their expressions also weren’t attractive. They didn’t expect the other party’s attack to come this quickly.

The people from the Blood Knife Gang suffered losses accounting to more than half of their total manpower. Although the leader of the Blood Knife Gang wasn’t injured, his expression was very ugly. He glanced around and shouted, “Rats! I dare you to come out and fight!”

“Hahaha. Jiang Lei, aren’t you supposedly fierce? Why do you seem anxious? Why would I come out? I can wait until I kill you.” A voice was heard from the surroundings, making it impossible to track. Moreover, the voice sounded processed, so its owner couldn’t be recognized.

As soon as Jiang Lei heard this voice, his expression couldn’t help but change. Then he answered, “So you know about me. Why don’t you dare come out and face me?’

“Hahaha. I don’t want to meet you. I just want you to die.” Along with this response, a rain of fire appeared from the sky, heading straight towards Zhao Hai and the others.

They had just been subjected to a piercing cold, and now they were going to be burned by fire. The feeling of ice and fire was extremely uncomfortable. However, Zhao Hai didn’t move. He just stared straight ahead. Then all of a sudden, he turned left and shouted, “Rats, come out!” As he shouted, he swung his claw towards an area.

Ma Long and Liu Cai also responded. They flanked both sides of Zhao Hai and proceeded to charge with him. Their charge caused the voice from earlier to be startled. Then it said, “I didn’t expect that there’s another person in the Blood Knife Gang who could see me. Unfortunately for you, you can’t catch me.” The voice once more came from every direction, making it impossible to locate.

Zhao Hai also stopped and no longer attacked. This was because he knew that the other party already escaped. Zhao Hai just didn’t expect that the other party would run so fast.

At this time, Jiang Lei also responded. He looked around and turned towards the cultivator beside him and said, “Request for reinforcements from the gang. Send our location and tell them that we need support as soon as possible.” The cultivator nodded and took out a jade slip. After putting the message in, the cultivator took out a transmission formation and sent the jade slip over.

But to the cultivator’s surprise, although he activated the transmission formation, there was no response. The jade slip was still there.

As soon as he saw this, Jiang Lei’s expression couldn’t help but change, “A spatial confinement formation? Who is the other party? Why would they do such a thing?”

“Hahaha. Jiang Lei, you want to ask for reinforcements? Stop dreaming. You will die today. Understand? Hahaha.”

Zhao Hai also frowned. He didn’t expect the other party’s preparations to be this thorough. He even prepared a spatial confinement formation. Like a fixed transmission formation, this formation couldn’t be brought over. It seems like the other party had known their whereabouts a long time ago.

Zhao Hai looked at Ma Long and Liu Cai and said, “Follow me closely. We’ll find a way to escape. As long as we get away from the encirclement, our chances of survival will increase. I’m sure that the other party isn’t going after us, but they wouldn’t just let us go. They will be afraid that we would ask the Blood Knife Gang for help. It will be a tough battle if we want to break through. We need to be careful.”

The two nodded at the same time. They couldn’t help but tighten their hold on their weapons. Zhao Hai also moved and took out two hidden weapons which happen to be claws.

Metal claws were a type of hidden weapon, but their power was great when used well. The claws in Zhao Hai’s hands looked very refined. He used three fingers to grasp them. Once the claws were used properly, it could lock an opponent’s weapon, making it difficult for them to move. (https://th.bing.com/th/id/OIP.6MtyQPfY59HKs11ihPAiOAHaHa?rs=1&pid=ImgDetMain)

Zhao Hai’s claws were actually made from nanobots. Although he could also use liquid silver, Zhao Hai wanted to test the nanobots out. This way, he could get an estimate on how effective they could be.

At this time, the other party sent another wave of attack. Like before, they didn’t reveal themselves. However, each attack they sent over was lethal. This made Jiang Lei and the others be on guard at all times.

But to Zhao Hai’s surprise, the carriages that the Blood Knife Gang were transporting didn’t suffer any damage. Even if they were hit by the spells, they didn’t appear to be damaged. It seems like the carriages were more defensive than Zhao Hai thought.

Zhao Hai surveyed the situation around him. Actually, he was waiting for the report from the nanobots. When he found out that they could be attacked, Zhao Hai already released nanobots to check the situation. But since the other party was far away, the nanobots haven’t sent anything useful.

The reason Zhao Hai was able to find the enemy was also because of the nanobots. But as soon as he was discovered, the enemy turned around and ran. Because of this, Zhao Hai had the nanobots expand their search.

After some time, the nanobots finally came back. They were truly surrounded. There were more than 300 people surrounding the caravan. Among these 300 people, 30 of them were Earth Monarchs, 100 were Soul Fusion cultivators, and the rest were at the Clone Stage.

However, Zhao Hai also discovered the weakness of their encirclement. In a low voice, he whispered to Ma Long and Liu Cai, “On my signal, charge towards the southeast. We need to escape at the shortest possible time. Otherwise, we would be in deep trouble.” The other two nodded.

Zhao Hai glanced at Jiang Lei who was still dealing with various attacks. His mouth showed a hint of mockery. Jiang Lei ignored Zhao Hai’s warnings, so Zhao Hai didn’t have a good impression of him. Now, looking at Jiang Lei’s expression, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but gloat.

Zhao Hai took a deep breath, then he counted down, “One, two, three. Go!” Right after that, he leapt and rushed towards the southeast. Ma Long and Liu Cai followed closely behind him. In a blink of an eye, the three sunk into the southeast forest.

Seeing Zhao Hai’s movement, Jiang Lei coldly snorted. He didn’t organize people to break through the encirclement. Instead, he commanded everyone to group up in the middle to stage a defense.

Zhao Hai continued to lead Ma Long and Liu Cai. When they traveled around two li(1km), they finally noticed several shadows. However, Zhao Hai didn’t stop. Instead, he wielded his claws to attack, ℟ÀŊ𝐎ᛒЕ𝘴

The other party didn’t expect Zhao Hai to charge in such a short time. They had just begun to surround their target, but now Zhao Hai and the others were in front of them. Zhao Hai waved his claws, while Liu Cai and Ma Long waved their bucklers and executioner’s blade. The three looked like ferocious arrows as they pierced through the enemy,

Before the enemy could react, Zhao Hai and the others were already on the other side. Zhao Hai and the others didn’t stop running. When the enemies finally understood what happened, they immediately sent people to pursue.

Zhao Hai and the others began to run for another five li(2.5km). Seeing the pursuers behind him, Zhao Hai coldly snorted. He waved his hand and took out several spheres. Then he threw the spheres behind him.

The pursuers also discovered what Zhao Hai threw their way. They knew that it would be bad for them, so they became more careful. However, they clearly underestimated Zhao Hai’s means.

What Zhao Hai threw wasn’t an ordinary item. The spheres he threw were the thunderfire spheres that were famous in the underground world. Thunderfire spheres of the underground world were different to those aboveground. The thunderfire spheres of the underground world took after the properties of the earthfire pillars. Moreover, its power was as good as the thunderfire spheres of the True Spirit Realm.

Thunderfire spheres were treasures of the underground world. After Wei Tiande gave a few spheres to him, Zhao Hai immediately had the Space analyze it and create a large number of spheres.

Because of this, Zhao Hai dared to throw thunderfire spheres by the dozens. If Wei Tiande knew of this, he would be shocked.

A loud rumbling explosion was immediately heard after the thunderfire spheres got in contact with the pursuers. Ma Long and Liu Cai naturally knew what Zhao Hai threw out. They were surprised as well as felt envious towards Zhao Hai. They didn’t expect Zhao Hai to use thunderfire spheres.

The pursuers were ignorant of the thunderfire spheres, so they were all immediately blown up in one go. They immediately forgot to pursue Zhao Hai, which allowed them a smooth escape.

Seeing that they were safe, Zhao Hai immediately took out a transmission formation and then took out a jade slip. After inscribing the message, Zhao Hai sent the jade slip through the transmission formation.

Ma Long and Liu Cai looked at Zhao Hai in confusion. They saw that what Zhao Hai took out was a rough looking transmission formation. No matter how they looked at it, it looked like the one Liu Zhen gave Zhao Hai. Did Zhao Hai send word to Liu Zhen?

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “I’m sending a report to Liu Zhen. The caravan of the Blood Knife Gang that we’re in has been attacked. If we don’t do anything, the Blood Knife Gang will place this matter on our heads. So, I sent a report to Liu Zhen about what happened to avoid suspicion. If the gang hated us for what happened, they would most likely send someone to Demonheart City. We wouldn’t want that to happen.”

Hearing the explanation, Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded. They knew that if the Blood Knife Gang blames them for what happened, their future wouldn’t be great. The Blood Knife Gang was a local snake in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory. Although Demonheart City wasn’t inside their sphere of influence, the gang would still have plenty of means to deal with Zhao Hai’s group.

If Zhao Hai and the others were ordinary cultivators, the matter might not be as serious. However, they were sent by the underground world. If their presence was discovered, they would suffer fates worse than death.

Ma Long and Liu Cai had nothing to say about Zhao Hai’s actions. Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “Now that Liu Zhen has received the report, it wouldn’t take long before they arrive. Continue to be alert.” The two nodded. They understood what Zhao Hai was saying. Zhao Hai wanted them to stop talking once they saw Liu Zhen.

Sure enough, in less than ten minutes, a flash of white light appeared. Then a group appeared. Liu Zhen was in front along with at least 50 people.

When Liu Zhen appeared, he immediately looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Brother, can you tell me what happened?”

Zhao Hai replied, “We’ve been attacked. We don’t know who. However, we know that the other party is very prepared. They not only have a spatial confinement formation, they also have a large number of talismans with formidable spells. I managed to find an opportunity to break out of the encirclement. Team Leader Jiang Lei is still being attacked. We don’t know how many attackers there are, but there should be at least 150.”

Liu Zhen listened intently to each word coming out of Zhao Hai’s mouth. After Zhao Hai was finished talking, he nodded and said, “Alright. Thank you, Brother. If it weren’t for you, our Blood Knife Gang would have suffered a huge loss.”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “Brother Liu is too polite. You looked after me, so it’s only fitting that I do the same to your people. Brother, you should head over there as soon as possible. I suspect that there’s an Earth Monarch with the attackers.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2218: Gang Master Wang Da
chapters.body:
Chapter 2218: Gang Master Wang Da

Liu Zhen didn’t say anything more but instead took out a transmission formation and sent a message back to the Blood Knife Gang. After that, he waved his hand, then a few cultivators who came with him rushed to the direction pointed by Zhao Hai. They wanted to confirm the number of enemies first before charging over.

Zhao Hai and his group didn’t participate in the action, nor did Liu Zhen. They just stood in place. Although Liu Zhen maintained a stoic expression with closed eyes, the killing aura that he was emitting was getting stronger and stronger.

Liu Zhen was the Blood Knife Gang’s Battle Hall Master. His specific role was dealing with the gang’s external enemies. People who dared attack the gang’s caravan were naturally the gang’s foes. Liu Zhen’s reputation in Split River City was quite good. Now, his caravan has been attacked. It was no wonder that he has a strong killing intent.

Zhao Hai was a god of killing, so naturally he noticed Liu Zhen’s aura. However, he didn’t say anything. Liu Zhen was already treating him well. Although Liu Zhen had an agenda, he still offered help to Zhao Hai. Moreover, Zhao Hai was happy to remove any suspicion that might be pinned on him.

Moreover, helping the Blood Knife Gang would reduce any suspicions on Zhao Hai that he was a Ghost Cultivator. It must be known that most spies wouldn’t act high-profile. Zhao Hai’s actions might surprise people, but it wouldn’t make them suspicious of him.

The group didn’t wait for a long time. In half an hour, the sound of fighting could be heard. Hearing this, Zhao Hai’s expression changed. Liu Zhen also opened his eyes and said, “Trash. I only asked them to check, but they exposed themselves.”

As Liu Zhen said this, a large number of Blood Knife Gang cultivators appeared in the surroundings.

At this time, there was another flash of white light, and more than 20 cultivators appeared. Although the group was fewer than Liu Zhen’s group, the strength they possessed couldn’t be underestimated. The strongest of them has reached the Teleportation Stage.

In front of the new group was an old man with gray hair. Despite his age, he was dressed well with his warrior clothing. He didn’t look tacky at all. On the contrary, he looked graceful and extraordinary.

Seeing the old man, Liu Zhen couldn’t help but stare. Then he immediately walked forward and bowed, “I have seen the Gang Master. Gang Master, why did you come personally?”

The old man was the Blood Knife Gang’s Leader, Wang Da. Wang Da nodded and said, “How could I not come when a huge matter is happening. Moreover, I just broke through to the Teleportation Stage, I want to find people to test my strength.”

Liu Zhen smiled faintly, then he gestured his hand towards Zhao Hai and said, “Gang Master, this is my friend Zhao Ling. If it weren’t for him, we wouldn’t have been aware of this matter.”

Zhao Hai cupped his fist and said, “I have seen Gang Master.”

Wang Da nodded, “Let this old man thank you, Little Friend. Wang Da will remember this favor. If Little Friend needs something in the future, don’t hesitate to approach the Blood Knife Gang.

Zhao Hai quickly replied, “Thank you very much, Gang Master.”

Wang Da nodded, then his pupils narrowed as he looked in another direction. Then he said, “Have each team get ready. This old man wants to see who dares to attack my Blood Knife Gang.” After he said that, the old man turned his hand and took out a knife. The knife was three feet long but was quite thin. What was strange about the knife was that although it was snow white, its sharp edge was blood red.

Zhao Hai now knew the Blood Knife Gang’s origin. It seems like the gang was inseparable from this knife. Wang Da held his blood knife in his hand and led everyone forward to fight.

Zhao Hai, Ma Long, and Liu Cai followed behind the Blood Knife Gang. They also took their weapons out. The techniques they used could be seen as belonging to the Demonic Faction and not from Ghost Cultivation. Naturally, they weren’t afraid of joining the fight. It was also for this reason that they were chosen to go to the True Spirit Realm.

The three of them were already involved in this matter, so they can’t just quit. Moreover, they were attacked, so they couldn’t just let their attackers off. They also need to vent their anger.

Before long, the group arrived at the scene of fighting. In the forest, the group from the Blood Knife Gang were being attacked by cultivators dressed in black and were masked.

Seeing this, the rest from the Blood Knife Gang were immediately enraged. Wang Da waved his blood knife and shouted, “Kill!”

Despite sending an order, Wang Da didn’t attack, nor did Liu Zhen. Liu Zhen was an Earth Monarch while Wang Da was a Teleportation Stage cultivator. Their enemies were only at the Soul Fusion Stage, so there was no need for them to attack.

Meanwhile, Zhao Hai and his group joined the fight. Although Zhao Hai and the others didn’t use their full strength, their combat prowess was still formidable. Needless to say, Zhao Hai only used a tenth of his strength. Meanwhile, Ma Long and Liu Cai weren’t simple people. They were rogue cultivators that became disciples of the Battle Corpse Sect, this was enough proof of their ability. Therefore, when the three made their move, the attackers immediately suffered heavy losses.

The strength of the three naturally attracted the attention of the Blood Knife Gang and the masked men. Wang Dan and Liu Zhen’s faces showed a surprised expression when they saw Zhao Hai and the others. It must be known that Zhao Hai and the others were only at the Soul Fusion Stage, but the fighting strength they showed was beyond their level.

Seeing Zhao Hai and the others killing another three Soul Fusion cultivators, Wang Da couldn’t help but turn to Liu Zhen and said, “It’s been a few days since you met them. Did you investigate their background?”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “I made a thorough investigation. They belong to a declining cultivator clan. The reason they came out was to get money and resources for their clan. Because of this, they are focused on going to Demonheart City and don’t want to stay in Split River City.”

Wang Da nodded, “Their combat strength isn’t weak. I could see that they are experienced combatants. If they’re placed in those sects, they would have been popular a long time ago. They want to find an opportunity in Demonheart City, maybe even join the Forbidden Path Sect. You did a good job. No matter what, befriending them will be very beneficial to the Blood Knife Gang.”

Liu Zhen nodded, “It seems like I made the right decision to befriend them. Although they didn’t join our Blood Knife Gang, they already gave us a lot of help. As long as we have a connection to them, our gang will benefit if they develop in the future.” 𝖗ÀŊỒ𝔟Ɛş

Wang Da smiled faintly and said, “You’re thinking too far. But that’s also good. You’ve learned a lot, not like before. Haha. Oh, someone is coming. Let’s see who wants to attack our Blood Knife Gang.

Liu Zhen also felt a few strong cultivators heading over. The killing aura on Liu Zhen’s face intensified even more. Wang Dan also tightened his grip on his blood knife.

Before long, large numbers of cultivators appeared in the forest. Although their clothes varied, their faces were all covered. Most importantly, each of them had formidable strength. All of them were Earth Monarchs, and there were 30 of them.

The Blood Knife Gang only had around 20 Earth Monarchs. If they were competing on numbers alone, the Blood Knife would be at a disadvantage.

However, in addition to its domineering strength, the reason the Blood Knife Gang could dominate Split River City was because they have a fierce spirit that the other gangs didn’t have. The members of the Blood Knife Gang rarely retreated without a fight. Even if they knew that they could be defeated, they would fight to the death.

Because of this, instead of retreating, the Earth Monarchs of the Blood Knife Gang roared and attacked. Liu Zhen also made his move and killed his way towards the masked attackers. Only Wang Da was left behind. Wang Da wants to see if the other party has a Teleportation Stage expert. If there were, then he would make a move.

The two sides quickly clashed. Although the Blood Knife Gang suffered from numerical disadvantage, their dauntless spirit suppressed the other party. The masked attackers immediately found that they were forced into a stalemate.

At this time, another group of cultivators appeared from the forest. All of them were from the Blood Knife Gang, but this group was mostly wounded. They were the Blood Knife Gang members who were escorting the caravan. They haven’t been wiped out and managed to survive.

The Blood Knife Gang members fought their way through the forest, so their eyes were red with killing intent. Along with their arrival, another group of masked individuals also joined the fight.

Naturally, these people were those who surrounded the caravan. In other words, the battle didn’t stop, they just joined the two battles into one.

With the arrival of these cultivators, the disadvantage of the Blood Knife Gang grew even more. However, Wang Da still didn’t move. He even hid himself to see if more people would arrive.

Others might be unaware, but Zhao Hai was well aware that nobody else was coming. These cultivators were the only people attacking the Blood Knife Gang. Although the Blood Knife Gang didn’t send as many people to help, they still numbered around 200. With the enemy only around 300, the attackers didn’t have enough numbers to completely overwhelm the Blood Knife Gang.

chapters.title: Chapter 2219: Small Pool
chapters.body:
Chapter 2219: Small Pool

The battle continued for an hour. The two sides already suffered some casualties, but Wang Da still didn’t move. The losses of the Blood Knife Gang were still within his estimates. As an old ghost, Wang Da knows that he couldn’t make a move without figuring out the opponent’s cards. Therefore, he didn’t rush to finish the fight.

Zhao Hai was also unworried. Although the Blood Knife Gang suffered some losses, the other party lost a lot more. The Blood Knife Gang’s relentless spirit caught their enemy off-guard.

However, Zhao Hai was aware that the Blood Knife Gang couldn’t keep this situation going for long. The more spiritual qi was consumed, the more casualties appeared, the relentless spirit of the cultivators would begin to wane. When that time comes, Wang Da would be forced to move.

Zhao Hai was also aware as to why Wang Da hasn’t made a move. Wang Da was afraid that the enemy still had cards to play.

The battle continued on. As Zhao Hai thought, as they suffered more losses, the Blood Knife Gang began to feel the pressure of being outnumbered.

Wang Da also saw this and knew that he had to make a move. If he didn’t, the gang’s foundation would be irreparably damaged.

Wang Da was a decisive person. The moment he made up his mind, he immediately moved. He roared and raised his blood knife towards a nearby masked cultivator.

Although the masked cultivator was an Earth Monarch, he didn’t think that there was someone hiding in the forest. Moreover, that hidden person was at the Teleportation Stage. The most hateful thing was that this Teleportation Stage cultivator resorted to a sneak attack. The masked cultivator didn’t even have a chance to escape before he was killed by Wang Da’s blood knife.

Wang Da didn’t stop and continued to swing his knife, carving his way through the masked men. The masked attackers did not expect that there was still someone who didn’t attack. Moreover, he was a powerful expert. As they were processing what happened, Wang Da already beheaded several people.

When the masked cultivators saw that Wang Da was a Teleportation Stage expert, their expressions changed. With such an expert joining the battle, the scales of victory were beginning to tilt.

After Wang Da cut down the tenth Earth Monarch, the masked cultivators finally couldn’t hold on. They already suffered a lot of casualties from the Blood Knife Gang’s relentless spirit. And with Wang Da killing so many Earth Monarchs, the masked attackers began fleeing the battle.

The cultivators from the Blood Knife Gang wanted to chase the masked cultivators but they were stopped by Wang Da, “Don’t pursue. Go around and see who died.” The members of the Blood Knife Gang complied. The injured immediately began to tend to their wounds. Those who were fine went around to the corpses to see if they could find any clues.

Liu Zhen’s left arm was injured, but he still looked through the corpses to see who attacked the Blood Knife Gang.

Liu Zhen walked towards a corpse of an Earth Monarch and removed their mask. When he saw the Earth Monarch’s face, Liu Zhen’s expression changed. He immediately turned towards Wang Da and said, “Gang Master, it’s Plum Sword Li Zifeng.”

When Wang Da heard this, he couldn’t help but stare. Then his complexion changed. He walked towards Liu Zhen’s side and looked down at the corpse. Seeing the face behind the mask, Wang Da’s expression turned worse. Then he said, “Go identify the others.”

Liu Zhen complied and looked at the other remains. Then they heard another person’s report, “Gang Master, I recognize this person. It’s Iron Lock Heng Chun.”

Wang Da’s expression became uglier. As more and more masked cultivators were identified, Wang Da’s face became worse. The expressions of the others weren’t any better.

Zhao Hai looked at everyone’s expressions and couldn’t help but be confused. Even if they recognize these people, their reaction shouldn’t be as bad as this.

However, Zhao Hai didn’t ask. It obviously wasn’t the time to ask questions. But judging by everyone’s reaction, it wasn’t good news for the Blood Knife Gang. ṘÂℕօ𝔟Ès̈

After a while, Wang Da said, “Alright, take everything valuable on their bodies and bury them.” The cultivators from the Blood Knife Gang immediately complied.

At this time, Jiang Tian appeared beside Wang Da and said, “Gang Master, let’s head back to the camp first and rest. The bodies of our brothers are still there. We have to take care of them.”

Wang Da nodded, “Take good care of our fallen brothers and bury them well. They served our Blood Knife Gang until the very end.”

At the same time, Liu Zhen appeared beside Zhao Hai and said, “Good Brother, we can’t thank you enough. If it weren’t for you, our Blood Knife Gang would have suffered big losses.”

Zhao Hai waved his hand and said, “Brother Liu is too polite. Right, judging by your reactions, you found out who attacked. Are they powerful?”

Liu Zhen smiled bitterly and said, “They’re not, but the ones behind them are troublesome. They all belong to the other gangs in Split River City. This time, the three major gangs of Split River City joined up to attack us.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai’s expression changed. He immediately replied, “So it’s this. Brother Liu, I reckon the three gangs already know of the outcome of the battle. I’m afraid the members of the Blood Knife Gang still in the city are in trouble.”

Liu Zhen coldly snorted and said, “They might attack if it was before, but they won’t dare to do that right now. The Gang Leader has broken through to the Teleportation Stage. Now, among the four major gangs, only the Blood Knife Gang has a Teleportation Stage Expert.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai stared for a moment before he nodded and said, “I see. That’s good.” At this time, Jiang Tian had already finished collecting the corpses of the Blood Knife Gang members.

It didn’t take long for the group to return to the caravan. The beasts pulling the carriages have long since died from the ambush. On the other hand, because they were made from good materials, the carriages were fine. Jiang Tian and the others began to clean the camp. Although there was still the smell of blood as well as traces of battle, the camp was made clean.

The group lit a few campfires and then sat down. Despite their success at repelling the attackers, everyone’s expressions weren’t good to look at. It was clear that the move made by the other three gangs had weighed heavily on everyone.

Zhao Hai, Ma Long and Liu Cai sat quietly on the side separate from the Blood Knife Gang members. At this time, Wang Da, Liu Zhen, and the others were having a discussion. All of their expressions aren’t good.

After looking at Wang Da and the others, Zhao Hai turned to Ma Long and Liu Cai and said, “It seems like the Blood Knife Gang is in great trouble. Even if Wang Da broke through to the Teleportation stage, they are still at a numerical disadvantage. It’s impossible for Wang Da to deal with three gangs on his own. However, the three gangs will have to think deeply before attacking the Blood Knife Gang.”

Ma Long nodded and said, “Split River City wouldn’t be peaceful for quite some time. From what I can see, this matter wouldn’t end cleanly.”

Liu Cai smiled faintly and said, “This has nothing to do with us. In my opinion, we should head to Demonheart City as soon as possible. Junior Brother Zhao, what are your plans once we arrive?”

Zhao Hai looked around him and then said, “We’ll go one step at a time. I’m sure we can earn more in Demonheart City compared to anywhere else. Moreover, it’s very close to the Forbidden Path Sect. If we can join the sect, our clan will benefit even more.” As he said that, Zhao Hai’s eyes kept looking left and right.

Ma Long and Liu Cai understood Zhao Hai’s message. They were surrounded by the Blood Knife Gang, they would get in trouble if they were careless with their words.

However, Zhao Hai also replied to the question. He said that they could earn more in Demonheart City, which meant that they could get more news there compared to Split River City. Ma Long and Liu Cai understood Zhao Hai’s words and nodded without saying anything else.

At this time, Wang Da was talking to Liu Zhen, “The three gangs are now going after us. It will be harder for our gang to stay in Split River City in the future. Although we can survive with me in charge, our benefits will only get smaller and smaller in the future.”

When Liu Zhen heard Wang Da, he couldn’t help but stare. He looked at Wang Da and said, “Gang Master, what do you mean?”

Wang Da replied, “Split River City is too small.”

As soon as he heard Wang Da, Liu Zhen and the others were stunned. Then their expressions spiked up. Wang Da was now a Teleportation Stage Expert. No matter where they are in the True Spirit Realm, Teleportation Stage experts are considered as small hegemons. With Wang Da’s promotion, his ambitions grew as well. He feels like a small pond like Split River City could no longer accommodate him. Wang Da wants to go to a bigger place.

To be honest, Wang Da’s decision was more beneficial for Liu Zhen. Although moving to a bigger city meant bigger risks, it also translated to bigger income and more opportunities. This was something that all cultivators wanted.

Liu Zhen looked at Wang Da and said, “What are Gang Master’s plans? Where do you plan to move?”

Wang Da turned to Zhao Hai and the others and then said, “Demonheart City is a good choice. Moreover, if we go to Demonheart City, maybe Zhao Ling’s group will want to join us. You have seen their strength. If we let them go, my ancestors will surely punish me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2220: Joining The Blood Knife Gang
chapters.body:
Chapter 2220: Joining The Blood Knife Gang

When he heard Wang Da, Liu Zhen couldn’t help but stare, then his face quickly lit up. He looked at Wang Da and said, “Gang Master, you want to invite Zhao Ling’s group to the Blood Knife Gang? That’s great! Zhao Ling and the others don’t look too old. If they join the Blood Knife Gang, we can nurture them for a few years, and they will certainly become Earth Monarchs. Maybe they can become Teleportation Stage experts in the future. When that time comes, no matter which city we choose, we will be able to create a foothold.”

Wang Da looked at Liu Zhen and smiled, “You really place a very high price on them. Why are you so optimistic about Zhao Ling’s group?”

Liu Zhen shook his head and said, “I don’t favor Zhao Ling’s group, only Zhao Ling. Although the talent of the other two is pretty good and they have the capability to reach the Teleportation Stage, it would be hard for them to reach further. On the other hand, I can’t see through Zhao Ling. I’m certain of his talent, but I always feel that the strength he could display can be higher. Every time I go near him, I always feel a sense of danger. And that is when he’s not hostile towards me. I would rather become the enemy of the other two than be Zhao Ling’s enemy.”

When Wang Da heard this, he couldn’t help but stare. He looked at Liu Zhen and asked, “You’re an Earth Monarch. You’re one level higher than Zhao Ling. How can he make you feel danger? Impossible.”

Liu Zhen smiled bitterly and said, “Aren’t there cultivators that can kill above their levels? Gang Master knows that my sense of danger is stronger than other people. This is the reason I survived multiple battles and reached my current level. To be honest, even as I stand beside you, I don’t feel the same danger that I felt when I’m next to Zhao Ling. This is also the reason why I’m so polite to Zhao Ling.”

Hearing this, Wang Da stared. His complexion changed as he asked, “So you’re saying that Zhao Ling isn’t using his full power? Why would he hide his strength?”

Liu Zhen shook his head and said, “I have seen Zhao Ling fight, he is still in the Soul Fusion stage. But his situation is special. If my guess is right, Zhao Ling has aces he didn’t use. His strength is definitely not simple.”

Wang Da nodded, then he said, “This means we cannot give up on Zhao Ling even more. It’s just right that we have goods to deliver to Demonheart City. Go follow the caravan and then stay in Demonheart City. Choose a good place there for our gang to move in. The location isn’t important.”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Yes, Gang Master.”

Wang Da gave a nod and said, “Go and invite Zhao Ling over. I must thank him properly. Without him, our Blood Knife Gang would have suffered big losses.”

Liu Zhen complied and stood up to walk towards Zhao Hai and the others. At this time, Jiang Tian said, “Gang Master, Hall Master, I have something to report.”

Liu Zhen and Wang Da looked at Jiang Tian in confusion. Jiang Tian was an old member of the gang. He wasn’t as polite as this in the past.

Wang Da looked at Jiang Tian and said, “What’s the matter? Tell me.”

Jiang Tian had an awkward expression as he said, “Gang Master, Hall Master, we may have offended Mister Zhao Ling. Before we were attacked, Mister Zhao Ling gave us a warning. However, we didn’t trust him at that time. Instead, I ignored his words……”

When Wang Da and Liu Zhen heard Jiang Tian, their complexion changed. There was no need to mention how bad Liu Zhen’s expression became as he said, “Didn’t I tell you before you left that you shouldn’t offend Zhao Ling? It turns out you didn’t listen. Fortunately, Zhao Ling doesn’t seem to be angry. Otherwise, he wouldn’t have sent us a message. Forget it, I’ll go talk to him.” After that, Liu Zhen huffed at Jiang Tian before standing up and walking towards Zhao Hai and the others.

Seeing Liu Zhen walking towards him, Zhao Hai immediately stood up to meet him. Liu Zhen cupped his fist and said, “Good Brother, let me apologize. There were some things that we needed to discuss. I hope you didn’t feel ignored.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “Brother Liu is too polite. The gang’s matter is more important.”

Liu Zhen nodded, then he smiled bitterly and said, “Also, I heard that Jiang Tian has shown you some disrespect. I hope you’re not offended.”

Zhao Hai chuckled and said, “That matter is already in the past. It no longer matters. After all, I’m still a stranger, I can understand. Brother Liu, come sit, let’s talk.”

Liu Zhen waved his hand and said, “Let’s leave that for later. The Gang Master wants you to come over. He wants to talk to you in person.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai quickly stood up and said, “So it’s the Gang Master. Let’s go.” Then the two walked towards Wang Da.

When the two arrived, Wang Da stood up and welcomed Zhao Hai personally. Zhao Hai hastily cupped his fist and said, “I have seen the Gang Master. This Zhao Ling doesn’t dare receive Gang Master’s welcome. I’m not worthy.”

Wang Da laughed and said, “Little Friend is too polite. You have given great kindness to my Blood Knife Gang. It’s just right for me to give my gratitude. Come, have a seat.” After cupping his fist towards Wang Da once more, Zhao complied and sat down.

Wang Da looked at Zhao Hai and smiled faintly before saying, “I don’t know if Little Friend already knows, but our Blood Knife Gang is preparing to move.”

Zhao Hai stared; he couldn’t understand what Wang Da was hinting at. So, he looked at Wang Da and asked, “Gang Master is planning to move? Because of the other three gangs? But with Gang Master’s strength, there’s no need for you to be afraid of them.”

Wang Da coldly snorted and said, “I don’t care about those three gangs. Nevertheless, the Blood Knife Gang needs to move. Split River City is too small. It will limit the Blood Knife Gang’s growth. Therefore, I plan to move.”

Hearing Wang Da, Zhao Hai could finally get an idea about Wang Da’s plan. He nodded and said, “I see. If the Gang Master doesn’t mind me asking, where do you plan to move?”

Wang Da smiled and said, “Demonheart City sounds good. What do you think?”

Upon hearing Wang Da, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare. Then he immediately understood. He replied, “So Gang Master plans to move to Demonheart City. Good. This is good news.” 𝐫𝐚ŊоʙĘṦ

Wang Da looked at Zhao Hai and asked, “Little Friend, do you want to join the Blood Knife Gang?”

When Zhao Hai heard that Wang Da wants to move to Demonheart City, he immediately knew what Wang Da was going to say. Zhao Hai hesitated and said, “If the Gang Master insists, then us three brothers will join the Blood Knife Gang. However, I have some words to say to the Gang Master. Is that fine?”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Wang Da stared, then he said, “Tell me.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Gang Master, I have seen what the Blood Knife Gang is like back in Split River City. To be honest, the Blood Knife Gang is too domineering. Although such an approach is good sometimes, it also offends a lot of people. The attack of the three gangs might have something to do with this. If the Gang Master wants to move to Demonheart City, I hope that you can tell the brothers in the gang to hold back on their domineering attitude. Demonheart City is the largest city under the Forbidden Path Sect. The experts there are as common as clouds. If we offend one, it might be the end of the Blood Knife Gang.”

Wang Da didn’t expect Zhao Hai to share an opinion. He wasn’t offended. Conversely, he pondered over Zhao Hai’s words. After a while, he nodded and said, “Alright. I’ll keep your words in mind. I will tell everyone to be more careful.”

Zhao Hai relaxed after hearing Wang Da. Then he cupped his fist and said, “Thank you very much, Gang Master.”

Wang Da laughed and said, “What is there to thank? You’re thinking about the gang’s welfare. Alright, now that you’ve joined the Blood Knife Gang, you need positions. How about joining the Battle Hall first? It’s the Hall Liu Zhen is in charge of.”

Zhao Hai bowed and said, “I’ll follow Gang Master’s orders.”

Wang Da nodded, then he stood up and announced, “Brothers, I have good news. From now on, Zhao Ling, Ma Long, and Liu Cai are now part of the Blood Knife Gang. We are now brothers who’ll take care of each other.”

The Blood Knife Gang members cheered in agreement. Only Ma long and Liu Cai looked dazed. They didn’t think Zhao Hai would join the Blood Knife Gang. But they were only stunned, they didn’t show any other emotion.

Ma Long and Liu Cai knew that Zhao Hai must have his reasons for joining the Blood Knife Gang. And with Wei Tian making Zhao Hai the group leader, the two didn’t have any problems with the decision.

Wang Da waved his hand, quieting everyone down. Then his face turned serious as he said, “Our Blood Knife Gang will have to find a new home. Split River City is too small. It can no longer accommodate the Blood Knife Gang. Therefore, I’m planning to move to Demonheart City. Liu Zhen will lead 100 people to escort the caravan to the city and to prepare a place for us in the city. The rest will come back with me to Split River City. We will tie loose ends before leaving.”

Boom!

The news about Zhao Hai was less explosive compared to this one. As soon as they heard this, all members of the Blood Knife Gang were stunned. However, most of them were excited. After all, a bigger city has more opportunities.”

At this time, Zhao Hai returned to Ma Long and Liu Cai’s side. Ma Long and Liu Cai looked at Zhao Hai with a confused expression. Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and whispered, “Our performance during the battle has moved Wang Da. If I declined, I’m afraid we would live a very hard life. After all, the Blood Knife Gang is also moving to Demonheart City. But this is also good. We are just here to gather information. Now that we’re part of the Blood Knife Gang, nobody will suspect our identity.”

Zhao Hai said the last few sentences through voice transmission. By the end, Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded.

When the members of the Blood Knife Gang finally digested the fact that they were moving, Wang Da arranged who would head to Demonheart City with Liu Zhen and those who would return to Split River City. Naturally, Zhao Hai and the others belonged to the group heading to Demonheart City.

After taking care of the groups, Wang Da returned to Split River City using a portable transmission formation. Meanwhile, Liu Zhen and his 100 men remained.

Once Wang Da’s group left, Liu Zhen went to Zhao Hai and smiled, “I knew we would be brothers sooner or later. Good brother, now that you are part of the Blood Knife Gang, you can call me Big Brother in the future.

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, Big Brother Liu, you’re too polite to me. I’m just a Soul Fusion cultivator. I’ll do whatever you need. How can I not contribute now that I’m a member of the Blood Knife Gang?”

Liu Zhen patted Zhao Hai’s shoulder and said, “Brother, I’m not saying empty words. I know that you have cards you haven’t yet played. Although you are in the Soul Fusion Stage, if you go all out, I might not be your opponent. Don’t deny it. Brother, I trust my instincts. But that’s also good. The stronger you are, the happier I will be.”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly but didn’t say anything. He continued to act low-key, but he didn’t expect Liu Zhen to sniff something out. Zhao Hai now understood why Wang Da wanted him to join the Blood Knife Gang. Liu Zhen must have told him something.

Seeing that Zhao Hai didn’t deny it, Liu Zhen laughed. Then he looked at the weather and said, “Brother, sleep well. We will need to rush tomorrow. I hope that our road ahead will be peaceful.” Zhao Hai complied and then walked to the side. He took out a piece of beast skin and spread it on the ground. The other cultivators from the Blood Knife Gang were similar to him. They also took out beast skins and laid them on the ground. None of them put up any tents to sleep inside.

The night passed peacefully. But since they slept in the middle of the night, they weren’t able to sleep for long. Once dawn arrived, everyone reorganized the caravan. Since the animals were dead, people were pushing the carriages along the road.

Fortunately, before noon, the support from the Blood Knife Gang arrived. The reinforcements carried beast bags with them. After handing the beast bags over, they immediately returned to Split River City.

chapters.title: Chapter 2221: Demonheart City
chapters.body:
Chapter 2221: Demonheart City

Split River City’s current situation has become chaotic. After knowing that Wang Da has become a Teleportation Stage Expert, the three major gangs immediately became honest. At the same time, they became fully on guard. They were afraid of Wang Da’s retaliation.

However, Wang Da didn’t retaliate. Although Wang Da has broken through to the Teleportation Stage, he knew very well that he couldn’t eliminate the three major gangs of Split River City. If he tried, he might even suffer fatal injuries. Right now, the only thing in Wang Da’s mind was Demonheart City. He no longer cared about his grievances against the three major gangs.

Wang Da’s indifference made the three major gangs even more worried. They didn’t know what Wang Da was planning. Artes Wang Da returned to Split River City, he rounded up every member of the Blood Knife Gang and gathered everyone in the gang’s main hall. Then the gates of the Blood Knife Gang were closed tightly. Nobody knew what was going on inside.

Liu Zhen had long known about the situation. He understood Wang Da’s thought process. Wang Da’s mind was no longer in Split River City. Therefore, the gang’s grievances could only be pushed aside. Wang Da wouldn’t allow their grievances to ruin his plans.

Liu Zhen and the others hitched the beasts they obtained from the gang to the carriages and resumed their travel. The road wasn’t completely foreign to Liu Zhen. He has done several missions to Demonheart City in the past.

Thor time, the caravan didn’t experience any attack. Ten Days later, Zhao Hai and the others finally spotted a big city from afar.

The city was truly big. From the distance, Zhao Hai could see the seemingly endless city wall. The city was built on a mountain, making the walls look like a dragon coiling around it.

Although Zhao Hai has seen the Great Wall of China, he still couldn’t help but marvel at Demonheart City’s walls.

Liu Zhen stood beside Zhao Hai and said, “Surprised? The first time I saw Demonheart City, I couldn’t help but be stunned by its walls. There are even more surprising things inside the city. Did you know? Demonheart City were built by the Forbidden Path Sect’s disciples by hand. Every single block used to make the wall was mined and carried by the sect’s disciples.”

Liu Zhen’s trivia surprised Zhao Hai. He looked at Liu Zhen and said, “The city was built by the disciples of the Forbidden Path Sect? How is that possible?”

Liu Zhen smiled faintly and said, “It’s true. The Forbidden Path Sect focuses on body cultivation. Their body cultivation method is top class. Quarrying and transporting the stones could help refine their bodies. Slowly, they were able to make Demonheart City into what it is right now.”

After that Liu Zhen sighed and said, “Actually, Demonheart City has been expanded many times before. You will see this once we enter. Demonheart City is a city within a city within a city. The entire city is composed of five Demonheart Cities. The inner city is the city center. Not only does it hold the sector’s biggest branch hall, it also has innumerable gangs inside. These gangs have a complicated relationship with each other. But in the end, all of them are subordinates of the Forbidden Path Sect.”

Speaking of this, Liu Zhen let out a long breath and said, “Although there are a lot of gangs, even the weakest of them could destroy the Blood Knife Gang. This makes it impossible for us to settle in the inner city. It’s already good if we can find a place in the outer city. The outer city is very chaotic, but this also means that the rent is cheaper. Since the outer wall has just been built, there are still a lot of empty spaces. As long as we register and pay a fee to the Forbidden Path Sect, we can get the rights to use a portion of land and build our base. Of course, we can build the base ourselves or have someone build it for us at a higher cost.”

Upon heaping Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai stared. Then he looked at Liu Zhen and said, “We aren’t settling in the inner city? Can we still go there? Otherwise, where can we get missions? Do missions get issued in the outer city?”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “We can still go to the inner city, nobody will stop us. Moreover, there are many shops in the inner city. But the items sold in the inner city aren’t cheap. If you have something to buy, do it in the third city. There is a huge trading market there. More importantly, setting up a store there is free. It’s a paradise for cultivators.”

Zhao Hai nodded. He looked at the grand city in the distance as he internalized Liu Zhen’s words.

At this moment, Liu Zhen said, “We’re transporting our goods to the Abundance Hall in the second city. After handing over the goods, we can go about our business.”

As the caravan continued towards Demonheart City, the roads became more and more crowded. Carriages of all sizes were being pulled by all kinds of beasts. Everyone was focused on heading towards the city. Nobody cared about Zhao Hai and the others.

As he swept his gaze at the people on the road, Liu Zhen whispered to Zhao Hai, “Don’t stare at anyone. It’s not worth offending anyone for no reason. You don’t have to worry about being attacked. We’re already close to Demonheart City, petty thievery basically doesn’t exist in this region. If anyone dared to commit any crime here, they would face the wrath of the Forbidden Path Sect.”

Zhao Hai nodded. However, he still used his peripheral vision to look left and right. As they got closer and closer to Demonheart City, more and more caravans began to occupy the road. Compared to other caravans, the Blood Knife Gang’s 20-carriage caravan could only be considered as a small one.

Before long, Zhao Hai and the others arrived at the foot of Demonheart City. Seeing the city walls up close, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but be stunned. He didn’t expect the city wall to be so high. From his estimations, the city walls should be around a hundred meters tall.

Gawking at the highest walls he has seen, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh. Liu Zhen smiled at Zhao Hai’s reaction before commanding the caravan to enter the city.

Zhao Hai followed the caravan to enter the city. Upon entering the gates, Zhao Hai immediately understood how the walls could be built very high. This was because the walls were 40 meters thick. With a 40 meter thick foundation one could definitely build a wall a hundred meters high.

After passing through the long entryway, Zhao Hai and the others have officially entered Demonheart City. The city was very lively. The streets were very wide and there were shops everywhere. Cultivators were everywhere. Surprisingly there were no mortals in sight.

With Demonheart City’s scale, it should have at least several million residents. If all the residents were cultivators, then does this mean that Demonheart City has several million cultivators? Such numbers are terrifying. ṝÅꞐɵβЁ𝐒

However, Zhao Hai was able to discover the issue. Besides the main street, there seems to be a lot of vacant lots. Even the plots right behind the main street shops were empty.

Seeing this, Zhao Hai understood why Liu Zhen said that building their headquarters in the fifth city was very easy.

Liu Zhen looked around and sighed, “Demonheart City’s charm is really something. The number of people here has increased since the last time I came.”

Zhao Hai nodded but didn’t say anything. Then Liu Zhen added, “Last time I came here, the Outer City didn’t have a Mission Hall. I don’t know if one has been built since then. If there’s no Mission Hall, we can only go to the fourth city to take missions.”

Zhao Hai raised his brows and asked, “Is there a requirement for a Mission Hall to be built?”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “There are. Firstly, a certain population needs to be met. Unless a city has 100 thousand cultivators, a Mission Hall will not be built.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “So it’s like that. But from what I can see, reaching a population of 100 thousand should be easy.”

Liu Zhen forced a smile and said, “It’s not that easy. It hasn’t been a long time since the fifth city has been built. The people you see here might not be residents. People would rather spend more money and live in the fourth city, third city, or even the second city. This way, they can get missions faster, and they will also have more access to cultivation materials.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “That is also good. This only means that the Blood Knife Gang could build a larger building in the fifth city. I believe that it wouldn’t be long before people begin snatching up the fifth city’s plots.”

Liu Zhen nodded, “That’s right. Me and the Gang Master have the same thoughts. The Gang Master specifically said that he’d rather live in the outer city if we could build a larger residence. The Gang Master’s ambition isn’t small. Once we hand the goods in, we’ll look for a good spot for us to live in.”

However, Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “Brother Liu, if it were up to me, I would rather choose a bad spot. It doesn’t matter if it’s far from the main street, as long as it’s big.”

Liu Zhen gave Zhao Hai a puzzled look as he said, “What do you mean? Why wouldn’t you choose a good place?”

chapters.title: Chapter 2222: Choosing A Location
chapters.body:
Chapter 2222: Choosing A Location

Zhao Hai replied, “Right now, it doesn’t matter if we get a good place or not. Our Blood Knife Gang’s name might be resounding in Split River City, but we aren’t much in Demonheart City.”

Liu Zhen nodded, he didn’t dispute Zhao Hai’s words. The Blood Knife Gang might be able to dominate in Split River City, but in Demonheart City, they are still small fries.

Zhao Hai continued, “Judging from Demonheart City’s situation, it won’t be long before people come and live in the outer city. Once more people come, all kinds of forces would follow. If we chose a good spot, we would only attract unnecessary trouble. What will we do if we are confronted by people we can’t offend? Do we hand our building over? If we are forced to hand it over, all of our hard work will go up in smoke. Moreover, the Blood Knife Gang’s reputation will be tainted.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Liu Zhen couldn’t help but stare. His expression showed understanding as he said, “You mean not only should we look for a not so good place, but it should also be out of sight?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “At the very least, the spot we choose shouldn’t be within the choices of the powerful forces. Then, the gangs that would choose our spot wouldn’t be much stronger than us.”

Liu Zhen hesitated, then he nodded and said, “Alright. There is truth in what you said. But I cannot make a decision on this matter. I’ll relay your thoughts to the Gang Master. He’ll make the final decision.” Zhao Hai nodded and no longer said anything.

At this time, the caravan has crossed the fifth city and entered the fourth city. Upon entering the fourth city, Zhao Hai immediately noticed the increase of cultivators on the road. It was also obvious that there were more goods displayed in the shops.

Despite entering the fourth city, the Blood Knife Gang’s caravan didn’t stop. They continued on and entered the third city. As soon as they entered the third city, Zhao Hai was stunned. He could rarely see shops in the third city. Instead, there were huge squares everywhere. Countless cultivators set up their own stalls in these squares and sold goods. The whole city looked like a large market with cultivators bargaining and advertising their goods.

Liu Zhen still didn’t stop. The caravan continued on until they reached the second city. The second city was very different compared to the third city. The second city was very quiet, and the number of cultivators wasn’t large. However, the cultivators in the second city were noticeably more well-dressed than the cultivators in the third city.

Looking at the people around him, Liu Zhen said, “The formidable gangs live in the second city. Of course, there are also independent cultivators living here. However, those independent cultivators are all in the Teleportation Stage. This makes the second city much stronger compared to the cities before.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “I can see from their appearance that they’re living pretty well.”

Liu Zhen nodded, “That’s right. People from other cities go to the second or the first city to buy things, but they rarely stay here for too long. Because of the difference in strength, they are afraid of accidentally offending anyone here.”

Zhao Hai nodded. At this time, Liu Zhen stopped in front of a store. Zhao Hai looked at the shop and saw that it was a five-storey building that occupied a moderately-sized plot of land. A signboard was hung outside that read ‘Abundance Hall’. From the aura coming out of the signboard, it was clear that it was made by a master. Sensing the pressure from the characters, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but be surprised.

When the carriage stopped in front of the Abundance Hall, an attendant immediately came out and greeted Liu Zhen, “I didn’t expect Hall Master Liu to deliver the goods personally. Hall Master, please lead the caravan to the back. Someone will meet you there.”

Liu Zhen cupped his fist and said, “Thank you, Brother Lin. If you have time, I’ll invite you over for a drink.”

Brother Lin smiled faintly and said, “Hall Master Liu is too polite. I’ve been very busy these days, so I’ll have to politely decline. But once I’m free, I’ll definitely take your offer.”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “Then that’s settled. I’ll go deliver the goods first.” Then he cupped his first towards the attendant once more.

The processing or the delivery was very smooth. The carriages didn’t belong to the Blood Knife Gang, so once the receivers confirmed that the carriages hadn’t been tampered with, they immediately closed the task. This mission earned the Blood Knife Gang 10 thousand jade essences.

Ten thousand essences might sound a lot, but it wasn’t much in Zhao Hai’s opinion. One must know that the Blood Knife Gang sent around a hundred people to complete the task. Therefore, on average, each person only got a hundred jade essences. Earning 100 jade essences in 15 days wasn’t a worth transaction in Zhao Hai’s mind.

After completing the mission and getting the reward, Liu Zhen led Zhao Hai and the others out of the second city and returned to the fifth city. Constructing the gang’s headquarters in the fifth city was an important matter, naturally they didn’t dare to slack off at all.

Upon arriving at the fifth city, they first looked for a place to temporarily stay in. There weren’t a lot of inns in the fifth city. Moreover, the accommodations were quite ordinary. But for Zhao Hai and the others, it was enough.

After settling down, Liu Zhen didn’t immediately go out to choose a place. Instead, he took his communicator out and contacted Wang Da.

Wang Da was handling the move, so when he saw Liu Zhen calling him, he immediately answered, “Zhen, did something happen?”

Liu Zhen shook his head and said, “There’s nothing wrong. Gang Master has nothing to worry about. However, I have something I need your advice on.”

Wang Da raised his brows and said, “What is it? Tell me.”

Liu Zhen nodded and explained what Zhao Hai said. He also mentioned that the idea came from Zhao Hai.

Hearing this, Wang Da frowned. He thought about it for some time before saying, “Zhao Ling is right. We should choose a place that isn’t too eye-catching. Although I have reached the Teleportation Stage, my strength can’t reach far in Demonheart City. There are too many powers and people we can’t offend. If we choose a good location, it might cause us trouble in the future. Go choose a remote place, but make sure that it is big.”

Hearing Wang Da, Liu Zhen immediately complied. After putting the communicator down, he turned to Zhao Hai and said, “The Gang Master has agreed to your suggestion. It seems like the Gang Master really trusts you.” 𝖗ἈNỌ฿ÊŞ

Zhao Hai smiled, “Thanks for the auspicious words, Big Brother Liu.”

Liu Zhen laughed and then led Zhao Hai and the others out of the inn.

Demonheart City was truly big. Actually, the fifth city already has a large population. But because of its size, the city looked empty.

Liu Zhen and the others went around the fifth city a few times and looked at a lot of potential locations. However, Liu Zhen was still unsatisfied. What surprised Zhao Hai was that although the fifth city was sparsely populated, plenty of the good locations have already been taken. Boundary stones have been seen on some plots, which meant that they were already owned.

After looking around for one hour, the group finally found a remote location in the fifth city. It was near the walls, but it was in a remote corner. There were no boundary stones in the area, making it quite desolate.

Liu Zhen gave a satisfied nod after looking around. The place was around a hundred mu, enough to build the Blood knife Gang’s Main Hall.

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Let’s pick this place.”

Zhao Hai also nodded, “This place is good. Brother Liu, we should go find someone from the Forbidden Path Sect. Let’s book this place down first.”

Liu Zhen nodded, then he turned to the others and said, “Ten of you come with me and the rest follow Zhao Ling.” Everyone nodded. Then Liu Zhen took ten people and left.

When Liu Zhen left, Ma Ling and Liu Cai went to Zhao Hai. Then Ma Long whispered, “Junior Brother, now that we’re in Demonheart City, should we begin gathering information? What is your plan?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Don’t worry, if we want to gather information in Demonheart City, we only need to go to two kinds of places. The first one is the Mission Halls, and the second one are the inns. Especially those in the third and fourth cities. Let’s not be too anxious, or else we’ll reveal ourselves. Let’s gain a firm foundation in the Blood Knife Gang first.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded. Then Zhao Hai added, “Don’t think about it too much. Go and help everyone. Gain some favor so that we can fit in more.” The two complied and immediately helped the others.

In the past, the Blood Knife Gang had been too domineering. But after what just happened, they restrained their tempers. They were now easier to command.

chapters.title: Chapter 2223: Assigning Tasks
chapters.body:
Chapter 2223: Assigning Tasks

Liu Zhen handled the matter of reserving the land very smoothly. In less than an hour, Liu Zhen was already back to the plot that he chose.

After returning, Liu Zhen found that everything had already been taken care of by Zhao Hai. Liu Zhen was very satisfied with Zhao Hai’s performance.

Seeing Liu Zhen return, Zhao Hai immediately came over and said, “Big Brother Liu, how did it go?”

Liu Zhen smiled faintly and said, “It went smoothly. From now on, this place belongs to the Blood Knife Gang.” Liu Zhen’s voice was quite loud, so the people from the Blood Knife Gang were able to hear him. They immediately cheered. Although the location was very remote, it still meant that they now have a home in Demonheart City.

Liu Zhen waved his hand and said, “Alright. Don’t celebrate too much. Although this place is ours, it’s just an empty land. We still have to build everything ourselves. Everyone will be busy from now on.”

Everyone smiled. Despite Liu Zhen’s words, they were still happy. And they would even be happier once they see their home becoming more and more complete.

At this time, Zhao Hai looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Big Brother Liu, what are we going to build here? Do you have something in mind? Do we ask the Gang Leader about this?”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “The Gang Master already planned everything out. Since it’s better for us to be low-key, it won’t be good if our home is too grand. I think we’ll build it according to the old headquarters of the Blood Knife Gang, only a bit bigger.” Zhao Hai naturally has no problems with this.

Liu Zhen didn’t immediately have everyone begin construction. Instead, everyone returned to the inn. Then Liu Zhen began to allocate tasks to everyone.

It was actually easy for cultivators to build anything. Unlike Forbidden Path Sect’s body cultivators, cultivators can use spiritual qi to mine rocks.

Quarrying and transporting was simple, the difficult part was plotting the building together. The most common method in the True Spirit Realm was using glutinous paste to stick stones together. This not only made strong structures, it was also cheap.

The yield of grain in the True Spirit Realm was very high. Because of this, grain was cheap. This made it cheap to bond stones together using grain pulp and mud.

Naturally, the powerful sects never used this method. What they used was a magical mixture and mud. This not only made a firm structure, it also gave the structure a resistance to spiritual qi.

For small gangs like the Blood Knife Gang, the special mixture was too expensive. It’s impossible for them to use this method.

Building a house was a specialized job. It wasn’t something that anyone can do whenever they want. Most cultivators don’t know how to build a house. If they had time to learn how to build a house, they would have used that time to cultivate.

Fortunately, there are people in the True Spirit Realm who specialize in construction. However, one would need to spend money to hire these people. Moreover, stones weren’t the only materials needed. All kinds of things were required. Because of this, Liu Zhen assigned people to procure the necessary supplies.

As for Zhao Hai, he was tasked to buy glutinous rice. The more he could buy, the better. After all, every construction project would need an astronomical amount of rice.

After the tasks were given, everybody returned to their rooms to prepare. When Zhao Hai entered his room, Ma Long and Liu Cai followed behind him. Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “I’m going to send a message to Master.” The two nodded and returned to their own rooms. At the same time, they became more vigilant, helping Zhao Hai pay attention to the surroundings.

Upon entering his room, Zhao Hai immediately set a formation on the floor. After writing his message on the jade slip, he placed it on the transmission formation and then activated it. ℞άƝŐＢËꞩ

The message from the transmission formation was for Wei Tiande. Since Wei Tiande doesn’t know Zhao Hai’s true identity, he also doesn’t know that Zhao Hai was a space ability user. Therefore, Zhao Hai could only send Wei Tiande a message through transmission formations.

After sending a message to Wei Tiande, Zhao Hai’s figure vanished from his room. The next moment, Zhao Hai appeared in the Tyrant Blade Sect’s residence 52.

Recently, the Tyrant Blade Sect was preparing for a full-out war. The Yin Yang Elders were also very busy. It was quite rare for them to be free. At this time, the Yin Yang Elders were having their rare rest in residence number 52, so Zhao Hai rushed over to meet them.

Seeing Zhao Hai come back, the elders were surprised. The Yin Elder looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Hai, did something happen? Aren’t you in the Forbidden Path Sect’s domain?”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “Nothing happened. I just want to come back to see Masters. I have joined a gang called the Blood Knife Gang. It’s a small gang whose leader is at the Teleportation Stage. The gang just decided to move to Demonheart City and are now building their new headquarters. It will be easier for me to collect information about the Forbidden Path Sect in the future.”

The Yang Elder looked at Zhao Hai and smiled bitterly, “You, really. You said that you’re going to the underground world to investigate, now you’ve been reused and sent to investigate the True Spirit Realm. I really don’t know what to say. Who knows how many identities you will end up with.”

Hearing the Yang Elder, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but laugh, “Master, I don’t have that many identities. I’m a disciple of the Tyrant Blade Sect, a Guest Member of the Long Clan, a True Disciple of the Battle Corpse Sect, and a member of the Blood Knife Gang. It isn’t a lot.”

The Yang Elder smiled bitterly and said, “You. Forget it. You should take care of yourself. The sect is preparing for an all-out war. Since you’re near a well-known sect in the Demonic Alliance, make sure to send us any news regarding the Forbidden Path Sect’s actions.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Master can rest assured, I will send news as soon as I get them.”

The Yin Elder replied, “Is there any movement from the ghost cultivators? Make good use of your identity as a True Disciple of the Battle Corpse Sect. You can’t relax on monitoring them just because you’ve been set to the True Spirit Realm.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “Master, you can rest assured. I have everything under control. I just returned to see the two or you. I’m heading back right away. Masters, take care.”
