The Yin Elder waved his hand and said, “You don’t have to worry about us. It’s you that is in the tiger’s lair. You have to take care of yourself. Alright, you can’t be away for too long.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he cupped his fist towards the two elders before vanishing. Looking at the place Zhao Hai vanished from, the Yin Elder sighed and said, “The kid now has several identities. I feel tired just thinking about it. But this task can only be completed by him.”

The Yang Elder agreed, “We can only depend on him. But no matter what, he’s a disciple of the Tyrant Blade Sect. Once we get an opportunity, let’s promote him to be a core disciple.”

The Yin Elder was stunned for a moment, then he lightly frowned and said, “There’s naturally no problems with promoting Little Hai to the core sect, but he also has an identity as a guest of the Long Clan. His identity is quite sensitive. Even if we agree as well as the sect master, I’m afraid some people will oppose it. After all, core disciples of the Tyrant Blade Sect have never been guest members of outside forces.”

The Yang Elder raised his brow and said, “No matter what, Little Hai needs to become a core disciple. Ask any core disciple of the core sect if they’re willing to become guest elders of the Long Clan in exchange for their core disciple status; almost all of them will agree. They might even be desperate to grab the opportunity.

The Yin Elder sneered, “The Long Clan will just look down on them. I reckon Little Hai doesn’t treat his identity in the Long Clan that seriously. In his heart, he’s still a disciple of the Tyrant Blade Sect.”

The Yang Elder added, “When we have the chance, we should urge Little Hai. Being a guest resident of the Long Clan isn’t a simple status. After all, only the Long Clan has access to the planar passages of the True Spirit Realm. If Little Hai neglects his relationship with the Long Clan, the Long Clan might forget about him. The Long Clan has existed for many years, it has seen all kinds of geniuses. It would be a pity if Little Hai loses the ability to train in the other planes.”

The Yin Elder nodded and said, “The Long Clan wouldn’t foster talents for no reason. You’re right, we should remind Little Hai to pay attention to this matter.”

Although Zhai Hai didn’t know what the Yin Yang Elders were talking about, he didn’t immediately return to Demonheart City. Instead, he went to Coiling Dragon City next.

Zhao Hai directly appeared in front of Long Tian’s courtyard and knocked on the gate. Before long, Long Tian’s voice was heard, “Kid, it’s you. Come in.” Zhao Hai pushed the gate and entered.

Seeing Zhao Hai, Long Tian immediately gestured to him to come over. Then he said, “Kid, you’re back? Did something happen?”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but smile bitterly. Both Long Tian and the Yin Yang Elders asked the same thing when they saw him. Does he only appear when something goes wrong? But Zhao Hai also knows that they were only worried about him. So, he shook his head and said, “No, there’s nothing wrong. I just came back for a moment. At the same time, I want to inform you of the current situation.”

Long Tian waved his hand and invited Zhao Hai to sit down. Then he said, “Back then, you said that you’re in the Forbidden Path Sect and are going to Demonheart City. Did you arrive in Demonheart City?”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Yes, we just arrived today. I also joined the Blood Knife Gang. The gang decided to move to Demonheart City, so I followed.”

Long Tian knit his brows and said, “Why did you join that gang? What if they find out who you are? Fortunately, the Long Clan also has a shop in Demonheart City. If you have time, get in touch with the shopkeeper there. The store’s name is the Abundance Hall. As long as you show them your identity token, they’ll lend a hand.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare, then he smiled bitterly and said, “The world is really small. I didn’t expect the Abundance Hall to belong to the Long Clan. We just delivered goods to the Abundance Hall. I’ll go there when I have time. As for joining the Blood Knife Gang, it’s a rushed matter. I have no choice but to join. Otherwise, my identity will be exposed.”

After that, Zhao Hai explained the situation. Finally, he said, “If I did not agree to join the Blood Knife Gang, Wang Da would certainly deal with me. I could only join in the end.”

Long Tian sighed and said, “Gold will always shine wherever it is. You’re a genius, it’s impossible for other people to let you go. Forget it, joining the Blood Knife Gang would also solidify your disguise. By the way, how come you have time to return?”

Zhao Hai told Long Tian what the Blood Knife Gang was doing. After hearing Zhao Hai, Long Tian frowned and said, “I can understand why the Blood Knife Gang would move to Demonheart City, but I didn’t expect that they would build their own headquarters. That will take a lot of work. Go to Abundance Hall tomorrow. You don’t have to do anything, just tell them that you want to buy glutinous rice. I will do the rest. They will know who you are and will secretly help you.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Alright. Elder, it’s been some time since I was out. I should go back. I’ll inform you if something happens.”

After Long Tian nodded, Zhao Hai disappeared in a flash. The next moment, he returned to his room in Demonheart City.

Just as Zhao Hai returned, the transmission formation on the ground lit up. Zhao Hai immediately knew that it was Wei Tiande’s reply. He took the lade slip on the transmission formation and used his spiritual force to read the contents.

chapters.title: Chapter 2224: Stop Pretending
chapters.body:
Chapter 2224: Stop Pretending

Wei Tiande was very concerned about Zhao Hai’s situation. Every time a report came from the True Spirit Realm, he would immediately respond.

This time, Wei Tiande was more concerned about Zhao Hai’s situation. When he heard that Zhao Hai arrived in Demonheart City, Wei Tiande urged Zhao Hai to be careful.

After replying to Wei Tiande, Zhao Hai received the transmission formation. The message Zhao Hai sent only told Wei Tiande that he doesn’t have to worry.

Once the transmission formation was taken down, Zhao Hai called Ma Long and Liu Cai into his room. Ma Long and Lou Cai were standing guard for Zhao Hai. So, when Zhao Hai called them over, they immediately arrived. They also knew that the information had been transmitted.

Zhao Hai told the two about Wei Tiande’s orders. Actually, it wasn’t anything other than taking care and avoiding their status being discovered by the Forbidden Path Sect.

There was no need for Wei Tiande to remind them to be careful. If the Forbidden Path Sect were to ever find out about their identities, they were finished. For the sake of their survival, they cannot expose their true identities.

The night passed silently. Early the next morning, Zhao Hai took a few people into the inner cities. They inquired around the shop, including the Abundance Hall. After going around, they returned to the Abundance Hall.

The Abundance Hall gave a warm welcome to Zhai Hai and the others, but not enthusiastic enough for other people to be suspicious. They also gave the glutinous rice to Zhao Hai and the others at the base price.

Naturally, Ma Long, Liu Cai, and the others from the Blood Knife Gang didn’t find anything wrong. They were even glad to see that the Abundance Hall was selling the glutinous rice at a price much lower than the other shops.

Once the matter was dealt with, Zhao Hai returned to the inn with Ma Ling and the others. At this moment, Liu Zhen was very busy taking charge of the stone collection. A large number of stoners were transported to the location of the new headquarters. However, a problem soon arose. They can’t build the same way they did in Split River City. The new headquarters needs to be bigger. They also can’t just enlarge the original plans to fit the new requirements.

Actually, Zhao Hai has experience with building in the past. But to make himself as unnoticeable as possible, Zhao Hai didn’t mention it. This caused Liu Zhen to have a headache.

Seeing Zhao Hai return, Liu Zhen immediately called him over. Then he said, “Junior Brother, are you finished on your end?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I’m done. The other party agreed to supply us with glutinous rice. Moreover, they’re selling it to us for a base price. You even know them, it’s the Abundance Hall.”

Upon hearing Zhao Hai, Liu Zhen couldn’t help but stare. He raised his brow and said, “The Abundance Hall sells glutinous rice? I didn’t know. Forget it, it’s good for them to sell glutinous rice to us. By the way, it’s good that you’re back. I talked to the builder, and he said that if we build according to our plans, we will have a lot of space left. What do you think?”

Since we chose this location, we naturally have to use all of it. It would be wasteful if we leave a few open spaces. What did the builder suggest?”

Liu Zhen turned to the person beside him and said, “Call the builder over.” The man immediately nodded and walked away.

While waiting for the builder to arrive, Liu Zhen looked at Zhao Hai and said, “We’re in an awkward position. If we build according to our previous headquarters, there will be a lot of space left. It’s also impossible for us to scale the building up.”

Hearing Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but frown. Then he said, “We can’t enlarge it according to our original plan, but we can expand on certain parts. The training ground, food hall, and other places can have more floor area. We can also build more residential buildings. This will also make everyone live more comfortably. There should be no issues with this right?”

Just as Zhao Hai said that, someone coldly snorted and said, “No issues? I have some issues with that. I can’t build with that design.” Then a cultivator walked in from the outside. What surprised Zhao Hai about this person was that he was young. Moreover, he was still in the Clone Stage. Ŗ𝐀ℕỘ𐌱ÈS̈

Although this person didn’t look strong, he had a proud look on his face. His nose was pointed upwards as he faced Zhao Hai. It was clear that he wasn’t putting Zhao Hai in his eyes.

Zhao Hai looked at the young man and said, “What does Mister mean? Aren’t you a builder?”

When the builder heard Zhao Hai, his expression couldn’t help but change. Then he coldly snorted and said, “Of course I’m a builder. It’s precisely because of this that I can say such things. Do you think you know more about building than me?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “You are the builder, of course you know more than me. I might not know much, but I know that what I just said can be built. If you can’t do it, then get the hell out of here. You are not the only builder in the True Spirit Realm.”

When the builder heard this, his complexion changed, he gave Zhao Hai a cold look as he said, “What do you mean?”

Zhao Hai sneered and said, “What I’m saying is, although you are a builder, you are not the only one. You are merely a Clone Stage cultivator. What are you pretending to be? You better be honest with me. Otherwise, I’ll make you suffer.”

When he heard this, the builder glared at Zhao Hai and said, “Is this your words or the words of the Blood Knife Gang?”

Hearing the builder’s words, Zhao Hai’s complexion changed. He waved his hand and used his qi to grab the neck of the builder. He pulled the builder over and looked straight into his eyes and said, “Are you threatening me?”

This time, the builder finally showed a terrified expression. He no longer had the arrogant look he wore when he entered the room.

Zhao Hai looked at the builder and said, “you best remember this, you are just a builder. The True Spirit Realm is still ruled by strength. If you were a Teleportation Stag expert, I would have followed your words. But you’re just a Clone Stag mutt. You are not qualified to be arrogant in front of me. I can take your life at any time, and nobody would care. It’s better if you follow what I said just now. Otherwise, don’t blame me for being impolite.”

After saying that, Zhao Hai waved his hand and threw the builder five meters away. The aura of the builder has been completely suppressed by Zhao Hai. When the builder fell to the ground, Zhao Hai looked at him and said, “You better behave yourself. I will have someone review your job. If you don’t do well, I will get rid of you. Remember, strength rules the True Spirit Realm.”

The face of the builder was pale as he struggled to get up. Then he bowed his head repeatedly as he said, “Yes, my Lord. I will complete the job well.”

Zhao Hai coldly snorted and said, “Builders should know how to build. If you build well, we will pay you accordingly. But if you dare do anything, I will make you regret being born.”

The builder immediately said, “Yes, sir. I will do my job well.” Zhao Hai waved his hand, giving the builder the permission to leave with the Blood Knife Gang member.

Liu Zhen was shocked at what just happened. It was only until the builder left that Liu Zhen recovered. He slapped the table in front of him and said, “Damn! That bastard dare lie to me? I’m going to kill him right now!”

Liu Zhen was truly angry. Back when the builder arrived, he was so arrogant that Liu Zhen was intimidated. When he thought about how Zhao Hai almost snapped the builder’s neck, and only then did they behave, Liu Zhen couldn’t help but turn red with anger.

Zhao Hai quickly caught Liu Zhen and said, “Big Brother Liu, bear with it for a while. Although that guy was pretending, we still have to see his true skill. How about this, join me to go to the Abundance Hall tomorrow. Since they’re selling building materials, they should know a trustworthy builder. We might as well ask them for help. We might even get a discount. And we don’t have to worry about hiring a fraud.”

Liu Zhen sat as he huffed in indignation. Then he nodded and said, “Alright, we’ll go to the Abundance Hall tomorrow. That bastard builder really dared to treat me like this. Just wait, I’ll make him pay for this.”

Zhao Hai patted Liu Zhen’s shoulder and said, “Big Brother, that person isn’t worthy of your anger. It won’t be late for us to deal with him later.”

Liu Zhen coldly snorted and stayed silent. After some time, he said, “Now that the stones have been transported, we’ll head to the Abundance Hall to get help regarding the builder as well as receiving the glutinous rice. Then we can get to work.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “The stone is the most important material. Now that we have it, we can get the rest of the materials by one in the afternoon tomorrow.”

Liu Zhen nodded, then he said, “I want to pave the headquarters with stone slabs. So stone is in great demand.”

When Zhao Hai heard this, he couldn’t help but frown inside. But he didn’t say anything. If it were him, he would leave a few areas in the headquarters to plant vegetables in. But since he would only be spending a limited amount of time in the Blood Knife Gang, he didn’t offer any advice.

chapters.title: Chapter 2225: Help From Abundance Hall
chapters.body:
Chapter 2225: Help From Abundance Hall

As Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen stood in front of the Abundance Hall, Liu Zhen took a deep breath and said, “Junior Brother, are you sure we’ll succeed? I’ve long heard that the people in the Abundance Hall are all arrogant. Moreover, the strength they have far surpasses the Blood Knife Gang.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “They were accepting of the business when I came. Also, we did a task for them, they should allow this small favor.”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Alright, let’s go in.” Then the two walked towards the building.

Just as they entered the Abundance Hall, an assistant immediately walked over. When he saw Liu Zhen, the assistant smiled and said, “So it’s Hall Master Liu. Are you here to ask me for a drink?”

Seeing the assistant, Liu Zhen chuckled and said, “Brother Lin, let’s drink at another time. I came this time to ask for help.” Then he gestured towards Zhao Hai and said, “Right, this is my junior brother.”

When Assistant Lin saw Zhao Hai, he stared for a moment and said, “So it is Mister Zhao. I didn’t know Mister Zhao is from the Blood Knife Gang. This Lin Haiyang is ashamed.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “Brother Lin is too polite. Thank you for the help yesterday.”

At this time, Liu Zhen smiled and said, “It seems like you two already know each other. Brother Lin, as you already know, our Blood Knife Gang purchased a bunch of glutinous rice yesterday to make our headquarters. We already have the land ready, but the builder we found doesn’t look reliable. So, I’m here to ask Brother Lin to introduce us to a builder. Rest assured; we won’t skimp on the price.”

Lin Haiyang couldn’t help but laugh when he heard Liu Zhen, then he said, “So it’s that. That’s easy. The Abundance Hall has a few builders. They should be able to help you. I didn’t expect the Blood Knife Gang to move to Demonheart City. That is good. We will have more opportunities to cooperate in the future. Please wait a moment, I’ll ask the shopkeeper to come out and talk to you.”

After that, Lin Haiyang invited the two to sit down and served them a cup of tea. Then Lin Haiyang left. After a while, a thin middle-aged man walked over.

When the man reached Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai, he cupped his fist and said, “So it is Hall Master Liu and Mister Zhao. Haiyang just told me what you require. You don’t have to worry, a builder of the Abundance Hall will come over and help you. He’ll help take care of your buildings.”

Hearing this, Liu Zhen immediately stood up and cupped his fist. Then he said, “Thank you very much, Shopkeeper Yun. On behalf of the Blood Knife Gang, I’d like to express our gratitude.”

Shopkeeper Yun smiled faintly and said, “Hall Master Liu is too polite. The Abundance Hall and the Blood Knife Gang have a long history with each other. This couldn’t even be considered a small favor. Moreover, now that the Blood Knife Gang has moved to Demonheart City, we can cooperate more in the future. You don’t have to be polite.”

Liu Zhen smiled faintly and said, “Then I’ll take your offer. The Blood knife Gang will remember this benevolence.”

Shopkeeper Yun replied, “Hall Master Liu, you don’t have to take it to heart. Oh, your builder is here. Old Kin, come here.” After speaking, Shopkeeper Yun waved his hand and an old man walked over. As it turns out, the old man was an Earth Monarch. His appearance was ordinary, and he didn’t wear a cultivator’s robe. Instead, the old man was wearing worn-out white garments. The old man looked just like an ordinary old worker.

When the old man arrived, he cupped his fist towards Shopkeeper Yun and said, “Shopkeeper, what did you call this old man for?”

Shopkeeper Yun smiled faintly and said, “Old Kin, let me introduce you, this is Hall Master Liu of the Blood Knife Gang. And this is Mister Zhao Ling of the Blood Knife Gang.”

Old Kin cupped his fist towards Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai, which was reciprocated by the two. Then Shopkeeper Yun continued, “Old Kin, the Blood Knife Gang is a friend of the Abundance Hall. The Blood Knife Gang has decided to move to Demonheart City and they want to build their headquarters. I want to ask you to help them build it. What do you think? Do you have time?”

Hearing Shopkeeper Yun’s tone, Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare. They didn’t expect Shopkeeper Yun to be so polite to a builder. It seems like the builder’s status isn’t low.

Old Kin nodded and said, “No problem. Let me take the job. Let me get my things, I’ll be back soon.”

Shopkeeper Yun didn’t mind Old Kin for being impolite. He turned to Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen and said, “Forgive Old Kin for being a bit crass. Old Kin is the best builder working for the Abundance Hall. He’s also our oldest builder. His temper is quite weird. Just don’t mind it too much.”

Liu Zhen quickly waved his hand and said, “Shopkeeper Yun, don’t worry. We don’t really mind. People with talent naturally need to be respected.”

When Shopkeeper Yun heard Liu Zhen, he couldn’t help but stare, then he said, “Hall Master Liu, what do you mean? What is there to be arrogant about being a builder? We respect strength in the True Spirit Realm. If you aren’t strong enough, nobody would care even if you are a good builder.” 𝖗â₦Ỗ₿ĚŚ

Liu Zhen’s complexion changed when he heard Shopkeeper Yun. Then he immediately restored his calm as he cupped his fist and said, “Shopkeeper Yun is correct.”

Shopkeeper Yun looked confused at Liu Zhen’s reaction. He couldn’t help but ask, “Hall Master Liu, what is happening?”

Liu Zhen smiled bitterly but didn’t reply. Instead, he looked at Zhao Hai who immediately understood. Liu Zhen felt that this matter had lost him face. Therefore, he wants to have Zhao Hai explain.

Zhao smiled faintly at Shopkeeper Yun and said, “Shopkeeper Yun, please don’t be offended. Our Hall Master is just embarrassed. Yesterday, we hired a builder to help us, but that builder was extremely arrogant. He always declined the ideas we wanted. It’s extremely infuriating.”

Hearing this, Shopkeeper Yun couldn’t help but chuckle when he heard this, “So it’s like this. I can’t blame that builder. You might not know, some builders are being bullied outside, especially builders who are rogue cultivators. In order to make their lives better, they can only put on an arrogant look.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Thank you, Shopkeeper Yun. Now we understand what to do.”

At this time, Old Kin walked over. As he walked over to Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen, he cupped his fist and said, “Let’s go.” After he said that, he walked out. He didn’t say anything to Shopkeeper Yun.

Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai hastily cupped their fists towards Shopkeeper Yun. Liu Zhen quickly gave his goodbye, “Shopkeeper Yun, we’ll head back first. Once we’re free, I’ll invite you for a drink.”

Shopkeeper Yun chuckled and said, “Alright, no problem. I’ll wait for Hall Master Liu’s invitation.” After the two sides expressed their goodbyes, Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai turned around and left the Abundance Hall.

After leaving the Abundance Hall, Zhao Hai turned to Liu Zhen and said, “Big Brother, I have to buy something. I’ll head back after that.”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Alright. I’ll escort Old Kin back. Return as soon as you can. Don’t stir up any trouble in this place. We can’t offend anyone here.” Zhao Hai nodded and then left.

After going around the second city, Zhao Hai returned to the Blood Knife Gang. As soon as he arrived, he saw Old Kin going around controlling the construction. The first builder that the Blood Knife Gang hired was behind Old Kin acting like a personal servant, looking at his every action. Liu Zhen was also standing next to the two.

Zhao Hai arrived beside Liu Zhen and looked at Old Kin. The aged builder was controlling a formation. At this moment, he was using the formation to create a building plan.

Zhao Hai turned to Liu Zhen and said, “Big Brother Liu, what is Old Kin doing now?”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “He’s making a rough plan for the building’s foundation. Did you see that? The kid is wholeheartedly following Old Kin wanting to learn. But from what I can see, Old Kin is just ignoring him. By the way, where did you go?”

Zhao Hai replied, “We can’t treat Old Kin badly. The Abundance Hall allowed us to borrow him. So, I bought some wine and snacks.”

Liu Zhen couldn’t help but pat his head, “Thanks for that. I was too busy to notice. Once Old Kin becomes free, we can invite him to have a few cups.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly without saying anything. At this time, Old Kin finished his sketch. He glanced at Zhao Hai before he nodded and said, “The place you chose is quite good. Although it looks remote, there is an underground water source and it’s very close to the city walls. You can improve the defenses on a few points and you’re good to go. Most importantly, you can easily monitor the surrounding area.”

Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen stared, they haven’t considered these things. Although Zhao Hai understood a bit of construction, he didn’t specialize in it. And to be honest, he wasn’t sincere towards the Blood Knife Gang. This meant that he didn’t care too much about the relocation.

There was no need to mention Liu Zhen. The only thing he knew was that a building was used to house people. If he built a house, the best he could do would be a thatched hut. Naturally, he doesn’t understand the basics of building. So, when he heard Old Kin, he was stunned. He couldn’t help but turn his head towards Zhao Hai, who was the one who gave the idea of the location. But he found that Zhao Hai was also stunned.

Old Kin didn’t mind their reactions. He waved his hand and took out several gourd-like containers. Then he began pouring its contents to the ground. White lines began to appear on the ground. Surprisingly, the lines were very straight. Liu Zhen looked at Old Kin’s movements in confusion. On the other hand, Zhao Hai knew what Old Kin was doing. After all, he also saw construction workers back on Earth.

chapters.title: Chapter 2226: Wang Da Arrives
chapters.body:
Chapter 2226: Wang Da Arrives

Old Kin looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Dig up all the soil I outlined. Make sure that the hole is 5 meters deep.”

Liu Zhen nodded. Then Old Kin said, “Alright, that’s all for today. Once you clean up all the soil for the foundation, we can proceed to the next step.”

Liu Zhen immediately replied, “I’ll make sure to comply with your requirements. Old Kin, Little Ling has prepared some food and wine. Come have a drink with us.”

Old Kin didn’t decline, “Let’s go.” Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai hurriedly led Old Kin back to the inn that they rented out. After arriving at the inn, Zhao Hai immediately called the attendant and handed over the food that he bought earlier to be prepared. Then he sat down with Old Kin and the others.

As the inn’s attendant offered tea, Liu Zhen turned to Old Kin and said, “Old Kin, thank you for helping the Blood Knife Gang with our problem.”

Old Kin waved his hand and said, “Hall Master Liu is too polite. You’re a customer of the Abundance Hall. Naturally, I have to take care of your troubles. I’m a builder, and making structures is my job. You don’t have to express your thanks.”

Hearing this, Liu Zhen immediately said, “No matter what, Old Kin has helped the Blood Knife Gang. The gang will not forget this favor.”

Old Kin just waved his hand and didn’t reply. Seeing this, Liu Zhen didn’t know what to say. He now understood what Shopkeeper Yun said. Old Kin had quite the temperament.

Zhao Hai couldn’t help but secretly smile when he saw this. He understood what kind of person Old Kin was. He immediately said, “Old Kin, did you see any issues with our plans? We aren’t good with building. We want to ask you for advice.”

Hearing this, Old Kin stared, then he immediately answered, “There are plenty of issues. First, the location of your training ground is unreasonable….” Then Old Kin described all of the problems with the Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters.

Liu Zhen’s eyes looked vacant as he listened to Old Kin’s speech. He thought that Old Kin was a quiet person. He did not expect him to be very talkative. Liu Zhen couldn’t help but turn his head towards Zhao Hai. All of this was possible because of Zhao Hai.

Old Kin talked for a bit more than an hour. During this time, the food and drinks have been served. Then Liu Zhen invited Old Kin to eat.

After talking for a long time, Old Kin looked at the food with expectations. The food were all prepared by Zhao Hai, which meant that they were products of the Space. In addition to the healthy spread, all of the dishes were better than the ones in the True Spirit Realm. The smell alone caused Old Kin’s stomach to rumble.

Seeing Old Kin’s hunger, Liu Zhen quickly said, “Old Kin, please.” Old Kin didn’t hesitate as he took his chopsticks and ate the dishes on the table.

The moment the vegetables hit Old Kin’s mouth, he couldn’t help but close his eyes. He chewed slowly as he savored the flavor of the food. This caused Liu Zhen to be nervous. He didn’t know if Old Kin liked the food or not.

After chewing for a while, Old Kin opened his eyes and then nodded towards Liu Zhen before saying, “This is good food. Although the vegetables are ordinary, they are very high grade. I didn’t expect to eat such good vegetables. My trip to the Blood Knife Gang wasn’t a waste!”

Liu Zhen relaxed as soon as he heard this. He immediately said, “It’s good that Old Kin liked the food. Please, take this cup as my respects.” Then he poured Old Kin a glass of wine. The wine was also from the Space, so there was no doubt regarding its quality.

Old Kin took the cup and then raised it towards Liu Zhen, “This old man only has two hobbies. The first one is building. Watching structures being built by my own hands makes me very happy. The clothes hobby I have is food. I like to taste food from various places. I also research dishes and wines. From the first look, I can see that this is a very high-quality wine. This old man would have to be impolite.”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “Old Kin, there’s no need to be polite.” Old Kin nodded and then downed the wine cup.

After he let out a long breath, Old Kin said, “Nice wine. I can drink this wine for days.”

Liu Zhen also looked at his own cup. To be honest, Liu Zhen liked drinking as well. Compared to the wines he drank before, the wine in his hands was on a different level.

Liu Zhen couldn’t help but turn to Zhao Hai and said, “Junior Brother, where did you buy this wine? Did you buy a lot?”

Hearing Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Don’t worry, I managed to buy a lot. However, I didn’t buy this wine from a shop. There’s a cultivator in the third city selling his family’s wine. He said that the recipe has been lost and he’s selling the wine because he needs the money. I tasted it and thought that it was good, so I bought a hundred jars. Each jar contains around a hundred catty of wine.”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Good. let’s give the wine to Old Kin.” Zhao Hai nodded. The wine wasn’t special to him. It was a common good of the Space. Not to mention giving away 10 thousand catties of wine, he wouldn’t flinch even if he gave a hundred thousand.

Hearing Liu Zhen, Old Kin didn’t decline and only thanked Liu Zhen. Zhao Hai picked up the jar on the table and poured wine for Liu Zhen and Old Kin. The mood of the table became good.

Liu Zhen’s table ate happily for the rest of the night. The things produced by the Space weren’t ordinary. Each article of food was high-grade. Due to this meal, Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen’s relationship with Old Kin became closer. 𝙍å₦ÓBËS

After the meal, Zhao Hai rested for the rest of the day. The next day, Zhao Hai and the others arrived at the worksite to dig the foundations.

Old Kin also came. He made some changes to the lines he drew the day before to make the Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters more reasonable. The other members of the Blood Knife Gang were also busy with the foundation, which was a very important aspect of building.

With more than 100 cultivators digging, the work proceeded very fast. In just one day, most of the digging was done. Old Kin also instructed Liu Zhen what needed to be done the next day.

The worksite proceeded in an orderly manner. Old Kin hardly communicated with Zhao Hai besides during meals. Natusally, Zhao Hai didn’t go looking for Old Kin when he was working. Zhao Hai doesn’t know if Old Kin was aware of his identity, but even if he knew, Old Kin couldn’t help him. If Zhao Hai needed help, he would go look for Long Tian.

In the next five days, Old Kin went with Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai to the worksite. The first builder they hired continued to follow behind Old Kin. He had completely lost the arrogance he had. No matter which way one looked, he looked like an apprentice learning from Old Kin.

Old Kin wasn’t stingy as well. He taught the young builder a lot of things, benefiting him greatly. Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen didn’t say anything regarding this. They didn’t want to offend the builder to death. After all, the builder had no other fault besides being arrogant.

Five days later, the Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters finally took form. Although the headquarters looked simple, it became more practical due to Old Kin’s modifications.

Just as the Blood Knife Gang’s main hall was about to be built, Wang Da brought everyone to Demonheart City. The gang has finally migrated to Demonheart City.

With Wang Da arriving in Demonheart City, the Blood Knife Gang’s main hall was fully operational. Although the headquarters wasn’t completely finished, it didn’t affect its habitability.

Wang Da was very satisfied with the changes to the layout. Hearing that Old Kin was from the Abundance Hall, Wang Da was very polite. He took the initiative to ask Old Kin for a drink.

Wang Da’s actions were understandable. The Abundance Hall was far more powerful compared to the Blood Knife Gang. It was also one of the gang’s biggest customers. Naturally, Wang Da couldn’t offend the Abundance Hall’s people.

On the night he arrived in Demonheart City, Wang Da called Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen to his room. Once all three of them were seated down, Wang Da said, “The two of you did a very good job. Forming a relationship with the Abundance Hall will benefit the Blood Knife Gang in the future. Moving to Demonheart City doesn’t mean that jade essences will begin raining down from the sky. We still need to establish a foothold in the city. We can’t let go of a big customer like the Abundance Hall. It’s very important for us to maintain a good relationship with them.”

Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen nodded. Liu Zhen said, “Gang Master, what’s the situation in Split River City? Isn’t it a waste to move out completely?”

Zhao Hai could understand Liu Zhen’s concern. The Blood Knife Gang also has a lot of businesses in Demonheart City. Liu Zhen felt that it was a pity to let go of these businesses.

Hearing Liu Zhen, Wang Da shook his head and said, “Don’t feel bad about it. It would be more difficult for us if we kept our businesses in Split River City after moving to Demonheart City. Now that we cut off all our paths back, we can fight in Demonheart City with all our might.”

Liu Zhen immediately understood Wang Da’s thoughts. He looked at Wang Da and said, “I understand. Gang Master, what do we do now? Everyone is here and the headquarters is almost finished. Shouldn’t we start taking missions? We can’t always waste time like this.”

Wang Da nodded and said, “Sitting idle is indeed unproductive. But you shouldn’t be anxious about the missions. Demonheart City is different from Split River City. Back in Split River City, we can monopolize all of the good missions. We can’t do that here. There are a lot of gangs much stronger than us. It’s impossible for us to get all the good missions. And if we get good missions, we might offend people. So, we might as well use this time to make use of our good relationship with the Abundance Hall. Go there tomorrow and ask about the situation of the missions in Demonheart City. Then we can begin taking missions. At the same time, we should see if we can secure a spot in the fifth city. Then we can begin to get a business up and running.”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Alright. The people from the Abundance Hall aren’t as difficult as the rumors say. They have taken good care of us so far. Shopkeeper Yun is quite a talkative person. I reckon he can help us out.”

Wand Da nodded, “Alright. I’ll leave this matter to you. Little Ling, give all of the wine you have to Old Kin. Old Kin’s position in the Abundance Hall isn’t low.  It would be great for the Blood Knife Gang to be in good relations with him.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Yes, Gang Master. I’ll give the rest of the wine to Old Kin.”

Wang Da nodded. Then his voice turned cold as he said, “The three gangs didn’t know that we moved out. I believe it won’t be long before they know. Let them be happy for two days, then we’ll find time to clean them up. The three gangs will definitely be glad to see us gone and won’t look at us as a threat. Tomorrow we’ll go and see if there is a mission going to Split River City. We are more familiar with this route. Although its reward wouldn’t be high, nobody would take it away from us. While taking missions, we can also familiarize ourselves with Demonheart City.”

Liu Zhen nodded when he heard this. He replied, “I’ll handle this tomorrow.”

Wang Da waved his hand and said, “Alright, you can go back and rest.  We’ll be busy for quite some time. We just arrived at Demonheart City, we have a lot of things to do.”

Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen complied. They cupped their fists towards Wang Da and turned around to leave. After leaving Wang Da’s room, Liu Zhen turned to Zhao Hai and said, “Junior Brother, from what I can see, Shopkeeper Yun looks at you favorably. Moreover, you know how to communicate with Old Kin. While I go look for missions tomorrow, I’ll have to ask you to go to the Abundance Hall to ask for information.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Big Brother, you can rest assured. I’ll take care of it.” Zhao Hai was also thinking of getting in contact with the Abundance Hall. Fortunately, he didn’t have to come up with an excuse. He didn’t hesitate to agree.

chapters.title: Chapter 2227: Special Information
chapters.body:
Chapter 2227: Special Information

Zhao Hai followed Old Kin back to the Abundance Hall with a smile on his face. Now that the headquarters of the Blood Knife Gang has been built, Old Kin no longer has any reason to stay. So, he returned to the Abundance Hall.

Since Zhao Hai was ordered to go to the Abundance Hall to gather information, he returned with Old Kin. Also, the wine that was promised was also given to Old Kin.

Zhao Hai’s goal was to establish a contact with the Abundance Hall. This will make it more convenient for him to operate in Demonheart City.

When the two entered the Abundance Hall, an attendant walked over and greeted them, “It’s Old Kin and Mister Zhao. Please come in while I call the Shopkeeper.”

Old Kin waved his hand and said, “Forget it, I’m going home.” After he said that, Old Kin turned around and left. The attendant was already used to Old Kin’s antics, so he didn’t react. Instead, he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Mister Zhao, please come with me.”

Zhao Hai cupped his fist and said, “I’ll have to trouble you.” Then he followed behind the attendant.

When they arrived at the reception area, the attendant poured Zhao Hai a cup of tea before heading out to call Shopkeeper Yun. Before long, the sound of footsteps were heard. Zhao Hai turned his head and saw Shopkeeper Yun walking over.

Zhao Hai quickly stood up and cupped his fist, “Blood Knife Gang’s Zhao Ling has seen Shopkeeper Yun. I came uninvited. I hope Shopkeeper Yun isn’t offended.”

Shopkeeper Yun smiled faintly and said, “Mister is too polite. Please take a seat.” After cupping his fist once more, Zhao Hai sat down.

When Zhao Hai settled down, Shopkeeper Yun looked at him and said, “Mister Zhao Hai, we can speak freely here. Rest assured, Elder Long Tian already informed me about your circumstance. If you have any problems that need solving, don’t hesitate to approach us. The Abundance Hall exists to serve the Long Clan, we’ll support you with all our strength.”

Zhao Hai didn’t expect Shopkeeper Yun to be direct. After a short while, he cupped his fist and said, “Thank you Shopkeeper Yun. As you already know, I’m now acting as a member of the Blood Knife Gang. But before this, I was disguised as a ghost cultivator. The ghost cultivators detected that something is happening in the True Spirit Realm, so they sent me over to investigate. My main task right now is to gain a stable foothold within the Blood Knife Gang so that the Forbidden Path Sect wouldn’t suspect me. This time, I want to ask you for information regarding the gangs that might be a threat to the Blood Knife Gang. I wonder if Shopkeeper Yun can help me with this?”

Shopkeeper Yun smiled faintly and said, “This is a small matter. In fact, I have already compiled all the information you might need to survive in Demonheart City. I was about to find you but I didn’t expect you to come here. The Blood Knife Gang wouldn’t be suspicious, right?” As he said that, he handed a jade slip to Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai politely received the jade slip and said, “I’ve been ordered to get information. Moreover, the Blood Knife Gang will have a hard time surviving in Demonheart City without the Abundance Hall’s help. There will be more opportunities for us to come in contact in the future.

Shopkeeper Lun smiled and said, “That’s good. You can come to the Abundance Hall whenever you want. However, you need to be more careful. Recently, the Forbidden Path Sect has made a lot of moves. They should begin accepting disciples from outside. Are you interested in joining?”

Zhao Hai stared, then he knitted his brows and said, “The Forbidden Path Sect is recruiting disciples? Do you know why?”

Shopkeeper Yun replied, “What other reason is there? They want to make a big move, so they need cannon fodder as well as talented disciples to invest in to strengthen the sect.”

Zhao Hai nodded. He thought for a moment and said, “My status is quite sensitive. I don’t think I can join the sect. Also, as a person from the Blood Knife Gang, I don’t have the qualifications to join the Forbidden Path Sect. After all, the Blood Knife Gang just moved in. Even if the Forbidden Path Sect accepts disciples, they won’t take in people from the Blood Knife Gang.”

Shopkeeper Yun smiled faintly and said, “It’s not impossible for you to join the sect. The Forbidden Path Sect doesn’t care very much about the origin of its disciples. Every time they recruit disciples, a lot of rogue cultivators get in. Some of them have unclear origins. This is because the disciples they accept from outside would forever be in the outer sect. The true combat strength of the sect are the core and the true disciples. If we scale the strength of the sect with ten points, the elders would be five points, the core disciples and the true disciples would be three points, and then the outer sect would be two points.”

“Even if people with ill intentions manage to get in, it’s impossible for them to destabilize the sect. As for those with talent to become true or core disciples, ordinary sects would be reluctant to send them as spies.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he said, “Alright. I’ll pay attention to this. If there is an opportunity to join the Forbidden Path Sect, I’ll go and try. Then, Shopkeeper Yun, I’ll be heading back.”

Shopkeeper Yun stood up to send Zhao Hai off. He also said, “If there’s anything you need, don’t hesitate to come. We’re all members of the Long Clan.” Zhao Hai smiled faintly and then cupped his fist to Shopkeeper Yun before leaving.

Zhao Hai didn’t return to the Blood Knife Gang after leaving the Abundance Hall. However, he didn’t spend a long time in the second city. Like Liu Zhen said, there are characters in the second city that he couldn’t afford to provoke. There is also no benefit to him staying in the second city. Therefore, Zhao Hai left the second city and entered the third city.

The third city was a huge trading area. There were very few shop fronts in the third city. Besides restaurants, inns, and the buildings belonging to the gangs, almost all of the land in the third city was occupied by stalls. Here, any open area could be used as a trading ground. Any cultivator could become a buyer or a seller.

Zhao Hai casually walked around the third city. Among the five cities of Demonheart City, the third city was most definitely the liveliest one. There were countless cultivators exchanging goods on the trading grounds.

The reason Zhao Hai went to the third city was to buy things. He discovered that the third city was a treasure trove. He could obtain things for the Space for very cheap. Cultivators often sold things they didn’t know, which made its price much lower than what it could be. Although Zhao Hai also didn’t know what these items were, it didn’t matter. He only bought these things to enrich the Space.

Zhao Hai walked all around the third city, buying things he hadn’t seen before. Despite buying a lot of items, nobody paid attention to them. The third city’s trading ground was just too vast. Even if you spend millions here, nobody would notice.

Because of the third city’s size, it would take Zhao Hai a long time to explore everything. So, after walking for two hours, he left the city and returned to the Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters in the fifth city. Ɍ𝘼ΝŎβËṥ

The Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters still has a bit of work left to complete, but it was already a fully functioning building capable of housing people. Therefore, the members of the Blood Knife Gang no longer need to stay in hotels.

When Zhao Hai returned to the Blood Knife Gang, the people were still very busy. Although the headquarters could now be occupied, some places still need to be decorated. The gang members were now working on finishing the work.

Zhao Hai approached a gang member and asked, “Brother, is Hall Master Liu in the main hall?”

The gang member quickly recognized Zhao Hai, so he replied, “Brother Zhao, it’s you. Hall Master Liu is not here. I heard that he went to the mission hall.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Thank you, Brother.” The gang member didn’t say anything else  and continued on with his work. He knew very well that although Zhao Hai just joined the Blood Knife Gang, he was already favored by Liu Zhen and Wang Da. In fact, Zhao Hai’s current status might now be inferior to those who stayed in the gang for a long time.

Because of this, despite being a newcomer, Zhao Hai wasn’t looked down on by the other gang members. In fact, even Liu Zhen wouldn’t offend Zhao Hai. This was because Liu Zhen wasn’t the one who thought highly of Zhao Hai, but the Gang Master, Wang Da.

Zhao Hai walked towards the main hall. His status in the Blood Knife Gang was not low, so when the headquarters was being built, he as well as Ma Long and Liu Cai were given their own courtyard. This could be considered as Wang Da’s care for them.

Before long, Zhao Hai arrived at his courtyard. When he entered, he couldn’t help but stare. He saw Ma Lond and Liu Cai being busy reorganizing the place. They were doing a final cleaning of the place.

chapters.title: Chapters 2228 – Information Confirmed
chapters.body:
Chapters 2228 – Information Confirmed

The Battle Corpse Sect was a sect of ghost cultivators. Their treatment towards their disciples was very harsh. If the disciple fails to complete a task, they would be heavily punished. If the failure was very severe, the disciple might even be turned into a battle corpse.

Ma Long and Liu Cai were able to follow Zhao Hai not because of their strength. It was because they happened to be in the soul fusion stage; which was the same as Zhao Hai. They were also born as rogue cultivators, making them very familiar with life outside the sect.

Ma Ling and Liu Cai knew that if they failed the mission, they wouldn’t have good lives moving forward. Zhao Hai had Wei Tiande behind them who could act as a shield. Meanwhile, Liu Cai and Ma Long have nobody to depend on. When the time comes, all the misfortune would fall to them.

It has been some time since they arrived in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory, but they haven’t gained any useful information. This caused the two of them to worry. They were afraid that the sect would blame them for doing a bad job.

When he entered the room, Zhao Hai waved his hand to invite the two to sit down. Then he opened his mouth and said, “I went to the Abundance Hall today to establish a relationship between them and the Blood Knife Gang. The people of the Abundance Hall were very easy to talk to, which allowed me to gather information on behalf of the Blood Knife Gang. In addition to the information about gangs that the Blood Knife Gang couldn’t offend, I also got some surprising information.”

Zhao Hai paused for a moment as he looked at Ma Long and Liu Cai, then he continued, “The Forbidden Path Sect is recruiting disciples. This time, they’re recruiting anyone. Everyone can apply and those selected will become disciples of the sect. The sect did this because they are planning something big.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai stared for a moment to process what Zhao Hai said. They didn’t know if this information was useful to them or not. Although it was a big matter for a sect to recruit disciples, it was unlikely for the sect to accept rogue cultivators. After all, it was very easy to insert spies among rogue cultivators.

Zhao Hai looked at Ma Ling ang Liu Cai and said, “Don’t think that this has nothing to do with our matter. In fact, this tells us a lot of things. The Forbidden Path Sect is a major sect within the Demonic Faction. If the sect plans to make a big move, there’s a huge possibility that the rest of the Demonic Faction are doing the same. With the Demonic Faction making moves, how could there be no reaction from the Righteous and the Devil Factions?”

When Ma Long and Liu Cai heard this, they stared before their eyes lit up. They finally understood what Zhao Hai was saying.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “I also went around the third city to listen to rumors. People are saying that the Demonic and the Devil Factions are working together to go against the Righteous Faction. Do you know what this means if this rumor is true?”

Ma Long and Liu Cai aren’t fools. Otherwise, they wouldn’t be able to join the Battle Corpse Sect as Rogue Cultivators. So, when they heard Zhao Hai, they immediately understood. Almost at the same time, they opened their mouths and said, “There will be chaos in the True Spirit Realm.” They said that with bright eyes. If the True Spirit Realm was going to be overturned by war, this will be the biggest opportunity for ghost cultivators.

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Correct. If the Demonic and the Devil Factions work together and attack the Righteous Faction, the True Spirit Realm will turn chaotic. That will be a huge opportunity for us. However, we cannot pass this information to the sect yet. We still need solid proof. Once we determine that the information is true, it wouldn’t be late to send a report. The consequences wouldn’t be good if the rumors are false.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded. Naturally, they understood Zhao Hai’s concern. They cannot pass on fake information that would be detrimental to the sect. If they submit inaccurate information, they would be punished by the sect.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “Go to the third city and listen around. We need to confirm this information as soon as possible.”

Ma Long nodded and then he said, “Junior Brother, rest assured, you can leave this matter to us. Right, you said that the Forbidden Path Sect is preparing to accept disciples, are you planning to apply?”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “I don’t. Once we get confirmation, our mission is complete. There’s no reason to join the sect. Alright, let’s head out and dig for more information. I still need to see the Gang Master. After that, the three stood up and went about their business.

When Zhao Hai left the courtyard, he walked towards Wang Da’s residence. Wang Da is the Blood Knife Gang’s leader and has now reached the Teleportation Stage. Although he still had a lot of tasks to manage, he no longer handled the mundane affairs. This left him more time for cultivation.

Zhao Hai arrived outside Wang Da’s courtyard and said, “Gang Master, Zhao Ling wants an audience.”

The door to the courtyard opened, then Wang Da’s voice was heard, “Come in.” Zhao Hai nodded and entered.

Wang Da’s courtyard was the biggest in the Blood Knife Gang. The courtyard also has a small cultivation ground where Wang Da can practice in peace.

At this time, Wang Da was sitting in his living room. Since the door to the living room was open, Zhao Hai was able to see the Gang Master sitting inside.

Zhao Hai entered the room, cupped his fist, and said, “I have seen the Gang Master.”

Wang Da nodded, then he waved his hand and said, “Alright, you don’t have to be polite. Sit down and tell me if the Abundance Hall is willing to help.” ȑἈΝỔʙĘṠ

Zhao Hai sat down, then he took out a jade slip and handed it over to Wang Da before saying, “Gang Master, as soon as the Abundance Hall heard my request, they immediately agreed. They said that in order for the Blood Knife Gang to survive in Demonheart City, there are forces that we cannot provoke. Shopkeeper Yun gave me this jade slip showing which forces we cannot offend.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Wang Da held the lade slip and read through it using his spiritual force. After going through the contents, his face couldn’t help but change. He looked at Zhao Hai and asked, “Zhao Ling, have you seen the contents of the jade slip?”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “I haven’t. After Shopkeeper Yun gave it to me, I left the Abundance Hall. Then I walked a few rounds in the third city before returning here.”

Wang Da sighed and said, “I didn’t expect Demonheart City to be so huge. There are nearly a thousand differently sized gangs in the city, and there are hundreds of them we can’t offend. There are also lone individuals living in the city that have the strength to eradicate the Blood Knife Gang. The Blood Knife Gang is actually ranked around eight hundredth.”

Zhao Hai was genuinely surprised by what Wang Da said. He hasn’t looked through the jade slip. He believed that Shopkeeper Yun wasn’t a person to make careless mistakes. The content in the jade slip was for the Blood Knife Gang to read. There shouldn’t be anything unrelated inside. And if the jade slip arrived at Wang Da used, the Gang Master might become suspicious.

Zhao Hai guessed correctly. Shopkeeper Yun didn’t add unnecessary information in the jade slip. Shopkeeper Yun knew that Zhao Hai wasn’t a high-level member of the Blood Knife Gang. He has no right to read jade slips intended for the Gang Master.

Wang Da asked Zhao Hai about seeing the jade slip not because he was suspecting him, but because he was surprised by its contents. He didn’t expect the Blood Knife Gang to be very low in Demonheart City’s hierarchy.

Wang Da looked at Zhao Hai, very satisfied with his performance. Zhao Hai was sensible and knew when to advance and retreat. Then he said, “Little Ling, did you manage to get information other than this?”

Zhao Hai quickly replied, “There is information, but I don’t know if it’s true or not. The Forbidden Path Sect is recruiting disciples. Shopkeeper Yun said that they might be preparing something huge. We have to be careful.”

Hearing this, Wang Da’s expression changed. Then he asked, “Did Shopkeeper Yun really say this?”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Yes, Shopkeeper Yun told me this. Gang Master, do you have any idea about this?”

Wang Da smiled bitterly and said, “It really came. Actually, this matter isn’t a secret. I also heard from others that the Demonic and the Devil Factions have formed an alliance and are ready to send troops to the Righteous Faction. If the Forbidden Path Sect is indeed making a move, then it might have something to do with the attack.”

Zhao Hai’s expression changed. Then he said, “So it’s like that. I also heard such rumors when I walked around the third city. I didn’t expect the rumors to be true.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2229: Full-On Preparation
chapters.body:
Chapter 2229: Full-On Preparation

This time, Zhao Hai was truly surprised. Before this, he was just pretending because he was already privy to some information.

Wang Da’s words surprised Zhao Hai. Wang Da basically confirmed that the Demonic and the Devil Factions have allied with each other. Moreover, they were preparing to attack the Righteous Faction. The rumors were actually true.

Looking at Zhao Hai’s reaction, Wang Da smiled bitterly and said, “Surprised? I was also surprised when I heard this. I was informed by someone from the Forbidden Path Sect, so I can only believe this. This is also why I want to move the Blood Knife Gang to Demonheart City. If the Demonic-Devil Alliance attacks the Righteous Faction, then I will have to leave the Blood Knife Gang to participate. Once I’m gone, the Blood Knife Gang wouldn’t be able to survive against the three gangs in Split River City. And since I also want to make the Blood Knife Gang expand, I decided to move to Demonheart City.”

Zhao Hai was shocked. He didn’t expect the move of the Blood Knife Gang to have deep reasons.

Wang Da sighed and said, “Now that the Forbidden Path Sect has begun accepting disciples, it seems like the wheels have begun rolling. Little Ling, you have good talent, and you are still young. Although you came out because of your family, it would be more beneficial for your clan if you could join the sect. This is an opportunity for you. Go back and think about what I said.”

Zhao Hai stood up and cupped his fist before turning around and leaving. Before long, he returned to his courtyard. Ma Long and Liu Cai had yet to return. Zhao Hai didn’t wait for them and immediately returned to his room. After putting up several formations, Zhao Hai’s body flashed and appeared on Residence Number 52 shortly after.

After arriving in his courtyard, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare because he couldn’t sense the Yin Yang Elders. He immediately took out his communication token and called the Yin Yang Elders.

Before Ling, the Yin Elder appeared on the token. He looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Hai, what’s the matter?”

“Master, where are you? Why aren’t you in the residence? I have important information to tell you.” Zhao Hai said immediately as soon as he saw the Yin Elder.

Hearing Zhao Hai, the Yin Elder quickly replied, “We’re at the Heaven Slashing Palace. If you have anything important to report, you can come here.” Zhao Hai nodded as he quickly disappeared and then arrived at the Heaven Slashing Palace of the Tyrant Blade Sect.

The people of the Heaven Slashing Palace naturally knew Zhao Hai. As soon as they saw him, they gave him a greeting which Zhao Hai reciprocated. Despite being polite to everyone, Zhao Hai was still rushing in. The guards of the palace naturally heard the orders, so they didn’t stop Zhao Hai. When he arrived in front of the palace, a cultivator announced his arrival, “Zhao Hai is here!”

The palace master’s voice was heard, “Let him in.” The guard outside the door opened the door and invited Zhao Hai in. Zhao Hai cupped his fist towards the guard before entering.

Upon enticing the palace, Zhao Hai stared. He didn’t expect there to be plenty of people inside. Besides the Yin Yang Elders, there were also other elders inside. Even the branch hall elders were present. Seeing this scene, Zhao Hai knew that something must have happened.

Zhao Hai immediately recovered. Then he cupped his fist and said, “I have seen the palace master.” Then he cupped his fist to the Yin Yang Elders and then to the rest of the elders.

After Zhao Hai gave his respects, the palace master asked, “Little Hai, you said that you have something important to report. What is it?”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Yes. This disciple has obtained confirmation that the Demonic and the Devil Cultivators have established and alliance. They are indeed preparing to attack the Righteous Alliance.”

After Zhao Hai said that, everyone looked at him in confusion. They had already received this news, they were already aware.

Zhao Hai looked at everyone and then added, “This disciple has confirmed the authenticity of this news. Additionally, I heard that the demonic faction has issued a recruitment notice to all Teleportation Stage rogue cultivators. Once the war begins, all of the Teleportation Stage rogue cultivators will participate in the battle. The sects of the demonic faction are also recruiting disciples en masse.”

Unlike his previous report, Zhao Hai’s follow-up information caused the cultivators present to erupt in discussion. Although they have received news that the demonic and the evil factions have formed an alliance, the information has yet to be proven. Now, not only has Zhao Hai confirmed the information, he also brought news about the alliance recruiting Teleportation Stage rogue cultivators to participate in the war.

“Silence!” The palace master immediately ordered everyone to quiet down. At this moment everyone’s gaze was on Zhao Hai.

The palace master looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Hai, as you know, this is significant information. The consequence to the sect if it were false will be critical. Are you sure that this information is true?”

Zhao Hai seriously replied, “I am confident that the information is true. palace master can rest assured.”

The palace master nodded and said, “Alright, I believe you. I’ll take it from here. You can go back.” Zhao Hai complied. He cupped his fist and left the hall. Ṙ𝐀Ꞑǒ𝐁Ëś

The fact that Zhao Hai infiltrated the underground world and was then sent to the True Spirit Realm was only known to a few people. Naturally, the palace master and the Yin Yang Elders were aware among those who knew. It was precisely because of this that the palace master placed great importance on Zhao Hai’s words. He knew that Zhao Hai was currently holding multiple identities that couldn’t be exposed. It was impossible for Zhao Hai to stay in the sect for long, so he let Zhao Hai leave.

Although the others didn’t know what the palace master was thinking, they didn’t say anything. After all, Zhao Hai’s presence wasn’t important right now. What they needed to focus on was the information that Zhao Hai brought.

After Zhao Hai left, the palace master looked at everyone and said, “You all have heard Zhao Hai’s report. What do you think?”

The hall was silent. Although they have heard rumors about the alliance, having it suddenly proven was still shocking. They were speechless for some time.

Seeing everyone’s reaction, the Yin Elder looked at the palace master and said, “Palace Master, I think it’s time for us to go all-out in preparation for war. With the information practically confirmed, war is inevitable. Since we cannot avoid it, the Tyrant Blade Sect will have to mobilize everything it has to get through the war.  We need to let everyone know how sharp our blades are. They need to know that we aren’t soft fruits that they could just squeeze.”

The palace master nodded and said, “Now that we have confirmation, it’s time to prepare for war. We would be fools to sit on our asses while the enemy is preparing to attack us. Starting today, the Tyrant Blade Sect is in full-on war preparation. Strategic materials will no longer be traded. All disciples outside the sect need to be recalled. We will also recruit the rogue cultivators within our borders. Tell them that the sect will not treat them badly. And once the war is over, they will be richly compensated.”

The hall rumbled as everyone complied. The Palace Master continued, “To the branch hall masters, although I know that your branches have their own strengths, it’s impossible for you to block attacks coming from major sects. So, from now on, be prepared to retreat at any time. I command all branch halls to restrict their usage of formations. Besides crucial formations, all energy should be saved for guardian formations. All transmission formations need to be heavily guarded. To the Formation Hall, inspect the sect’s Mountain Guarding Formation. Ensure that the formation is in optimal shape.”

The various Branch Hall Masters as well as Elder Zhen complied. The others finally felt that war was truly approaching. They were waiting for the Palace Master to give additional orders.

The Palace Master continued, “All Elders must stick to their stations. Most importantly Yuan Mountain. Junior Brothers, you need to protect it.”

The Yin Yang Elders nodded. They also knew how important Yuan Mountain was. The peak was right beside the Black Dragon Mountain. The beasts in Black Dragon Mountain aren’t fully controlled by the sect. When war comes, the enemy could use the mountain to sneak into the Tyrant Blade Sect. Because of this, the defense of Yuan Mountain was imperative. The enemy cannot enter the Tyrant Blade Sect’s territory.

The Yin Yang Elders have been living in Yuan Peak recently. It was natural for them to be its guardians. So, when the Palace Master issued the order, they didn’t say anything and just agreed.

The Palace Master added, “Regarding Yuan Peak, when it was constructed, a large formation was also built underneath it. It won’t be easy for the enemy to break through. The other points in the sect must also be careful. As you know, the enemy has other choices to break through besides Yuan Peak. So, no matter where you are located, always keep vigilance. Always be ready for battle.” Everyone nodded.

The Palace Master turned to Lu Lin and said, “Elder Lu, resources need to be moved as we prepare for war. You are better than me at this. I need your opinion.”

Lu Lin nodded, “Yes, Palace Master. After multiple upgrades, our Mountain Guarding Formation has become stronger. It will be very hard for the enemy to break it in a short time. We need ships to always be prepared to reinforce the areas that the enemy decides to attack. We cannot allow the attackers to break through the formation. The headquarters is too important to the sect. Any damage to the headquarters will damage the sect’s foundation. I suggest we move our elite disciples to form ten groups/ These groups will stay in the main hall and would only move once the battle becomes tense. They will act as reserves, ready to help any battle group that is struggling. And once the enemy is repelled, they can act as a hunting team with the Palace Master’s approval.”

The Palace Master nodded and said, “Then Elder Lu can select disciples or the sect to join the ten reserve groups. Each group will have a thousand members. You can select any disciple except Zhao Hai, he has his own duties to fulfill.”

Lu Lin nodded and said, “Palace Master can rest assured.”

The Palace Master nodded as he turned to the others and said, “This will be a calamity for the Tyrant Blade Sect. But this is also an opportunity. Every huge war is followed by a reshuffling of influence in the realm. The Tyrant Blade Sect has the advantage of knowing in advance. As long as we capitalize on this, we would certainly benefit in the future. Therefore, everyone needs to work hard.”

Everyone complied simultaneously. The Palace Master looked at everyone and asked, “Does anyone have anything else to say? If not, you can go back and prepare.”

At this time, the Yang Elder opened his mouth and said, “Palace Master, I have something to say.”

The Palace Master looked at the Yang Elder and said, “Junior Brother, please speak.” The Yang Elder rarely spoke. But every time he opened his mouth, his message would always be important.

The Yang Elder nodded and said, “Palace Master, we should inform the True Dao Sect about this. They are our closest ally. If the war comes and they are unprepared, it would also be bad for us.”

Hearing this, the Palace Master thought about it for a moment before saying, “Alright. We will tell the True Dao Sect as well. Over the years, the True Dao Sect has proven themselves to be our closest ally. No matter what happens, they are always by our side. We would be betraying them if we withhold such crucial information. However, we must make sure that the True Dao Sect doesn’t spread this news. Right now, it would be better if this information is known to as few people as possible. Does anyone else have anything to say?”

Those present shook their heads. The Palace Master nodded and said, “Alright, you can all go back and prepare.” Everyone complied and left.

chapters.title: Chapter 2230: Leading A Group
chapters.body:
Chapter 2230: Leading A Group

Zhao Hai doesn’t know how the Tyrant Blade Sect would manage the crisis, but he believed that they would do well. The Tyrant Blade Sect has existed in the True Spirit Realm for many years. They already have their own protocols on how to traverse any problems. If their protocols were flawed, they would have been destroyed a long time ago.

At this time, Zhao Hai arrived in the Long Clan and went to Long Tian. Long Tian didn’t expect to see Zhao Hai at this time. He was aware that Zhao Hai was currently in the tiger’s den. Seeing Zhao Hai, Long Tian immediately invited him in. When the two sat down, “I already got in contact with the Abundance Hall. But I received some information, so I came here to tell you.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Long Tian stared. Then he sat properly and said, “What information?”

Zhao Hai replied, “The Demonic Faction have begun to move. They have already recruited all Teleportation Stag rogue cultivators inside their domain. Once the war begins, those rogue cultivators will be called in to join. I’m afraid the Demonic Faction is going to begin to move soon.”

Long Tian sighed and said, “So it really came, what are your thoughts?”

Zhao Hai sighed and said, “I don’t have much to think about. If they want to go to war, then we’ll fight. I have already informed the Tyrant Blade Sect. I believe they have already started preparing. The Long Clan shouldn’t participate immediately. I’ll pass this information to the underground world. The ghost cultivators will not let this opportunity go. They will definitely return to the True Spirit Realm. At that time, the ones who would fight them will be the Long Clan.”

Long Tian smiled bitterly and said, “This isn’t an easy matter. Our Long Clan looks good from the outside because of our previous identity. But almost all sects are wary of us. Although the strength of the Long Clan has recovered a lot through the years, it was still slow because of the restrictions brought by the sects. On the other hand, the ghost cultivators divided themselves into sects when they moved to the underground world. Their development isn’t any worse than the sects in the True Spirit Realm. If they really came, the Long Clan would essentially be fighting an entity as strong as the True Spirit Realm. That won’t be an easy battle.”

Zhao Hai replied, “It won’t be easy. However, I believe that once the ghost cultivators appear, the sects of the realm wouldn’t just allow them to go around and rampage. They might reunite to deal with the ghost cultivators. They would ease some of the Long Clan’s burdens.”

Long Tian smiled bitterly and said, “Let’s hope. Alright, let’s not talk about this. Since you have confirmed the information, your mission is considered finished. What are your plans now?”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and said, “Next thing I will do is to look at the movements of the Battle Corpse Sect. If they want me to return to the underground world, I will. If they want me to stay, I will stay. I don’t want to discard my True Disciple status just yet.”

Long Tian looked at Zhao Hai and said, “And why is that?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I haven’t retaliated enough. With this status, I can cause better chaos in the underground world. Wouldn’t that be better?”

Long Tian stared, then he immediately understood Zhao Hai’s plan. He looked at Zhao Hai and said, “This is a dangerous plan. Once the ghost cultivators discover your identity and manage to find you, you’re dead.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “That won’t matter. It won’t be easy for them to find me. Don’t forget, I’m a True Disciple of the Battle Corpse Sect. With that status, nobody would easily suspect me. Right, Elder, I must go. I can’t be away for too long.”

Long Tian nodded, then he said, “Little Hai, haven’t you thought of joining the Forbidden Path Sect?”

Zhao Hai replied, “Let’s take one step at a time. I really haven’t thought of joining the Forbidden Path Sect.” Then he stood up and cupped his fist towards Long Tian. In an instant, his body vanished and reappeared in his quarters inside the Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters.

After returning to his room, Zhao Hai immediately took out a late slip and passed the information to the Battle Corpse Sect. In any case, the sect will learn about this sooner or later. It wasn’t a big deal.

After passing the information, Zhao Hai walked out of his room and saw Ma Long and Liu Cai sitting in the courtyard. It was clear that they had just returned. They didn’t expect Zhao Hai to also be back.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “Senior Brothers, you’re back. Let’s go to the living room.” The two know that Zhao Hai has something to tell them, so they immediately walked towards the living room with Zhao Hai. ŗАΝȰΒƐṣ

Once the three sat down in the living room, Zhao Hai said, “I just sent information back to the sect along with our names. The alliance between the Demonic Faction and the Devil Faction has been confirmed. And they are also preparing to attack the righteous faction. But as to when they will attack, we don’t know. Now, we’ll wait for the sect’s instructions.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai stared. They didn’t expect Zhao Hai to tell them this. Just then, they were still clamouring for any news. Now they were wondering whether or not Zhao Hai was lying to them.

One couldn’t blame Ma Long and Liu Cai. There was no friendship between ghost cultivators. Mistrust was very common among them. If Zhao Hai wanted to claim all of the credit, it was natural for him to deceive them.

Zhao Hai saw the two’s expressions and knew what they were thinking. He coldly snorted and said, “What are you thinking about? If I wanted to take all the credit, I wouldn’t have told you anything. I just confirmed the news from Wang Da. The Forbidden Path Sect has issued a recruitment order to Wang Da to participate in the war. It’s because of this that I got the news. We managed to confirm it earlier than we expected.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Ma Long and Liu Cai’s faces couldn’t help but turn red. They didn’t expect Zhao Hai to read their minds.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “You must be careful in the following days. We cannot reveal anything wrong with us. Otherwise, the consequences will be unimaginable.”

The two nodded. Then Zhao Hai said, “Go look around for information in the third city. Find out when the Forbidden Path Sect will recruit disciples or when the Demonic and Devil Alliance plan to attack the Righteous Faction.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded. Deep inside, the two were embarrassed. They felt that they haven’t been working hard enough. All the information they have come from Zhao Hai. On the other hand, they weren’t able to get even a sliver of useful news. This made them feel that they were useless.

Zhao Hai saw the expression of the two and knew that they were feeling. He nodded and said, “Alright, you can go back. We still have a few tasks to do in the following days. We need to be careful until we get word back from the sect.” The two nodded.

At this time, a knock was heard from outside. Then Liu Zhen’s voice was heard, “Brother, are you in?”

Zhao Hai quickly stood up and replied, “Brother Liu, I’m here. Please come in.” Then he walked out of the living room to see Liu Zhen waiting outside.

Zhao Hai quickly asked Liu Zhen to come in. After sitting down, Liu Zhen looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Brother, I heard from the Gang Master that you got information from the Abundance Hall. You did great. The Gang Master is full of praise towards you.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “It’s not much. The Abundance Hall is also willing to establish a relationship with us. It’s a matter of gesture for them. I was only there to retrieve something they’re willing to give.”

Liu Zhen laughed and said, “You kid. You really like to hide. Although you’re only at the Soul Fusion Stage, your ability to get results is very good. Otherwise, we wouldn’t have sent you to the Abundance Hall to inquire. Alright, let’s not talk about this. I went to the mission hall just now and saw a mission that goes to Split River City. I have taken the mission and I’m ready to send 50 people. I’m planning to have you lead. What do you think?”

Zhao Hai stared, he didn’t expect Liu Zhen to make him a group leader this early. It must be known that it hasn’t been a long time since he joined the Blood Knife Gang. Moreover, he only did one mission for the gang. In Zhao Hai’s opinion it’s still too early to have him lead a team. He looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Brother Liu, isn’t it too early for me to lead a team? Can anyone else lead?”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “You’re quite naive. At this point, a lot of people in the gang are aware of your ability. But because you have only joined the gang recently, you don’t have any contributions. Even if the Gang Master wants to promote you, it would be impossible. The mission this time should help you gain contributions. Convince everyone that you have the capability. So, in the future, if we want to promote you, nobody will say anything. Do you understand?”

Upon hearing Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but smile bitterly. He has no plans to get promoted and excel in the Blood Knife Gang. But some people still want him to be promoted. Zhao Hai couldn’t possibly decline and cause Wang Da to suspect him. Therefore, he could only agree, “Alright, I’ll lead this mission.”

Liu Zhen showed a satisfied nod.  Then he gave Zhao Hai some information with regards to the upcoming mission.
