chapters.title: Chapter 2231: Creating Problems
chapters.body:
Chapter 2231: Creating Problems

Zhao Hi rode on the back of a horse with Ma Long and Liu Cai following behind him. Beside him was a convoy of ten carriages. This time, their mission was to escort the convoy to Split River City. The convoy didn’t belong to the Abundance Hall. It was from another famous hop in the city called the Moonfall Palace.

The Moonfall Palace was quite a huge establishment in Demonheart City. It is located in the second city and was one of the groups that couldn’t be easily offended. Zhao Hai doesn’t know who owns Moonfall Palace, but he has no plans to find out. His focus right now is to finish the mission.

The person in charge of the Moonfall Palace’s caravan was a fat man. Naturally, the fat man wasn’t an ordinary person. His cultivation has also reached the Soul Fusion Stage. Additionally, the fat man brought 20 other cultivators from Moonfall Palace. All of these people were at the Clone Stage.

Besides Ma Long and Liu Cai, Zhao Hai also brought 50 members of the Blood Knife Gang. The weakest among these people were at the Clone Stage while there were more than 10 Soul Fusion Stage cultivators. The Blood knife Gang placed great importance to this mission. After all, this was their first mission since moving to Demonheart City.

Zhao Hai and the others have left Demonheart City and were now on their way to Split River City. The cultivators of the Blood Knife Gang were guarding both sides of the convoy. Ma Long and Liu Cai were behind Zhao Hai. In the carriage right next to Zhao Hai were two long poles that bore flags. One of the flags belonged to the Blood Knife Gang while the other flag belonged to the Moonfall Palace. Contrary to their status, the Moonfall Palace’s flag looked very simple. It was a crescent moon with the word “Moonfall” below.

The fat man leading the Moonfall Palace’s convoy was sitting on the carriage beside Zhao Hai. The fat man looked at Zhao Hai with a trace of hesitation on his face. Zhao Hai already noticed the fat man looking at him. He turned his head to the fat man and said, “Convoy Leader, do you have any instructions?”

As soon as the convoy leader heard this, he couldn’t help but get embarrassed. He waved his hand and said, “It’s nothing. I’m just curious about mister’s status in the Blood Knife Gang. You’re still so young yet you were able to become a leader.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I don’t actually have much status in the Blood Knife Gang. In fact, this is the second mission from the gang that I’m participating in. The Gang Master is showing me kindness and handed this mission to me. But you can rest assured that we will deliver the Moonfall Palace’s goods with no mistakes.”

As soon as the fat man heard Zhao Hai, his expression couldn’t help but change. He didn’t expect Zhao Hai to be a newcomer to the Blood Knife Gang. This caused the fat man to be a bit worried about the convoy.

The cargo that the fat man was delivering wasn’t simple. Although the items in the carriages aren’t worth much, the most valuable items were in the fat man’s spatial ring. Inside the ring was a valuable herb called the Nine Revolutions Heavens Herb.

The Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb was a treasured herb. In fact, it could no longer be considered as a medicinal herb. It was more accurate to call it a spiritual treasure.

The Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb can be consumed directly. Consuming the verb wouldn’t only increase one’s cultivation, it would also make the user’s body exude a fragrance that repels poisonous insects. At the same time, the herb can improve one’s body and make them invincible.

The Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb can also be used as an ingredient. It was the main ingredient for the Nine Revolutions Pill. The Nine Revolutions Pill can revive an almost dead person, regrow limbs, and can also detoxify a hundred poisons. Such a pill only has demand but no supply. Even an existence like the Forbidden Path Sect would covet such a pill.

Demonheart City’s Moonfall Palace were lucky enough to come across the Nine Revelations Herb. After getting their hands on the herb, they kept quiet and immediately hid its existence. In the end, they finally selected the fat man to take the herb to Split River City. Then from Split River City, the herb would travel to the main hall of the Moonfall Palace.

Normally, such a precious item would be sent through transmission formations. However, the problem came from the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb itself. Being a special herb, the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb cannot be transported through a transmission formation. Once the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb was sent through a transmission formation, its essence would undergo a huge change. The herb would become extremely poisonous. Once that happens, a whiff of its scent would be fatal even to Earth Monarchs. Moreover, there was no cure.

It was said that spatial items contain independent spaces that couldn’t be affected by external factors. But for some reason, the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb could still be affected by the outside world. It was precisely because of this that the herb could only be transported the old fashioned way.

The Moonfall Palace was well aware of the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb’s value. Because of this, they didn’t dare reveal its existence. They didn’t even hire the powerful gangs for the escort. Instead, they issued a mission with low pay to attract mediocre gangs. In this way, nobody would think that the convoy contained a valuable item.

However, the fat man still hoped that he would be escorted by strong guards. This way, he would be protected if there were any accidents along the way. So, when he heard Zhao Hai say that he just joined the Blood Knife Gang and that this was his second mission, the fat man’s heart sank. He became afraid that he wouldn’t be able to count on Zhao Hai when something happened.

Zhao Hai didn’t know that he became useless in the eyes of the fat man. But even if he knew, he still wouldn’t care. Naturally, if he knew that the fat man was carrying the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb, Zhao Hai might be tempted to attack and take the herb for himself.

With his worries occupying his mind, the fat man was silent. Zhao Hai also noticed that the fat man seemed absent minded, but he didn’t mind it. What the fat man thought has nothing to do with him. As long as the mission is completed, then that was enough.

Nothing happened as the convoy moved forward. After all, they had just left Demonheart City. Even if people were planning to attack, they wouldn’t do it near the city. If they alarmed the Forbidden Path Sect, they would all have bad luck.

The convoy continued to travel along the road. When evening came, Zhao Hai and the others planned to rest in a small town. Despite its size, the town was quite lively due to it being along a main road.

As they entered the town, Zhao Hai turned to the fat man and said, “Convoy Leader, our Blood Knife Gang is quite familiar with a family in this town. Although they don’t have an inn, they have a few houses we can rent. Every time the Blood Knife Gang stayed in the town, we would come to them. What do you think?” Ŗ𝒶ꞐŏBƐś

Although the Blood Knife Gang was tasked to guard the convoy, they were still hired by their employer. There were things that the employers can decide on. At the very least, Zhao Hai had to ask the fat man’s opinion.

When the fat man heard this, he rolled his eyes and said, “Didn’t you just join the Blood Knife Gang? How would you know if the family has a connection with the gang? My Moonfall Palace also has an old acquaintance in the town. We’ll stay there.” After he said that, the fat man ignored Zhao Hai. He waved his hand and led the convoy towards the town.

When Ma Long and Liu Cai heard the fat man, their expressions changed. The others from the Blood Knife Gang also had ugly expressions. There were unwritten rules in escort missions. Although the guards were hired and had to ask for permission from their employer, it was understood that the employer must listen to the guards. When it came to accommodations, employers rarely got involved. It was basic courtesy between the two parties. The Blood Knife Gang didn’t expect to be disrespected. This doesn’t only involve Zhao Hai, but also the face of the gang.

Because of this, the cultivators from the Blood Knife Gang gathered towards Zhao Hai. All of them were looking at the fat man with unkind expressions. Despite this, the fat man just sneered at them from inside his carriage.

Zhao Hai’s expression was also not good. He looked at the fat man and said, “Does the Convoy Leader doubt our capability? If the Convoy Leader can’t trust us, then the Blood Knife Gang would have to abandon this mission. As long as the Convoy Leader gives us one-tenth of the reward, our Blood Knife Gang will not say anything and leave. If this isn’t what the Convoy Leader is planning, then we will go rest according to our arrangement. The Convoy Leader can also decide where to rest. But the Blood Knife Gang will not take responsibility if something happens. Is the Convoy Leader alright with that?”

Zhao Hai’s words went along the rules of employment. If the employer was unsatisfied with the escort, they can pay one-tenth to make the escorts leave. If the employer doesn’t want to pay one-tenth, then they must continue the mission. However, if the employer decides to not follow the arrangement of the escort, they can stay another place. In that case, the guards aren’t responsible for whatever happens to the employer during the period. Everyone knows about these rules, naturally this includes Zhao Hai.

chapters.title: Chapter 2232: Clue
chapters.body:
Chapter 2232: Clue

As soon as the Convoy Leader heard this, his complexion changed. He thought that since Zhao Hai just joined the Blood Knife Gang, he wasn’t very familiar with escort missions. Therefore, he thought that he could suppress Zhao Hai. To his surprise, Zhao Hai had a strong attitude and laid the cards down in front of him. This caused the fat man to become pale.

The fat man looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Is this your decision, or the Blood Knife Gang’s?”

Zhao Hai looked at the fat man and said, “I am the leader of the Blood Knife Gang team. The words I speak naturally represent the words of the gang. What do you think, Convoy Leader? Will you give us our pay and we’ll leave, or do you want us to continue protecting you?”

The fat man looked at the Blood Knife Gang members behind Zhao Hai, and his eyes couldn’t help but flash with a strange light. He didn’t expect the Blood Knife Gang to be so united. To be honest, he didn’t expect everyone to support Zhao Hai.

Actually, there were quite a few people in the Blood Knife Gang who didn’t like Zhao Hai. After all, Zhao Hai was just a newcomer and yet he already holds a high position. How could the old members of the Blood Knife Gang accept it?

However, the Blood Knife Gang was also very proud, even overbearing. They would deal with their own matters within the gang. But if someone bullies another member, they wouldn’t just let it go. Not to mention the fat man being dismissive of the Blood Knife Gang’s face. It was natural for everyone to share the same reaction.

If Zhao Hai showed weakness in front of the fat man, the other members of the gang might now support him. However, Zhao Hai showed a strong front. It was because of this that the other members in the group had Zhao Hai’s back.

The fat man didn’t know this, so he was in a dilemma. If he agreed with Zhao Hai, he would lose face. But if he didn’t agree to Zhao Hai, then he would be tearing the face of the Blood Knife Gang. Then the convoy would no longer be protected, which was something that could never happen.

Zhao Hai wasn’t worried about the others from the Blood Knife Gang. He looked calmly at the fat man. He didn’t understand why the fat man decided to disrespect him. However, he knows that he cannot show weakness at this moment. Showing weakness at this time would affect his future in the Blood Knife Gang.

Although it hasn’t been long since Zhao Hai joined the Blood Knife Gang, he knew that the gang had been strong and domineering back in Split River City. Although they have relocated to Demonheart City and the gang has suppressed their nature, their domineering manner hasn’t fully disappeared. Therefore, if Zhao Hai showed any weakness, the Blood Knife Gang members would look down on him. Then he would no longer be able to gain any respect in the gang.

So, this time, Zhao Hai changed his usual gentle nature to a more domineering pose to gain support from the Blood Knife Gang members. Now, he was waiting for the Convoy Leader’s choice.

The Convoy Leader’s complexion changed. Finally, he thought of the Nine Revolutions Herb in his spatial bag and his expression lightened up. He cupped his fist towards Zhao Hai and said, “So there is such a rule. Please forgive me for not knowing. Since this is the care, then I’ll leave everything to Team Leader Zhao. We’ll go rest where Leader Zhao wants.”

Looking at the Convoy Leader’s change in expression, Zhao Hai’s heart sank. He knew that it was impossible for the fat man to be unaware of this rule. However, the fat man still chose to lose face. This wasn’t good news.

The more the fat man endures, the more it means that he cannot lose protection. As far as Zhao Hai knows, the road from Demonheart City and Split River City was still peaceful. The fat man was a Soul Fusion Cultivator, and he also has 20 other people with him. Even if they didn’t hire guards, they could still complete this task. Even so, they still hired other people. The fat man seems to care very much about the pace of travel. In other words, the fat man knew that the mission contained some danger, so he was able to endure losing face.

The fat man knew that there was danger, yet he issued a mission as though there was no danger. This meant that there was something hidden in the shadows.

Since the Convoy Leader has already backed down, Zhao Hai can no longer break the contract. Therefore, he took a deep breath and said, “Thank you, Convoy Leader. Then, let’s depart.” Although the Blood Knife Gang members felt suffocated by the disrespect, they also knew that Zhao Hai’s response was correct. They could only protect the convoy now, since that was the mission that they took.

Before long, Zhao Hai and the others arrived at the small town. After arriving at a small courtyard, Zhao Hai arranged for the convoy’s security.

The convoy came to rest because it was already getting dark. When everything was settled, it was already completely dark. The fat man and his men were already resting, but they still left five men to watch over the carriages.

On the other hand, Zhao Hai didn’t rest. Not only did he not rest, he also arranged ten people to watch the carriages. Then he called a few squad leaders to his room. ṜＡℕÖ𝐛È𝐬

In the Blood Knife Gang, ten people were inside a squad and each is headed by a squad leader. Since he brought 50 people with him, this meant that there were 5 squads and also 5 squad leaders.

The squad leaders were conferred why Zhao Hai called them over. They sat inside the room waiting for what he was going to say.

As Zhao Hai was frowning, he looked at the others and said, “Everyone, I’m afraid this mission will be hard to complete. It’s possible that we are going to be attacked. We need to be very careful.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, the 5 squad leaders couldn’t help but stare. Then they looked at each other. They didn’t understand why Zhao Hai would say this.

Zhao Hai looked at the squad leaders and said, “I felt that there’s a problem with the Convoy Leader.”

The squad leaders became even more confused when they heard this. A squad leader named Zhang Chen looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Team Leader, we can see that the fat man has some issues. But he is our employer. He can offend us all he wants. He knows about the rules, but he wasn’t afraid of going against it, we can see that. However, this doesn’t mean that we’re going to be attacked, right?” The other squad leaders nodded, clearly agreeing to Zhang Chen.

Zhao Hai waved his hand and said, “This isn’t because of what he did to me. It’s something else. The Convoy Leader wants to discredit me to show his authority. He’s hoping that it would be more convenient for him to command us in the future. But after I pushed back, he should have been offended. However, he endured. This is the problem.”

Zhang Chen and the others still can’t quite understand where Zhao Hai was getting at. After looking at them, Zhao Hai continued, “As you know, this mission isn’t the best mission. This means that its reward isn’t high. We’re expecting that this will be a simple escort mission that will just take a long time. A mission like this, ten people can finish it with ease. But since this is the Blood Knife Gang’s first mission in Demonheart City, we have no room for error. Therefore, we sent 50 people to complete it. It can be said that after taking the food and lodging, the Blood Knife Gang won’t make much money with this.”

Everyone nodded. Indicating that they were able to follow Zhao Hai’s thought. They were all old members of the Blood Knife Gang and have taken quite a few missions. But for escort missions, it has been sometime since the gang took one. Being the most powerful Gang in Split River City, they disdained missions that don’t have high pay. Missions that had low risks, low pay, and took a long time were given to other gangs and individuals to do.

The Blood Knife Gang has just entered Demonheart City. Moreover, compared to Split River City, Demonheart City is where dragons live. It was impossible for the Blood Knife Gang to monopolize all good missions like in the past. Because of this, they could only take escort missions. However, Zhang Chen and the others still don’t understand why their mission will be hard to complete.

Zhao Hai looked at everyone and said, “You still don’t get it? The Convoy Leader is a Soul Fusion Stage cultivator. He also brought 20 men whose strength is no worse than us. In this case, why did they hire escorts? With their strength, they can protect the convoy on their own. What would you do if you are the convoy leader, and you have a conflict with the person you hire? I would just pay them off and send them away. I believe any normal person would do this. However, the convoy leader just endured. This only meant that he needs us for this mission.”

Speaking to here, Zhao Hai stopped. Then he looked at the squad leaders and said, “This will be a dangerous route. Even with sufficient strength, he still thinks that he needs us. The only explanation for this is that he is expecting trouble along the way. In this case, how could this be a simple mission?”

The squad leaders looked at each other. They didn’t know what to say. Hearing Zhao Hai’s points, it was hard for them to think that nothing was going on.

Zhao Hai looked at everyone and said, “This is the Blood Knife Gang’s first mission in Demonheart City. There can be no mistakes. However, I didn’t expect that we would take such a mission. Judging by the current situation, there should be another story hidden from us. I will report this to the Gang Master and ask for appropriate support. No matter what, we need to complete this mission.”

As soon as Zhang Chen and the others heard this, their expressions turned cold. Then they nodded. Seeing that he convinced everyone, Zhao Hai said, “Alright, go and take some rest. Remind your subordinates to be vigilant at all times.”

If they weren’t convinced by Zhao Hai’s leadership before this, then now they have been won over. Zhao Hai was able to get a lot of information just by analyzing the fat man’s actions. This was something that they found hard to do. Although they had yet to fully believe in Zhao Hai’s speculations, they were all old cultivators. They would rather believe in a crumb of evidence and be cautious than be caught off-guard due to carelessness.

When the squad leaders left, Ma Long immediately looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Junior Brother, is what you said true? Does this mission have a secret we aren’t aware of?” Liu Cai also looked at Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “I won’t joke with these matters. Fortunately, I still have the messaging formation from Liu Zhen. I can tell him about our situation and wait for the gang’s reaction. I hope we can finish this mission with no problems.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai’s expressions couldn’t help but change when they heard this. To be honest, they really didn’t want anything to happen in this mission. They were from the Battle Corpse Sect, and they didn’t want to shed blood for the Blood Knife Gang. If the mission turned dangerous, it wouldn’t be a good thing for them.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “Alright, you don’t have to worry too much. What I said is only speculation. Perhaps nothing would happen.”

Ma long and Liu Cai didn’t show a relieved expression. After being by his side for many days, the two knew that Zhao Hai’s words were as valuable as gold. If he said that there was danger, then there was bound to be danger. This caused the mood of the two to turn heavy.

chapters.title: Chapter 2233: Carrying A Treasure
chapters.body:
Chapter 2233: Carrying A Treasure

Liu Zhen and Wang Da sat in the Gang Master’s room. Wang Da was holding a jade slip and carefully went through the contents. By the end, he looked up and said, “Zhen, have you read Little Ling’s report?”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “I have. To be honest, I was surprised at the beginning. But as I read more and more, I felt that his concerns are reasonable. I don’t know how many times I have walked the road between Split River City and Demonheart City. Besides the time we were attacked by the three gangs, there were no problems on the road. It should be a safe route. However, the other party not only hired us, they also brought people with them. It is indeed abnormal.”

Wand Da nodded, “It is not normal. But since this is the Blood Knife Gang’s first mission in Demonheart City, we cannot make any mistake. Whether the speculation is true or not, we have to make preparations. Zhen, go and gather the elites of the gang. Follow behind the convoy in secret.”

Liu Zhen nodded, “Alright. Like Little Ling said, we have to ensure the completion of this task. If something happens, we also have hidden forces we can use.”

Wang Da smiled faintly and said, “I must say, Little Ling is quite smart. I didn’t expect that he would have such ability. If what he said is true, he will have done the Blood Knife Gang a great favor.”

Liu Zhen nodded, a smile growing on his face. He was the one who recruited Zhao Hai. Now that Zhao Hai was doing well, he felt very proud. He stood up and cupped his fist towards Wang Da and said, “Gang Master, I’ll head back to prepare.”

Wang Da nodded. Like he said, if Zhao Hai’s suspicions were true, it would have a huge effect on the Blood Knife Gang. Cultivators believe very much in luck. If the Blood Knife Gang wants to live well in Demonheart City, they will need to complete a lot of missions. This made the gang’s first mission extremely crucial. If they started out strong, then they would have better missions in the future.

It was because of this consideration that they took the mission heading to Split River City. Not only because the mission had low pay and was unpopular, the gang was also familiar with the route which increased the chances of completion.

If something happens in the mission or if it fails, it wouldn’t be great for the Blood Knife Gang’s reputation. As people who believe in luck, cultivators wouldn’t hire a group that failed in their first mission.

Before long, Liu Zhen finished choosing the group of elites. Wang Da personally led the group and used a portable transmission formation to go to the meeting place agreed upon with Zhao Hai. However, they didn’t show themselves but instead hid outside the town.

Zhao Hai also received word from Liu Zhen telling him that the reinforcements have arrived. Only then did Zhao Hai relax.

The night passed quietly. The next morning, Zhao Hai and the others departed. The Convoy Leader didn’t put any airs in front of Zhao Hai and instead talked and laughed with him. Zhao Hai also wanted to find out what the Convoy Leader was hiding, so he indulged the fat man in conversation. It was as if the altercation the day before didn’t happen.

Although the others didn’t understand what Zhao Hai wanted to do, nobody said anything. Zhao Hai made a good showing the day before, which convinced the members of the Blood Knife Gang.

The day went smoothly. However, the fat man discovered that the Blood Knife Gang members were more vigilant compared to yesterday. This caused the fat man to be a bit worried.

The next three days passed uneventfully. However, the fat man didn’t relax his guard. He knew the importance of his cargo. He cannot afford to have anything happen.

Zhao Hai was also observing the fat man in this period of time. He wanted to see if the fat man showed any abnormal actions. But after three days of observation, Zhao Hai found that the fat man seemed to be normal besides the fact that he was afraid of death. But this was exactly what Zhao Hai had problems with.

The fat man was a Soul Fusion Cultivator. In the convoy there were very few people that could go against him. However, the fat man not only stayed in the carriage at all times, he also had five to six guards with him.

Although the fat man seemed to be focusing on something else, Zhao Hai noticed that his guards were surrounding him, making sure that any attack wouldn’t get to him first.

This caused Zhao Hai to come up with an unusual thought. When night came and the convoy had settled down, Zhao Hai stealthily left and met with Wang Da and the others.

All this time, Wang Da and the others were following behind at a distance. Despite not making any appearance, Zhao Hai was still aware of their position. 𝔯âꞐóBƐꞩ

In a forest outside the town, Zhao Hai cupped his fist towards Wang Da and Liu Zhen, “Zhao Ling has seen the Gang Master and Hall Master Liu.”

Wang Da waved his hand and said, “Alright, you don’t have to be polite with me. Why did you come here? Do you have something to report?”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Gang, Master, I’m here to report. After three days of observation, I have made some discoveries.”

Wang Da nodded and said, “Sit down and tell me.”

Zhao Hai sat down on a piece of beast skin opposite Wang Da. Since they had been staying in the wild, these animal skins became invaluable. At this time, Wang Da had several pieces around him.

After Zhao Hai sat down, he said, “Gang Master, after three days of observation, I discovered that the Convoy Leader seems to be afraid of being attacked. He always has several people around him. And this is what I find suspicious.”

Wang Da looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Suspicious? How can that be suspicious?”

Zhao Hai explained, “To become a convoy leader, the fat man shouldn’t have been that cowardly. If he is, then he wouldn’t have reached the Soul Fusion Stage. Moreover, from his previous actions, his current act doesn’t line up. The fat man seemed to be convinced that he would be attacked.”

As he looked at Wang Da and Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai continued, “This could mean one thing. The fat man is carrying a valuable treasure with him. Moreover, its value might exceed our expectations. So valuable that I reckon if the Forbidden Path Sect were to know of this treasure, they might want to snatch it for themselves.”

Hearing this, Wang Da and Liu Zhen’s bodies couldn’t help but shake. They looked at each other and saw the greedy look on their faces.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “Gang Master, we can test him tomorrow. Lead a group to attack the convoy and see how he responds. If he protects himself first and not the cargo, then we can be sure that the treasure is with his body.”

Wang Da nodded, “Alright. I’ll go attack the convoy tomorrow. Go and observe. If that fatty really has a treasure…” He didn’t say anything mire but Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen understood his message.

Zhao Hai added, “The Blood Knife Gang has been in Split River City for a long time. The destination of the fat man shouldn’t be Split River City. Once we arrive, they would hire another set of guards. It’s most likely those from the three gangs. When the time comes, the Gang Master can take action and deal with them all in one clean swoop. Not only can we get revenge, we might also gain a valuable treasure in the process.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Wang Da’s face couldn’t help but change. He wanted to take action before the convoy arrived at Split River City. But now that he heard Zhao Hai, he hesitated.

Zhao Hai looked at Wang Da and said, “Gang Master, if that fat man really has a treasure with him, then that treasure most likely belongs to the Moonfall Palace. There should be people in there who are aware of the treasure. If we attack before arriving at Split River City, Moonfall Palace will certainly find fault with us. When the time comes, they don’t even need to make a move, they could just announce that the Blood Knife Gang has a treasure and we’ll be finished. Therefore, we cannot cast doubt on us. We need to reach Split River City first before moving.”

Wang Da stared, then he nodded and said, “Alright, we’ll do it your way. Let’s test him tomorrow. If that fatty really has a treasure, then the moment he leaves Split River City will be his death.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Then, Gang Master, I’ll head back first. I can’t be seen here.”

Wang Da nodded, “Go and pay close attention. Make sure to protect yourself and our brothers.” Zhao Hai cupped his fist before leaving.

After Zhao Hai left, Wang Da turned to Liu Zhen and sighed, “He’s a good kid. Vicious and merciless. He’ll be great one day. Little Zhen, once the sect begins recruiting disciples, I’m planning to have Little Ling apply. What do you think?”

Liu Zhen smiled faintly and said, “Although Little Ling is vicious and merciless, he looks after his own people. If he enters the Forbidden Path Sect, I’m sure he will not forget our Blood Knife Gang. It’s a good idea for him to join the sect.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2234: Ambush
chapters.body:
Chapter 2234: Ambush

Chapter 2234 – Ambush

What was the biggest obstacle to gangs? There was only one answer, the sects. Countless small gangs couldn’t compare to a sect. These small gangs depend on sects to survive. At the same time, they also need to provide a steady stream of fresh blood for the sects.

As for gang members who were able to join a sect, if they want to thrive inside, they will need the gang’s support. The gang can provide them with cultivation materials. Only in this way can these members become inner disciples, true disciples, or even core disciples of the sect.

Once these members gain status within the sect, they can help their gang expand. Huge gangs in Demonheart City were able to develop using this method.

Wang Da also wants the Blood Knife Gang to take this path. However, he hasn’t found the right person. If he sent a person to the sect and they can’t obtain a high status, then all of his investments would be wasted. Because of this, Wang Da placed great importance on the candidate to be sent to the sect. Seeing Zhao Hai’s performance these days, Wang Da couldn’t help but think that he was the right candidate.

Zhao Hai was unaware of Wang Da’s thoughts. After returning to the town, he found Ma Long, Liu Cai, and the other squad leaders. He told them the plan he discussed with Wang Da. He didn’t say why they were doing this, but the squad leaders didn’t ask. After all, this was the gang leader’s order. It wasn’t their turn to make any remarks.

After sending the squad leaders out, Zhao Hai looked at Ma Long and Liu Cai and said, “The sect just sent me a message. I haven’t opened it yet. Since you’re here, we can read it together.” Then Zhao Hai took out a jade slip and searched it using his spiritual force.

The jade slip was sent through the transmission formation when Zhao Hai met Wang Da. The message was sent by Wei Tiande. Zhao Hai knew that the jade slip would contain instructions for what they would do in the future.

The jade slip would indicate whether they would return to the underground world or to stay. After going through the jade slip, Zhao Hai sighed. Then he passed the jade slip to Ma Long and Liu Cai.

Seeing Zhao Hai’s expression, Ma Long and Liu Cai already knew what’s inside the jade slip. Zhao Hai wouldn’t have such an expression if they could return to the underground world.

Sure enough, when they read through the jade slip, Ma Long and Liu Cai couldn’t help but smile bitterly. Just as they thought, they were instructed to stay in the True Spirit Realm. And it would be best if they could infiltrate the Forbidden Path Sect.

The three didn’t know that the decision whether they could head back or not had been discussed by the Battle Corpse Sect several times. Wei Tiande actually wanted them to return. But in the end, the Battle Corpse Sect decided to have Zhao Hai and the others lurk in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory. This way, once they attack, they would have people helping them inside.

Looking at the jade slip, Zhao Hai sighed, then he looked at Ma Long and Liu Cai and said, “Looks like we have to regard ourselves as people from the True Spirit Realm to prepare for deeper infiltration. From now on, we should forget that we’re members of the Battle Corpse Sect.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai just smiled bitterly as they nodded. They don’t know what to say. To be honest, they were already prepared for such an outcome.

Although the two of them weren’t high level members of the Battle Corpse Sect, they knew well that infiltrating the True Spirit Realm was a very dangerous job for the underground world. Plenty of cultivators tried and failed, never to return.

They could be considered as successful infiltrators. If the Battle Corpse Sect withdraws them from the mission, then all of their efforts would be wasted. Nevertheless, now that their thoughts became true, they still found it hard to calm down.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and suddenly smiled, “Actually, our situation isn’t that bad. As people from the underground world, haven’t we always wanted to return to the True Spirit Realm? People fight to the death to return to the True Spirit Realm, and now we’re here. Not only that, we have an identity to continue living here.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Ma Long and Liu Cai couldn’t help but stare. Then their eyes shone as they chuckled, “Right, right. This is also good.”

Zhao Hai sighed and said, “Don’t think about it so much. This time, the sect didn’t ask us to collect information. We just have to mix well with the Blood Knife Gang and find a way to enter the Forbidden Path Sect. Alright, you can go back and rest. We still have a play to do.” The two nodded and then left. 𝙧𝘢𐌽ΟᛒÈꞩ

When the two left, Zhao Hai sighed. Then he set a few formations in his room before entering the Space to see Laura and the others.

Seeing Zhao Hai’s depressed face, Laura and the others laughed. Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and said, “I think I acted too well. I just want to sneak into the underground world to get information and cause problems. But now, I’ve been sent back to the True Spirit Realm and couldn’t go back.”

Laura chuckled and said, “Brother Hai, there’s no need to trouble yourself too much. You can just find an opportunity to enter the underground world and cause trouble. You don’t have to be so busy.”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and said, “I should have done that. Forget it, let’s talk about it in the future. Let’s take a rest. By the way, what do you think that fat man is carrying that he’s being too careful?”

Laura knit her brows and said, “I don’t know, but I’m sure that it must be in the fat man’s spatial ring. He’s also very careful in not taking it out. What’s certain is that the tuning on him must be very valuable.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “No matter what, we’ll know in a few days. Right, how are the Tyrant Blade Sect’s preparations?”

Laura smiled and said, “Rest assured, the sect is doing well. You don’t have to worry.”

Zhao Hai nodded. Then he sighed and said, “I haven’t seen Little Tie lately. How is he doing?”

Laura smiled and said, “He’s doing well. His progress is very fast. He’s also opened up to the kids of the Long Clan. Now he’s acting more of a child.”

Zhao Hai gave a gratified nod and said, “That’s good. That’s good. With you in the Long Clan, I’m also relieved. For the Long Clan to exist for so many years, they are not simple. They can guarantee your safety. But remember, if you really need it, don’t hesitate to enter the Space. Even if it gets exposed, I don’t want anything to happen to you.”

Laura and the others felt touched by Zhao Hai’s words. They knew very well how important the Space was for Zhao Hai. And now, Zhao Hai would rather expose the Space than have them experience harm. How could they not be happy?

After resting in the Space for one day, Zhao Hai left before the convoy departed. Although nothing seemed different compared to the past few days, Zhao Hai and the others were more alert.

The convoy travelled all morning. When it was almost noon, Zhao Hai looked around and said, “There is a clearing three kilometers ahead. We can rest there for the day.”

Upon hearing this, everyone complied, and the convoy sped up unconsciously. At this time, two spells suddenly came from in front. The two spells were large, but they weren’t very strong.

Zhao Hai first responded, his complexion changed as he shouted, “Enemy attack!” Then he moved and took two claw weapons out and guarded the side of the main carriage. The others also took their weapons out and released attacks to strike the incoming spells.

As for the convoy leader, the moment Zhao Hai shouted, he, along with his men, looked around nervously.

“Hahaha. I didn’t expect our Moonlight Bandit Group to meet such fat sheep just after arriving. Listen, leave everything and I might spare your lives.” As he spoke, a group of people appeared and surrounded the convoy.

The bandits wore grey clothing and had their faces covered. They also had varying weapons in their hands. The person at the lead was a tall cultivator whose face was also covered. Hearing his voice, Zhao Hai guessed that it must be Liu Zhen.

Seeing Liu Zhen’s act, Zhao Hai had to stop himself from smiling. Instead, he changed his expression as he said, “What Moonlight Bandit group? I have never heard of you. To dare attack the convoy guarded by the Blood Knife Gang. I can see that you are new here. I can give you a chance to retreat now.”

Liu Zhen laughed and said, “Kid, you’re too arrogant. If I don’t let you taste our might, you might regret it. Now, die!” With a wave of his hand, the other cultivators of the Blood Knife Gang attacked. Zhao Hai also commanded his men to meet them. The two sides began to fight. The clashing of weapons was heard everywhere.

The fat convoy leader had a face full of worry as he looked at the battle. He discovered that the attackers were as strong as the Blood Knife Gang. He’s afraid that Zhao Hai’s men wouldn’t be able to block the bandits. Despite this, he didn’t command his personal guards to help. To the fat man, Zhao Hai and the others’ lives don’t matter. It was fine as long as he survived.

chapters.title: Chapter 2235: Murder On The River
chapters.body:
Chapter 2235: Murder On The River

As he observed the fat man, Zhao Hai confirmed his suspicions. He didn’t say a word and continued to lead Ma Long and the others in battle. He also shouted a command that was a code for Liu Zhen to retreat.

Once he got Zhao Hai’s message, Liu Zhen exchanged a few more attacks with Zhao Hai before running away and dropping a few corpses. Zhao Hai also sent someone to clean up the battlefield and had everyone tend to their injuries. After that, he walked up to the fat man and said, “Convoy Leader, we’re fine now. It’s just a few thieves who don’t know how to live. There’s no need to worry.”

The fat man nodded and thanked Zhao Hai, “Thank you very much, Mister Zhao and the Blood Knife Gang. If it weren’t for you, the convoy would have ended here.”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “This is our duty. You don’t need to be polite. We can depart, but we must hurry along. If we cannot find a place to stay the night, we will have to camp outdoors.”

The fat man nodded and said, “Alright. I’ll follow Mister’s words.” Zhao Hai nodded and then he waved his hand. The convoy set off once more. Although the battle was just a play, for the sake of truthfulness, a few people were still injured. Some even feigned death, using beast blood for effect.

The convoy rested at noon before departing once more. This time, they didn’t encounter any attacks.

Zhao Hai continued to strengthen the convoy’s alertness in the following days as they hurried along. They even sent scouts ahead to make sure that there was no ambush.

After half a month of travelling, Zhao Hai and the others finally arrived at Split River City. Looking at the familiar wall outside Split River City, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh. They had just left Split River City a short time ago, he didn’t expect to return this soon. But now, they weren’t returning as one of the four major gangs in the city, but as the Blood Knife Gang from Demonheart City.

Although they kept their name, the Blood Knife Gang’s status in Split River City was completely different. Right now, the Blood Knife Gang doesn’t have a single industry in the city. The Blood Knife Gang’s previous headquarters might still be present, but it was only guarded by a few people.

Despite this, the three gangs didn’t attack the Blood Knife Gang’s remaining building. Although they were aware that the Blood Knife Gang had moved out, they couldn’t ignore the fact that Wang Da had broken through to the Teleportation Stage. They also knew that even if the Blood Knife Gang moved out, as long as Wang Da was alive, they couldn’t afford to offend them.

As for the cultivators behind Zhao Hai, they had quite a few feelings towards Split River City. After all, they had lived in the city for quite some time.

Zhao Hai turned his head towards everyone and said, “Enter the city. Escort the convoy leader to the meeting point. Once the mission is complete, we’ll take a rest at the old main hall.” The guards roared in celebration before escorting the convoy into the city.

People of Split River City were very familiar with the Blood Knife Gang’s flag. After not seeing the gang’s flag for a long time, the cultivators in the city were stunned upon seeing Zhao Hai and the others. The other gangs in the city were startled as well.

Zhao Hai didn’t pay attention to these people. He continued to lead the convoy to the Moonfall Palace’s branch hall. After handing off the mission and receiving the reward, Zhao Hai led everyone to the former main hall of the Blood Knife Gang. Wang Da and the others have already secretly returned to the main hall.

After arranging his men to rest, Zhao Hai went to see Wang Da and Liu Zhen. Seeing Zhao Hai arrive, Wang Da waved his hand and said, “Little Ling, come and take a seat.”

Zhao Hai nodded and then sat down. Wang Da looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Have you gotten any ideas as to what the fat man is carrying?”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly as he shook his head and said, “Unfortunately, I haven’t. The Convoy Leader is very tight-lipped about his cargo. I also can’t ask directly since it would only raise suspicion.”

Wang Da nodded, “It’s what I was expecting. Merchants, each one of them, are slimy fellows. It’s impossible to get something out of their mouths. Alright, let’s not talk about this. Tomorrow, lead the others to return to Demonheart City. Don’t let anyone suspect that we have left Demonheart City.”

Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen nodded. Wang Da looked at the two and said, “When all of this is over, I definitely won’t treat you badly.”

Liu Zhen smiled faintly and said, “Thank you very much, Gang Master.” Zhao Hai also expressed his gratitude to the Gang Master. He knew Wang Da’s promise was to make them keep the matter a secret. If Zhao Hai declined, Wang Da might become suspicious of him.

After exchanging a few more words with the two, Wang Da waved his hand and allowed them to leave. Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen complied and returned to their own rooms. Ŕ𝘼ŊǑᛒƐꞩ

The night passed uneventfully. Early the next morning, Liu Zhen left with the rest of the hidden forces. As for Zhao Hai’s group, they weren’t in a hurry. They only left Split River City after eating breakfast, under the gazes of the people of Split River City.

Seeing the Blood Knife Gang’s group leave, the three gangs of Split River City relaxed. To be honest, they were afraid of the Blood Knife Gang returning to Split River City. The Blood Knife Gang was known for seeking vengeance over a simple fault. Back when they attacked the Blood Knife Gang, only then did they find out that Wang Da had broken through to the Teleportation Stage. At that time, they were terrified. They were afraid that Wang Da would retaliate. But to their surprise, the Blood Knife Gang instead chose to move to Demonheart City. Although this wasn’t what they expected, they welcomed this outcome.

The Blood Knife Gang’s return this time surprised the three gangs. They were afraid that the Blood Knife Gang would return to Split River City. If that happens, their good times would be over. Therefore, seeing that Zhao Hai and the others only stayed for one night before leaving, the people from the three gangs let out sighs of relief. At the same time, they sent people to monitor Zhao Hai’s actions, fearing that Zhao Hai would return to kill people.

Zhao Hai was naturally aware that there were people following behind him, but he didn’t care. In fact, the presence of these people was good for him. They would provide a good alibi for the Blood Knife Gang. When the time comes and something happens to the fat man, Zhao Hai and the others wouldn’t be the first suspects.

Five days after Zhao Hai and the others left Split River City, a new mission was issued in the city’s mission hall. It was from the Moonfall Palace. The mission was to escort a batch of goods heading to River Border City. The reward was two thousand jade essences.

The mission was quite lucrative for Split River City. River Border City wasn’t very far. It was a land route with a river crossing. The road was known to be peaceful. The reward of two thousand jade essences wasn’t low. The moment the mission was posted, it was immediately picked up by one of the three gangs.

Eight days after Zhao Hai left Split River City, a convoy of ten carriages from the Moonfall Palace left the city. This time, only 30 people were sent by the palace. This was because the road was very safe. They didn’t need too many guards.

The convoy moved forward with no issues. Two days later, they stopped at the riverside to prepare for the river crossing. They would traverse the river for three days before disembarking. Then it would take another two days before they arrived at Rover Border City.

There were specialized vessels to take the carriages along the river, so the convoy didn’t need to worry about the crossing. Naturally, the vessel couldn’t just take the convoy, there would be other passengers inside. With various merchants on board, the vessel was quite lively.

A day after the vessel started moving along the river, a black shadow appeared and began killing everyone on the boat. Although the people on the boat quickly discovered that they were being attacked, there was nothing they could do since the attacker was at the Teleportation Stage. Nobody could go against him. The people on the boat were killed one by one. Naturally, the black shadow also killed the fat convoy leader and took his spatial item. When the shadow probed the ring with his spiritual force, he discovered that it had been secured with a spiritual lock. He couldn’t open it in a short time. However, this also informed the shadow that he got what he was looking for.

After finding the ring, the shadow moved and flew in mid-air. Then he punched towards the ship, sending it to the depths of the river. Then the shadow disappeared. The river returned to its calm, it was as if a huge vessel hadn’t been sunk just now.

Shortly after the shadow disappeared from the river, he reappeared at another place. After looking around, he found that there was nobody following him. Then he turned around and left. After a flash of light, the shadow’s body changed its form.

Naturally, the shadow was Wang Da. Although Wang Da only took the fat man’s spatial item, he didn’t just ignore the other goods on the ship. He found a large boulder and hollowed it out. After placing the goods inside, he sunk the boulder into a shallow part of the river.

Wang Da didn’t immediately return to Demonheart City after acquiring the spatial item. Instead, he went to a mountain and found an empty cave. After making sure that he wouldn’t be disturbed, Wang Da took out the fat man’s spatial item and carefully dealt with the spiritual lock.

The spatial item was a rarely-seen necklace item. Ordinary spatial items would be in the form of a bracelet or a ring to make it easier to remove and insert items.

Spatial items in the form of a necklace or a belt were quite rare. The fat man’s spatial item was in the form of a necklace.

The necklace-shaped spatial item was well-made. Although it looked ordinary, cultivators preferred their treasures to blend in so as to not attract any unwanted attention. Items that were too dazzling would only cause troubles.

The fat man’s necklace was made to blend and hide from prying eyes. This caused Wang Da to be more curious about its contents. He used his spiritual force to slowly grind the spiritual lock down. This was the slowest way of dealing with a spiritual lock, but it was also the safest.

Cultivators rarely use spiritual locks on their spatial items. This was because spatial licks cost a lot of spiritual force. And once a spatial item was spiritually locked, taking something out or putting something in would become tedious.

There are several methods to remove spiritual locks. The first method was to match the spiritual force patterns to the spiritual lock, just like a lock and a lockpick. Despite the quickest, it was also the most difficult. The lock wouldn’t open unless the spiritual force pattern used was exactly the same as the one used to lock it. This method of breaking through a spiritual lock only exists in theory. It’s impossible for one to be accurate with it all the time.

Another method to break spiritual locks was to break it open with brute force. Using a very powerful spiritual force, one could overwhelm the spiritual lock and cause it to break. However, this method risks damaging whatever was inside.

The method that Wang Da used was the slowest one. But it was also the most consistent and safest method. Using one’s own spiritual force, a cultivator can grind down a spiritual lock until it dissipates. This is a very long process. Sometimes, it would take an entire day or several days to complete.

Since he didn’t know what was inside the spatial item, Wang Da couldn’t use the brute force method to break the lock. Because of this, he could only resort to the long process to get through. However, Wang Da was certain that what’s inside was valuable. Otherwise, the Moonfall Palace wouldn’t be this meticulous in transporting it.

The Moonfall Palace was a huge trading company inside the Forbidden Path Sect’s influence. It shares the same stage as the Abundance Hall. While the Abundance Hall has the Long Clan behind it, the Moonfall Palace has an Elder of the Moonfall Palace behind it. Although the Elder has been in seclusion for quite some time, the size of the Moonfall Palace allowed it to continue with its affairs unhindered. The Elder behind the Moonfall Palace was also very powerful, so nobody dared fight the palace.

Despite such a background, the Moonfall Palace was still so careful in transporting the item, which showed how precious it was. Therefore, Wang Da was being extra careful. He was afraid that his haste would damage the item inside.

chapters.title: Chapter 2236: Sudden Death
chapters.body:
Chapter 2236: Sudden Death

Wang Da’s instincts are telling him that there was something precious inside the spatial item. This was because he had been grinding the spiritual lock down for an entire day, and yet the lock hasn’t shown signs of being broken through.

Looking at the inconspicuous necklace in his hand, Wang Da’s fiery gaze became more intense. He was now becoming more and more eager to see what was inside.

On the other hand, Zhao Hai and the others have yet to return to Demonheart City. They spent the way back comfortably. This was because they didn’t take a mission while heading back. This allowed them to travel in a more relaxed way.

During this mission, Zhao Hai showed his skills to everyone. He was able to traverse a sticky situation in front of the Blood Knife Gang members. This allowed him to command the others smoothly on the return trip.

Liu Zhen was also leading his men back to Demonheart City. Nobody has noticed their departure. This was partly because the gang was still new to the city and also partly because Liu Zhen and the others had been stealthy in their departure. They only left with a small group of 50 people. The gang was also currently busy with building houses, so nobody paid any attention to them.

After Liu Zhen returned to Demonheart City, the Blood Knife Gang continued to be low-key. At the same time, Liu Zhen was paying attention to any movements made by the Moonfall Palace. He wanted to see how they would react.

However, in the following days, there was no response from the Moonfall Palace. It was as if nothing happened.

At this time, Wang Da has reached the final stretch of his goal. He could feel the spiritual lock loosen. As long as he continues, the spiritual lock will break.

Despite the goal being very close, Wang Da didn’t become careless. He knows that this was the most important period. If he wasn’t careful, he might destroy the spatial item. He slowed down and made sure to properly grind down the remaining energy in the spiritual lock.

After two hours, Wang Da felt the spiritual lock disintegrate. He couldn’t help but light up with joy. Ten minutes later, the spiritual lock completely disappeared. Wang Da couldn’t help but relax.

But all of a sudden, a terrifying amount of spiritual force gushed out from the spatial necklace. Before Wang Da could respond, the spiritual force shook his soul causing it to collapse.

Wang Da only felt a pain on his head before he vomited blood and fell down. The spiritual force from the spatial necklace hasn’t been exhausted and continued to flood Wang Da’s head. In the next moment, Wang Da’s head burst like a watermelon. Not long after he broke through to the Teleportation Stage, Wang Da perished in an unknown cave.

At the same time as this happened, Zhao Hai heard the Space issue a prompt, “Observation Subject No. 1221 has died. Asking the Host whether to withdraw the monitoring.”

Hearing the prompt, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare. Then his complexion changed. He knew clearly who Observation Subject 1221 was, it was Blood Knife Gang’s Master Wang Da.

Zhao Hai didn’t dare monitor a Teleportation Stage Expert like Wang Da. Someone like him could easily discover the presence of liquid silver.

Although Zhao Hai couldn’t monitor Wang Da, he could easily monitor the Moon fall Palace’s convoy leader. Zhao Hai could see how much care the fat man placed towards his necklace. Therefore, Zhao Hai placed a speck of liquid silver dust on the necklace.

When Wang Da took the convoy leader’s life, Zhao Hai didn’t remove the silver dust on the necklace since it wasn’t necessary. Even if Wang Da noticed that someone was monitoring him through the necklace, he wouldn’t think that it was Zhao Hai.

However, Zhao Hai still didn’t dare actively monitor the necklace in Wang Da’s hand. Experts like Wang Da were extremely sensitive.

Because of this, Zhao Hai only had the Space use the necklace to observe passively. So, if something major happened to the necklace, Zhao Hai would be notified immediately.

But Zhao Hai didn’t expect the report he’d receive would be about Wang Da’s death. This information stunned Zhao Hai. Wang Da was a Teleportation Stage Expert, how could he die easily? What happened?

Thinking of this, Zhao Hai contacted the Space, “Show me the recording before Subject No. 1221 died.”

The Space immediately complied, then a recording appeared in Zhao Hai’s mind. Looking at the video, Zhao Hai understood how Wang Da died.

Seeing Wang Da, Zhao Hai knew that the spatial necklace had a spiritual lock. And Wang Da was using the safest way to break it.

Then Wang Da smiled, obviously managing to open the spiritual lock. Then all of a sudden, Wang Da collapsed after vomiting blood. Shortly after, Wang Da’s head exploded.

Seeing this, Zhao Hai understood what happened. Besides a spiritual lock, the necklace also contained a wave of terrifying spiritual force. If the lock was opened in an unorthodox way, the spiritual force would surge out and attack the trespasser.

When Wang Da finally broke the spiritual lock, he unconsciously lowered his guard. So, when he opened the lock, the spiritual force easily caused him to faint. Then after that, it attacked more fiercely causing Wang Da’s definite death.

Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh. He didn’t expect Wang Da’s life to end like this. He just broke through to the Teleportation Stage. He was dreaming of using his new strength to reach greater heights. In the end, he perished in this manner. ꞦάŊő𐌱ΕꞨ

Despite this, Zhao Hai didn’t feel bad. With a thought, he opened a spatial rift underneath the necklace, sending it straight to the Space.

Looking at the necklace inside the Space’s inventory, Zhao Hai’s gaze couldn’t help but turn hot. He really wanted to know what’s inside the necklace. However, he also knew that this wasn’t the right time. He had seen what happened to Wang Da, and he wouldn’t make the same mistake. He would wait until everything was stable before slowly checking inside.

After putting the necklace away, Zhao Hai looked at Wang Da’s corpse. Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh, then he waved his hand and sent Wang Da’s body to the Space to be turned into Undead.

All of this happened without Zhao Hai moving his body. Others have no idea that something significant has happened. Naturally, Zhao Hai wouldn’t tell them either.

Zhao Hai and the others spent the next few days calmly on the road. Finally, twelve days later, the group arrived at Demonheart City.

Just as Zhao Hai and the others returned to Demonheart City, several experts in the Teleportation Stage arrived at the cave where Wang Da stayed. Besides bloodstains, these experts were unable to find anything. Most importantly, the item they were tracking has been lost.

These experts were naturally from the Moonfall Palace. The Moonfall Palace were able to trace Wang Da down because the spatial necklace was specially made. Besides the spiritual lock and the spiritual force attack, the necklace would also send its location once it was breached. Although this function could only be used one time, it was enough for the Moonfall Palace to locate the cave.

However, after arriving at the cave, the experts from the Moonfall Palace were unable to find anything. They immediately scoured the mountain to look for clues. When they still found nothing, they went to the next place of suspicion; Split River City.

Upon entering Split River City, the experts didn’t immediately make a move. They first inquired about news in Split River City. The experts stayed in the city for a few days. In these few days, one or two experts from the three gangs would suddenly disappear. These experts were all elder-level members of the three gangs. There people held pivotal positions in Split River City. THer disappearance caused the city to be chaotic. Even the Blood Knife Gang was involved. This was because the three gangs suspected that the disappearances were Wang Da’s doing.

After several elders from the three gangs disappeared one after another, the experts finally left. After leaving Split River City, the experts rushed to Demonheart City. After that, the Moonfall Palace didn’t dare make too many moves. Demonheart City was vastly different compared to Split River City. In Demonheart City, the Moonfall Palace couldn’t do anything they wanted. In Split River City, due to the lack of Teleportation Stage Experts, even if the Moonfall Palace eradicated the three gangs, no trouble would come for them.

But in Demonheart City, experts could be seen everywhere. Although the Moonfall Palace possessed several Teleportation Stage Experts, the other powers in the city were the same.

Most importantly, Demonheart City is under the Forbidden Path Sect’s control. If the sect found out that the Moonfall Palace was causing trouble, they would be erased. Not only would the Moonfall Palace be destroyed, those who followed the Moonfall Palace would also be dealt with. The Forbidden Path Sect wouldn’t allow anyone to challenge their authority.

chapters.title: Chapter 2237: Understanding The Moonfall Palace
chapters.body:
Chapter 2237: Understanding The Moonfall Palace

Not long after Zhao Hai returned to Demonheart City, he already knew that experts had arrived in Wang Da’s cave. Listening to these experts, Zhao Hai knew that they were from the Moonfall Palace. The strength these people displayed surprised Zhao Hai. He didn’t expect the Moonfall Palace to have this much strength. They were actually able to send several experts in the Teleportation Stage at once.

Zhao Hai also knew what the Moonfall Palace did in Split River City. Several elders from the three gangs were captured by those experts for the sole reason of finding out what happened.

Unfortunately for the experts, they found that the three gangs had nothing to do with this matter. In the end, they left Split River City. Zhao Hai could also infer why the experts returned to Split River City. They were going to make a move on the Blood Knife Gang next. The problem was who they would attack.

Zhao Hai was sure that these experts wouldn’t let him off. This was because Zhao Hai was the team leader of the guard party. It would be strange if the Moonfall Palace just let him go.

Zhao Hai knew that he could no longer wait. He has to find out what was inside the necklace. In the last few days, he was afraid that he would repeat Wang Da’s mistakes, so he didn’t use his spiritual force to probe the necklace. But now, it seems like he has to.

The night was as dark as usual, but Zhao Hai wasn’t inside his room. Instead, he was inside the Space underneath the Hundred Spirits Tree. The necklace that killed Wang Da was in his hand.

Lausa and the others stood next to Zhao Hai with worry in their faces. Laura looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Brother Hai, how about you forget it. Even if you knew what’s inside, the Moonfall Palace still wouldn’t let you off. We can still wait until we can find a way to look inside the necklace.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and waved his hand, “Forget it, things have already come to this point. It’s the same whether we know it sooner or later. I am just curious about what it is that the Moonfall Palace would be this rabid in searching for it. Also, if the Moonfall Palace really thinks that it is valuable, they would have sent a Teleportation Stage Expert to guard the convoy leader in secret. However, they didn’t do it. Isn’t that strange?”

Laura thought about it and nodded, “That’s true. But it is also understandable. The Moonfall Palace has a lot of competition. Those people would certainly keep an eye on them. If they sent someone to protect the convoy leader and it was discovered by their competitors, then the consequence might be more disadvantageous to the Moonfall Palace. Seeing that the Moonfall Palace is doing their best to obscure any information about what’s inside the necklace shows how important it is.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “I am now more curious about this thing. Laura, watch over me. If there’s anything wrong, use the Space to break me out of it.” Laura nodded. Then everyone began to turn serious.

Once he was ready, Zhao Hai slowly probed the necklace with his spiritual force. Zhao Hai was very careful. He was even ready to withdraw at any time. But what surprised him was that the moment his spiritual force entered the necklace, there was no spiritual lock nor were there any attacks. Inside the necklace was an ordinary pocket of space with a jade box inside and nothing else.

Zhao Hai searched the necklace once more and found nothing. He didn’t even find any hints of a foreign spiritual force.

Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh at his good luck. It seems like the only attack inside the necklace has been fully used on Wang Da.

Zhao Hai let out a long breath and then he opened his eyes. He looked at Laura and the others and said, “It’s safe. There’s no danger inside.” Then with an intention, a jade box appeared in his hand.

Carefully looking at the jade box, Zhao Hai saw that it was well-made. Moreover, the entire box was made with exotic jade.

Exotic jades are a type of mutated jade and are usually found in small amounts. They were generally used for jade slips. An example of mutated jade were jade essences which are used by cultivators as currency.

A stronger jade than jade essence was the jade marrow. It was also used as currency and was more valuable compared to jade essence. The energy contained within it is also stronger.

Besides the commonly used mutated jades, there was the exotic jade. Generally, jade has the earth attribute. Exotic jade, on the other hand, has special attributes. There are even exotic jades with extreme attributes like lightning. Nobody knew how lightning-attribute jades are formed, but they are very valuable materials for creating weapons. It was precisely because of these properties that exotic jades were very expensive.

The jade box in Zhao Hai’s hand was made entirely of exotic jade. Feeling the strong vitality in the box, Zhao Hai immediately knew that the exotic jade had the wood-attribute. Only exotic jades with the wood attribute would have such strong vitality.

At this time, the Space issued a prompt, “Unique jade containing strong life force detected. Building corresponding jade mines in the Space. Space has leveled up. All crops in the Space have been enhanced by 10%. Speed of crop growth has improved by 10%.”

Zhao Hai was stunned. It must be known that it has been some time since the Space has leveled up. This was because the Space was already at a very high-level. Zhao Hai didn’t expect the Space to level up at this time.

Zhao Hai immediately felt that it was worth it. At this point, what’s inside the box doesn’t matter. The upgrade of the Space and the creation of new mines was already a good outcome for Zhao Hai.

At the same time, Zhao Hai could guess why the Moonfall Palace used exotic jade for the box. Wood-attribute jade only had one general use, and that was to preserve the life force of herbs.

The True Spirit Realm was abundant with precious herbs. In the past, these herbs would need to be refined into medicine immediately or else their potency would decrease. There would even be herbs whose properties change if they were left out for too long.

Afterwards, cultivators from the True Spirit Realm discovered that exotic jade with the wood attribute could preserve an herb’s quality for a long time after it was picked. It was because of this that wood-attribute exotic jade became the most used exotic jade in the realm. РÀＮǑ𝐛Ês

Zhao Hai doesn’t need to guess what’s inside the jade box in his hand. There was a very high chance that what’s inside was a precious herb. This thought delighted Zhao Hai. Herbs and ores sent to the Space could be mass-produced. And seeing the Moonfall Palace’s conduct, the herb inside should be far more than ordinary. It would definitely benefit the Space.

Although Zhao Hai was excited, he was still very careful. He inspected the jade box to see how it operated. Finally, after looking through it multiple times, Zhao Hai didn’t see any traps.

Zhao Hai felt relieved and then opened the jade box. Right after opening the box, a faint medicinal fragrance immediately came out of the box. The fragrance wasn’t thick, but it had a fresh scent. Smelling the fragrance made one feel like they were standing in a spring wilderness where vitality came out from every single blade of grass. It was a fresh, lively, and alive scent.

Zhao Hai and the others couldn’t help but take a deep breath. But as they inhaled the scent, Zhao Hai and the others’ spirits shook.

It must be known that the Space’s environment was extremely good. To make Zhao Hai and the others feel shocked tells a lot about how strong the herb is.

At this time, the Space issued a prompt, “New plant species discovered. Scanning.. Scanning complete. New plant is classified in the True Spirit Realm as the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. Producing Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb seeds. Host can now plant the herb in the Space. Suggesting to plant in a time-accelerated area.”

Zhao Hai stared at the prompt, waiting for it to end. Then his face lit up with happiness. He didn’t expect to get his hands on a piece of Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. It has been some time since Zhao Hai arrived in the True Spirit Realm. All this time, he has been collecting materials to upgrade the Space. Because of this, he has a comprehensive guide on the realm’s herbs. He naturally knew the value of a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. He just didn’t think that the convoy from the Moonfall Palace that he escorted would have the herb.

The Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb was just too precious. No wonder the Moonfall Palace was being extremely careful. Now, Zhao Hai felt that their actions were appropriate. Anyone who got their hands on the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb would be this careful.
