chapters.title: Chapter 2238: Solution
chapters.body:
Chapter 2238: Solution

Zhao Hai took a deep breath to calm his mood. Then he waved his hand, causing the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb to fly out of the box and land onto an open space. Future Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herbs will be planted in a similar area.

After planting the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb, Zhao Hai looked at Laura and the others and bitterly smiled, “No wonder the Moonfall Palace went all out investigating. It’s a mature Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. The price of one is too high. Anyone who gets their hand on it will not be willing to give it up. This might be a huge problem.”

Zhao Hai was telling the truth. The Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb’s value was too high. While the Moonfall Palace wouldn’t dare announce its existence, it was also impossible for them to just give it up. Because of this, they will certainly sift through everyone involved in its disappearance.

Laura knit her brows and said, “With the Moonfall Palace returning to Demonheart City, they won’t just leave the gang off. Although you are already quite strong, this matter will cause some disturbance. Your status might be exposed. Even if it won’t do any good for the Tyrant Blade Sect and the Long Clan, we still have to deal with this matter carefully.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then after thinking for a while, he said, “We need to discuss this matter with someone, I’ll go and meet Master.”

Laura nodded and said, “You might as well. But you have to bring the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. Cai’er, prepare a plot of land to plant a few Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb seeds.”

Zhao Hai replied, “It’s fine, Masters might not care about the herb. I’ll just talk to them about it. They don’t necessarily have to do anything. I reckon we need the Long Clan to solve this matter.”

Laura nodded, “The influence of the Tyrant Blade Sect won’t reach here, but the Long Clan can. If the clan is willing to come forward and help, then the problem will be solved.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he gave the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb one more glance before appearing in the Tyrant Blade Sect. Although the sect was preparing for war, the Yin Yang Elders didn’t have many responsibilities. Because of this, the two elders were quite free.

The two elders were currently in their rooms, meditating. They didn’t sleep even though it was already evening.

Suddenly, the two elders opened their eyes. They felt that Zhao Hai had returned. They immediately stood up and went to the living room. Just as they entered, they heard Zhao Hai from outside, “Disciple Zhao Hai is here to visit Masters.”

The Yin Elder smiled and said, “Come in.” Zhao Hai nodded and then purged the door to enter.

After entering the room, Zhao Hai cupped his fist to the Yin Yang Elders. The Yin Elder waved him over to sit down and then asked, “Why did you come back? Did something happen?”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and said, “I didn’t expect something this significant to happen when the Battle Corpse Sect sent me to the True Spirit Realm.”

When the Yin Yang Elders heard this, they also couldn’t help but shake their heads. Zhao Hai’s situation was far from what they anticipated. They didn’t expect Zhao Hai to return to the True Spirit Realm under the orders of the Battle Corpse Sect. They even wanted Zhao Hai to join the Forbidden Path Sect. This wasn’t necessarily bad for Zhao Hai, but it wasn’t good for him either.

Zhao Hai snuck into the underground world with the purpose of getting information and seeing if there were any changes with the Ghost Cultivators.

But now, Zhao Hai was back in the True Spirit Realm without any reasons to return to the underground world. This meant that he couldn’t collect information about the Ghost Cultivators.

Zhao Hai sighed and said, “I suddenly obtained a treasure, the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. Some people are currently tracking it down. Although they don’t know that it ended up in my hands, I was part of the group that escorted it. I’m afraid they will check my body thoroughly.”

The Yin Yang Elders couldn’t help but stare when they heard this. Then their expressions changed as they exclaimed, “Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb? You have a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb?”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he waved his hand, taking out a jade box made with wood-attribute exotic jade from his sleeve. Then he handed the box over to the Yin Yang Elders. Like Laura said, he had to take the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb that he planted out. Fortunately, everything in the Space was under Zhao Hai’s control, so there was no damage to the herb.

The Yin Elder received the box that Zhao Hai handed over. In one glance, the Yin Elder immediately knew that the box was made from wood-attribute exotic jade. He wasn’t shocked by this, the Tyrant Blade Sect also has its own stockpile of exotic jades. Carefully opening the box, the Yin Yang Elders were immediately hit with the fragrance of the herb.

The Yin Yang Elders paused, then they sighed. Closing the box, the Yin Elder handed it back to Zhao Hai. Then Zhao Hai said, “Master, I heard that the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb has a calming effect on the mind and spirit. You should take it to a Pill Master to make it into medicine. This way, you could suppress your killing intent.”

The Yin Yang Elders stared. Then a trace of emotion passed through their eyes. But the Yin Elder still handed the box to Zhao Hai as he said, “The biggest use of the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb is still detoxification. It only has the side effect of calming the mind and spirit. It’s not very useful to us. You better keep it for yourself.” Zhao Hai didn’t fight it as he put the box away. Ｒ𝐚ŊŎ𐌱ÊS

The Yin Elder looked at Zhao Hai and asked, “How did you get your hands on it? Who is looking for it?”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and then told the story to the two elders. Of course, Zhao Hai didn’t mention his usage of liquid silver and he just found another excuse. He said that he had an insect following Wang Da and then he got the herb after Wang Da died. Listening to Zhao Hai’s story, the Yin Yang Elders smiled bitterly. They didn’t expect Zhao Hai to be so lucky that he would obtain a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb from a random mission.

The Yang Elder nodded and said, “I also heard about the Moonfall Palace. They seem to be founded by an Elder of the Forbidden Path Sect. They hold quite some influence in the sect’s domain. With them investigating this matter, they certainly wouldn’t let you off. Those Demon Cultivators aren’t amiable people. You don’t want to be in their eyesight. The best solution for you is to leave Demonheart City and return to the sect. Or you can return to the Long Clan so that they won’t be able to track you down.”

Zhao Hai sighed, then he smiled bitterly and said, “If I disappear suddenly, the Battle Corpse Sect and the Ghost Cultivators will be chasing after me. When the time comes, the Long Clan and the Tyrant Blade Sect might be pulled in. This will only make the matter more complicated. I can only find a way to join the Forbidden Path Sect. Only in this way can I get more trust from the Ghost Cultivators, and I can also get more insider news.”

The Yin Yang Elders were silent. They knew that what Zhao Hai said was true. If Zhao Hai returned to the Tyrant Blade Sect or the Long Clan, then once the Battle Corpse Sect or the Ghost Cultivators discover his traces, the Tyrant Blade Sect or the Long Clan would become involved. The Tyrant Blade Sect would gain another enemy while the Long Clan would lose their aloof status. Moreover, the Ghost Cultivators might be able to use this opportunity to attack.

Zhao Hai looked at the two elders and smiled, “Master, you don’t need to worry. I’m also prepared to tell the Long Clan about this matter. Although the Moonfall Palace holds quite some influence in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory, the Long Clan is also influential in this area. Perhaps the Long Clan has a solution for me.”

The Yin Yang Elders nodded, then the Yin Elder sighed and said, “Right, go and see if the Long Clan has a solution. If the Long Clan can’t solve it, then you need to tell us. We Old Folks can still move and eradicate the Moonfall Palace. But we can only use this move for last since it would attract the Forbidden Path Sect’s attention. We still have to listen to the Long Clan’s opinion on this matter.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Don’t worry Master, we won’t reach that point. I’ll go to the Long Clan first. We need to resolve this issue as soon as possible.”

The Yin Yang Elders nodded. Then Zhao Hai cupped his fist towards the two before vanishing. The Yon Elder looked at the empty chair and sighed, “I don’t know if Little Hai is lucky or unlucky. He’s lucky to obtain a rare treasure, but he’s now facing trouble.”

The Yang Elder smiled bitterly and said, “Most importantly, he even came back to the True Spirit Realm with the status of a Ghost Cultivator. No matter how we look at it, his luck is full of twists.”

The Yin Elder couldn’t help but agree. Then the two went silent. Although they seemed to be joking around, they knew that Zhao Hai was in a precarious position. Once his identity gets exposed, he would be under constant threat. He might even be assassinated. It can be said that Zhao Hai was walking on a narrow path, with one side having a mountain of swords while the clothes side a sea of fire. He needs to take each step with caution or else he would fall.

At this time, Zhao Hai appeared in Coiling Dragon City. Majority of the residents have already withdrawn to their houses to rest. Zhao Hai wasn’t bothered by it and went directly to Long Tian’s residence. Once he was outside, Zhao Hai cupped his fist and said, “Elder Long, it’s Zhao Hai.”

Long Tian’s voice immediately replied, “Little Hai, why are you back at this time? Come in. Did something happen?”

Zhao Hai interred the courtyard. As he sat down in front of Long Tian, he smiled bitterly and said, “I’m in trouble. I’m here to ask Elder for advice.”

Long Tian stared, then he smiled faintly and said, “What’s the problem? Tell me.”

Zhao Hai replied, “I managed to get my hands on a treasure, a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb.” Then he explained the entire process save some of the methods that he couldn’t reveal.

As he listened to Zhao Hai, Long Tian couldn’t help but stare. To be honest, Long Tian didn’t care about the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. He has seen much more valuable treasures. However, he also knew how much trouble it would cause now that it was in Zhao Hai’s hands.

As he looked at Zhao Hai, Long Tian frowned and said, “What are you planning to do? How do you want us to help you?”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and said, “I still don’t know, so I’m here to ask you. The Moonfall Palace will certainly reach me for investigation, and they definitely won’t let me go. I cannot expose my identity, so I might not be able to return for some time. This is what I’m worried about.”

Long Tian smiled bitterly. To be honest, he also doesn’t know how to solve this issue. If they went for the hard approach, the Long Clan could easily get rid of the Moonfall Palace. However, just like what the Yin Yang Elders said, it would attract the attention of the Forbidden Path Sect. After all, an elder of the sect was behind the Moonfall Palace.

But if they didn’t do the hard approach, how could they save Zhao Hai? Long Tian knitted his brows for a moment before he thought of something, “Who else knows of Wang Da’s death?”

Zhao Hai looked at Long Tian in confusion as he answered, “Nobody. He died alone in a cave. I believe besides me, nobody is certain that he’s dead.”

Long Tian’s eyes lit up as he added, “Then how about his corpse? How did you get rid of it? Can it be found?”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “No. His corpse has been turned into an undead. As long as I don’t take it out, nobody would know that he’s dead.”

Long Tian nodded, “That’s good. We can still save your situation. I’ll have someone secretly spread rumours tomorrow that the Moonfall Palace has obtained a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. I believe that once this information gets out, the Moonfall Palace’s actions would slow down. They won’t be in a mood to deal with you. Even if others know that it has been stolen, they wouldn’t think that you would have it. They would suspect the missing Wang Da. The Blood Knife Gang should be minimally affected.”

Zhao Hai stared. Now he understood why Long Tian was curious about Wang Da’s death. As long as Wang Da doesn’t appear, then everyone would think that the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb was with him. Nobody would suspect that a Soul Fusion stage cultivator of the Blood Knife Gang would have it. As the matter stands, the problem was solved.

Old ginger is indeed spicier. One move has solved Zhao Hai’s problem. However, this method also carries some danger. The Forbidden Path Sect isn’t a kind-hearted organization. They would probably vent their anger on the Blood Knife Gang. But strictly speaking, this was the best case scenario for Zhao Hai.

chapters.title: Chapter 2239: News Spread
chapters.body:
Chapter 2239: News Spread

Zhao Hai got up early the next day. His previous worries have been swept away, and he was now waiting to watch the show. He knew very well what was coming after the news spread. When the time comes, the Moonfall Palace wouldn’t have the chance to deal with him.

Zhao Hai calmly went out of his room. The Blood Knife Gang was also quite busy. Looking at everyone, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh inwardly. Ignorance was indeed bliss.

Just as Zhao Hai came out of his room, Liu Zhen just returned from outside. His appearance didn’t look good. He might not have rested properly last night. His eyes were bloodshot.

Liu Zhen’s situation surprised Zhao Hai. It must be known that cultivators have great vitality. They won’t get tired from sleeplessness like mortals do. Even if they didn’t sleep for several days, they would still be fine.

As he looked at Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai asked, “Brother Liu, what happened to you? You look like you haven’t slept well.”

Liu Zhen smiled bitterly and said, “The Gang Master has been out for several days and has yet to return. I’m somewhat worried. If the Moonfall Palace finds that he’s not here, they may suspect our Blood Knife Gang. When that happens, we will be in trouble.”

Hearing Liu Zhen, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but bitterly smile. He couldn’t tell Liu Zhen that the Gang Master was never going to return. Moreover, the Blood Knife Gang has already been targeted. If it wasn’t for Zhao Hai’s arrangements, the gang would have been in chaos already.

Zhao Hai solemnly replied, “Brother Liu, whether the Gang Master returns or not, we must pay attention to the Moonfall Palace’s actions. It would be a good idea to be prepared in advance.”

Liu Zhen nodded, “We can only do that.” Then he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Ling, if the Gang Master doesn’t come back, what do you think we should do?”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai stared, then his complexion changed as he said, “Brother Liu, what do you mean?”

Liu Zhen smiled bitterly and said, “If that thing is very valuable, greater than the value of the entire Blood Knife Gang, would the Gang Master still come back?”

Zhao Hai’s expression changed. He hesitated before he smiled bitterly and said, “That might be possible. The Gang Master is now a Teleportation Stage Expert. If he’s still an Earth Monarch, he might still return to the Blood Knife Gang. But now that he’s at the Teleportation Stage, he can go wherever he wants. The Teleportation Stage is a milestone realm for cultivators. At that stage, the Gang Master will focus on increasing his strength. The Blood Knife Gang is now secondary to him.”

Liu Zhen nodded. He looked at Zhao Hai and said, “If that is the case, what should the Blood Knife Gang do?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “The Blood Knife Gang Knife is still strong even without the Gang Master. As long as we elect someone to look after the gang, we should be alright. Brother Liu, you must be prepared. Even if you aren’t the Gang Master, you must have the Blood Knife Gang be under your control. You can have the power of the Gang Master despite not having the title.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Liu Zhen’s heart couldn’t help but shake. Then an unusual light passed through his eyes. He looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Ling, are you sure about that?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Brother Liu, winning over the people of the Blood Knife Gang wouldn’t be bad for you. Even if the Gang Master returns, would he still have the heart to take care of the Gang’s matters? Moreover, you have been close to the Gang Master, he will give you the power sooner or later. If you don’t have everyone’s support, even if you have the Gang Master at your back, you will still have trouble taking command. As long as you have everyone’s support, your position will be firm. Then you won’t have to hesitate to punish those who disobey you.”

Liu Zhen immediately understood what Zhao Hai meant. He hesitated for a moment before he said, “It’s still too early. At the very least, we should wait for news regarding the Gang Master. But I’ll remember your words. Once I gain everyone’s support, my current position will be yours.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Thank you, Brother Liu. If the Forbidden Path Sect decides to open its doors for recruitment, I will try and see if I can get in. In Demonheart City, powers rely on connections to the Forbidden Path Sect. If I can join the sect, our Blood Knife Gang will have something to hold on in the city. Otherwise, if the Gang Master doesn’t return, the Blood Knife Gang will have nothing to rely on.” ŖÂ₦Ȫ𝐛ЁS̩

Liu Zhen’s expression turned heavy, “Right. My heart will remain unsteady unless we can find somebody to rely on.”

Zhao Hai nodded and no longer said anything. At this time, Ma Long and Liu Cai arrived at Zhao Hai’s courtyard. Seeing Liu Zhen inside, the two immediately cupped their fists.

Liu Zhen waved his hand. Then he smiled faintly and said, “There’s no need to be so polite. Have you eaten? Let’s eat first. After breakfast, we can head to the Main Hall to deal with the finishing touches. Then the Gang can use its full strength in completing missions.”

Zhao Hai and the others complied and went to the canteen with Liu Zhen. After eating, everyone became busy in the Main Hall. There were still some unfinished jobs in the Main Hall. Once all of that was completed, the Gang could begin taking missions seriously.

Although Zhao Hai was busy, he still had an ear out for news in Demonheart City. In the following hours, he went to several places in the city to map it out for the Space and also to monitor the situation.

Before long, noon came. Zhao Hai’s mood couldn’t help but loosen. This was because he finally heard rumours regarding the Moonfall Palace acquiring a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb.

As long as this rumour appears, no matter if it is true or false, it would spread to the entire Demonheart City. When the time comes, the Moonfall Palace wouldn’t have the time to deal with Zhao Hai. They would be very busy quelling fires. Not to mention Zhao Hai, even the Blood Knife Gang would be safe.

Not long after Zhao Hai received the news, a person from the Blood Knife Gang came running from outside. Then they quickly went to Liu Zhen and whispered something.

The worried expression on Liu Zhen’s face suddenly turned into shock. Then his face lit up with joy.

Liu Zhen immediately turned to Zhao Hai and said, “Little Ling, come with me.” Zhao Hai knew what Liu Zhen was about to say, but he still nodded and followed Liu Zhen to his courtyard.

The two quickly arrived at the courtyard. After locking the door, Liu Zhen led Zhao Hai to the living room. Then once they had sat down, Liu Zhen said, “Little Ling, I just received news that the Moonfall Palace has acquired a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. If my guess is correct, the thing we escorted is that herb. If that is the case, I’m afraid that the Gang Master already has his hands on it. Hahaha. This is heaven’s will!”

Zhao Hai pretended to be shocked. Then his expression lit up with joy as he said, “Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb? Is it really the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb? Hahaha. Good!”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “I heard that the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb has infinite uses. Any cultivator that gets their hand on it will make great progress in their cultivation. If the Gang Master has the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb with him, that will be very good for the Blood Knife Gang.”

Zhao Hai looked at Liu Zhen, then he smiled bitterly and said, “Brother Liu, do you think the Gang Master would still come back after getting the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb? How could the Gang Master be unaware about the value of the herb? Our Blood Knife Gang’s value cannot be compared to a single heavenly herb. If Y could guess, we would never see the Gang Master again.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Liu Zhen stared for a moment. Then his complexion changed as he said, “You’re saying that the Gang Master has abandoned the gang for the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb?”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly and said, “Right. Even sects want to get their hands on a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. After the Gang Master got his hands on the herb, he would certainly think that if he returned to the Blood Knife Gang, whether he had the herb or not, he would be captured by the sect. If he doesn’t have the herb, he would be killed. And if he did, the herb would get taken. If I were in the Gang Master’s shoes, the moment I got the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb, I would run away immediately. I wouldn’t even think of returning to the gang.”

Liu Zhen frowned as he walked around the room. He knew that Zhao Hai was right. Especially when he heard about the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. There was no chance of Wang Da returning to the gang.

With Wang Da’s chances of returning to the gang becoming zero, the Blood Knife Gang needs a new Gang Master. In other words, what Zhao Hai said to Liu Zhen before needs to be enacted. When the time comes, the Blood Knife Gang would fall into Liu Zhen’s hands.

Liu Zhen kept walking around as he processed his thoughts. Zhao Hai looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Brother Liu, this is an opportunity for you to control the Blood Knife Gang. You can’t miss this chance.”

Liu Zhen couldn’t help but get excited. He stopped walking around as a sense of resolve settled in his eyes. He took a couple of deep breaths to calm himself before looking at Zhao Hai, “Alright, I’ll listen to your plans. However, the matter of the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb has certainly reached the ears of the Forbidden Path Sect. If the Forbidden Path Sect takes action, the disappearance of the Gang Master cannot be hidden. What if the sect moves against the gang?”

chapters.title: Chapter 2240: Visit
chapters.body:
Chapter 2240: Visit

Zhao Hai said in a serious voice, “Whether the Forbidden Path Sect acts against us or not, they won’t suspect anything if we stay here. They might just think that we don’t know anything. But if we leave now, we might not even make it out of the sect’s territory. And even if we manage to escape, they will think that we have the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb and then they will hunt us down.”

Liu Zhen’s complexion changed when he heard this. Then he nodded and said, “Right, we can’t leave no matter what. If we do, it will seem like we are guilty. Not to mention being guilty, we really don’t have the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “We don’t have to act in any way. Brother Liu, you can go through with your plan. If the Forbidden Path Sect looks for the Gang Master, tell them you don’t know. In any case, we really don’t know.”

Liu Zhen nodded, “We really don’t know. Good, good. Alright, I’m going.” Zhao Hai nodded, then the two left the room and began to get busy like everyone else. At the same time, Liu Zhen recalled everyone sent to monitor the Moonfall Palace.

Liu Zhen knew that if he kept watching the Moonfall Palace, he would only look suspicious. Because of this, he called everyone sent to the Moonfall Palace back.

There aren’t many people in the Blood Knife Gang who knew that Wang Da went to rob the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb. Besides Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen, practically nobody else has an idea, this included those who acted with Liu Zhen during the ambush. Because of this, the news that there’s a Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb didn’t disrupt the Blood Knife Gang. At most, the members looked interested in the rumours.

Compared to the calmness in the Blood Knife Gang, the undercurrents of Demonheart City were beginning to surge. Knowing that someone has the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb, people couldn’t help but get jealous.

The people from the Moonfall Palace didn’t expect this news to spread. The entire Moonfall Palace immediately went to a state of combat readiness. They knew very well that no matter how they explained it, nobody would believe them.

However, the Moonfall Palace’s actions confirmed to everyone that the rumours were true. The entire city jumped with excitement. Major gangs sent people to inquire from the Moonfall Palace. Many lone travellers also arrived. The Moonfall Palace became a fat piece of meat with everyone staring at them.

Although a lot of people were staring at the Moonfall Palace, nobody dared to make the first move. This was due to the Moonfall Palace’s close relationship to the Forbidden Path Sect. If someone wants to make a move, they will have to consider the Forbidden Path Sect’s reaction.

Moreover, everyone was very clear, things like the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb would also be in the Forbidden Path Sect’s radar. So, everyone was waiting for the Forbidden Path Sect’s reaction. If the sect has no response, then that means that they don’t want the herb. Then everyone can begin to make their moves.

Demonheart City fell into a strange silence. But everyone knows that this was the calm before the storm. A huge disturbance was bound to happen.

The Forbidden Path Sect didn’t let everyone wait. On the next day, the sect investigated the Moonfall Palace. Several senior members of the Moonfall Palace as well as some Teleportation Stage Experts were taken to be interrogated. Then soon after, the sect announced that the Yue Family of the Moonfall Palace had been kicked out of the sect. They would no longer bear the mark of the Forbidden Path Sect in the future. The news stunned everyone. They immediately understood the Forbidden Path Sect’s message. For a while, the entire sect buzzed with activity. Various locations belonging to the Moonfall Palace have been ransacked and looted. Everyone from the Yue Family had been hunted down and killed.

Nobody expected this result. However, this also made the onlookers happy. Now that the Yue Family has been kicked out of the sect, this means that they no longer have the sect’s protection. This gave the gangs a chance to rob the evicted family. If they didn’t, then they don’t deserve to be called Demonic Cultivators.

Just as everyone was feasting on the Moonfall Palace’s corpse, the Blood Knife Gang also received a few people. Liu Zhen and the other senior members of the gang led everyone to stand in the martial grounds. They all looked at the people in front of them in fear.

The people who came to the Blood Knife Gang wore unusual clothing. Instead of regular clothing, they wore Buddhist gowns and sported Buddhist hairstyles. Their eyes seem to be both open and closed with sparks of lightning seemingly escaping from the sides. Their aura was also particularly fierce.

The skins of these people were like shiny copper. Their muscles were well sculpted and clearly on display. They were like battle gods, causing awe to anybody looking at them.

Liu Zhen and the others were short of shaking as they faced their visitors. Although they looked unordinary, nobody who lived in the Forbidden Path Sect didn’t know that these people were disciples of the sect. Nobody in the domain wore the same clothes as them, unless they had a death wish. 𝐑𝒶ƝȏΒЕŚ

Although Liu Zhen was alarmed and afraid, he needed to preserve the Blood Knife Gang’s face. So, he stepped forward and performed a deep bow before saying, “Blood Knife Gang’s Soldier Hall Master has seen the Lords from the Forbidden Path Sect. Might I know why the Masters have visited our humble Blood Knife Gang? If you have any requests, the gang will do our best to fulfill it.”

The man leading the group of Forbidden Path Sect members was around 20 meters tall. He had a beard on his face and looked like an angry god when he opened his eyes. He looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Stop wasting my time. Why are you the one talking to me? Where is your Gang Master?”

Liu Zhen wasn’t angered by the man’s words. In fact, what the man said was right. Ivin if he was an outer disciple, as long as he said something, everyone in Demonheart City would come clamouring. A small gang like the Blood Knife Gang isn’t qualified to do things for him.

Liu Zhen immediately replied, “Replying to the Lord. Our Gang Master went out. I also don’t know where he is or when he will come back.”

The man from the Forbidden Path Sect looked at Liu Zhen and said, “You don’t know, or you chose to not know?”

Liu Zhen immediately replied, “My Lord, we really don’t know. The Gang Master never tells us where he goes. Please forgive us.”

The man seemed to believe Liu Zhen but also seemed to be doubtful. He no longer asked about Wang Da’s whereabouts but instead moved on, “Last time, your Blood Knife Gang took a mission from the Moonfall Palace. Have everyone involved come forward.”

Upon hearing this, Liu Zhen immediately complied. He waved his hand and said, “Those who joined the mission, including those involved in the shadows, come forward.”

Zhao Hai and his team stepped forward as well as Liu Zhen and his team. Everyone had lowered heads, showing alarm and fear.

The man from the Forbidden Path Sect couldn’t help but be stunned when he saw the people stepping forward. Then his expression changed as he looked at Liu Zhen, “What is this? I thought there were only 50 people escorting the Moonfall Palace’s carriages. Why are there so many people stepping forward? Are you lying to me?”

Liu Zhen immediately replied, “I wouldn’t dare lie to my Lord. These are the people involved with the Moonfall Palace’s convoy. Zhao Ling leads the 50 people who escorted the convoy while me and the Gang Master lead 100 other people to follow in the shadows. The Moonfall Palace only knows that there are 50 people protecting them. They didn’t know about the ones hiding. Since my Lord asked, I naturally wouldn’t hide the truth. So, I made everyone involved step forward, including those acting in secret.”

When the man heard Liu Zhen, his eyes flashed. Then he coldly snorted and said, “The last time I know, the Moonfall Palace’s mission isn’t worth having 150 people protecting it. Why would the Blood Knife Gang send so many people?”

Liu Zhen quickly replied, “Replying to my Lord. We aren’t going for the pay for the mission but for the reputation it would bring us. The Blood Knife Gang is a gang from Split River City. We just moved to Demonheart City and are still trying to make connections. After our Main Hall was constructed, we went on to get our first mission. We found that the Moonfall Palace’s mission is the easiest for us since it is heading to Split River City, so we took it.”

“Because it is our first mission, fearing bad luck will come to us if we fail, the Gang Master decided to send additional people in the dark to protect the caravan. Moreover, we have contradictions with the gangs in Split River City, so we divided the team into two, one in the light and one in the dark. Once our mission is completed, the hidden team would return swiftly while Zhao Ling and his team would return using the official road. My Lord, all of what I said is true. I won’t dare lie.”

Hearing Liu Zhen, the man frowned, then he said, “Tell me, did your Gang Master just leave? Has he gone with you on missions before?”

Liu Zhen nodded and said, “Since we are afraid of the three gangs disturbing our mission, he went with us. Then after the Moonfall Palace’s convoy reached Split River City, he told me that he had matters to deal with and left. Even after we returned to Demonheart City, the Gang Master is still away.”

The Forbidden Path Sect cultivator nodded. Then his gaze went to Zhao Hai. Zhao Hai pretended to be afraid and lowered his head. The man looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Are you the leader of the official escort group, Zhao Ling? Did you notice anything strange with the Moonfall Palace’s convoy?”

chapters.title: Chapter 2241: Internal Conflict
chapters.body:
Chapter 2241: Internal Conflict

Zhao Hai swiftly replied, “Replying to my Lord. We did indeed find something wrong with the people from the Moonfall Palace. The road from Demonheart City to Split River City should be very peaceful. The Blood Knife Gang only sent more people because we are afraid that the three gangs from Split River City would cause trouble. Normally, a 50 person team should be more than enough to escort a convoy to Split River City. But in addition to hiring us, the Moonfall Palace also brought 20 people. And these 20 people are at the Clone Stage, which is too much for the road ahead.”

“Also, the convoy leader looked cowardly. Halfway to Split River City, we were attacked by a small bandit group. We had enough strength to deal with those fellows. Despite this, the convoy leader had his team protect him instead of joining the battle. In the end, we managed to drive those people away without using our hidden troops. The people from the Moonfall Palace were just too afraid. Besides these two things, there isn’t anything weird about them.”

After listening to Zhao Hai, the Forbidden Path Sect cultivator nodded. Then he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “I heard that you had a conflict with the convoy leader. Can you tell me about it?”

Zhao Hai stared, then he immediately answered, “It’s not a big conflict. The convoy leader just wants to suppress me. When I arranged our resting place for the night, the convoy leader wanted us to follow his own choice. According to rules and customs of escorts, the convoy leader should be listening to us. Because of that, I told him that if he wants to stay someplace else, we won’t be responsible for anything that happens to them. After that, the convoy leader no longer said anything.”

The Forbidden Path Sect cultivator nodded, “Besides this, did you notice anything else? Do you know what they are transporting?”

Zhao Hai shook his head and said, “I don’t know. We are only responsible for guarding the carriages. We cannot inquire about what the client is transporting, that will be bad practice. It would only make the client distrust us. When the time comes, the reputation of the Blood Knife Gang would be tainted. Because of that, we won’t dare ask too much.”

The Forbidden Path Sect cultivator nodded, “While you were on the road, did you know that there are people protecting you in secret?”

Zhao Hai nodded, “I was aware. Before we departed, we made arrangements. I also met the Gang Master twice while on the road. It’s only to report the situation of the convoy.”

The Forbidden Path Sect raised his brow and said, “And what did you tell your Gang Master?”

Zhao Hai looked at the man in confusion but still replied, “I didn’t say anything else aside from the Moonfall Palace being a little strange. I told him that they brought much more than required, especially on the road that we are going through. I also told the Gang Master about the convoy leader’s attempt to suppress me.”

The man nodded, then he looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Alright, I’m done asking questions. If your Gang Master returns, have him report to the Forbidden Path Sect immediately. Tell him that we have something to ask him.”

Liu Zhen nodded at the cultivator from the Forbidden Path Sect. Then he said, “My Lord can be rest assured. As soon as the Gang Master returns, I will immediately tell him to go to the Forbidden Path Sect.”

The cultivator from the Forbidden Path Sect nodded, then took his men with him and left. After the cultivators from the Forbidden Path Sect left, everyone took a long breath. Plenty of them were wiping the sweat off their faces. The pressure brought by sect members was too big for a gang of their size.

Actually, the people who came weren’t very strong. They didn’t have a single Teleportation Stage cultivator, only an Earth Monarch. Normally, the Blood Knife Gang wouldn’t be afraid of these people. But since they had the Forbidden Path Sect behind them, the Blood Knife Gang couldn’t afford to offend them. They wouldn’t want to cause the Forbidden Path Sect to be unhappy.

The Forbidden Path Sect brought an incomparably huge pressure on rogue cultivators. The same was true for any sect in the True Spirit Realm.

Liu Zhen let out a long breath. Then he turned to everyone and said, “Alright, you can all go back and rest. Demonheart City has been quite chaotic. Minimize going out in the next few days. We’ll head out tomorrow to take missions, not only for the gang’s income, but to also leave the city temporarily.”

As soon as they heard this, the members of the Blood Knife Gang complied. Only a few people frowned without moving. Zhao Hai looked at these people and recognized that they were the other Hall Masters of the gang.

The Blood Knife Gang has nine Hall Masters. Liu Zhen was the master of the Battle Hall. He commanded the gang during wars, which gave him great power within the sect. Moreover, Wang Da trusts him. Liu Zhen was also known to care about his people. His prestige within the sect was very high. Besides Wang Da, nobody else was more respected than Liu Zhen.

At the same time, Liu Zhen was friends with five other Hall Masters. This allowed him to have high status within the gang.

Naturally, it was impossible for everyone to be Liu Zhen’s friend. For example, Yu Linfeng, Chen Feng, and Lie Xing weren’t compatible with Liu Zhen.

Now, upon seeing Liu Zhen taking command of the situation, Yu Linfeng felt uncomfortable. Because of this, he didn’t comply immediately. The same was true for Chen Feng and Lie Xing. The members of their halls also didn’t move.

Liu Zhen and the other Hall Masters noticed that they hadn’t moved. Liu Zhen frowned as he looked at Yu Linfeng and said, “Hall Master Yu, is there a problem?”

Yu Linfeng looked at Liu Zhen and said, “Hall Master Liu, I don’t know who gave you power to order us like the Gang Master. Now that Demonheart City has become chaotic, it is time for the Blood Knife Gang to show our fists. To let everyone miss this opportunity by taking missions, what are you planning?” ℟𝘈Ŋ∅ＢĚS

Hearing this, Liu Zhen’s expression changed. Then he said, “As for who gave me the power to take command, it’s naturally the Gang Master. Before he left Demonheart City, the Gang Master left me with the authority to act on his behalf. You’re asking about missing opportunities in the city? Do you think the Blood Knife Gang is stronger than the sect? The chaos in Demonheart City that we see is only happening on the surface. In reality, the gangs are all moving against the Moonfall Palace. Do you still want to grab advantages in this state? If we mess around right now, we will only be courting death.”

Yu Linfeng sneered and said, “You’re the only one saying that the Gang Master left you with power. Nobody has heard of it. The Gang Master is not here right now, so he can’t disprove your claims.”

Liu Zhen’s expression turned for the worse as he glared at Yu Linfeng and said, “Yu Linfeng, what are you implying? Although the Gang Master hasn’t returned, there will be a day where he will come back. When the time comes, everything will be clear. Are you thinking that I’m pretending to act as the Gang Master?”

Yu Linfeng sneered, “Liu Zhen, everyone can see that the Forbidden Path Sect is suspecting the Gang Master. Perhaps the Gang Master has the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb, in this case, will he still come back? If the Gang Master doesn’t return for a day, you will control the sect for a day. But if the Gang Master wouldn’t return for a year, does that mean that you will hold the sect for a year?”

Cultivators aren’t fools. Liu Zhen’s conversation with the cultivator from the Forbidden Path Sect was also heard by Yu Linfeng and the others. Liu Zhen and Zhao Hai twisted the narrative to mislead the Forbidden Path Sect into thinking that Wang Da himself found out about the treasure that the Moonfall Palace was escorting and decided on his own to steal it before disappearing. This way, the Blood Knife Gang would become safe.

However, Liu Zhen didn’t think that the narrative that he spun out would also convince Yu Linfeng and the others. They were now thinking that Wang Da wouldn’t come back. And now, they were using the power vacuum to snatch power from Liu Zhen.

Liu Zhen looked at Yu Linfeng and said, “Before the Gang Master returns, I will act as the substitute Gang Master. I can pledge here that if the Gang Master doesn’t return for one year, then I would no longer hold the position of substitute Gang Master. As for who will command the gang at that time, the members will decide for themselves. But in this year’s time, if anyone dares to disobey me, it will be the same as disobeying the Gang Master. Punishments will be give accordingly.”

Hearing Liu Zhen, Yu Linfeng and the others stared, then their complexion slightly changed. He knew Liu Zhen’s plan very well. Liu Zhen might have promised to let go of power in a year, but it was clear that Liu Zhen was simply using this as a buffer. In a year’s time, Liu Zhen would have the power to deal with any opposition to his influence. Then after one year, Liu Zhen would become the Gang Master, and nobody would say anything.

However, nobody would believe him if he told it out loud. Moreover, now that Wang Da was missing, the top power of the Gang was now beginning to dissipate. If Yu Linfeng openly disobeyed Liu Zhen at this time, he would cause the entire gang to be disgusted with him. In the end, he would be on the unlucky side.

The best move for Yu Linfeng right now was to retreat. Yu Linfeng knew what Liu Zhen wanted to do, but he could only agree. If he opposed at this time, it wouldn’t be Liu Zhen but him who would be ostracized.

Yu Linfeng’s face was pale as he stood in place. After glancing at Yu Linfeng, Liu Zhen said, “Alright, everyone, you can go back and rest. We will be taking missions tomorrow. Anyone who doesn’t listen will be punished according to the rules.” Everyone complied and then dispersed in groups of two or three. Yu Linfeng coldly snorted and then walked out.

At this time, Zhao Hai arrived beside Liu Zhen and said, “Brother Liu, how do you want to deal with these people? If you don’t deal with them, they will only cause trouble later on.”

Liu Zhen sneered and said, “Rest assured, they will be dealt with within a year. Yu Linfeng isn’t a fool. He also knows that I will deal with him within this year. He would be on guard. Moreover, I reckon he deliberately caused trouble today to show everyone that they’re against us. If something happens to him, the first suspect would be me. He wants me to be cautious in my actions otherwise I would take the fall. He wants to be a rat to protect himself.”

Zhao Hai frowned, “If that is the case, then it is indeed troublesome. It seems like Yu Linfeng isn’t a simple character.”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “He’s smart. However, he forgot to take one person into account, and that is you.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai stared. Then he looked at Liu Zhen and asked, “Me? What do I have to do with this? Brother Liu, do you want me to deal with them? I’m afraid I’m not strong enough.”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “Why would I let you take action against them? We won’t resort to such barbaric methods. Little Ling, aren’t you planning to participate in the Forbidden Path Sect’s recruitment? I fully support you. In the next period of time, you don’t have to do anything. Focus on improving your strength. Once you join the Forbidden Path Sect, all of our problems will be solved. When the time comes, we only need a word from you and Yu Linfeng won’t have the guts to get rid of me.”

When Zhao Hai heard this, he couldn’t help but stare. He didn’t expect Liu Zhen to have this scheme. But he has to recognize that Liu Zhen’s plan was very good. If Zhao Hai could join the Forbidden Path Sect, then Liu Zhen’s position as Gang Master will be decided by a few words. Even if Wang Da survived, he wouldn’t dare snatch the position from Liu Zhen.

Seeing that Zhao Hai didn’t say anything, Liu Zhen patted Zhao Hai’s shoulder and said, “Little Ling, you have to work hard. As long as you join the Forbidden Path Sect, you will become a pillar of the gang. Once you reach a high position within the sect, don’t forget about the Blood Knife Gang. My talent is average, no sect will spare a glance at my direction. But if there is a chance, I hope that you can help the younger generation.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Brother Liu can rest assured, I will do my best to join the Forbidden Path Sect. As for the future, I will never forget Brother Liu’s help. You don’t have to worry about this.”

Hearing this, Liu Zhen gave a satisfied nod and then patted Zhao Hai’s shoulder before leaving.

chapters.title: Chapter 2242: Befriending Zhao Hai
chapters.body:
Chapter 2242: Befriending Zhao Hai

Yu Linfeng sat silently in his room along with Chen Feng and Lie Xing. After some time, Chen Feng said, “Brother Yu, what do we do now? Liu Zhen clearly wants to use this year to get a firm hold on the Blood Knife Gang. If he controls the gang, how could we continue surviving?”

Li Xing nodded and said, “I’m afraid he will try to deal with us this year. When the time comes, we will be in trouble.”

Yu Linfeng coldly snorted and said, “There’s no need to guess. Liu Zhen will definitely use this year to deal with us, he’s not a saint. His influence in the gang is greater than us, he shouldn’t let us off just like that.”

Chen Feng nodded. But he frowned and then looked at Yu Linfeng and said, “There’s one strange thing. Liu Zhen seems to be prepared for this. He seems to know that the Gang Master will not come back. At the very least, he wasn’t telling the truth to the Forbidden Path Sect.”

Yu Linfeng nodded as his eyes narrowed, “Liu Zhen has always been very close to the Gang Master. How could he be unaware of the Gang Master’s mentality? It’s impossible for him to not know what the Gang Master is planning. He must have known what happened but didn’t tell the Forbidden Path Sect.”

Lie Xing couldn’t help but stare, then his eyes lit up as he said, “Brother Yu, how about we spread this information outside. When the time comes, we don’t have to make a move. The Forbidden Path Sect will deal with Liu Zhen on their own.”

Yu Linfeng glared at Lie Xing as he said, “Are you stupid? Have you considered what kinds of people belong to the Forbidden Path Sect? Liu Zhen hid information from the sect not because he’s protecting himself, but he’s protecting the entire gang. If the Forbidden Path Sect knew that Liu Zhen was aware that the Gang Master plans to snatch the Nine Revolutions Heavenly Herb, then it will be hard to guarantee that they won’t eradicate the entire Blood Knife Gang. If that happens, you and I won’t worry about Liu Zhen acting against us since we’ll be dead.”

When Lie Xing and Chen Feng heard this, they were stunned. Then their expression couldn’t help but change. They lived in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory for many years, they were aware how the Forbidden Path Sect acted. As Yu Linfeng said, the Forbidden Path Sect aren’t good people. The sect was known for its domineering personality. In the eyes of the Forbidden Path Sect, a small gang like the Blood Knife Gang was disposable. If the Forbidden Path Sect knew that Liu Zhen deceived them, then it wouldn’t be far-fetched to think that the sect would eradicate the entire gang. If the sect wants to deal with the gang, it would be as simple as waving their hand. And nobody can escape the pursuit of the Forbidden Path Sect.

Yu Linfeng looked at everyone and said, “You should also know that although we are Earth Monarchs, we have already exhausted our potential. It will be difficult for us to go further. With our talent, it would be impossible to join a sect. We can only thrive inside gangs. But if we join a bigger gang, we can only get the position of elder. It’s impossible for us to become masters of a hall.”

“This means that we cannot leave the Blood Knife Gang. And we can’t do anything that can harm the gang. We only have to try our best to keep the Blood Knife Gang standing. Protecting the Blood Knife Gang is protecting our interests. Do you understand?”

Chen Feng and Lie Xing nodded. Then Chen Feng looked at Yu Linfeng and said, “Then what do we do about Liu Zhen? You went against him just now, he will certainly take revenge on us.”

Yu Linfeng sneered, “He wouldn’t dare do anything to us. Before this, the Blood Knife Gang has the Gang Master at the Teleportation Stage. Even so, the Blood Knife Gang is still at the bottom of Demonheart City’s hierarchy. Now that the whereabouts of the Gang Master is unknown, the Blood Knife Gang has been severely weakened. If Liu Zhen drives us out of the gang, the strength of the gang would decrease even more. When the time comes, any gang in the city could clean us up. Whether for himself or for the gang, Liu Zhen wouldn’t deal with us right away.”

Upon hearing this, Chen Feng and Liu Xing nodded. They felt that Yu Linfeng’s words were very reasonable. Although the Blood Knife Gang was a powerhouse in Split River City, it was a gang of nobodies in Demonheart City. With Wang Da’s unclear situation, the strength of the gang was essentially halved. If there’s infighting at this time, the gang would be finished.

At this time, Yu Linfeng frowned and said, “What I’m worried about right now isn’t Liu Zhen’s move, but another person.”

Chen Feng and Liu Xing looked at Yu Linfeng, not knowing who he was talking about. Yu Linfeng looked at the two and said, “What I’m worried about is Zhao Ling.”

Hearing this, Chen Feng and Liu Xing couldn’t help but stare. Chen Feng asked, “Brother Yu, you were worried about Zhao Ling? Why would you be worried about him?”

Yu Linfeng replied, “Zhao Ling isn’t simple. He has only been in the Blood Knife Gang for a short time, yet he has already won the trust of the Gang Master and Liu Zhen. I’ve seen the Gang Master summon him multiple times. Moreover, you’ve forgotten, but Zhao Ling is among the ones who took the Moonfall Palace’s mission. How could he be unaware of the Gang Master’s situation? I reckon he’s lying like Liu Zhen.”

After sighing, Yu Linfeng continued, “Moreover, I heard that the Forbidden Path Sect is planning on recruiting disciples from the outside. The Gang Master intends for Zhao Ling to participate in the recruitment. If Zhao Ling can join the Forbidden Path Sect, the Blood Knife Gang would have nothing to worry about in Demonheart City.”

Chen Feng and Liu Xing stared when they heard this, then their complexion changed. Lie Xing took a deep breath and said, “Zhao Ling and Liu Zhen are very close. If Zhao Ling manages to join the Forbidden Path Sect, he will definitely support Liu Zhen. Once that happens, we won’t have good lives.”

The three became silent for some time. A short while later, Chen Feng laughed. Yu Linfeng and Liu Xing couldn’t help but look at him. Chen Feng looked at the two and said, “I think this isn’t that bad. If Zhao Ling fails to join the Forbidden Path Sect, then Liu Zhen will have to depend on his own strength to become the Gang Master. In that case, Liu Zhen will have to defend against us. If Zhao Ling joins the Forbidden Path Sect and supports Liu Zhen, then would we dare oppose him? By that time, we won’t be a threat to them. Even if Liu Zhen gains enough influence, he might not deal with those who aren’t a threat to him, making it safer for us.”

Hearing this, Yu Linfeng and Liu Xing stared for a moment before their eyes lit up. There are two sides to everything. Before, they thought that Zhao Hai would become bad news to them once he joined the Forbidden Path Sect. However, they didn’t think about what happens to Zhao Hai once he becomes a sect disciple. When that time comes, they would no longer be a threat to Liu Zhen, and Liu Zhen would have to reason to deal with them. This would turn their bad situation into a more acceptable outcome.

Chen Feng looked at the two and said, “And Brother Yu, if we want to survive in the Blood Knife Gang in the future, we can no longer work against Liu Zhen. We have to find a way to repair our relationship with him. He might not have any power now, but once Liu Zhen gains control over the gang, he would certainly point his sword at us. The person that can help us repair our relationship is Zhao Ling.”

Yu Linfeng immediately understood what Chen Feng was talking about. He looked at Chen Feng and said, “You mean, Liu Zhen also knows that Zhao Ling is going to participate in the assessment of the Forbidden Path Sect? If that is the case, he will certainly support him. We must also support Zhao Ling. This way, Liu Zhen will understand our intent of repairing our relationship.”

Chen Feng nodded, “Moreover, we can improve our relationship with Zhao Ling. If he succeeds in joining the Forbidden Path Sect, he will certainly remember us. When the time comes, he can put in a good word for us in front of Liu Zhen.”

Yu Linfeng and Liu Xing heard this, and their eyes lit up. They haven’t thought about Zhao Hai becoming their bridge in repairing their relationship with Liu Zhen. Moreover, if Zhao Hai becomes a sect disciple, Liu Zhen would certainly respect his words. This might even solidify their position within the Blood Knife Gang. R̃ᴀƝỒ𐌱Ëṣ

Yu Linfeng stood up and said, “Alright, I like your idea. Let’s prepare Zhao Ling’s gift first. To be honest, since he joined the Blood Knife Gang, we haven’t got in contact. I think it’s time that we meet him.”

The two naturally wouldn’t object. Although the Blood Knife Gang is a small gang. It was still a small power in the end. Moreover, it was one of the major gangs of Split River City. Yu Linfeng and the others were Hall Masters of the gang, which meant that they had amassed a small fortune of their own. At the very least, they were rich among rogue cultivators.

After preparing the gift, the three left Yu Linfeng’s courtyard and walked towards Zhao Hai’s residence. Zhao Hai was now a celebrity in the Blood Knife Gang, which won him his own place. It didn’t take long before the three arrived in Zhao Hai’s courtyard.

chapters.title: Chapter 2243: Showing Goodwill
chapters.body:
Chapter 2243: Showing Goodwill

Zhao Hai was in his room, not needing to prepare anything. Although the Forbidden Path Sect was one of the Great Sects of the True Spirit Realm, Zhao Hai has the confidence to enter it.

Zhao Hai was now conversing with Laura through the Space. He’s currently telling her about the situation in Demonheart City as well as the contradictions between Liu Zhen and Yu Linfeng’s group. To be honest, Zhao Hai didn’t take their feud too seriously. Liu Zhen was already very popular in the Blood Knife Gang. And with the support of several other hall masters, Liu Zhen holding the greatest power in the gang was just a matter of time.

Liu Zhen also had the name of justice in his hands. Even if Zhao Hai didn’t join the Forbidden Path Sect, Liu Zhen can still easily deal with Yu Linfeng and the others. It was practically impossible for Yu Linfeng and the others to defeat Liu Zhen.

Zhao Hai had just broken contact with Laura when a knock was heard from the gate of his courtyard. Then Yu Linfeng’s voice was heard, “Is Zhao Ling in? This is Yu Linfeng. I came for a visit.”

Zhao Hai quickly replied, “So it is Hall Master Yu. Please come in.” As he said that, he walked out of his room and opened the gate.

When he opened the gate, Zhao Hai saw three people standing outside. Zhao Hai cupped his fist and said, “I have seen the Hall Master Yu, Hall Master Chen, and Hall Master Lie.”

Yu Linfeng smiled faintly and said, “Zhao Ling, we came uninvited. I hope you aren’t offended.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “You three are distinguished guests, I’m deeply honored that you came. Hall Masters, please come in and sit down.” The three smiled faintly and cupped their fists to Zhao Hai before following him inside.

After the three sat down, Zhao Hai steeped a pot of tea and gave each person a cup. After serving tea, Zhao Hai said, “Hall Masters, may I ask why you came to visit?”

Yu Linfeng smiled and said, “It has been some time since you joined the Blood Knife Gang, but we haven’t properly introduced ourselves. So, we came here specifically to get to know each other more.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “I only joined recently. But during this period of time, a lot of things happened in the gang. The gang is undergoing drastic changes. Everyone has a lot of things in their hands. I was supposed to greet you myself, I didn’t expect you would come to me first. I’m embarrassed.”

Yu Linfeng laughed, then he waved his hand and said, “Let’s not talk about that. Although you have been in the Blood Knife Gang for a short time, all of us are aware of all that you’ve contributed. You have been busy, it’s natural that you won’t have time to see us. How could we blame you?”

Chen Feng also smiled and said, “Your ability has already been seen by everyone. There’s a reason why the Gang Master likes you so much. We are also impressed by your abilities.”

Liu Xing also nodded, “The Blood Knife Gang needs to recruit more people like you. Only with strong and capable hands can the Blood Knife Gang progress.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “Hall Masters must be joking. I’m just a Soul Fusion cultivator. I don’t have a lot of strength.”

Zhao Hai still hasn’t figured Yu Linfeng out. He doesn’t know what they wanted to do. Everyone in the Blood Knife Gang knew that he was close with Liu Zhen. It can even be said that Liu Zhen was the reason he joined the gang. His name has already been branded with Liu Zhen’s faction.

On the other hand, Liu Zhen and Yu Linfeng’s camp had a hostile relationship. This extended to Zhao Hai’s relationship with them. Moreover, just earlier in the day, Yu Linfeng exchanged a few heated words with Liu Zhen. For Yu Linfeng and the others to give him a sudden visit, Zhao Hai’s thoughts couldn’t help but wander.

Does Yu Linfeng want to win him over? That’s impossible. From connection, to power, and to influence, Liu Zhen was leagues better than Yu Linfeng’s faction. There was no advantage in joining them. Moreover, Zhao Hai regards Liu Zhen highly, he can never be won over by Liu Zhen’s enemies.

If they aren’t here to win Zhao Hai over, then why are they here? To drive a wedge between Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen? That’s impossible as well. If others can separate Zhao Hai and Liu Zhen with a mere visit, then they had no concrete relationship to begin with.

Yu Linfeng and the others continued to chat with Zhao Hai. They talked about random topics. The three didn’t mention their goal. Zhao Hai also wasn’t anxious, he was waiting to see what the three wanted to do.

The four chatted for more than an hour. Then Yu Linfeng looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Ling, I heard that the Forbidden Path is preparing to recruit disciples. I heard that the Gang Master wants you to participate in the recruitment. Is that true?”

Zhao Hai stared, then he immediately said, “At that time, the Gang Master wants me to try if I can join the Forbidden Path Sect. If I succeed, then the Blood Knife Gang would have a firm foothold in Demonheart City. However, the Forbidden Path Sect is a great sect, I’m not very confident that I could pass their assessment.”

When Yu Linfeng heard Zhao Hai say this, he quickly said, “Actually, the assessment of the Forbidden Path Sect isn’t hard. It would be great for the Blood Knife Gang if you could enter the sect. Don’t worry, we fully support you in participating in the sect assessment. Right, we brought you some things that you might be able to use. I hope they can be of help to you.” 𝐫Ä₦𝔬𝐛Εᶊ

After he said that, Yu Linfeng waved his hand, and a few jade bottles appeared on the table. At a glance, the bottles contained pills. Chen Feng and Lie Xing also took out the things that they prepared. Chen Feng took out a bell-shaped defensive artifact while Lie Xing took out a pile of jade talismans. From the runes on its surface, the talismans seem to be high-level.

Zhao Hai looked at the items on the table in confusion. He looked at the three and said, “Hall Master’s, what is this? I don’t understand.”

Yu Linfeng looked at Zhao Hai and said, “It’s nothing. These will help you enter the Forbidden Path Sect. We hope that you can join the sect. This is to benefit you and also for the Blood Knife Gang.”

Chen Feng also nodded and said, “Now that we don’t know when the Gang Master will return, the strength of the Blood Knife Gang places it at the bottom of Demonheart City. Although we have our contradictions with Liu Zhen, we are still members of the Blood Knife Gang in the end. We also hope that the gang heads towards a brighter future. If the gang becomes better in Liu Zhen’s hands, it’s not impossible for us to serve him as Gang Master.”

Hearing Yu Linfeng and the others, Zhao Hai immediately understood why they came over today. He immediately cupped his fist and said, “Zhao Ling thanks the Hall Masters for their intentions. Hall Masters, please rest assured, I will certainly do my best.”

Hearing this, Yu Linfeng and the others knew that Zhao Hai understood their message. Yu Linfeng and the others smiled before they stood up. Then they cupped their fists towards Zhao Hai and said, “In that case, we won’t disturb you any longer. Go and prepare. We’re heading out.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “I’ll escort you out.” The three nodded and then went out of the courtyard with Zhao Hai. After cupping their fists once more towards Zhao Hai, they turned around and left.

Soon after the three Hall Masters left, Liu Zhen arrived at Zhao Hai’s courtyard. Liu Zhen skipped the pleasantries as he sat down and said, “Little Ling, why did those three come here? Did they try to win you over?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Yes and no. They came to make friends with me, but they also want to repair their relationship with you.” After he said that, Zhao Hai told Liu Zhen about his meeting with the three Hall Masters.

Hearing Zhao Hai, Liu Zhen frowned and then said, “Do they really want to fix their relationship with me? Why? They have always been strongly against me.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “It’s very simple. They found out that they cannot win against you. Moreover, they know that I would participate in the Forbidden Path Sect’s assessment. If I manage to join the Forbidden Path Sect and support you, they will have no chance in winning. They also aren’t thinking about leaving the gang. Because of this, they can only repair their relationship with you. Only through this can they continue to stay in the gang and keep their position as Hall Masters.”

Liu Zhen coldly snorted and said, “When I control the Blood Knife Gang, they will be the first to taste my knife.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “There’s no need for that. If I successfully join the Forbidden Path Sect, they won’t dare fight with you. Their threat will completely disappear. You don’t need to deal with such people. On the contrary, if you want to develop the gang, you need to attract more talents. If you can keep them in the gang and maintain their positions, people will think that you are a tolerant person and not a tyrant. When the time comes, people will come flocking to join the Blood Knife Gang. This reputation is more useful to you than getting rid of your rivals.”

Liu Zhen stared. Zhao Hai approved of him dealing with Yu Linfeng and the others before. He didn’t expect Zhao Hai to change so quickly. He couldn’t help but frown as he said, “All of this is based on the fact that you can join the Forbidden Path Sect. But if you fail, what do we do?”

Zhao Hai’s eyes flashed a cold light, “Then we cannot keep them. They need to be killed. Even if this results in the gang losing a few powerful members, we need to remove unstable elements. Their continued existence will bring no benefit to you or the gang. They might even collude with other groups to swallow the Blood Knife Gang. If I fail to join the Forbidden Path Sect, they will be the first ones we get rid of.”

Liu Zhen stared, but then the anxiety on his face cleared.

chapters.title: Chapter 2244: Back To Teaching
chapters.body:
Chapter 2244: Back To Teaching

Liu Zhen thought that he hid his emotions really well, but Zhao Hai could see the anxiety in his eyes. Zhao Hai also knew why Liu Zhen was anxious. He was afraid that Zhao Hai would accept the benefits that Yu Linfeng and the others presented and put in a good word for them.

Zhao Hai already guessed that Liu Zhen would think this. Therefore, he said that if he couldn’t join the Forbidden Path Sect, then Yu Linfeng and the others would be dealt with. This was to dispel Liu Zhen’s anxiety.

Liu Zhen didn’t think that Zhao Hai had pondered over his thoughts in advance. He only smiled faintly and said, “We’re not in a hurry. Your main job right now is to cultivate. Once you join the Forbidden Path Sect, all of our problems would be solved.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I will do my best. However, I won’t be able to participate in the gang’s missions.”

Liu Zhen smiled and said, “If you can’t participate, then don’t. Not only you, your two brothers also don’t need to participate in the missions. You can also bring two people to accompany you during the sect’s assessment. Your two brothers are just right to be your companions.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Thank you very much, Brother Liu. But the Forbidden Path Sect hasn’t announced their recruitment. Isn’t it too early for me to be in seclusion?”

Liu Zhen shook his head and said, “It’s not early. The sect will make an announcement soon. This means that people are already preparing. If you seclude right after the announcement, it will be too late.”

Zhao Hai nodded, “Alright, then I’ll begin my seclusion. If there’s anything, you can send someone to inform me.”

Liu Zhen nodded. Then he said, “Little Ling, the Blood Knife Gang is depending on you.”

Zhao Hai smiled, “Rest assured, I’ll bring you good news.” Liu Zhen stood up and then left.

Just after Liu Zhen left, Ma Long and Liu Cai arrived at Zhao Hai’s courtyard. After the two sat down, Ma Long immediately said, “Junior Brother, what happened? Why did Yu Linfeng and Liu Zhen visit you one after the other?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “What else, they are hoping that I can join the Forbidden Path Sect to help the Blood Knife Gang.” Then he told the two about his meeting with Yu Linfeng and the others.

After explaining the situation, Zhao Hai said, “The three of us must work hard to join the Forbidden Path Sect. At this point, it seems impossible for us to return to the sect in a short time. If we keep being rogue cultivators, our cultivation will suffer. Once we join the Forbidden Path Sect, the resources we can get access to will increase. When the time comes, our cultivation might be faster than if we returned to the sect. The two of you need to focus.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai’s bodies shook when they heard Zhao Hai. To be honest, they haven’t thought about this point. They were only thinking about the mission that the sect has given them. Now, with Zhao Hai’s words, they discovered that if they continued to be rogue cultivators, then their cultivation progress would stagnate.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “Yu Linfeng sent me some pills. You can take them. I’ve decided to go into seclusion, you should do the same. We need to do our best to join the Forbidden Path Sect.” Then he took out several bottles and divided them between Ma Long and Liu Cai.

Ma Long and Liu Cai weren’t polite and took the pill bottles before cupping their fists towards Zhao Hai and leaving. Once the two left, Zhao Hai closed his door and hung a token at the entrance, showing that he’s in seclusion. Then he arranged a few formations before going to his room and entering the Space.

Laura and the others are currently in Coiling Dragon City, which means that the Space was very quiet. Zhao Hai let out a long breath and then lied down underneath the Hundred Spirits Tree. He looked at the swaying leaves of the tree as he emptied his mind and relaxed. After some time, Zhao Hai fell asleep. After days and days of strategizing and manipulating people, Zhao Hai was tired.

When Laura and the others returned from Coiling Dragon City, they discovered Zhao Hai lying down under the tree. A heartbroken expression couldn’t help but appear on their faces. Unknowingly, their steps became lighter.

Meg looked at the others and whispered, “Let Big Brother Hai sleep. Once he wakes up, we’ll join him to eat.”

Laura nodded, “Go make something delicious for Brother Hai. Something he likes to eat. He’s been too busy lately. It’s rare for him to have some free time. He won’t be staying in the Space for too long. From what I can see, he’ll go visit the Tyrant Blade Sect and the Long Clan in two days.” ŔΆŊȪᛒĚṡ

Meg sighed, “Big Brother Hai is too busy. I’ll go and prepare the food.” Then she turned around and left.

Laura and the others sat beside Zhao Hai and looked at him. It has been some time since they’ve spent a moment with Zhao Hai, but this didn’t dilute their feelings. Instead, they became more and more appreciative of Zhao Hai. They also know that Zhao Hai loved them the same.

The women looked at Zhao Hai like he was their whole world, their endless starry sky. It seems like they couldn’t look at him enough.

After one hour, Zhao Hai slowly woke up. Although he also slept outside, he kept his guard all the time. It was impossible for him to fully relax. He could only sleep with no worries inside the Space.

Zhao Hai woke up and saw Laura and the others. He couldn’t help but smile, “You’re back? Why didn’t you wake me up?”

Laura smiled at Zhao Hai and said, “You seem like you needed the rest, so we didn’t wake you up. Brother Hai, you’ve been working too hard recently, consider staying in the Space for longer.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Forget it, I’m short of time. After resting for two days, I’ll go back to the Tyrant Blade Sect to take a look. Then I’ll go to the Long Clan before returning to the Underground World.”

Hearing this, Laura’s expression couldn’t help but change. “You want to return to the underground? Brother Hai, do you want to make a move against the ghost cultivators? That’s very dangerous.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and replied, “I have changed my plan. I won’t retaliate against the ghost cultivators directly. I’ll attack them through the Red Goblins. Now that the Space has analyzed the most suitable path for the Red Goblins, I can visit them and teach them how to cause trouble to the Ghost Cultivators. With the Red Goblins causing trouble, the Ghost Cultivators would have problems if they put all of their strength into attacking the True Spirit Realm.”

Laura stared, she looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Path for the Red Goblins? What are they good at? Machines?”

Laura asked because the Goblins in the Space have shown great talent in machinery. It hasn’t been long since the Goblins were introduced to the Space. Moreover, they were a race with a broken inheritance. They were a pitiful group who didn’t know how to progress. But right now, the Goblins had the best machinery talent among all races in the Space. They even have cities that could move. They managed to construct flying battleships. Although they would still be defeated if they waged war in the True Spirit Realm, their progress still shocked Laura and the others.

Because of this, Laura and the others had some impression of the Goblin race. But in regard to cultivation, they seem to be lacking.

Hearing Laura, Zhao Hai smiled and said, “No. The Red Goblins’ strongest suit isn’t machine building. The Red Goblins have lived in the underground world for many years, and it has changed their physique. Their compatibility with the fire element has surpassed any race. Because of this, I’m prepared to teach them fire element cultivation methods. This path is more suited for them compared to machinery.”

Laura and the others stared. Then Laura said, “However, cultivation doesn’t take just one or two days. It’s simply impossible for Red Goblins to get stronger in a short enough time to cause trouble to the Ghost Cultivators. It would take some time before they cause any headaches to the Ghost Cultivators.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “They don’t need to get strong. The Red Goblins have very powerful fire energy inside their bodies that they cannot use. Only special Red Goblins have the ability to use this fire energy, which became the resistance. However, their method of usage is very primitive. They couldn’t even exert one percent of the energy’s power. As long as they are taught, they will give immediate results.”

“Also, don’t forget that the underground world has the Earthfire Pillars. Although these pillars are transformed from the sun’s fire, it isn’t much worse. The Red Goblins can use the Earthfire Pillars for cultivation, which would accelerate their increase in power. And with the vast numbers of Red Goblins, I believe it won’t take long before they can cause massive headaches to the Ghost Cultivators.”

Laura nodded, then she smiled and said, “It seems like Brother Hai is going to be a teacher again. But this time, it won’t be the Long Clan. You can leave the children to us, we won’t be teaching the goblins.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai laughed and said, “Don’t worry, you won’t. Let’s go, I can smell Meg’s cooking from here. Let’s have a meal. We haven’t eaten together for quite some time.”

Laura and the others also laughed. Then they stood up and went indoors together with Zhao Hai. Just like Zhao Hai said, it has been some time since they had a meal together.

Zhao Hai stayed in the Space for the next two days. Instead, it was Laura and the others who left to teach the Long Clan’s children. Because of this, during the day, they will go to Coiling Dragon City leaving only Cai’er to accompany Zhao Hai.

Naturally, Zhao Hai didn’t do anything while Laura and the others were away. He was sorting through the Space’s cultivation methods to find anything that would be suitable for the Red Goblins. He ranked them from low to high-level. Moreover, the methods that the Red Goblins could cultivate aren’t the same as the methods of humans. What’s most important for the cultivation method of the Red Goblins was that it should rely on Earthfire Pillars to practice.

Earthfire Pillars were everywhere in the underground world. It was practically the underground world’s sun. The Space took this into account in coming up with a cultivation method for the Red Goblins. The methods ranged from using Earthfire Pillars directly to cultivating only in its vicinity. Each method differed in speed and strength.

Although the Space was able to create different levels of cultivation methods, Zhao Hai doesn’t know anything about them to be able to teach the Red Goblins. Therefore, he spent his days studying the methods so that he could teach them to the Red Goblins.

Zhao Hai stayed inside the Space for a total of three days. After he was familiar with the cultivation methods, Zhao Hai left the Space. The first place he went to after leaving was the Tyrant Blade Sect. This was because, in Zhao Hai’s heart, the Tyrant Blade Sect was his true home in the True Spirit Realm. The other places were mere stopovers, this included the Long Clan as well as the Battle Corpse Sect.

The Tyrant Blade Sect was currently filled with tension. This was because the sect was in full war preparation. Even Zhao Hai’s peak was becoming very busy. The wasteland under Zhao Hai’s residence has been turned into fertile land. In addition to food sources, the lands were also planted with herbs that could be used as strategic resources. All of the peak’s production has been handed over to the sect. Buying and selling of goods has been forbidden by the sect.

To Zhao Hai, this restriction wasn’t a big deal. He didn’t care about contribution points since the sect would give him all he needs. The plants were also useless to him. So, it doesn’t matter if the sect takes all of the plants.

The Yin Yang Elders took charge in taking care of the fertile lands. Therefore, Zhao Hai has nothing to worry about. The Tyrant Blade Sect also doesn’t need to win him over. If Zhao Hai still gets offended by all the restrictions, then he would be unworthy of the sect’s attention.
