chapters.title: Chapter 2252: Windrange Town
chapters.body:
Chapter 2252: Windrange Town

Although Clone Stage and Soul Fusion Stage cultivators could occupy the surroundings of Gale Canyon, it was rare for such cultivators to go in recent years. This was especially true for Rogue Cultivators.

Soul Fusion Cultivators in Gale Canyon might not be killed by the beasts or the gale winds, but they would certainly die by the hands of other cultivators. There were cultivators who specifically went to Gale Canyon to hunt and rob other cultivators. Unless they are from a sect or have life-saving methods, it was very hard for a Rogue Cultivator to survive in the canyon.

Sects have their own trial grounds and wouldn’t take risks to go to Gale Canyon. Because of this, there were very few low-level cultivators in the canyon.

It was also for this reason that Liu Zhen and the others were stunned upon hearing that Zhao Hai was planning to go to Gale Canyon. They knew how risky that place was. If Zhao Hai went there, the gang might not be able to handle the consequences.

Liu Zhen quickly said, “I’m afraid that isn’t a good idea. You can’t go to Gale Canyon, it’s too dangerous. All Soul Fusion cultivators that went there didn’t return. I can’t allow you to go.”

Yu Linfeng anxiously nodded, “Little Ling, find another place. Even Earth Monarchs would hesitate going to Gale Canyon. It’s too dangerous.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and then said, “There’s no need to convince me. I have to go to Gale Canyon. I want to immerse myself in life and death situations. If I want to pass the Forbidden Path Sect’s trials, I need to go beyond my current skills. If I can’t survive life and death trials, I’m afraid I won’t be able to join the Forbidden Path Sect. It would be good for me to go to Gale Canyon. As long as I can return alive from that place, I should be able to join the Forbidden Path Sect.”

Liu Zhen and Yu Linfeng no longer tried to convince Zhao Hai. They knew that Zhao Hai was planning to bet all he had in this gamble. If they still insisted on stopping Zhao Hai, they might affect his future cultivation. However, they were still worried about Zhao Hai. After all, Gale Canyon isn’t like any other place.

Zhao Hai looked at the two and said, “My trip to Gale Canyon will take at most three months. I will certainly come back by the time the Forbidden Path Sect opens its gates. If I fail to come back, then that means I’m dead. The Blood Knife Gang could make plans then. Alright, I’m going now.”

Liu Zhen didn’t expect Zhao Hai to leave immediately, he hurriedly said, “You’re going now? Aren’t you going to prepare?” Zhao Hai shook his head. Then he cupped his fist towards everyone before leaving. Liu Zhen and the others can only follow Zhao Hai outside.

When he exited his courtyard, Zhao Hai saw Ma Long and Liu Cai standing outside. He nodded at the two of them and said, “Senior Brothers, I’m heading to Gale Canyon for three months.  I already made arrangements in the gang. You two should help Brother Liu in these three months.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai immediately understood Zhao Hai’s message. Zhao Hai said that he already made arrangements in the gang, but in their minds they changed the word ‘gang’ to ‘sect’. Zhao Hai was telling them that he had already arranged for things in the sect so that the two of them didn’t need to worry.

Ma Long and Liu Cai weren’t expecting to join Zhao Hai in going to Gale Canyon. They have already stayed in Demonheart City for some time, so they were aware of Gale Canyon. They knew very well that they didn’t have the ability to survive in the canyon, so they didn’t insist on joining Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai also knew what the two were thinking. Therefore, he didn’t make them follow. After saying his words, Zhao Hai waved his hand and took out two spatial bags and handed them over to the two. Then he said, “These are my insights on some spells. Take it. If you have time, send them back to the family.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai nodded. Naturally, this was another coded message. Inside the spatial bags should be jade slips. Moreover, inside should be a small transmission formation of the Battle Corpse Sect. Zhao Hai handed the mission of delivering message to the two of them.

Ma Long just nodded and received the spatial bags. Then he said, “Junior Brother, be careful out there. The clan sent us out to increase our strength. Nothing can happen to you.”

Ma Long and Liu Cai knew that if Zhao Hai suffered an accident, Wei Tiande wouldn’t let them off easily.

Ma Long and Liu Cai also knew well that it was impossible for a cultivator to hole themselves all the time. It was clear that Zhao Hai was set on going to a dangerous trial. So, they didn’t stop him from going.

Zhao Hai nodded towards the two and then left. Before long, he left the Blood Knife Gang’s headquarters. When he exited the headquarters, Zhao Hai was stunned to see two wind-chasing horses.

Liu Zhen looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Little Ling, the gang isn’t doing very well, so we don’t have anything to give you. Take these wind-chasing horses. At the very least, they can make your travel easier.”

Zhao Hai cupped his fist towards Liu Zhen and said, “Zhao Ling thanks Senior Brother Liu. Everyone, goodbye.” Then he jumped on the horse and tapped it on the belly. Before long, Zhao Hai was out of Demonheart City.

Zhao Hai was truly heading to Gale Canyon this time. He hadn’t gone out and fought people for some time. He was a cultivator, if he didn’t fight and accumulate experience, then his progress would be hindered in the future. It was because of this that Zhao Hai wanted to go to Gale Canyon for a trial.

Naturally, he knew about the ominous reputation of the canyon. However, Zhao Hai wasn’t worried. He was now as strong as a Teleportation Stage expert. And with the addition of the Space, his Undead army can ensure his safety. As long as he doesn’t go too deep, maintaining his life wouldn’t be difficult. ṘÄNO͍ꞖÈ𝒮

Zhao Hai has never been to Gale Canyon before, but there were quite a few people from the Forbidden Path Sect who went. Zhao Hai was able to find a map in Demonheart City that marked some forbidden areas in the canyon.

The map that Zhao Hai bought only included around a 50 thousand li range outside the canyon. So, the map only had the forbidden areas in this region. Some forbidden areas were naturally formed while some had beasts that even Earth Monarchs didn’t dare to offend. Fortunately, these beasts stayed in their territories. This allowed weaker cultivators to stay outside the canyon for trials.

After sending the map to the Space, Zhao Hai rushed towards Gale Canyon. He almost didn’t make any stops along the way. With two wind-chasing horses to alternate with, it didn’t take long before Zhao Hai arrived at the closest town to Gale Canyon called Windrange Town. The town was built behind a hill and housed around 300 thousand people. It was quite lively since it was the only stop for cultivators heading towards Gale Canyon. Cultivators also took things they obtained in the canyon to Windrange Town to sell. This caused merchants of all types to flock to the city to buy their wares.

Although Windrange Town wasn’t big, it was fully equipped with amenities. There was even a branch hall of the Forbidden Path Sect in the town. The branch hall was present to maintain order. This was because the town brought a lot of profits to the sect each year.

Don’t underestimate Windrange Town due to its size. Because it’s very near to Gale Canyon, items found in the canyon would almost always end up in the town. And some of these things were good enough for the Forbidden Path Sect. The sect itself had several big shops in the town specifically targeting these valuable materials.

The Forbidden Path Sect might be a demonic sect, but it still had to do business properly. They knew clearly that extreme suppression of trade would lead to cultivators not wanting to interact with their shops. Therefore, the sect had to do proper business with rogue cultivators. In turn, the sect’s businesses were booming, creating a huge sum of money for the sect.

Zhao Hai has no understanding of Windrange Town. The only thing he knew was that it was a stopover for cultivators before entering Gale Canyon. He plans to rest in the town before going to the canyon to see what good things he could get.

Zhao Hai rode his wind-chasing horse to enter the town. Upon entering the small town, Zhao Hai was stunned. He didn’t expect the town to be so prosperous. It had many shops on both sides of the street. Most importantly, the streets were full of people. What surprised Zhao Hai more was that the weakest cultivator walking around was at the Soul Fusion Stage. He could hardly see Clone Stage cultivators. Also, Soul Fusion wasn’t the majority of people, the streets were filled with Earth Monarchs.

A city of several hundred thousand people was occupied by cultivators not lower than the Clone Stage. This thought felt frightening to Zhao Hai. Although Zhao Hai was strong himself, he couldn’t help but be surprised seeing so many people in such density.

Now Zhao Hai understood why the Forbidden Path Sect didn’t take Gale Canyon for themselves. This was because there were just too many cultivators going to it. Clans were the most common groups in the town. Although Clans couldn’t compete against sects, when all the clans work together, even a sect would feel threatened. Even the tyrannical Forbidden Path Sect would dare admit that they could take on all these cultivators.

chapters.title: Chapter 2253: Hidden Dragons And Crouching Tigers
chapters.body:
Chapter 2253: Hidden Dragons And Crouching Tigers

While on the back of his horse, Zhao Hai looked around Windrange Town’s street. His head couldn’t fathom what he was seeing for a while. He truly didn’t expect that there would be so many cultivators in a small town. Moreover, these cultivators were quite strong. It even scared him a little.

“Brother, is this your first time in Windrange Town?” As Zhao Hai was in a daze, a voice suddenly came from his side. Zhao Hai’s expression changed as he immediately turned. In the direction of the voice, he saw an Earth Monarch not far away.

The Earth Monarch looked quite young, at around 30 years old. He wore a tattered cultivator’s robe and had a full beard. He looked sloppy.

The sloppy cultivator saw Zhao Hai’s response and smiled, “Brother, there’s no need to be so tense. Fighting isn’t allowed in Windrange Town, otherwise you will be captured by the Forbidden Path Sect. Then you will be turned into a working slave by the sect. Because of this, nobody dared to cause any fights in the town. So, is this your first time in Windrange Town? Are you going to Gale Canyon to temper yourself?”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai nodded his head and said, “It’s my first time here. I didn’t expect to see so many strong cultivators in this place.”

The sloppy cultivator chuckled and said, “You won’t find this scene anywhere else. How about it, ten jade essences and I’ll take you around Windrange Town. No matter what you want to find, I can help you find it.”

Zhao Hai stared, then he looked at the sloppy cultivator in confusion. This man was an Earth Monarch, an entire realm higher than him. How could such a person be short of money that he would act as a guide for ten jade essences?”

Seeing Zhao Hai’s reaction, the sloppy cultivator immediately knew what he was thinking about, he couldn’t help but smile as he said, “This is nothing strange. I just came back from Gale Canyon. But my luck hasn’t been good. I didn’t manage to get anything. I have already used up all my money to buy drinks. Now, I don’t even have a piece of jade essence. Since Windrange Town prohibits fighting, I can’t just take anyone’s money. Therefore, I can only do this kind of job. So, Brother, do you need help?”

Hearing the explanation, Zhao Hai smiled faintly, then he waved his hand and threw a spatial bag to the sloppy cultivator. Then he said, “Since we’re both people who like liquor, take these. Consider it as a gift.”

The cultivator received the spatial bag and looked inside using his spiritual force. He discovered 500 jade essences inside. Although 500 jade essences weren’t much, one shouldn’t forget that Windrange Town was mostly rogue cultivators. To rogue cultivators, 500 jade essences was a significant amount. They could achieve quite a lot with this money.

Seeing the jade essences in the spatial bag, the sloppy cultivator couldn’t help but stare. Then he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “I didn’t expect Brother to be a rich man. To be able to casually throw hundreds of jade essences like this.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “I’m not rich, just a bit lucky. Moreover, I also love liquor. If a wine lover meets another wine lover in dire straits, it’s natural for me to help. Alright, I’ll take my leave.”

The sloppy cultivator hastily said, “Brother, wait. I mean what I said before. I can accompany you around Windrange Town. Tell me what you need.”

Hearing the sloppy cultivator, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Alright, I want to look for a place to sleep. I want to stay the night and go to Gale Canyon tomorrow.”

The sloppy cultivator nodded and said, “Alright, I know of a hotel. It’s cheap and clean. Follow me.” After saying that, the sloppy cultivator went ahead. Zhao Hai smiled faintly and then followed.

Seeing Zhao Hai behind him, the sloppy cultivator slowed down to go beside and then said, “The shops in Windrange Town are very fair. Even the hotels provide good service for their price. However, if you want to live lavishly, you can stay at Demongod Palace that is opened by the Forbidden Path Sect. However, if you want a modest stay and do not want to be disturbed, you can stay in the Windsound Hotel. It’s definitely the cleanest hotel in Windrange Town.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “I still don’t know Brother’s name. I forgot to ask you just now.”

The sloppy cultivator nodded and said, “I’m called Qin Feng. I’ve lived in Windrange Town for five years.”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “So it’s Big Brother Qin. My name is Zhao Ling. Thanks for showing me the way.”

Qin Feng waved his hand and said, “There’s no need to be polite. Just call me Qin Feng. Right, if you have a lot of jade essences, I suggest that you stay in Windrange Town for a few days. Three days later, Windrange Town’s biggest shop will hold an auction. Moreover, it will be the biggest auction of the year. I can assure you that the stuff there will be very good. If you are interested, you can wait and see for yourself.”

Hearing Qin Feng, Zhao Hai raised his brow and said, “There’s such a thing. That’s good. Then I’ll wait a few days to take a look. I want to see what kinds of things this town has.”

To be honest, Zhao Hai didn’t care much about ordinary cultivation resources. Treasures like spiritual herbs, high-level artifacts, pills, or books were nothing special to Zhao Hai.

The level of Zhao Hai’s Ten Thousand Stellar Transformations Art was still a mystery. However, even now, Zhao Hai felt that the cultivation method still has a lot to give him. Therefore, there was no need for Zhao Hai to change into another cultivation method. As for magical artifacts, Zhao Hai has Liquid Silver. As for ores and pills, the Space can just create them using the Processing Machine. Although Zhao Hai has some attraction towards herbs, at this point, he didn’t care much about them. After years of looting in the True Spirit Realm, Zhao Hai already has his hands on all the herbs he could. If there were better herbs in the auction, they would simply be herbs that matured for many many years.

Even then, such ancient herbs aren’t too attractive to Zhao Hai. If he really needs it, he could place an ordinary herb in the Space’s accelerated fields to age them. This way, low-grade herbs could become high-grade in a short time. Zhao Hai just wanted to add more species of herbs to the Space. It doesn’t matter if they were immature or very old. Both were the same in Zhao Hai’s eyes. As long as the Space didn’t have the herb, he would get it.

It has been some time since he participated in an auction, so Zhao Hai became interested in this one. He wanted to see what good things he could get in the auction.

Seeing Zhao Hai’s reaction, Qin Feng smiled. The duo continued to walk until they reached a small street that branched out from the main avenue. The small street didn’t look anything special, so there was almost nobody in it. Despite this, the small street had several small shops in it. Before long, the two stopped in front of a shop.

Zhao Hai looked up at the simple-looking shop. The building wasn’t tall, but it still had three storeys. Above the entrance were the words that spelled out ‘Windsound’. ＲãΝóΒËȿ

Qin Feng looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Let’s head inside.” Zhao Hai also went down on his horse and then tied both horses to the side of the building.

Upon entering, what Zhao Hai saw immediately was a restaurant. Inside were cultivators eating their meals and chatting. Seeing Qin Feng walking in, one of the cultivators laughed and said, “Qin Feng, you’re finally back. Who did you fool today? If you can’t get any money today, Old Wang will drive you out. You’ll have to sleep on the streets.”

It was clear that Qin Feng knew these people. Qin Feng smiled and said, “When did I go out to cheat someone’s money? Also, Uncle Wang is an old friend. How could he drive me away? Look, I even brought business.”

At this time, an old person walked out from the back. The man was already in his late years. He had a small hump on his back. When he heard Qin Feng, he rolled his eyes and said, “Qin Feng, stop talking nonsense. If you don’t give me what you owe today, you can get out. This old man knows that you haven’t been lucky, but all you do is drink! You drink until you have no money left. If you continue, sooner or later, you will die from overdrinking!”

Hearing the old man, Qin Feng couldn’t help but chuckle, “Uncle Want, I have no other hobby. This is my only vice. Right, here’s what I owe you.” Then he took out Zhao Hai’s spatial bag and gave it to Old Wang.

Old Wang took the spatial bag and looked at the things inside. Then his brows furrowed as he glared at Qin Feng, “Qin Feng, who did you rob? You know that if you get caught, you will rot in prison.”

Qin Feng smiled faintly and said, “Old Wang, I’m a good person. How could I rob? This money is given by this brother. I wanted to lead him around for 5 jade essences. But when he heard that I drank all my money, he gave me some. He said that he can relate to me since he also loves wine. Being a wine lover, it’s appropriate to help a fellow wine lover. Right, this is his first time in Windrange Town, and he wants to find a place to stay.”

Old Wang turned his head to Zhao Hai when he heard this. Zhao Hai smiled at Old Wang and then cupped his fist, “I have seen Manager Wang. Do you have any free rooms? I want a quiet room.”

Old Wang’s attitude towards Zhao Hai was completely different compared to his treatment of Qin Feng. As soon as he heard Zhao Hai, Old Wang immediately became polite as he said, “We have, we have quiet rooms. Guest, please come with me. Are those two horses outside yours? Do you need us to look after them?”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “I’ll have to thank Manager Wang for the trouble. I want to stay for a couple of days. This can be regarded as advance payment.” After saying that, Zhao Hai took out a spatial bag and handed it to Old Wang.

Old Wang didn’t look inside the spatial bag to see its contents. Instead, he smiled and said, “It’s no trouble at all. Guest, please follow me. Little San, go and pull those two horses to the back and take care of them.” The assistant at the side nodded and immediately ran outside to take care of Zhao Hai’s wind-chasing horses.

At this time, Qin Feng loudly said, “Uncle Wang, hurry up. I want a table of food and wine. I’ll invite Brother Zhao Ling to drink with me.”

Old Wang rolled his eyes and said, “I’ll prepare it for you. I don’t really know where you got your thick skin. Spending other people’s money as though it’s your own.”

Qin Feng didn’t mind the old man’s words. He just smiled and said, “I’ll return the favor one day. When I have the money.” Old Wang coldly snorted as he directed Zhao Hai to the third floor. Then he found a quiet corner room and gave Zhao Hai the keys.

Zhao Hai looked around the room that was given to him. The room wasn’t very big. Inside was a single bed and a small living room area. Although it wasn’t big, it was very tidy. There were also several plants inside that were placed appropriately. Zhao Hai was very satisfied.

A short while after, knocking could be heard outside. Then a young voice was heard, “Customer, Mister Qin Feng wants to invite you for food and wine. Is the customer willing to head down?”

Zhao Hai stared, then he smiled faintly and said, “Alright, I’ll go now.” After saying that, Zhao Hai stood up and tidied his clothes before opening the door. Outside the door was the shop’s assistant. The assistant looked very young, around 20 years old. However, his cultivation has reached the Soul Fusion Stage. Such a person was willing to become a shop assistant, which surprised Zhao Hai. However, he didn’t ask. After all, he noticed that the Manager of the hotel was a cultivator in the Teleportation Stage. It was normal for a Teleportation Stage cultivator to have a Soul Fusion cultivator as an assistant.

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly. He didn’t expect Windchange Town to be a den of dragons and tigers. A common shop owner was already a Teleportation Stage Expert. If it were any other place, such an expert could lord over a small town.

After coming down to the first floor, Zhao Hai saw Qin Feng sitting at the table looking at the jar of wine. He kept swallowing his saliva, as if he couldn’t wait to open the jar and drink every drop inside. There were also other dishes on the table. But it was clear that Qin Feng was here for the wine, the dishes weren’t important to him.

Seeing Zhao Hai go down, Qin Feng immediately sobered up. He looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Brother Ling, come come, quickly sit down. Let me offer you a cup.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2254: Chaotic Canyon
chapters.body:
Chapter 2254: Chaotic Canyon

Zhao Hai looked at Qin Feng and couldn’t help but smile, “Brother Qin really likes his refreshments. However, looking at you now, I’m afraid you are someone who can’t keep money in their hands. I can see that you will spend all your money today.”

“Ba!” Qin Feng pounded the table. Then he laughed and said, “You’re right, Brother. But people are alive, and I like to live a happy life. If you have money and don’t spend it, what’s the point? One of the inextinguishable things in this world is money. There’s no point keeping it if you can still get your hands on it later!”

“Put your voice down! And don’t pound on my table! You’re going to destroy it!” As Qin Feng shouted, Old Wang’s annoyed voice was conveyed. All of a sudden, Qin Feng looked like a crowed rooster. He shrunk his neck as his face reddened in embarrassment. He didn’t dare answer back.

Zhao Hai felt that Qin Feng was an interesting person. He couldn’t help but laugh as he looked at Qin Feng. Then he asked, “Brother Qing, you seem to be afraid of Manager Wang? May I ask why?”

Qin Feng smiled bitterly and said, “My Father and Old Wang are good friends. But during one of his excursions to Gale Canyon, my father died. Uncle Wang took me in. If it weren’t for Uncle Wang, I wouldn’t be here today. Uncle Wang treats me like a son, and I regard him as my foster father. How could I now be afraid of him?”

Zhao Hai nodded, now understanding why Qin Feng was afraid of the shopkeeper. At the same time, he also understood why Manager Wang tolerates Qin Feng.

Qin Feng looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Brother, if you believe me, don’t go to Gale Canyon. That’s not a place for someone below Earth Monarch Stage. Even Earth Monarchs have to be cautious whenever they go to the canon. Otherwise, the consequences would be dreadful.”

Zhao Hai stared, he looked at Qin Feng and said, “Brother Qin, why do you say this?”

Qin Feng sighed and said, “I heard from my father that the canyon used to have Clone Stage and Soul Fusion Stage cultivators going for trials. This is because there are countless treasures and beasts there. Everyone who went gained something. But after so many years of wanton looting, the first 20 thousand miles towards Gale Canyon became a barren land with nothing left. The stones there have been turned over many times. There’s nothing to pick up at all.”

As he said this, Qin Feng paused, then he sighed and said, “Beyond 20 thousand miles is a danger zone for Clone Stage and Soul Fusion Stage cultivators. Beasts there are extremely powerful, even Earth Monarchs couldn’t dare face them. Every year, news of Earth Monarch deaths could be heard in the town.”

Then Qin Feng let out a long breath and said, “Naturally, the most dangerous thing in Gale Canyon aren’t beasts, but the people. There’s nothing to collect in the first 20 thousand miles, but there are still many cultivators going there. These cultivators are murderers and treasure hunters. In the beginning, only Clone Stage and Soul Fusion Stage cultivators participated, but later on Earth Monarchs started to appear. Slowly, the Clone Stage and the Soul Fusion Stage cultivators stopped coming. This is because Clone Stage and Soul Fusion Stage cultivators would get robbed as soon as they entered the region. Some may be released upon getting robbed, but most are killed outright. Now, there are fewer and fewer low-level cultivators in the canyon. And from 20 thousand miles to 50 thousand miles, Earth Monarchs have gone crazy. It’s a huge mess. If you aren’t an Earth Monarch or don’t have a group, it’s better to stay away. Your life may be taken at any time.”

Then Qin Feng looked at Zhao Hai’s eyes, waiting for his response. Zhao Hai saw Qin Feng’s expression and smiled, “Thanks Brother for the advice. But you can rest assured, I came to Gale Canyon because I have methods to save my life. I won’t hide it from you, I came this time to prepare for the Forbidden Path Sect’s recruitment. I want to improve my strength in a short period of time.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng stared, then he nodded and said, “I know about the Forbidden Path Sect’s recruitment. Although I want to participate, the sect prefers body cultivators. No matter what cultivation method you studied in the past, the sect will force you to learn body cultivation methods once you enter. My body isn’t suitable for body cultivation, so I didn’t plan on participating. I didn’t expect you to come for this, no wonder.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Right, I came for this. I want to join the sect because there are countless brothers placing their hopes on me. I can’t let them down.” Zhao Hai said this with a firm tone.

What Zhao Hai said was half true and half false. He wanted to join the Forbidden Path Sect, but his reason wasn’t the Blood Knife Gang.

The Blood Knife Gang wasn’t a major gang. Even if Zhao Hai didn’t like them in the beginning, Wang Da and Liu Zhen have been good to him. Now that the Blood Knife Gang was facing a crisis, if Zhao Hai didn’t join the Forbidden Path Sect, the gang would be wiped out. This wasn’t something that Zhao Hai wanted to see.

Therefore, what Zhao Hai said was technically not a lie. He really wanted to help the Blood Knife Gang. No matter what, the gang did him quite a few favors. Moreover, the gang could provide him an identity to infiltrate the Forbidden Path Sect.

Hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng became curious. He looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Brother, is it alright for you to tell me what happened?”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he told Qin Feng about his matters. Naturally, he couldn’t tell him the truth. He said that he was from a declining cultivator clan. For the clan’s future, he was sent out to get experience along with two other people. At the same time, he hopes that he could get resources to give to the clan. He also told Qin Feng about his membership to the Blood Knife Gang. He told him about his seclusion and finally his decision to come to Gale Canyon to temper himself. ɽÁꞐȎ𝐛Ës̩

Hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng couldn’t help but sigh, “I see. It seems like you have no choice but to join the Forbidden Path Sect. That’s fine. If you can really join the sect, both your clan and the Blood Knife Gang will benefit greatly.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he smiled faintly and said, “I have a few savings in me, so I want to go to the auction to see if I can buy anything good. If I’m lucky, I might find life-saving methods to help me in the Gale Canyon.”

Qin Feng smiled bitterly and said, “Normally, it wouldn’t be wrong to have that idea. But this time, I’m afraid that you will be disappointed. The auction will be a large one. Although there will be good things sold, there are sect disciples among the buyers. Those items will be sold for a high price. Moreover, if those sect disciples want something, it would be difficult to take it away from them.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Don’t worry, I’ll just go take a look. At most, I would miss one or two days of training.”

Qin Feng nodded, “That’s good. Three days later, I’ll accompany you to the auction. We’re going to the Windrange Auction House. I heard the person behind the shop is from the Forbidden Path Sect. Nobody would dare cause any trouble there. But brother, your cultivation is too low. I’m afraid you won’t be able to get inside if you don’t have anyone accompanying you.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly, then he raised his glass and said, “Then, I’ll have to thank Brother Qin in advance.”

Qin Feng laughed, then he clinked his glass with Zhao Hai’s and then downed the wine.

Manager Wang looked at the two, a flash of light went through his eyes. This wasn’t the first time Qin Feng brought someone to the hotel. Qin Feng had a good personality which made it easy for him to make friends. The friends he met were often wine and meat lovers, most of them good-for-nothings. Manager Wang looked down on the friends that Qin Feng made.

However, Zhao Hai was different. Although Zhao Hai was only a Soul Fusion cultivator, Manager Wang could feel that he had a special temperament. Zhao Hai looked calm and composed despite all the warnings he got. Such a temperament wasn’t something that anyone could have.

Although Manager Wang was only a rogue cultivator, his strength wasn’t fake. Moreover, he had lived for quite a long time. He had seen all kinds of people. Zhao Hai’s temperament was commonly seen on Core Disciples of sects. Disciples of smaller sects wouldn’t have such temperaments. Looking at Zhao Hai, Manager Wang couldn’t help but make guesses on his identity.

Zhao Hai might have mentioned that he was participating in the Forbidden Path Sect’s recruitment, but Manager Wang had enough insight to know that Zhao Hai’s status wasn’t simple. This also confused Manager Wang as to why Zhao Hai wanted to join the Forbidden Path Sect. But he didn’t dwell too much on it. He knew that there were things that he shouldn’t know. It wouldn’t be good for him if he knew too much. Nevertheless, he was happy that Qin Feng could befriend Zhao Hai. In his opinion, Qin Feng made many mistakes, and this was the rare instance that he made the right decision.

chapters.title: Chapter 2255: Entering The Auction
chapters.body:
Chapter 2255: Entering The Auction

Windrange Auction was the auction shop of the biggest trading group in Windrange Town. Windrange Auction would hold small auctions every month and a large auction every year.

Rumors have spread that the large auction this time would contain many treasures. Pills, weapons, and even cultivation methods were for sale. A large auction like this naturally attracted cultivators from all directions. For a while, the population of Windrange Town exploded.

This was also the reason why Zhao Hai saw so many Earth Monarchs on the streets of the town. Normally, Windrange Town wouldn’t have so many people. But because of the large auction, people flocked to the town. Moreover, most of them were at the Earth Monarch Stage.

On the day of the large auction, Earth Monarchs all throughout the town walked towards the auction house.

Naturally, not everyone can enter the auction house. If you want to enter, you first need to hand a thousand jade essences as a deposit. If you don’t have a thousand jade essences, then don’t bother joining.

For sect disciples, a thousand jade essences was nothing. They can make such money in a single mission. But for rogue cultivators, a thousand jade essences was an astronomical value. Their yearly income was less than a thousand jade essences. This rule has kept plenty of people from entering the auction house.

In the beginning, people were discontent with this rule. They were thinking that Windrange Auction House was keeping them from entering. Later, they learned the reason why the auction house imposed this rule. This was because there were no cheap items in the selections this time. The cheapest item for auction costs more than a thousand jade essences. If you didn’t have a thousand jade essences, you can’t even buy the cheapest item, let alone other things.

This rule not only limited the number of people entering the auction house, it also ensured that the auctioned items sold for a good price.

In front of the Windrange Auction House was a row of people standing wearing the auction house’s uniform. These cultivators were all at the Earth Monarch Stage. All of them had indifferent expressions on their faces. One could see at a single glance that they couldn’t be messed with. If you wanted to break into the auction house, you would need to go through them. And if you managed to pass through these Earth Monarchs, there were also Teleportation Stage Experts waiting inside the auction house.

Most importantly, Windrange Auction House was affiliated with the Forbidden Path Sect. Although the sect cannot dominate the entire Gale Canyon, it was still under their territory. Moreover, the sect has a Branch Hall in Windrange Town. Therefore, nobody dared to offend the sect while in the town, which extended to respecting the auction house’s rules.

Cultivators began to gather around the auction house, looking eagerly at it. Although it was just an auction house, if a rogue cultivator could obtain even a single treasure inside, their strength would go up leaps and bounds. It would be very beneficial to their progress.

However, not many people could enter the auction house. A thousand jade essences was a huge amount for rogue cultivators. Some even might not reach this number despite saving for many years. If they can save hundreds of jade essences, they could be regarded as a rich person.

Rogue cultivators can indeed make money, but their expenses were big as well. Resources they get might be sold for 5 thousand jade essences, but the pills, artifacts, food, clothing, and residence would immediately deplete it. This was the main reason why rogue cultivators find it hard to cultivate.

Although not many people could enter the auction house, with the number of people coming to the auction, rogue cultivators still came to watch the fun. At the same time, some of them wanted to see people who are able to enter the auction house and remember their faces. If possible, they would mark these people and hunt them down if they left the town. This has happened in the previous auctions.

Qin Feng and Zhao Hai finally squeezed their way to the entrance of the auction house. Today, Qin Feng wasn’t wearing his sloppy clothes. He changed into neat robes and has also freshened himself up. The robe made Qin Feng exude a feeling of nobility. Naturally, there was a hint of cynicism in his temperament, which made him look like a prodigal son. Nevertheless, his temperament looked appealing.

Zhao Hai followed behind with a calm expression. To outsiders, Zhao Hai looked like Qin Feng’s attendant. This was also a method that Zhao Hai came up with. If someone saw him paying money to enter the auction house, he would be targeted by countless people. Zhao Hai didn’t want to cause himself so much trouble, so he asked Qin Feng to dress up and pretended to be Qin Feng’s servant.

Arriving at the entrance of the auction house, a cultivator of the house immediately blocked the two. Then he looked at them and said, “You two, two thousand jade essences.”

Qin Feng smiled faintly and then waved his hand. Zhao Hai took out a spatial bag and handed it over to the cultivator. Opening the spatial bag, the cultivator nodded and then took out two jade tokens and handed them over to Zhao Hai. Zhao Hai nodded and walked inside with Qin Feng.

At this time, several cultivators were chatting in a low voice. One of them looked at his companions and said, “Did you notice the two people who entered just now? The Earth Monarch looked familiar. I feel like I have seen them before.” Ɍ𝐀𐌽ȱВƐ𝙨

His friend nodded as a look of doubt appeared on his face, “I also feel that he’s familiar. We probably saw then before. But with that temperament, I would have etched their appearance in my mind. But I can’t recall anything, he just looks familiar.”

Another cultivator said, “I also feel like they’re familiar. What’s strange is that I don’t know him. He even brought a servant with him.”

“Hmph! You are all blind. What servant? Those two are acting! Don’t you know that Earth Monarch? We used to drink with him every day.” The one who spoke was another cultivator of the group.

As soon as the three cultivators heard this, they couldn’t help but look at the man. The first cultivator asked, “Old Ye, don’t talk nonsense. What acting? And we used to drink with him?”

Old Ye looked at the three and scoffed, “You’re already in the Earth Monarch Stage, yet you’re all blind! Can’t you see that the Earth Monarch was Old Drunkard Feng? You drink with him every day, yet you failed to notice him.”

As soon as the three heard Old Ye, they couldn’t help but stare. They looked at Old Ye in disbelief. After some time, one of them laughed and said, “I must say, Old Ye, your eyes seem to be malfunctioning. What do you mean Old Feng? Look at that person, how could you suggest that he’s Old Feng?”

Another cultivator also laughed and said, “Right, I’m afraid Old Feng is still eating in Old Wang’s shop. I’m even planning on inviting him to eat in a couple of days. He’s too poor that he can’t afford new robes. Where would he get money to enter the auction house?”

Old Ye looked at them all and sneered, “You three. It’s clear that you haven’t seen Old Feng recently. Two days ago, Old Feng met a new friend. That friend is the person following behind him. I heard that the guy is very rich.”

The three thought about it a little, then one of them said, “Old Feng got another friend? Although he could make friends with anyone in just two drinks, there are very few who think of him. All of his friends want to take advantage of him. Only a few of us look after him from time to time. This time, he even made friends with a Soul Fusion cultivator. His taste in friends is getting lower and lower.”

Old Ye sighed and said, “Alright, let’s stop talking about this. I wasn’t joking. I heard that Old Feng ran out of money a few days ago. He went to the town gate to guide people for money. He met that person there. As soon as that person heard that Old Feng loved wine, he gave him a bag of jade essence. When he saw that there are hundreds of jade essences inside, Old Feng was very happy. I also heard that the two had drank together and became close. Most importantly, Uncle Wang didn’t scold them.”

Hearing this, the three couldn’t help but stare. Then their expression changed as one of them said, “That guy can’t be a swindler, right? Old Feng has nothing on his name, why would that guy get close to him? Does Old Feng intend to sell his life? No, when Old Feng comes out, we need to talk to him.” The other agreed as a worried look appeared on their faces.

chapters.title: Chapter 2256: First Encounter With Leng Yue
chapters.body:
Chapter 2256: First Encounter With Leng Yue

As Qing Feng and Zhao Hai entered the auction house, a young woman immediately greeted them, “Gentlemen, please come with me.” Qin Feng and Zhao Hai didn’t respond and just followed behind the woman.

Before long, the three arrived at a staircase leading downwards. The woman led the two to the staircase and continued to walk downward. Finally, they arrived in front of a door. After pushing the door open, the woman gestured inside and said, “Gentlemen, please.”

Entering the room, Zhao Hai and Qin Feng couldn’t help but stare. They didn’t expect to see such a scene. They were inside a huge underground hall. It was enormous, almost as big as a stadium. In the middle of the hall was an open space with a table in the center.

Around the open space were chairs arranged from low to high. The lowest chair was at the same level as the open space. It had the same setup as a stadium.

At this time, the young woman walked in and then bowed, “These will be your seats.”

Qin Feng stared, he looked at the woman in confusion as he asked, “We’re sitting here? Why can’t we sit in the front?”

The young woman smiled and said, “The two thousand jade essences that you paid on the door is only the entrance deposit. Because of this, you can only sit in the tenth row. If you deposit an additional thousand jade essences, you can sit in the ninth row. If you deposited more than two thousand jade essences, you could sit even lower, and so on. If you deposited ten thousand jade essences, you can sit in the front row where you can see the item more clearly. Moreover, for the items you buy, you will get a 1 percent discount if you sit in the tenth row. But if you sit in the first row, the auction house will give you a 10 percent discount on all things you buy. Of course, your entry deposit will be deducted first if you decide to buy.”

Qin Feng turned to Zhao Hai who raised his brow. Then Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Alright, we’ll be sitting in the first row.” As he said that, he handed a spatial bag to the young woman.

Receiving the spatial bag, the young woman looked at the contents, then her expression changed as she quickly shifted her tone, “Gentlemen, please come with me.” After that, she led the two to the first brown. All this time, Qin Feng felt numb as he followed behind the young woman. Although he knew that Zhao Hai was rich, he didn’t expect Zhao Hai to casually take 20 thousand jade essences in one go. He couldn’t help but be greatly surprised.

As the two sat in the front row, the young woman immediately set up a table along with good wine. She even asked if they needed anything else. She could serve any food available in Windrange Town, all for free.

Zhao Hai just waved his hand and asked the young woman to bring two more bottles of wine and nothing else. The young woman immediately turned around and left.

But what the two didn’t know was that after they sat in the first row, the other participants of the auction were in an uproar. This wasn’t the first time that they participated in an auction, naturally they knew about the rules of the seating. Sitting in the front row meant that they had deposited more than 10 thousand jade essences. To rogue cultivators, this number was unreachable. Plenty of rogue cultivators looked at Zhao Hai and Qin Feng with burning gazes, it was as though they had become statues made of jade essence.

Qin Feng could feel the gazes directed at him from all directions. He couldn’t help but get restless. Despite being a lover of wine, the taste of the win in front of him seemed to turn dull.

Seeing Qin Feng, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Don’t mind them. Come, have a drink. The wine here is very good. It seems like there will be good things in the auction.”

Qin Feng looked at Zhao Hai and couldn’t help but smile bitterly as he said, “Of course the wine is good. It’s Rainflower Wine, the top wine in Windrange Town. One pot is worth 50 jade essences.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Then you have to drink a lot today. The wine is free.”

Qin Feng smiled bitterly. To be honest, he felt tremendous pressure from the gazes directed at him. He couldn’t fully enjoy the wine.

As the two were talking, more cultivators entered. However, most of these cultivators found seats at the top rows. Only a few people sat near the bottom. And there was nobody in the front row besides Zhao Hai and Qin Feng.

Zhao Hai looked around and couldn’t help but smile. Although gazes were directed at him, he didn’t actually care. In any case, nobody knew who he was. It was one of the rare moments where he could act high-profile.

More cultivators arrived in the next hour, but none of them caught Zhao Hai’s attention. There was only one group that caught Zhao Hai’s eyes. This was a group of three people. One of them looked to be in his twenties. He was a handsome man but his face was pale. His eyes flashed a cold light, giving people a very gloomy feeling. In one look, Zhao Hai didn’t like this person.

Following this person were two Earth Monarchs. The two seemed to be his servants as they followed behind him with lowered gait and heads.

The reason they caught Zhao Hai’s attention was because they also sat in the front row. Naturally, they deposited ten thousand jade essences each.

As the young man sat in the front row, the auction house immediately roared with conversation. It was special if one person sat in the first row, but today there were two groups sitting in front. This surprised the auction’s participants.

But this surprise didn’t end soon. A few more people sat in the front row. There were now five groups sitting in front. Besides Zhao Hai and Qin Feng as well as the young man, there was also a group of women, each with graceful figures. One could tell at a glance that they were beauties. Zhao Hai knew as soon as he saw their clothes that they were all female cultivators from the Green Willow Sect.

The Green Willow Sect is a small sect within the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory. This small sect only received female disciples. Moreover, each disciple was astonishingly beautiful. The Green Willow Sect’s special skill was the Green Willow Sword. It was a set of powerful sword techniques. Their sect master was a Diamond Body Expert, which was considered as a powerful expert stronger than Teleportation Stage cultivators. Although the sect was considered small, medium-sized sects didn’t dare offend them.

The Green Willow Sect’s relationship with the Forbidden Path Sect was considered intimate. According to legend, every ten years, Green Willow Sect disciples would marry Forbidden Path Sect disciples. The two sects were bound together by marriage, which made their relationship very close. ṚἁΝốβЕṤ

Besides the Green Willow Sect disciples, there was also a group of black-robed cultivators. Embroidered on their sleeves was a small silver snake. Seeing this, Zhao Hai knew that they were from Spirit Snake Mountain.

Spirit Snake Mountain was a powerful clan affiliated with the Forbidden Path Sect. They are a clan that possess a powerful cultivation method called the Nine Revolutions Spirit Snake Method. It was said that if this cultivation method was practiced to its highest level, one’s body would become as flexible as a spirit snake, completely negating all kinds of attacks.

The last group to sit in the front row was a single person. They wore gray robes and had a long black blade on their back. As he sat in his chair, he looked like an unsheathed blade, making it hard for the attendants to approach him.

Besides these people, there was nobody else in the front row. Conversely, there were quite a few people sitting at the back. Zhao Hai even saw a few people from sects that were famous in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory.

Seeing this, Zhao Hai’s eyes couldn’t help but brighten up. He felt that the auction wouldn’t be simple. Otherwise, it wouldn’t attract these people to come.

As for Qin Feng, he was in no mood to drink. He was too restless in his seat. His eyes kept looking around, looking very nervous.

Zhao Hai looked at Qin Feng and said, “Brother Qin, there’s no need to be anxious. We won’t be buying anything important. There’s no need to be nervous. When the auction starts, nobody will pay attention to us.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng couldn’t help but smile bitterly. As he looked around, he said, “Seems like the auction this time isn’t a normal yearly auction. Otherwise, there won’t be as many people as today. That person with the blade is called Leng Yue, he’s an expert known in Windrange Town. He is nicknamed Demon Blade. He was born in the external branch of the Leng Family, being one of the least valued descendants. But this didn’t deter him. He was resolute and reached his current Earth Monarch Stage cultivation through hard work. I heard that he’s going to participate in the recruitment of the Forbidden Path Sect. If he joins the sect, the Leng Family would surely suffer.”

Zhao Hai looked at Qin Feng in confusion as he asked, “Why do you say that? Although he’s from an external branch, he’s still a member of the Leng Family. If he joined the sect, wouldn’t he benefit his clan?”

Qin Feng sneered and said, “Leng Yue’s father was a genius of the external branch. But because he offended the family’s direct branch, he died in a suspicious manner. Leng Yue’s mother raised him. But because of what happened to his father, she was treated worse than a slave. When Leng Yue was 16 years old, she fell ill from overwork and died. Leng Yue hated the Leng Family for what they did to his parents. If he enters the Forbidden Path Sect, it would be strange if he didn’t act against the family.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he said, “I also heard about the Leng Family. They also have a few disciples in the Forbidden Path Sect. It seems like they also have someone in the inner sect. Even if Leng Yue joins, he would still be an outer disciple. It would be difficult for him to take revenge against the Leng Clan.”

Qin Feng nodded, “It is indeed difficult. However, Leng Yue was truly strong. Moreover, do you know what cultivation method he uses?”

Zhao Hai shook his head. Qin Feng smiled and said, “It’s the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique. If he enters the Forbidden Path Sect, he will be directly taken to the inner sect.”

Zhao Hai was shocked. He didn’t expect Leng Yue to practice the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique. This body tempering technique was a famous cultivation method in the True Spirit Realm. Its fame came from its simplicity, and also its difficulty.

There are plenty of body cultivators in the True Spirit Realm. Sects like the Forbidden Path Sect even specialize in body cultivation with the Evil Buddha Lotus Body. Once matured, practitioners of the body cultivation method would have absurd physical bodies comparable to artifacts. They could use their bodies directly as weapons.

The Five Elements Body Tempering Technique was the cheapest cultivation method one could buy in the True Spirit Realm. This doesn’t mean that the technique was weak. The Five Elements Body was very powerful. A matured Five Elements Body could go toe-to-toe against any body cultivation method there was.

However, the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique was just too difficult to practice. The technique was divided into nine levels. The first and second layers were the foundations. Cultivating to this point wasn’t hard. It was just the same as other body cultivation methods where one polishes their physique by attracting spiritual qi.

But upon reaching the third level, the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique becomes difficult. In the third level, one must learn to absorb the wood element to their body. The method to do this was by hitting wood.

To absorb the wood element, the practitioner needs to hit trees. And it wasn’t just with their fists. Cultivators need to hit trees with their entire body. Any part of the body needs to be used. This kind of cultivation must be maintained for many years, thousands of times a year. At least a year was required to reach minor achievement.

The fourth level of the cultivation method was absorbing the water element. The practitioner needs to practice in the cold. They need to stand naked in the winter, attracting cold air into their body. If they could absorb a tank of water per day, then they have reached small achievement.

The fifth level was absorbing the earth element. Like the third level, the practitioner needs to hit rock with their body. The Sixth level was absorbing the fire element. The practitioner needs to endure being on fire for an hour before reaching small achievement. The seventh level was absorbing the metal element. With the help of other people, their body needs to be hit with an iron rod for one year.

The eighth and ninth layer was absorbing the strength of the five elements. Treating their body as a raw ore, they would temper their body to have the strength of the five elements. The pain during this process was beyond one’s imagination. One would need to be insane to undergo such a process.

chapters.title: Chapter 2257: The Auction Starts
chapters.body:
Chapter 2257: The Auction Starts

When the suffering isn’t worth what you get in the end, naturally no cultivator would learn such a technique.

The Five Elements Body Tempering Technique was such a cultivation method. In the early parts, the results you get aren’t as strong as high-level body cultivation methods. At the same time, you would be suffering more than others, ten times or more. It was because of this that only a few people cultivated this technique.

The main reason Qin Feng emphasized that Leng Yue was practicing the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique was because the technique can be directly converted into the Forbidden Path Sect’s Evil Buddha Lotus Body. It also has one of the best conversion rates out of all body cultivation methods.

Because of this, cultivators who were successful in cultivating the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique would immediately enter the inner sect once they pass the Forbidden Path Sect’s assessment.

But even if practicing the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique could make it easier for someone to join the Forbidden Path Sect, there were too many hardships to go through in order to be qualified. Therefore, until now, there were very few people who were accepted to the Forbidden Path Sect through the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique. Another reason was a weakness to the technique besides the suffering, it was its speed.

The Five Elements Body Tempering Technique needs the five elements to be absorbed. This caused it to take longer to practice compared to other cultivation methods.

Although cultivators live very long lives, all cultivators started with body refinement. During that period, the cultivator needs to take care of their body, especially when they were still young. Otherwise, they would build up internal injuries that are hard to cure.

The Five Elements Body Tempering Technique was a very overbearing method. If it was practiced before one’s meridians are developed, it’s possible for a cultivator to cripple themselves. Because of this, cultivators of the Five Elements Body Cultivation Technique tend to be older or were lucky enough to find treasures that tempered their bodies.

Starting cultivation late, slow progress, painful process, these are the shortcomings of the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique. Moreover, the Forbidden Path Sect has an age limit in accepting disciples. This disincentivizes rogue cultivators even more from using the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique. They were afraid that even if they succeeded in cultivating the technique, they would be too old to join the sect.

However, Leng Yue was different. Looking at his appearance, he was still quite young, yet the fluctuations in his body were clearly showing that he had reached the Earth Monarch Stage. Young, practices the Five Elements Body Tempering Technique, and an Earth Monarch, this was a clear indication that Leng Yue was a genius. No wonder Qin Feng could say that Leng Yue could join the Forbidden Path Sect and even become an inner disciple directly.

Zhao Hai let out a sigh as he looked at Leng Yue’s indifferent face, he said, “This person is full of hatred. But this hatred is his greatest driving force. Once he gets his revenge, this fire might relax. I hope he can find a new goal then. Otherwise, it would have a great impact on his future cultivation. Revenge is merely a stop on the road to cultivation, it isn’t the road itself. That’s putting the cart before the horse.”

Upon hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng stared, then he looked at Zhao Hai with a meaningful gaze. He didn’t expect Zhao Hai to say such things. Even an Earth Monarch like Qin Feng hasn’t thought of this. This made Qin Feng feel that Zhao Hai was more complicated than he thought.

At this time, a melodious chime was heard in the hall. The entire audience immediately became silent. They all knew that this chime is the sign that the auction is starting.

Sure enough, after the chime, the doors to the hall closed shut. The people inside remained calm. They all knew that the Auction House wouldn’t do anything to harm them, they didn’t have the guts.

Soon after, a middle-aged man appeared at the center. As he stood behind the table, he cupped his fist to all four directions before saying, “Thank you everyone for coming to Windrange Auction House’s annual large auction. I am Ling Dong, today’s auctioneer.”

Everyone kept quiet. Lin Dong was an Earth Monarch and seemed to be in the late stages of his life. He was no longer young and clearly had no chances of progress. However, everyone knew that Ling Dong wasn’t simple. Although he has average potential, he was a business genius. The Windrange Auction House was founded under his guidance. Every year, the auction house earns an uncountable number of jade essences. This result was inseparable from Ling Dong’s abilities.

Ling Dong looked at everyone and then smiled, “I know that you can no longer wait, so I won’t waste your time. This is the first item, the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword.” With his words, a maid walked in holding a sword box. Inside the box was a long white sword.

The sword was entirely white. Whether it be the hilt or the scabbard, all were white. Most importantly, although it was sheathed, the audience could feel the coldness of the sword.

Ling Dong gestured towards the sword and said, “The Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword is made by the Forbidden Path Sect affiliated crafting Grandmaster Wendao. The sword is made from high-grade spirit frost iron as well as other metals. It weighs 12 catties and has the ice attribute. If spiritual qi is injected, the sword could release an ice mist that could injure the enemy. If you fight against an enemy for a long time, you would be able to seal their meridians and flood their body with ice poison. The starting bid for the sword is 1,200 jade essences, each bid must not be less than 100 jade essences!”

While introducing the sword, Ling Dong also took the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword and injected spiritual qi into it. Just as described, the sword emitted an ice mist.

Hearing Ling Dong describe the first item, everyone in the hall couldn’t help but be surprised. They didn’t expect this kind of item to be shown first in the auction.

Although the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword was a single-attribute sword, it wasn’t much in the eyes of the sect. On the other hand, once it was placed outside, it was a great treasure. The price of 1,200 jade essences wasn’t high.

As Ling Dong finished his introduction, a voice was heard, “One thousand three hundred jade essences. This Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword is compatible with my attribute. I want it.”

“Hahaha, you want this sword for only 1,300 jade essence? Are you dreaming? 1,500 jade essences!” Hearing this, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but turn his head to the source of the voice. The person sat in the ninth row, which meant that he deposited at least 2,000 jade essences.

Moreover, Zhao Hai could see that the cultivators who bid were both water-element cultivators. If they get their hands on the sword, their prowess would greatly increase.

However, it was clear the attendants of today’s auction weren’t poor. Moreover, the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword was a genuinely good item. The sword’s price continued to increase. In the end, it was purchased for 2,000 jade essences by the second bidder.

Zhao Hai wasn’t attracted to the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword. The most special thing about the sword was that it was made with spirit frost iron. Although it was a valuable metal, Zhao Hai has no interest in it. This was because the Space already has mines for ice-attribute metals. If he wanted, he could mass produce Ice Mist Spirit Frost Swords. Moreover, he could make better versions than the one in the auction.

Qin Feng looked at the cultivator who bought the sword with envy. Naturally, he didn’t fancy the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword. Although the sword was good, it didn’t match his attribute. He was envious because the man has so much money. R𝘈ŊôʙЕș

After the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword was sold, Ling Dong waved his hand once more. Then a maid walked in carrying a tray with a jade bottle on top. In one glance, the auction attendees knew that the next item was a pill.

Sure enough, as he scanned the audience, Ling Dong said, “The second item to be auctioned is the Primordial Soul Calming Pill. This pill is refined by a Pill Grandmaster and is a top-grade pill. It has the effect of nourishing the user’s primordial soul and helps them recover their spiritual force. It is helpful in cultivating spiritual force. One bottle has 100 pills inside. They will be sold as one set. The price of the bottle starts at 1,000 jade essences. Each bid must not be less than 100 jade essences!”

This pill was extraordinary. In the True Spirit Realm, pills that could help spiritual force were very rare. Ten jade spirits for one pill was actually quite cheap.

Once the bid for the jade bottle began, people immediately bid one after another. Finally, the pills were sold to a person from the fifth row at the price of 2,600 jade essences. It was sold for more than the Ice Mist Spirit Frost Sword.

Like the sword, Zhao Hai wasn’t interested in the pill. In fact, pills that affect spiritual force were the most useless to Zhao Hai. The tea made from the leaves of the Hundred Spirits Tree could temper one’s spiritual force. Zhao Hai usually treated such tea as water. Moreover, Zhao Hai was enhanced by the Spiritual Cube. Every time the cube rotates, his spiritual force would increase. In the True Spirit Realm, there would be very few people who have a more tempered spiritual force than Zhao Hai. Even the Yin Yang Elders at the Diamond-body Stage couldn’t compete with Zhao Hai in terms of spiritual force.

Additionally, even if Zhao Hai obtained the pill, he would just deconstruct it using the Universal Scanner. In the end, he would get a formula and a refining method, which was of no use to Zhao Hai. The recycled materials were also useless. Because of this, the pill didn’t even have the chance to enter Zhao Hai’s eyes.

After the second item was sold, Ling Dong continued with the third item. The third item was still put on a tray. There was also red silk on the tray that cushioned a jade slip.

After scanning the audience, Ling Dong said, “The third item is a rare Blade Technique. The technique is called the Eight Blades of the Hidden Fog. It is a mid-grade phantom blade technique. Since such levels of techniques are considered rare books, this blade technique is more expensive. Bidding starts at 3,000 jade essences. Each bid cannot be less than 300 jade essences!”

Boom! The entire hall exploded in excitement. They didn’t expect the third item to be a rare blade technique!

chapters.title: Chapter 2258: Zhao Hai Bids
chapters.body:
Chapter 2258: Zhao Hai Bids

In the True Spirit Realm, rare books were generally hoarded by the sects. Moreover, it was forbidden to leak it to the outside. Some ordinary rare techniques could be passed by a sect disciple to their family. But those powerful rare techniques were extremely guarded. Anyone found leaking rare techniques outside would get their cultivation abolished at best, some were beheaded on the spot.

Because of this, the number of rare books circulating outside the sects was very small. Even if they were outside, they were oftentimes incomplete. One could follow the technique to become strong, but if they wanted to progress, it was close to impossible.

Now, at the auction, there was a rare blade technique. This in itself was very attractive. Although it’s impossible for this blade technique to be too strong, it was still a treasure to rogue cultivators. Moreover, the starting bid was 3,000 jade essences, which wasn’t that high.

Looking at the jade slip, Qin Feng’s eyes couldn’t help but shine. Seeing Qin Feng, Zhao Hai smiled and said, “Brother Qin, do you want the technique?”

Qin Feng smiled faintly and said, “How could I not? Anyone would want it. However, not to mention the final bid, I can’t even afford the starting bid.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly. As he looked at Qin Feng, he raised his hand and shouted, “Five thousand jade essences!”

Zhao Hai raising his hand already startled Qin Feng. What was more surprising was that Zhao Hai added 2,000 jade essences to the starting bid. This terrified Qin Feng.

Ling Dong didn’t expect that as he finished introducing the technique, someone already bid five thousand jade essences. This wasn’t a low amount. Zhao Hai’s bid caused the entire hall to become silent. Everyone looked at Zhao Hai in surprise.

At this time, a raspy voice was heard, “Six thousand jade essences.”

Zhao Hai turned his head and looked at the pale young master accompanied by two bodyguards. The young master also noticed Zhao Hai’s gaze. He raised his eyebrows at Zhao Hai, appearing like he was provoking him.

Seeing this, Zhao Hai’s smile couldn’t help but widen. This person actually dared to compete with him in wealth. Interesting, Zhao Hai thought. Then he opened his mouth and said, “Ten thousand jade essences!”

Boom! Zhao Hai’s bid was like a bomb that was thrown into the auction hall. Nobody thought Zhao Hai to be so ruthless. He immediately upped the price to ten thousand jade essences. This one bid alone eliminated the majority of the auction’s attendees.

Hearing Zhao Hai’s bid, the pale young master’s expression changed. He looked straight into Zhao Hai’s eyes as he said, “Eleven thousand jade essences!”

Zhao Hai smiled and countered, “Thirteen thousand jade essences.” Hearing the competition between the two young masters, the entire hall was speechless. They couldn’t imagine themselves spending such a huge amount of money.

Hearing Zhao Hai’s bid of 13 thousand jade essences, the pale young master couldn’t help but show a strange smile, then he laughed and said, “Thirteen thousand jade essences? Did you take all of your worth for this bid? You’re a plant of the auction house right? Hahaha. I don’t want this jade slip anymore. I want to see where you can get 13 thousand jade essences.”

The pale young master thought that he had choked Zhao Hai’s finances. He laughed with glee thinking about checkmating an enemy. Everyone in the hall felt that what the pale young master said made sense, they looked at Zhao Hai with a bad expression.

Zhao Hai didn’t care about anyone’s reaction. He just smiled and kept silent. At this time, Ling Dong’s expression was of happiness. But when he heard the pale young master’s accusation, he couldn’t help but defend the auction house, “Young Master Xu, please watch your speech. Since the day we are established, we have always strived to gain our customers’ trust. I can guarantee that this gentleman and I don’t know each other at all. If you keep insulting our Windrange Auction’s reputation, I have to ask you to leave.”

The pale young master was clearly dreadful of Ling Dong, as soon as he heard this, he hurriedly said, “Shopkeeper Ling, my apologies, it was a slip of the tongue.”

Ling Dong nodded, then he waved his hand towards the maid. The maid immediately brought the tray with the jade slip to Zhao Hai and bowed, “Mister, here is your item.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he took the jade slip while placing a spatial bag onto the tray. Then he waved his hand towards the maid.

The maid was slightly stunned, but she also understood that Zhao Hai was paying. She immediately bowed to Zhao Hai and said, “Thank you, sir.” After saying that, she probed the bag with her spiritual force then immediately withdrew. She bowed towards Zhao Hai once more and said, “I have received sir’s payment.” After that, she turned to Ling Dong and bowed before leaving.

Seeing this situation, the entire hall was in an uproar. They understood what just happened. Instead of deducting from his deposit, Zhao Hai paid for the item outright. ŖàＮ𝙤𝐁ĚṨ

It must be known that to enter the hall and sit on the first row, one must hand over at least ten thousand jade essences per seat. This deposit would be returned later if it isn’t spent. Although Zhao Hai could use his deposit to pay for the 13 thousand jade essences, this money would be taken out later when he leaves the auction. That was to say that Zhao Hai didn’t have to pay for the jade slip. Zhao Hai’s payment was telling everyone that he still has 20 thousand jade essences left to spend in the auction.

Thirty three thousand jade essences! As soon as everyone understood this, they immediately knew that Zhao Hai at least has 33 thousand jade essences when he entered the auction house. What was this amount? Only a few people in the auction hall could get their hands on this amount.

Zhao Hai ignored everyone’s reaction as he took the jade slip and scanned it with his spiritual force. Then he handed the jade slip to Qin Feng and said, “Brother Qin, take this and make a copy. I have to bring the original to the Blood Knife Gang.”

Hearing this, Qin Feng immediately waved his hand and said, “Brother, this is too much, I don’t want it.”

Zhao Hai waved his hand and said, “Just make a copy. This jade slip will not shatter. You call me brother, why care about how much this jade slip costs? Go on, make a copy.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng’s lips moved without any sounds. Then his eyes flashed with determination as he laughed and said, “Fine, then I’ll be impolite.” After he said that, he took out a blank jade slip and copied the blade technique.

At this moment, the pale young master looked at Zhao Hai with a difficult expression. Just now he said that Zhao Hai used all of his net worth. But he didn’t expect Zhao Hai to pay immediately. This was a slap to his face. As Young Master Xu, he was a proud person. How could he stomach such an insult? His gaze turned cold.

Zhao Hai also felt the killing intent from the pale young master, but he didn’t mind it. He just smiled faintly as he looked at Ling Dong. At this time, Ling Dong was introducing another item. A maid brought over a box to the stage. Inside the box was a long blade three feet long and three inches wide. The blade itself was thin, and its entire body was purple.

As Ling Dong held the long blade, he said, “This is the Purple Blood Demon Knife. It is made by a Crafting Master from the Forbidden Path Sect. The blade is very sharp. Once it is taken out, blood will flow. The refiner sacrificed the blood of a hundred beasts while making this blade. Then he sacrificed living people to quench it. This is a murderous blade. The bidding starts at 5,000 jade essences. Each bid must be at least 500 jade essences!”

Seeing the Purple Blood Demon Blade, Leng Yue’s eyes couldn’t help but turn bright. He didn’t wait for other people to bid as he said, “Six thousand jade essences!” His voice was ordinary, albeit a bit ice-cold.

Zhao Hai has no interest in this blade, so he didn’t place a bid. On the other hand, the females from the Green Willow Sect wanted it. One of them shouted, “Seven thousand jade essences!”

Leng Yue looked at the female cultivator and then said, “Nine thousand jade essences!”

Hearing Leng Yue’s bid, the female cultivator from the Green Willow Sect’s expression changed. Although they sat in the first row, they didn’t come to the auction for this blade. What they wanted was a different thing. If the blade could be bought for 7,000 jade essences, then they would take it. Nine thousand jade essences was too much for them. Therefore, they didn’t place another bid.

As the pale young master looked at Leng Yue, the corners of his mouth lifted as he said, “Ten thousand jade essences.”

Leng Yue looked at Young Master Xu and said, “13 thousand jade essences!”

Hearing Leng Yue, Young Master Xu’s expression turned blue. But he kept silent in the end. It was clear that 13 thousand jade essences was his limit.

Seeing that Young Master Xu was silent, Ling Dong spoke, “Young Master Leng Yue has bid 13 thousand jade essences. Are there any more bids? This Purple Blood Demon Blade is a rare treasure among blades. It has the function of intimidating beasts and stunning people. If you activate it, your battle prowess would immediately increase. Nobody? Thirteen thousand jade essences, going once, going twice! Alright, sold! The Purple Blood Demon Blade now belongs to Young Master Leng Yue.’

After announcing the winner, Ling Dong waved his hand. Then the maid delivered the blade to Leng Yue. Leng Yue immediately grabbed the blade and placed the blade on his back on his spatial bag. Then he carried the Purple Blood Demon Blade in its place. However, he didn’t pay on the spot, clearly he can’t take out more than 13 thousand jade essences.

Once the blade was handed over to Leng Yue, the maid bowed and then left. Ling Dong moved on and waved his hand once more. This time, instead of a female maid, an old person walked over. The old person carried a tray. The tray had a transparent cover with a piece of stone under it. The stone was red and had nine small holes.

Seeing this stone, Zhao Hai’s eyes lit up. He could feel a special aura from the stone. It was the aura of life.
