chapters.title: Chapter 2259: Exotic Stone
chapters.body:
Chapter 2259: Exotic Stone

Right, it was the aura of life. A stone could also have a hint of life? Zhao Hai didn’t object to this thought. The characteristics of life in stones are different to ordinary lives. Stones might be dead to ordinary people, but to Zhao Hai who had a high level of spiritual force, things were different. He could communicate with all things, he knew that stones could also contain life.

The stone underneath the transparent container gives Zhao Hai a very strong aura of life. It made people feel that it was an animal, not a stone. Although it was not moving, Zhao Hai felt that it seemed to be accumulating strength. It was as if it was a tiger lying on the ground, ready to pounce on the enemy.

Besides Zhao Hai, nobody else knew what the stone was. They all looked at the stone with curiosity.

Zhao Hai believed that the others couldn’t feel that the stone had the aura of life. Although the aura of life contained inside the stone was intense, it was a different aura from most beasts. They might think that the stone was special, but they wouldn’t know that the stone contained life.

Sure enough, as Zhao Hai thought, Ling Dong gestured towards the stone and said, “This is the Ninehole Flying Stone. It’s a very peculiar stone. Don’t look at it lying dormant right now, it is because of the cover. If I open the cover, it will immediately fly away. The use of this stone is still unknown, it is a strange treasure that was released by the Forbidden path Sect. The stone has been refined, but it has no effect. It isn’t only hard, it also repels water and fire. If you win it, you need to restrain it immediately otherwise it will fly away. We still don’t know how to use this item, so you have to study it yourself. The starting price of the item is six thousand jade essence. Each bid must not be less than 500 jade essences.”

Upon hearing Ling Dong, everyone in the hall stared. A piece of stone whose use is unknown. Moreover, it might fly away. Who would want it? Therefore, after Ling Dong opened the bidding, nobody placed a bid.

Seeing the hall’s reaction, Ling Dong couldn’t help but smile bitterly. The stone wasn’t actually from the Forbidden Path Sect. He just said so to boost the saleability of the item. Actually, this stone was something that a rogue cultivator took out from Gale Canyon. The rogue cultivator was a Teleportation Stage expert. Ling Dong felt that the stone was valuable, so he had it sent to the Forbidden Path Sect However, the sect didn’t take the stone seriously. They tried refining it but found that it couldn’t be refined.

In the end, the stone was returned to Ling Dong. The auction house spent 6 thousand jade essences to buy the stone. Since Ling Dong was a businessman and hated taking a loss, he put the stone up for auction with the starting price being 6 thousand jade essences. At the very least, he wanted to recoup his capital. He didn’t want to have something in his hand that nobody wants.

Just as Ling Dong thought that the stone wouldn’t be sold, a bid came, “Seven thousand jade essences.”

Ling Dong’s heart shook. He turned his head and saw that it was Zhao Hai who shouted the bid. Zhao Hai didn’t care where the stone came from. It might not be useful to others, but it has some use for him. This was the first time he saw a stone like this, so he needs to have it.

Similarly, Ling Dong didn’t care for the reason Zhao Hai placed a bid. Seeing that he was about to get rid of the stone, he shouted, “This gentleman is asking for 7 thousand jade essences! Is there any other bid?”

“Eight thousand jade essences!” Another bid surprisingly came up. Ling Dong followed the voice and couldn’t help but stare. The one increasing the price was Young Master Wu.

Young Master Wu sat with a calm face, not even looking at Zhao Hai. When Zhao Hai turned his head and saw Young Master Wu’s appearance, he knew what he was thinking about. He wanted Zhao Hai to spend more money. Zhao Hai didn’t mind it as he smiled faintly and said, “Ten thousand jade essences.”

Whoosh! People in the hall were surprised. They didn’t expect a seemingly useless stone to fetch such a price. The way Zhao Hai looked in the eyes of those in the hall changed. They seem to be seeing a madman. In their eyes, Zhao Hai was a money crazed person. A standard lunatic.

At the same time, some people looked at Zhao Hai with greedy eyes. Zhao Hai revealed his cultivation level at the Soul Fusion Stage. That wasn’t to say that he was the weakest person in the auction hall, but such a person actually carried so much money! This was equal to a child carrying a gold brick while walking on the street. He was waiting for people to rob him! That was what some people were thinking.

Hearing Zhao Hai shout out his bid, Young Master Wu’s eyes couldn’t help but narrow. Then he said, “12 thousand jade essences!”

A louder clamor was heard in the hall. Nobody expected Young Master Wu to increase the bid to 12 thousand jade essences. This wasn’t what everyone was expecting. Why would such a stone fetch a high price?

But what people didn’t know was that the moment Young Master Wu shouted his bid, a tense expression flashed through his face. But he covered it up very well.

As he turned his head towards Young Master Wu, Zhao Hai said, “13 thousand jade essences.”

Young Master Wu turned to Zhao Hai, then a faint smile appeared on his face. Everyone immediately knew what he thought. Zhao Hai used 13 thousand jade essences to purchase the blade technique, offending Young Master Wu in the process. This time, he deliberately raised the price of the stone to make Zhao Hai spend more money.

Thinking of this, people in the auction hall couldn’t help but smile. Some of them laughed out loud, “Hahaha. These people are lunatics. It seems like money has turned them stupid. They can’t even see that someone was deliberately raising the price! The auction house loves these people!”

“Right, if there are more of these people, the auction house will certainly celebrate. Hahaha.”

Ling Dong didn’t care about these words. He looked at Zhao Hai with a calm expression. His intuition told him that Zhao Hai wasn’t simple. He continued to increase his bid, not to spite Young Master Wu, but because he really wants to obtain the stone. ꭆἈ𐌽∅𝖇Еʂ

However, Ling Dong didn’t dwell on this matter too much. He only followed up, “Mister bids 13 thousand jade essences. Any other bids? It must be known that although we still don’t know how to use the stone, there are other strange things in the world. Take Detachment Gold, for example, it was unknown in the past but now all sects go all out to grab it. Although we don’t know what this stone is, its ability to fly is real. Maybe it will be a treasure in the future. Any other bids?”

People continued to laugh, someone even answered Ling Dong, “Shopkeeper Ling, how could you compare this stone with Detachment Gold? Detachment Gold is a high grade material that can still be used to make low-grade artifacts. What can this stone do? Fly and hit people? Hahaha!” Everyone also burst into laughter. The smile on Young Master Wu became even wider. He looked at Zhao Hai with a proud expression.

Ling Dong already counted to three, but nobody continued to bid. Finally, the stone was taken to Zhao Hai. When the old attendant reached Zhao Hai, he said, “Mister, the container will be given to you. But once the container is removed, it will fly away. Only Teleportation Stage experts can catch it. Don’t open the container on your own.”

Zhao Hai received the container and thanked the old attendant. This time, he didn’t pay immediately. The old attendant nodded towards Zhao Hai and then left.

Seeing that Zhao Hai didn’t pay this time, the people in the hall laughed even more. In their opinion, Zhao Hai no longer has any money. Otherwise, he would pay for the stone outright. After all, if he paid immediately, he would be slapping Young Master Wu’s face again.

Unfortunately for these people, Zhao Hai was truly rich. He has too much money, in fact. However, Zhao Hai didn’t pay right now because slapping Young Master Wu would be too cheap. He knows that the blade technique wasn’t Young Master Wu’s real target. Young Master Wu was saving his energy for a more valuable item. Getting the item that Young Master Wu really wants was the real slap that Zhao Hai wanted to give. Any slap at this time was meaningless.

Zhao Hai stored the container in his own spatial ring. Then he turned his head back to Ling Dong. Once the stone was handed over, Ling Dong waved his hand. A maid brought another tray with an antler on top. The antler was gray all around. It seems to have been cut directly from the head of a deer.

Ling Dong waved his hand towards the tray and said, “This is the antler of a Spiritwind Deer. Everyone should be aware that Spiritwind Deers are beasts unique to the Gale Canyon. It is docile but very strong. They won’t take the initiative to attack, but if you want to catch them, you will have a very hard time. They would rather die than get caught. The antlers of the Spiritwind Deer are a rare elixir that can replenish qi and blood. It’s good for body cultivators.”

“Other parts of Spiritwind Deers don’t appear on auctions, since the sects will take them away immediately. Although the antlers aren’t as good as the other parts, it is still good at replenishment. You don’t even need to refine the antler into a pill. You can crush them into powder and take them immediately. The starting price for the Spiritwind Deer antlers is 5 thousand jade essences. The bids must not be less than 300 jade essences.”

The antlers were priced lower than the stone. It should have been placed before the stone, but Ling Dong knew that the stone had a chance to be sold. Six thousand jade essences might be high for some rogue cultivators, it wasn’t much to the richer ones. And some rogue cultivators liked to study strange things, thus the reason why Ling Dong took the stone out for auction.

Spiritwind Deer antlers are very attractive to rogue cultivators. If Ling Dong auctions the antlers first, the rich rogue cultivators will have no money to bid for the stone. Therefore, Ling Dong placed the stone first and followed up with the antlers.

There is also another reason, it is that auctions also need to provide commodities to be bought. Although the bids would still be high, more cultivators could bid on them. This way, the auction attendants wouldn’t feel like the auction was for major powers to bid for precious treasures. Then they might no longer attend in the future.

The Spiritwind Deer antlers were taken out for those who have a bit of wealth. Although the antlers could replenish qi and blood, there are plenty of other items that could do the same. Stronger groups could get their hands on such items on other channels. Therefore, the antlers aren’t very attractive to those sitting in the front rows. On the other hand, the antlers are very alluring to those sitting at the back. They aren’t like those who have powers to support them. They can get ordinary herbs and materials, but items that could replenish blood and qi were rare for them. And medicine that could replenish qi and blood was very important for rogue cultivators.

Replenishing qi and blood isn’t only for body cultivators. In fact, rogue cultivators need this medicine whether they are body cultivators or not. This was because it was very easy for rogue cultivators to be injured and bleed, causing a loss of qi and blood. For a cultivator, losing qi and blood was a very serious thing. Even if they could restore their qi, if they lost too much blood, their combat strength would be affected. At most, they can only exert 75 percent of their strength. They can only rely on slow recuperation to return to their peak strength or use medicine that could replenish qi and blood. This was where the antlers could be useful.

Sure enough, after Ling Dong opened the bidding, the first rows didn’t make a sound. Instead, those at the back began to increase the price. In the end, the antlers were sold for 7,100 jade essences.

Ling Dong continued to auction off items. Their final prices weren’t very high at around six or seven thousand jade essences. The atmosphere of the auction also became better. This was because more people have been bidding for the items.

What appeared mostly were low to medium-grade items. These were not attractive to Zhao Hai at all. Therefore, he didn’t make any bids. As for people sitting in the back rows, they were able to get their hands on a few things. But most of these fell into the hands of ordinary rogue cultivators.

The auction has been going on for seven hours. Commodities that were sold numbered around a hundred. Although it wasn’t proportional to the attendees, it was a rare auction that happens once a year. But Zhao Hai also saw that the people sitting in the front row weren’t here for these items. Their goal has yet to appear.

chapters.title: Chapter 2260: Bloodless Command
chapters.body:
Chapter 2260: Bloodless Command

Ling Dong also saw the state of the frontmost rows. He knew what they were here for. He also knew that it was time to bring the real treasures out. He announced, “Alright, the auction has been going on for some time. We’re at the final leg of the event. What will appear will be the last ten items in the auction. For the first of the ten items, The Nine Rings Silverwind Blade!”

An old attendant walked to Ling Dong’s side with a box. Inside the box was a blade without a scabbard. The blade was silvery white and it had large iron rings on its backside. Although it was a thick blade, it gave people a sense of lightness. At a glance, one could see that it was a good blade. It was even better than the blade that Leng Yue won earlier.

But obviously, this blade didn’t match Leng Yue’s temperament, so Leng Yue didn’t spare it a glance. He just sat in place with his eyes half-closed as if he was asleep.

As Zhao Hai looked at the blade, he turned his head towards the other rows. A few cultivators sitting in the second row were paying attention to the blade.

As Ling Dong took the Nine Rings Silverwind Blade out of the box, he said, “The Nine Ring Silverwind Blade is a product of our auction house. After getting a piece of silverwind iron, we specially invited a refining master from the Forbidden Path Sect to make a weapon. Silverwind iron is one of the lightest materials in the True Spirit Realm. But it is also one of the toughest materials. If it is used to create a weapon, the weapon will be very light but still hold up against other weapons. Most importantly, weapons made with silverwind iron carry a trace of wind power. If the nine rings aren’t present, the blade will be silent. If the rings were shaken by the wind, they would disrupt the enemy’s spirit. This can be regarded as a mental attack. Although the blade is large, it only weighs three jin(1.5 kg). It is the best blade for those who use rapid blade techniques. The starting price of the blade is 8,000 jade essences. Each bid couldn’t be less than 1,000 jade essences!”

This was quite an expensive item. However, nobody thought that the price was unfair. People immediately placed bids, with the exception of those in the front row. Finally, the blade was bought by a cultivator from the third row at the price of 18,000 jade essences.

The price wasn’t high, but one couldn’t say that it was low. The Nine Ring Silverwind Blade was worth its price. If there were more blade users present, the price might have increased even more.

After the Nine Ring Silverwind Blade was sold, Ling Dong waved his hand once more. Another old attendant came over carrying a tray with a jade bottle on top. The bottle was red. However, Zhao Hai discovered that the bottle wasn’t red, it was the pill inside. The medicine was too powerful that it stained its container red.

Ling Dong pointed at the jade bottle and said, “This is the Pure Yang Pill, a fire element pill. However, anyone with a spiritual root can take it. After taking it, there is a certain chance of breaking through a level of their realm. Naturally, the closer you reach the realm, the higher the chances of success. But please take note that this pill is only useful for experts below the Teleportation Stage. If a cultivator at the peak of the Earth Monarch Realm takes this pill, they are very likely to break through to the Teleportation Realm. His pill is very precious. The starting price of the pill is 10,000 jade essences. Each bid must not be less than 1,000 jade essences!”

Bang! The moment Ling Dong opened the bids, people immediately increased the price of the pill. The Pure Yang Pill was a very famous pill. Typically, it was only sold internally within sects. Rogue Cultivators almost never get their hands on it. The attendees didn’t expect the pill to be in the auction.

Zhao Hai heard Ling Dong’s introduction of the pill but only gave it a glance. He had no intention of bidding. He knew very well that his situation was different from others. His spiritual qi concentration was ten times that of an ordinary cultivator. Adding to his other techniques, he needed to accumulate even more spiritual qi to break through. Even if the Pure Yang Pill has a lot of energy and could help Zhao Hai break through a minor realm, the refinement of the pill wasn’t very good. There are too many toxins within, which wasn’t suited for Zhao Hai’s tastes.

Although Zhao Hai didn’t place the Pure Yang Pill in his eyes, this didn’t mean that the rogue cultivators shared the same thought. For rogue cultivators, the Pure Yang Pill was an extremely rare find. Among those present, there were Earth Monarchs who had been stuck at the peak for more than ten years. To them, pills that can help them break through were incomparably precious. Therefore, when they saw the pill, the eyes of these cultivators immediately turned red.

The result of the bidding actually surprised Zhao Hai. This was because the person who won the bid wasn’t from the first ten rows. Instead, it was won by a middle-aged Earth Monarch at the common seats. The Pure Yang Pill auctioned at the highest price yet, at 30 thousand jade essences.

Zhao Hai wasn’t too surprised about the final price of the item. Tens of thousands of jade essences was nothing to him.

After the Pure Yang Pill, several pills and artifacts followed. Moreover, the final prices that they fetched weren’t low. There were even rare fist and footwork books. They were all sold at a higher price than the Pure Yang Pill.

Before long, nine of the final ten items have been auctioned off. Only the last item remained. Ling Dong waved his hand as two old attendants walked over. In their hand was a tray. On the tray, cushioned by yellow silk, was a red token. When the token was revealed, Zhao Hai felt the entire auction hall freeze. At the same time, the people in the front row became agitated.

Zhao Hai also felt Qin Feng’s heartbeat speed up. He looked at Qin Feng and said, “Brother Qin, what’s wrong?”

Without turning his head to Zhao Hai, Qin Feng muttered, “It’s the Bloodless Command Token. How can a Bloodless Command Token appear here? Is the Forbidden Path Sect insane? How could they sell the Bloodless Command Token in an auction?”

Zhao Hai raised his eyebrow and asked, “Brother Qin, what is the Bloodless Command Token?”

Qin Feng turned to Zhao Hai and smiled bitterly, “The Bloodless Command Token is a token that the Forbidden Path Sect releases to sect elders. If a sect elder discovers a rogue cultivator with potential, they will give the rogue cultivator a Bloodless Command Token. This token will allow a rogue cultivator to enter the Forbidden Path Sect without any assessment. What’s most precious about the token isn’t just this. Those who hold the Bloodless Command Token will have the opportunity to enter a secret realm for a trial.”

Speaking of this, Qin Feng drank a glass of water before adding, “There are plenty of secret realms in the True Spirit Realm. Some realms are cultivation caves of powerful beings. Some secret realms even contain the remains of powerful cultivators. Some are naturally formed worlds. These realms would open once every tens or even hundreds of years. After opening, one could hold a special token to enter the realm. The Forbidden Path Sect accidentally discovered a secret realm that held the remains of an ancient great power. I don’t know how big the realm is, only those holding the token can enter. There are countless treasures inside. As long as you can come out safely, your strength would certainly increase. It is an important place of trial for the Forbidden Path Sect.”

At this time, Ling Dong also introduced the token, “I think everyone already knows what this is. Right, this is a Bloodless Command Token. Every ten years, the Forbidden Path Sect would release 100 Bloodless Command Tokens to disciples for them to take a trial on the Blood Demon Realm.” ṙ𝔞ℕＯＢÈŜ

“What everyone doesn’t know is that the Forbidden Path Sect also releases Bloodless Command Tokens outside. Most of the time, these tokens will be silently taken by various powers and small sects. Because of this, nobody knows that outsiders can also enter the Blood Demon Realm. At the same time, participants of the Blood Demon Realm trial can enter the Forbidden Path Sect.”

“What I must tell everyone is that everyone can enter the Blood Demon Realm, not just disciples of the Forbidden Path Sect. Every ten years, only a thousand people can enter the Blood Demon Realm. Two hundred of these slots belong to the Forbidden Path Sect. The other Great Sects also have their own quota. The rest will be released outside for smaller powers to get.”

“This time, our auction house was able to get its hands on one token. Anyone who can get their hand on this token can join the Forbidden Path Sect and then join the Blood Demon Realm trial a year later. This is also an opportunity that the Forbidden Path Sect gave to the rogue cultivators. The Bloodless Command Token will start at the price of 50 thousand jade essences. Each bid cannot be less than a thousand jade essences!”

The price caused Zhao Hai to stare. But the Bloodless Command Token has attracted Zhao Hai’s attention. At the same time, he noticed the people at the front row begin to focus. Various people around the auction hall also became quiet. All these people were spread out throughout the seats.

The entire auction hall became very silent. Everyone was staring at the Bloodless Command Token. If the two old attendants weren’t at the Teleportation Stage, those present would have taken the gamble and tried to rob them.

Seeing that everyone was focused on the token, Ling Dong said, “The bidding can begin.” After that, he no longer said anything. The Bloodless Command Token was famous within the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory. There simply was no need to sell it to the audience. He already said what he could say. Now, he was waiting for someone to bid. Ling Dong was sure that the Bloodless Command Token would fetch a very high price.

A short silence ensued as everyone was thinking about the appropriate price to bid. Seeing everyone contemplating, Zhao Hai smiled faintly as he raised his hand and said, “60 thousand jade essences!”

chapters.title: Chapter 2261: Obtaining The Bloodless Command Token
chapters.body:
Chapter 2261: Obtaining The Bloodless Command Token

As everyone was thinking about the appropriate price, Zhao Hai suddenly opened his mouth. This startled everyone. Then they remembered that this was an auction. No matter what price they thought was appropriate, it still depended on how much money other people had.

People discovered that they were too agitated by the token. Thinking of this, they couldn’t help but get embarrassed. But some also thought the other way. They thought that Zhao Hai couldn’t afford his bid. The reason he placed a bid was to increase the price. This thought was shared by Young Master Wu.

Hearing Zhao Hai’s bid, Young Master Wu coldly snorted, then he immediately raised his hand and bid, “70 thousand jade essences!” He added 10 thousand immediately. The people in the hall immediately responded. The prices of the items before this was simply chump change compared to the price that the Bloodless Command Token would get.

“Eighty thousand jade essences!” The Green Willow Sect disciples could no longer sit still. They also called out a bid.

“Eighty-two thousand jade essences!” Someone also placed their bid. This time, the bidder was someone from the back seats. They were wearing a long robe that covered their face. One couldn’t discern their identity from their face or body shape.

“Eighty-five thousand jade essences!” Young master Wu increased the price once more. But instead of 10 thousand, he only increased the price by three thousand. Moreover, his complexion was somewhat heavy. It was clear that the price had reached his bottom line.

“Ninety thousand jade essences!” The Green Willow Sect increased the price, this time bidding 5 thousand more.

“One hundred thousand jade essences!” A voice from the back sounded out this time. However, unlike before, it wasn’t the person who wore a long robe. This time, a person wearing purple warrior clothing placed the bid. He was sitting at the common seats, seemingly unnoticeable.

Seeing this person, Qin Feng couldn’t help but stare. Then his complexion changed, “It’s the Purple Jade Gang. I didn’t expect that they would also send someone.”

Upon hearing Qin Feng, Zhao Hai recognized the one who placed the bid. The Purple Jade Gang was one of the large gangs in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory. It was said that this gang was closely linked to the Forbidden Path Sect. Rumor said that a member of the gang who had joined the Forbidden Path Sect had become an influential elder of the Outer Sect. It was because of this that the Purple Jade Gang became a powerful force inside the sect’s territory.

“110 thousand jade essences!” The black robed cultivator increased the price once more.

“120 thousand jade essences!” The Green Willow Sect followed.

“150 thousand jade essences!” This time, Zhao Hai raised the price. Hearing this bid, people in the hall stared. A hundred and fifty thousand jade essences wasn’t a small number, even to powerful groups. Now, Zhao Hai bid this exact price, raising the price by a whole 30 thousand. Now, people were wondering who he was.

Qin Feng was also stunned by Zhao Hai’s bid. He discovered that there was a mystery to Zhao Hai. Qin Feng already thought that Zhao Hai was rich when he gave him 500 jade essences. Qin Feng just didn’t expect that Zhao Hai was this rich.

“155 thousand jade essences!” Young Master Wu increased the price. At the same time, he glared at Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai didn’t even spare Young Master Wu a glance. He only smiled at Ling Dong. Although he didn’t say anything, Ling Dong was also stunned. He didn’t expect the Bloodless Command Token to reach this price.

But soon, Ling Dong changed his mind. The Bloodless Command Token allows anyone to enter the Blood Demon Realm. Clans like Young Master Wu simply cannot get their hands on it. Although the Purple Jade Gang and the Green Willow Sect can get their hands on these tokens, it wasn’t enough for their appetite. At most, they could get one or two tokens.

It must be known that the Blood Demon Realm was a very dangerous place. Although it was designated as a trial ground, there are countless beasts and natural dangers inside. Most importantly, people from other sects wouldn’t be polite to other participants. Every time the Blood Demon Realm was opened, a thousand would enter but only a fraction would return. There was one time where there were less than 200 survivors by the end of the trial. Such a mortality rate was truly shocking.

Because of the danger, various forces would do their best to acquire more Bloodless Command Tokens. They wanted to send more people from their own side in order for them to help each other. The bigger their group, the more chances they have of survival. Therefore, powers like the Green Willow Sect were desperate to get more tokens. Ꞧ₳Ν𝔬₿Ę𝙨

“160 thousand jade essences!” The black robed cultivator placed his bid.

“170 thousand jade essences!” The Green Willow Sect increased the price. Hearing this price, Young Master Wu’s expression turned gloomy. He doesn’t have enough jade essences in hand. It can be said that he had lost the chance to obtain the token.

“180 thousand jade essences!” The Purple Jade Gang put their bid.

“200 thousand jade essences!” Zhao Hai didn’t hesitate and directly increased the price to 200 thousand. To Zhao Hai, jade essences was merely a number. He didn’t care how expensive it was, he wanted to obtain the Bloodless Command Token. It can be said that joining the Forbidden Path Sect was no longer an issue for him. What he wanted now was to see the Blood Demon Realm.

Zhao Hai’s bid surprised the hall once more. Everyone looked at Zhao Hai in confusion. They didn’t know who Zhao Hai was and which power he belonged to. More importantly, why he has so many jade essences.

Zhao Hai didn’t care what others thought. He only looked at Ling Dong with a smile on his face. This time, people saw Zhao Hai’s smile as a signal with deeper meaning.

“210 thousand jade essences!” The black robed man didn’t give up.

Everyone turned their heads to Zhao Hai, wanting to see if he would increase his bid. Zhao Hai didn’t say anything this time. He just smiled. Nobody knew what he was thinking.

“230 thousand jade essences!” The Green Willow Sect placed their bid. Their voice was calm, as if there was no emotion behind their eyes.

“250 thousand jade essences! Friends, please give our Purple Jade Gang some face. We will certainly return the favor.” The representative from the Purple Jade Gang spoke.

“260 thousand jade essences! This is an auction. We pay with money, not with favors.” The black-robed cultivator spoke.

The Purple Jade Gang member coldly snorted and no longer placed a bid. He looked at the black-robed cultivator with clear killing intent.

“Does anyone else want to increase the price? 260 thousand jade essences going once! Everyone, this Bloodless Command Token is the only one being sold outside. The other tokens already have their owners. If you miss this opportunity, there will be no second chance!”

“300 thousand jade essences!” Zhao Hai calmly opened his mouth. After he placed his bid, the entire hall was stunned. They couldn’t understand where Zhao Hai got his bravery and more importantly, money.

The black-robed man looked at Zhao Hai and said, “350 thousand jade essences! Friend, it’s over. You must know that there are things you cannot have. Even if you get them, you won’t be able to keep them.”

Hearing this, Zhao Hai just laughed and said, “Once I obtain this, I’ll be a disciple of the Forbidden Path Sect. Who will dare touch me? You want to deal with me? If I don’t leave the town, how can you take action? You want to threaten me with my family? Fine, go and kill them. But once I join the Forbidden Path Sect, be ready for my revenge. Hahaha. You can get it if you can outbid me. 400 thousand jade essences!”

As soon as they heard Zhao Hai, everyone couldn’t help but be stunned. They also understood Zhao Hai’s plan. Just like Zhao Hai said, as long as he didn’t leave the town, nobody can take the token away from him. It must be known that the Forbidden path Sect has explicitly forbidden everyone from attacking inside the town. Moreover, Zhao Hai can take a teleportation formation from Windchase Town back to Demonheart City.

If they really threaten Zhao Hai with his family, then they must think about what would happen once he joins the Forbidden Path Sect. Don’t forget, a year after joining the sect, Zhao Hai could enter the Blood Demon Realm. If he comes back safely, his strength will undergo a huge boost. Moreover, he would become a target for the sect’s training. Then when he gains influence, he will certainly take revenge against those who made a move on his family.

Hearing Zhao Hai, the black-robed cultivator coldly snorted, but he no longer placed a bid. Ling Dong glanced at Zhao Hai before saying, “Anyone else wants to bid? 400 thousand jade essences, going once! Going twice! Sold! Mister, congratulations. This Bloodless Command Token will be yours. Three months later, once the sect opens its gates, you can take this token to the sect. You no longer need to undergo an assessment to join. Congratulations!”

Zhao Hai stood up as he cupped his fist and said, “Thank you Shopkeeper Ling.” At this time, the two Teleportation Stage experts handed the tray to Zhao Hai while also looking at him with glowing eyes.

Zhao Hai saw the two experts and knew what they wanted. He smiled and then placed a spatial bag on the tray.

One of the experts scanned the spatial bag with their spiritual force. Once he looked inside, the expert’s expression couldn’t help but change. Then he immediately stashed the spatial bag as he gave Zhao Hai a deep look. Shortly after, he turned his head towards Ling Dong and nodded.

Ling Dong also gave a nod. Then he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Mister, please take the token. From now on, it will be yours.”

Zhao Hai bowed and said, “Thank you, shopkeeper Ling.” Then he took the Bloodless Command Token, gave it a brief look and then threw it to the Space. Then he sat down.

Ling Dong scanned the crowd and said, “Everyone, today’s auction has ended. Thank you for all of your support. We have prepared a small gift for you, please take one before you leave.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2262: Plans Remain Unchanged
chapters.body:
Chapter 2262: Plans Remain Unchanged

Ling Dong walked into a room behind the auction house which was his office. Already inside the room were two people. These two were the Teleportation Stage Experts that presented the Bloodless Command Token.

When Ling Dong entered the room, he immediately bowed to the two and said, “Elder Ran, Elder Wu, did that kid really pay 400 thousand jade essences?”

One of the two smiled as he shook his head and said, “He didn’t pay with jade essences. He exchanged it for something else.” Then he handed Zhao Hai’s spatial bag to Ling Dong.

Hearing this, Ling Dong couldn’t help but stare. Then he smiled faintly and said, “I trust Elder’s eyes. I just want to see what it is.” After saying that, he received the spatial bag from the old man and then scanned it with his spiritual force.

As soon as he scanned what’s inside the bag, Ling Dong couldn’t help but stare. Then a happy expression flashed through his face. He looked at the two experts and said, “It’s Resurrection Grass. And it’s one thousand years old. It’s worth 400- no, at least it’s worth 500 thousand jade essences! We profited greatly this time.”

Elder Ran looked at Ling Dong’s expression and smiled, “When that kid bought his first two items, I thought it was strange. I immediately had someone look into his identity. He’s a member of the Blood Knife Gang. A gang that has just moved to Demonheart City. The leader of this gang disappeared not too long ago. The kid’s name is Zhao Ling. He joined the Blood Knife Gang just recently. He didn’t want to join the gang in the first place. He’s from a declining clan. Rumors say that his clan was once powerful but declined through generations. In this generation, the clan managed to nurture three talents, and Zhao Ling was one of them.”

“The three went out of the clan in hopes of restoring their clan’s glory. With a clan like this, I don’t find it strange that they can take out things like the Resurrection Grass. This Zhao Ling is indeed formidable. He didn’t tell anyone that he has Resurrection Grass. It’s clear that if their clan wants to revive itself, jade essences wouldn’t be enough. They need power. This Zhao Ling would rather use the Resurrection Grass to get the Bloodless Command Token. Then he could get the chance to be stronger once he joins the Forbidden Path Sect. For me, this is his most correct decision.”

Ling Dong nodded, then he sighed and said, “I truly underestimated today’s heroes. I didn’t expect this ordinary looking Zhao Ling to have deep plans. It’s a pity that this guy didn’t go into business. If he did, he would get rich very easily.”

Elder Wu smiled faintly and said, “This kid will bring trouble to the Blood Knife Gang. Since that black-robed man threatened him, he would certainly check his identity. Zhao Ling knew that people would go after his connections. Even if the Blood Knife Gang suffers, he won’t give up. He would rather bide his time and retaliate when possible. Such people are terrifying. They will give up a lot of things in order to attain their goal. Even if you kill their family in front of them, they wouldn’t flinch. But once they get the ability to take action, they will return the favor tenfold, or even a hundredfold.”

Ling Dong nodded, then he sighed and said, “Elder Wu, do you think we should get in touch with Zhao Ling? When necessary, we can offer some help. With his ability, if he survives the Blood Demon Trial, his gang and his clan will have limitless futures. If we get into his good graces now, then we will benefit later on.”

The reason Ling Dong said this was because they were actually people of the Forbidden Path Sect. But because their potential was limited, they were sent out by the sect to collect wealth. Although they made great contributions to the sect, the sect really values those who are talented and can go further on the road of cultivation. Any disciple with good talent was a superior person in the sect. If anyone affiliated with the Forbidden Path Sect doesn’t want to get bullied, they would need to invest in promising disciples. Then once this disciple becomes a powerful expert, they would have a back inside the sect.

When Elder Wu and Elder Ran heard Ling Dong’s proposal, they couldn’t help but think about it. After a while, Elder Wu nodded and said, “We can do that. Try getting in touch with Zhao Ling first. Then we can make a decision.”

Elder Ran also agreed as he said, “Now Zhao Ling should be concerned about two things, the Blood Knife Gang and his clan. His clan is too far away, so there’s nothing to worry about them. Nobody would go such a long distance to hold his clan hostage. What he should be most worried about should be the Blood Knife Gang. If we want to back him, we might as well help the Blood Knife Gang. This way, Zhao Ling will remember this favor.”

Ling Dong nodded, “No matter what, we should get in touch with Zhao Ling first. Right, increase the security of Windchase Town. Make sure that nobody causes any trouble. If somebody dares to make any noise, execute them.”

Although Ling Dong already left Demonheart City and the headquarters of the Forbidden Path Sect, he still has a lot of influence in the sect due to his talent in making money. He was even assigned to be in charge of the sect’s branch hall in Windchase Town. With his status, it wasn’t strange for him to issue this command.

Elder Ran and Elder Wu nodded. Then Elder Ran said, “We still don’t know about that black-robed man’s status. If anyone causes any trouble, it’s most probably him. The others won’t dare offend the Forbidden Path Sect. If they still want to exist within the sect’s territory, they will need to reign in their greed. But for that black-robed man, we still don’t know who he is, which is strange.”

Ling Dong knit his brows and said, “That black-robed man is quite strange. It’s impossible for him to be an unknown individual if he could take out so many jade essences. We need to pay attention to him.”

Elder Ran nodded, “I’ll take care of it.” Then he turned around and left. Elder Wu also stood up and left. As he looked at the two elders, Ling Dong recalled Zhao Hai and muttered, “That kid is interesting.”

At this time, Zhao Hai already followed Qin Feng back to the inn. Qin Feng didn’t say anything along the way. When they reached the inn, Qin Feng was still silent. Shopkeeper Wang saw Qin Feng’s appearance and couldn’t help but stare. He didn’t know what happened to Qin Feng to become like this. Only after he called a few times did Qin Feng respond, but he was still in a daze.

Shopkeeper Wang was worried for Qin Feng, so he turned to Zhao Hai and said, “Little Ling, what happened to him?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “He’s fine. Uncle Wang, please prepare some dishes and wine for us. I’ll join him for a couple of cups of wine.” Although Shopkeeper Wang didn’t understand Zhao Hai, he nodded and went to prepare the dishes and wine. Before long, the food and wine were served.

Zhao Hai raised his glass and then looked at Qin Feng, “Brother Qin, do you have something to say?”

Qin Feng just stared at Zhao Hai for some time. He held his wine glass and then downed the entire thing in one go. Then he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Did you lie to me? Are you really from the Blood Knife Gang? Why do you have so much money?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I didn’t lie to you. I am from the Blood Knife Gang. The reason why I can take so much money during the auction was because I didn’t pay with jade essence.”

Qin Feng stared, then he said, “Not jade essence? Impossible. If it’s not jade essence, how could the auction house give you the Bloodless Command Token?” ř𝐚NՕᛒĚŝ

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “What I gave them wasn’t jade essence, but something more valuable than 400 thousand jade essences. Because of this, the auction house accepted my payment. As for the money I spent before that, hehe, that was money the gang gave me. There’s also the money the clan gave me and also my own savings.”

Qin Feng stared, “What thing would be worth so much money? Are you lying?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly, “I’m not lying. That thing is a treasure handed down in my clan. I was prepared to exchange it for jade essences to support the clan’s development. But I thought that jade essence alone cannot lift my clan from its current state. Therefore, I traded the Bloodless Command Token for it. With the token, I can join the Forbidden Path Sect. Once I’m inside the sect, I can work hard to reach a higher position and then I can help the clan. When the time comes, the clan will restore its past glory. I’m thinking about the long term.”

Qin Feng stared, he couldn’t help but frown, “What if you failed? What if you die a year later inside the Blood Demon Realm? Why would your clan do then?”

Zhao Hai turned gloomy, then he said, “Now is not the time to think about such things. If I just sold that thing for jade essence, it won’t help the clan much. Moreover, the clan is weak right now. Having too much money will be a disaster for the clan.”

Hearing this, Qin Feng couldn’t help but become gloomy. He knew very well that Zhao Hai was right. A person with no strength cannot hold a large amount of money. This was because wealth could kill people. Those who had no strength, wealth was simply a certificate of death.

Qin Feng drank more wine before he looked at Zhao Hai, “Brother, I misunderstood you. What are you planning to do now?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “What else can I do? I need to prepare for the trial. I need to go to Gale Canyon.”

Upon hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng couldn’t help but stare, then his complexion changed as he said, “That’s not a good idea. Brother, there are many eyes on you right now. If you go out now, you will be in danger. Brother, trust me on this, you cannot go out. In any case, you can now join the Forbidden Path Sect. There’s no need to put yourself in danger.”

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly as he shook his head and said, “Not going right now is the wrong choice. Don’t forget, even if I don’t need to participate in the sect’s assessment, I still need to undergo a trial a year later. I have to enter the Blood Demon Realm. With my current ability, I will just die in that realm.”

Qin Feng was stunned, then his complexion changed. He forgot about the Blood Demon Realm. Now that Zhao Hai has obtained the Bloodless Command Token, it’s impossible for him to skip the Blood Demon Realm. No cultivator could resist this temptation. But with Zhao Hai’s current strength, going to the Blood Demon Realm was a death wish. What Zhao Hai needs right now is to increase his strength. Only in this way can he have more chances of surviving inside the Blood Demon Realm.

Qin Feng drank another cup. Then he placed his cup down, his breath already smelling of liquor as he said, “Alright, I’ll accompany you wherever you go. I’ll take care of your security.”

Zhao Hai waved his hand and said, “There’s no need to join me. You will only attract unwanted attention. But before I join the Forbidden Path Sect, you better not leave Windchase Town. The people who have their eyes on me also have their eyes on you. If you leave the town, they will certainly make a move on you. Stay in the town for at least three months. Wait until I join the Forbidden Path Sect. Brother Qin, I’m afraid I’ve brought you trouble this time.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, Qin Feng stared. Then he frowned and said, “I’m fine with staying in town for three months. At worst I can stay in the inn and help Uncle Wang. What I’m worried about is you. You will be in danger once you go out.”

Zhao Hai waved his hand, then he looked around and discovered that there was nobody inside the shop. This was also the reason why he dared to tell his plan. But this time, he used voice transmission to tell Qin Feng, “Brother Qin, don’t worry. I have a powerful disguise technique. As long as I change my appearance, nobody will be able to recognize me. You don’t need to worry about me.”

Now, Qin Feng understood why Zhao Hai wouldn’t want him to accompany him. He nodded and replied with voice transmission, “Alright, then this matter is decided. However, I still think that I need to cover for you here. Let’s pretend that you went into seclusion here so that nobody will find out where you are.”

chapters.title: Chapter 2263: Entering The Canyon
chapters.body:
Chapter 2263: Entering The Canyon

Zhao Hai walked along the road to Gale Canyon. His appearance has changed a lot, becoming a cultivator nearly two meters tall. He also became muscled, and he now has a big blade on his bag. Along with his rugged face, he was far from his original appearance.

Zhao Hai didn’t pay much attention to his current appearance. He just has too divergent abilities. Changing his appearance was among the most ordinary ones. Although Zhao Hai’s body and appearance had changed, it still felt like his own body, so he didn’t feel any discomfort.

Zhao Hai was already thinking about his interaction with Ling Dong. Zhao Hai and Qin Feng already made an agreement. Qin Feng would hide the truth and pretend that he was in seclusion so that other people wouldn’t suspect that he had left for Gale Canyon.

Although Zhao Hai wasn’t afraid of attracting trouble, he still didn’t want to go to the canyon as Zhao Ling. His identity would attract too many people, despite not feeling any threat from Gale Canyon, Zhao Hai still felt that it would be too annoying if too many people chased him.

What Zhao Hai didn’t expect was Ling Dong coming to find him. Ling Dong wanted to make friends with him, he even offered to solve his current problem.

Zhao Hai already went through many worlds. As soon as he heard Ling Dong, he immediately understood his purpose. He knew that Ling Dong wanted to win him over. Ling Dong knew that Zhao Ling was already a disciple of the Forbidden Path Sect, so he wanted to win him over. Even if Ling Dong failed to win Zhao Ling over, he only needs to leave a good impression and have a good relationship with him.

Zhao Hai naturally wouldn’t reject his good intentions. He had Qin Feng cover for him, which put him in danger. Ling Dong could protect Qin Feng in turn. Ling Dong was already a member of the Forbidden Path Sect, so nobody would dare take action against him.

In the end, Zhao Hai went to the auction house the same day. Then he entered the backyard under everyone’s watch and didn’t come out.

Later on, word spread throughout Windrange Town that Zhao Hai went into seclusion. It was at that time that Zhao Hai changed his identity and left for Gale Canyon.

At this point, Zhao Hai didn’t need to worry about the Blood Knife Gang. To be honest, before this, he was worried for the gang. The gang’s situation wasn’t very good. Moreover, Zhao Hai knows that people would check his identity. Although his threat was useful, forces like the Purple Jade Gang and the Green Willow Sect had more means in their hands. Such people wouldn’t take Zhao Hai’s threat seriously.

If these people really want the Bloodless Command Token, they will certainly start with the Blood Knife Gang. Although it was impossible for Zhao Hai to hand the token over, he also didn’t hope for the Blood Knife Gang to suffer.

But now, Ling Dong and his people have intervened. This saved Zhao Hai a lot of trouble. With Ling Dong’s side as well as the help from the Long Clan, it wouldn’t be so easy to take action against the Blood Knife Gang.

However, this assistance wasn’t Zhao Hai’s biggest harvest. It isn’t even the Bloodless Command Token. Zhao Hai’s biggest win was the Ninehole Flying Stone.

In the auction, Zhao Hai felt that the stone had an aura of life, and he wasn’t wrong. The stone did have life. This was the first time Zhao Hai encountered such a thing.

Zhao Hai named the stone the Beast Soul Stone. The reason he gave it such a name was because the stone was alive. It also gave people the feeling of facing a fierce beast.

A Beast Soul Stone mine automatically appeared in the Space. The original Beast Soul Stone was also absorbed by Liquid Silver. After absorbing the stone, Zhao Hai’s staff changed immediately. The staff transformed into a metallic tiger. In fact, it can turn into any kind of metallic beast. A metallic tiger head also appeared floating next to the cube.

Zhao Hai also discovered that Liquid Silver has developed its own wisdom. However, it wasn’t very smart, probably only at the same level as a clever beast.

Zhao Hai always wished to make Liquid Silver more useful. This was because Liquid Silver was connected to his own soul. The Beast Soul Stone was different from a real living being, it was in between the living and non-living state. Although it has an aura of life, it had no fluctuations of life.

Despite this, Zhao Hai wasn’t disappointed. After the Beast Soul Stone was absorbed, Liquid Silver became more powerful. But with his present identity, he cannot use Liquid Silver. What Zhao Hai had on his back right now was an ordinary blade artifact.

At this moment, Zhao Hai seemed like an ordinary Soul Fusion cultivator. If one only looks at his figure, they will think that he was a body cultivator.

This was also the effect that Zhao Hai wanted. He came to Gale Canyon for a trial. It has been some time since he fought someone. With Gale Canyon being chaotic, every cultivator one came across had a high chance to be an attacker, which was what Zhao Hai wanted.

Windrange Town wasn’t far from Gale Canyon. Although Zhao Hai didn’t travel at full speed, he still managed to arrive at the periphery of the canyon in two hours.

The terrain of Gale Canyon was quite peculiar. It wasn’t a mountain, but it was underground. Originally, the canyon was a plain, but a huge canyon suddenly appeared in the middle of the huge plain. Nobody knew the length of the canyon. Rumors say that nobody has reached the end of the canyon until now.

Zhao Hai stood on top of the canyon and looked down. The canyon was very deep. Looking from above, it was pitch black. From time to time, one could hear whistling sounds from the crack.

Zhao Hai took a deep breath as he looked around. There were cultivators like him who stood up above the canyon. Most of these cultivators were Earth Monarchs, and some of them were already looking at Zhao Hai with evil intentions. 𝔯ΆNÖ𐌱ËS̩

However, nobody took action. Zhao Hai knew that this wasn’t because they couldn’t, it was because they didn’t want to attack. There was an unwritten rule in Gale Canyon, as long as one didn’t enter the canyon, they wouldn’t be robbed. As long as someone entered the canyon, they were free to be hunted. It was as if there were two different worlds, one inside the canyon and one outside. One world was order and the other was chaos.

Zhao Hai didn’t pay attention to these people, he didn’t even take their strength seriously. He looked at the surroundings. It wasn’t easy heading down the canyon. The canyon was surrounded by cliffs, but there were protruding platforms along the cliff as well as trees that could be used as footholds. Obviously, one still needs skills if they want to enter the canyon.

Zhao Hai looked at the footholds on the cliff. There were quite a lot of footholds, and they were quite smooth, clearly showing that they were being used regularly. No matter where he looked, there were footholds everywhere. As soon as Zhao Hai saw this, he felt relieved. He doesn’t have to worry about exposing his ability to fly.

As he thought of this, Zhao Hai immediately moved. He jumped straight down the cliff, targeting a landing point 100 meters below. Although he looked bulky, he managed to slow his descent by opening his arms. When he reached the first foothold, he tapped it gently and proceeded to fall. The people above the canyon couldn’t help but look at Zhao Hai with surprise. From their perspective, Zhao Hai looked like a bird levitating down the cliff.

Some of the cultivators saw Zhao Hai’s movement technique and became serious. They regarded Zhao Hai as an ordinary rogue cultivator before, but now they don’t think so. Most rogue cultivators wouldn’t have such strong movement techniques. It must be known that movement techniques were one of the most difficult techniques to get. If there were two people with the same strength, but one of them had a movement technique, the one with the movement technique would be a stage stronger than the other. Having a movement technique means that you can hit your enemy and escape without them being able to do anything. Their enemies don’t even have a chance to escape.

However, most movement techniques are in the hands of sects and large families. Rogue cultivators have little to no opportunities to get their hands on a movement technique. Whether they be sect disciples or descendants from large families, both could fight beyond their cultivation level. It was because of this that the cultivators atop the cliff had solemn expressions. It was clear that Zhao Hai came out of a sect or a large clan. Although Zhao Hai was only at the Soul Fusion Stage, his true combat strength might not be worse compared to Earth Monarchs.

Although some were lamenting Zhao Hai’s background, there were also some who were overjoyed by what they saw. This didn’t mean that they no longer had any plans on robbing Zhao Hai, they were glad that they discovered Zhao Hai’s movement technique ahead of time. This would make it easier for them to deal with him in the future.

Jumping a depth of 1 kilometer was nothing to a cultivator. With his movement technique, Zhao Hai managed to reach this depth in just a few minutes.

chapters.title: Chapter 2264: Fighting One After Another
chapters.body:
Chapter 2264: Fighting One After Another

Seeing the bottom of Gale Canyon, Zhao Hai stared. This was because there were no plants at the bottom. It was all stones and sand. What made Zhao Hai feel strange was that the stone and sands were emitting a faint white light, which also illuminated the valley.

Zhao Hai looked around him and saw a few small trees, seemingly both alive and dead. Zhao Hai also received some soil and stones to be analyzed in the Space. There was nothing special to them, just a few special substances that made them glow.

After receiving the stone and sands, Zhao Hai inspected the surroundings. He could feel that there were plants here before. However, due to constant fighting, the ground leveled out.

Zhao Hai smiled bitterly. No wonder people compared humans to viruses. This destruction was truly no worse than a virus.

Seeing that there was nobody around him, Zhao Hai stepped forward. The more he moved forward, the brighter it became. Because of how big the canyon was, it was impossible for the cliff to block sunlight. Gradually, the plants around Zhao Hai increased.

But at the same time, Zhao Hai also discovered white bones on the road. Some bones were from beasts, but some were clearly from humans. Seeing these bones, Zhao Hai’s complexion couldn’t help but change. Judging by how many bones there were, one could see that the canyon was just a huge tomb that buried an uncountable number of cultivators.

At this time, there was the sound of wind. Zhao Hai stopped and saw a person in front of him. It was an Earth Monarch that looked to be in his forties. He had black hair and wore a black robe. He also carried a long black sword. This person was black from head to toe.

The Earth Monarch sized Zhao Hai up. Then he suddenly smiled and said, “I didn’t expect a Soul Fusion Cultivator to come to Gale Canyon. You’re quite brave. But this is a benefit for me. I didn’t expect to be so lucky. Kid, leave your storage equipment and I will spare you.”

Zhao Hai looked at the man and said, “If I kill you, I also will get your items.”

The black robed man couldn’t help but laugh, “Good, good. This is the first time a Soul Fusion brat talked to me like this. Kid, I’ll cut off all your limbs and throw you into an ant’s nest.” After he said that, he pulled out his black sword. Before long, a sword shadow came flying towards Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai reached towards the blade on his back. His eyes looked at the black robed man with vigilance. When the black-robed man saw this, he couldn’t help but sneer inside. His sword accelerated as more and more sword shadows appeared. The sword was black with no reflection at all. Now that he made a move, the air was filled with sword shadows, making it impossible to find out which shadow was real and which one was fake.

Zhao Hai looked coldly as the black robed man was getting closer and closer to him. He already knew that the black robed man wanted to confuse him, thus releasing multitudes of sword shadows.

However, the enemy obviously wasn’t aware of Zhao Hai’s strength. The black robed man eagerly approached Zhao Hai with his sword, seeming already seeing the blade go through Zhao Hai’s throat.

A cold light flashed, but the proud expression on the black robed man’s face froze. Then a shocked expression appeared on his face. He wanted to look down and see why his own throat hurt, but his eyes began to roll before he completely lost consciousness.

At this moment, there was only a corpse left in front of Zhao Hai. Almost immediately, Zhao Hai waved his hand, sending the black robed cultivator to the Space to be turned into undead.

Zhao Hai proceeded forward. He discovered the area in front of him becoming more and more open. There were also more plants and trees, but all of them were ordinary, not worth paying attention to.

As he walked forward, Zhao Hai heard sounds of fighting. He couldn’t help but stare, but he didn’t mind it. He continued walking and in less than a hundred meters, a pitiful yell was heard. Zhao Hai raised his brows and went over to look.

After walking another 200 meters, Zhao Hai heard a speech in front of him. One of the people in front laughed and said, “Hahaha. Good, good. This is the fifth one today. We’re going to be rich!”

“Big Brother, we should have come to Gale Canyon much earlier. In this place, a year of income is equivalent to three years elsewhere. After a few hunts, we will be able to head out and buy good pills.”

“Wait, someone is here. It’s a Soul Fusion brat. Hahaha. Another fat sheep! Today’s a good day!” Along with this sound, Zhao Hai felt qi fluctuation around him. Then five people surrounded him.

Zhao Hai looked at these people and couldn’t help but stare. All five were body cultivators with heights around 2 meters. All of them were Earth Monarchs. The weapons in their hands were special. All in all, they were wielding ten hammers.

Zhao Hai looked at these people as he drew his blade and then said, “Why are you blocking my way?”

“Hahaha. Kid, you actually dared to run here with your Soul Fusion Stage strength. You’re too stupid. But you made this grandpa happy. Leave behind your storage equipment and I might spare your life. Otherwise, you can’t blame me for being impolite.” ȒâƝỗ𝔟ĚŞ

Zhao Hai scanned the five people around him and then shouted, “Kill!” Then with the blade in his hand, he charged towards one person. The five didn’t expect Zhao Hai to attack first. As the person facing Zhao Hai saw the blade cutting towards him, he couldn’t help but stare for a moment before promptly retreating. Then he lifted his hammer and clashed with Zhao Hai.

Despite being stunned, the other four immediately recovered and proceeded to attack Zhao Hai with their own hammers.

However, they soon found out that it was impossible to besiege Zhao Hai. With his movement technique, Zhao Hai was very hard to catch. No matter how they attacked him, Zhao Hai would evade. They even almost hit the person being pursued by Zhao Hai.

Although the five were mad at being unable to deal with Zhao Hai, they suddenly discovered that they were being cornered by Zhao Hai’s blade. They haven’t surrounded Zhao Hai, it was Zhao Hai surrounding them.

Seeing this, the five were immediately enraged, one of them shouted, “If we don’t act seriously, we’ll embarrass ourselves. Big Brother, let’s move!”

“Alright. Five Thunder Formation!” As this person shouted, the five immediately changed their moves. They used odd footwork as their hammers moved in circles. Surprisingly, their actions produced sounds of wind and thunder. Zhao Hai saw this and was surprised. Then he immediately understood that they were using a combat formation. Zhao Hai didn’t dare to underestimate them as he sped up and pushed with his attack.

At this moment, the person in the middle of the five suddenly lit up with purple light. Then a purple lightning shot straight towards Zhao Hai.

Seeing this purple lightning, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare. He discovered that the force behind this lightning was enormous. At this time, the ‘Big Brother’ of the five laughed and said, “Kid, our Five Thunder Formation can create tribulation lightning. See if you can dodge this.”

Zhao Hai moved, but he didn’t retreat. Instead, he went forward to meet the lightning. As the lightning reached Zhao Hai’s body, a smile appeared on the five attackers. They were prepared to see Zhao Hai vanish into a pile of ash. But instead of turning Zhao Hai into smoke, the lighting just entered Zhao Hai’s body.

This caused the five to be stunned. Then Zhao Hai rushed towards them and began chopping. Once one person fell down, the Five Thunder Formation was broken. Only when the lightning vanished did the four recover.

They immediately looked at their brother and yelled, “Fourth Brother!” Then they turned to Zhao Hai and attacked.

Zhao Ha moved and dodged the incoming attacks. Then he silently muttered, ‘Heavenly Demon Seven Killing Blades, Behead!” Along with Zhao Hai’s words, the blade in his hand shone with blinding white light. Before the four could respond, Zhao Hai appeared in the middle of the group.

The moment he appeared in the middle of the group, Zhao Hai sheathed his blade. Before the four could process what happened, they were already dead.

The Heavenly Demon Seven Killing Blades was a technique that Zhao Hai comprehended from the Heavenly Demon Race. Its offensive strength was very powerful. However, this technique was more suitable for use in mid-air. But since he couldn’t fly in the True Spirit Realm, Zhao Hai modified the technique to be used on the ground.

After being in the True Spirit Realm for a long time, Zhao Hai’s understanding of the Dao has gotten deeper. The Dao was inseparable from his techniques. In addition, the Stellar Transformations Yin Yang Art has also improved. This increased the lethality of the Heavenly Demons Seven Killing Blades.

Zhao Hai didn’t use all of his strength. In this fight, Zhao Hai only utilized a tenth of his spiritual qi. He came to Gale Canyon in order to polish his techniques to adopt the circumstances of the True Spirit Realm. Therefore, he deliberately suppressed himself to see how he would fare if he used the normal amount of spiritual qi along with his techniques. This was the main purpose of this trial.

chapters.title: Chapter 2265: Black-Clothed Cultivator
chapters.body:
Chapter 2265: Black-Clothed Cultivator

Swish! Several people suddenly appeared in the opening. They all wore grey clothing carrying weapons on their backs. They had both blades and swords, there was also one carrying a pole in his hand.

As they looked at the open area, a person with a broadsword opened his mouth and said, “Something happened here. It’s quite a huge battle. There should be six people. If I’m not mistaken, five of them should be the Spring Breeze Bears.”

Someone on the side asked in a confused tone, “Big Brother, these Spring Breeze Bears, aren’t they the famous cultivators from Springwind City? They aren’t good people. They’re very good at robbing. Who knows how many cultivators they robbed. I heard that they rarely leave living witnesses.”

The person leading the group nodded and said, “Correct, it’s those five.”

The man who spoke before looked at him and said, “Big Brother, is it really them? Aren’t they body cultivators? There’s a strong aura of thunder and lightning here. Could it be that they used a powerful thunder talisman?”

The leader shook his head and said, “They didn’t. If I’m not wrong, the Spring Breeze Bears should have a combat formation called the Five Thunder Formation. Using this formation, the five of them can produce tribulation lightning to attack. Even Teleportation Stage Cultivators would suffer if they were hit by this.”

After looking around, the other person said, “Although there is the aura of thunder and lightning, I don’t feel any fluctuations indicating that it hit something. From the fluctuations, the battle didn’t last long. And from the smell of blood, the Spring Breeze Bears should have suffered greatly. Despite using the Five Thunder Formation, they still suffered. Could the other party be a Teleportation Stage Expert?”

Hearing this, the leader shook his head and said, “Impossible. Although the Five Spring Bears have a formation that could threaten a Teleportation Stage Expert, they shouldn’t be so bold to attack one. Teleportation Experts could detect the formation ahead of time. They would never fall for their attack. Moreover, from what you can see, the tribulation lightning didn’t hit anything, it seems to be absorbed. Most importantly, there is a killing aura here that hasn’t dissipated. From the killing aura, it seems to be a blade user. There is only one move made. What an amazing technique. One blade and the five bears are defeated.”

After saying this, the leader of the group closed his eyes. He was feeling the changes of spiritual qi in the surroundings. And from the remaining qi, he could deduce the flow of the battle.

When he heard this, the other person couldn’t help but be stunned. Not only him, but the rest of the group were shocked as well. Then a deep-voiced man said, “Big Brother, who has such strength to defeat the Spring Breeze Bears with just one blade? Is it someone from the Rogue Cultivator List?”

The Rogue Cultivator List mentioned was a list of notable rogue cultivators in the Forbidden Path Sect’s domain. These Rogue Cultivators share one detail, all of them were at the Earth Monarch Stage. Moreover, they are all very strong.

The leader shook his head and said, “It’s not. Our Shadow Hall specializes in intelligence gathering and selling information. The Rogue Cultivator List came from us. I have seen the people in the list and none of them have this aura. I’m sure that I haven’t met this person before.”

The cultivator from before replied, “Big Brother, I heard that the Forbidden Path Sect has invited our Shadow Hall to help them collect information on powerful rogue cultivators. It seems like they want to invite them to join the sect. Is it true?”

The leader nodded, “The top ten in the list have received the notice of the Forbidden Path Sect. They can join the sect without undergoing assessment.”

The cultivator said, “So it’s true. Big Brother, should we use this opportunity to join the Forbidden Path Sect?”

The leader looked at the cultivator and then shook his head, “It’s difficult. Moreover, do you think it’s over once you join the Forbidden Path Sect? Let me tell you, joining the sect is just the beginning. The Forbidden Path Sect isn’t like the other sects. The Sect’s External Hall has a list of disciples. If you join the External Hall and be among the last 100 for three consecutive years, you will be demoted to the Miscellaneous Hall. Disciples in the Miscellaneous Hall are more pitiful than rogue cultivators. They are treated harshly and have endless tasks to do every day. They won’t have any time to cultivate, which makes it harder for them to increase their strength and status. Entering the Inner Hall from the External Hall in the Forbidden Path Sect is as difficult as breaking through to the Teleportation Stage from the Earth Monarch Stage.”

When the others heard this, they couldn’t help but stare. Although they grew up in the Forbidden Path Sect’s domain since childhood, they have very little understanding regarding the sect. To them, the Forbidden Path Sect was a mysterious entity. Gangs and forces under the sect didn’t dare to inquire about the sect, because it was taboo. If the sect found out that they were looking into the sect, their entire families would be exterminated.

In addition to its strength, their constant killing and exterminations of misbehaving subordinates made it certain that nobody looks into the Forbidden Path Sect.

The group’s leader looked at everyone and said, “Alright, let’s not talk about this. Otherwise, we’ll have to look out for the Forbidden Path Sect. We came to Gale Canyon to look at the strength of the rogue cultivators. Finding this one wouldn’t be easy, we need to head further inside.” Everyone complied and proceeded to walk.

Not long after the group left, Zhao Hai reappeared. Looking at their backs, he knit his brows and said, “Shadow Hall? Interesting. This place actually has this kind of organization. Even the Forbidden Path Sect asks them for help. It seems like things are developing quickly. I didn’t expect the sect to actually begin absorbing powerful rogue cultivators.”

As he thought that, Zhao Hai smiled at the group before vanishing from sight. The group already has liquid silver dust on them. Their every action would now be monitored by Zhao Hai. They cannot escape even if they want to.

However, Zhao Hai wasn’t in the mood to monitor them, being able to at any time was already enough. Zhao Hai tagged these people to know the strong rogue cultivators in the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory. R̃ἈƝŎʙĘŠ

After walking more than ten kilometers, Zhao Hai was now in a forested area. Beasts could be seen from time to time. These beasts weren’t very strong, they practically had no value. Zhao Hai was too lazy to move against them. He just took a few beasts for the Space and kept walking forward.

As he walked, Zhao Hai recalled the map he had about Gale Canyon. He should be in Spirit Ape Forest. According to legend, this forest had Spirit Apes that were as strong as Soul Fusion Cultivators, they were also quite good at combat.

Unfortunately for the Spirit Apes, their inner core could help cultivate spiritual force. It was precisely because of this that the Spirit Apes were hunted down to extinction.

Now, Spirit Ape Forest has become an ordinary forest at the entrance of Gale Canyon. There were no medicinal herbs or ores left in the forest, just ordinary grass and trees. It could be said that this place has become a wasteland.

Zhao Hai didn’t pay attention to these. He enjoyed the view as he walked. Even so, he was attacked five times on his first day. Now all these people have turned into Undead for the Space.

Although all those robberies weren’t successful, they also allowed Zhao Hai to see the chaos of Gale Canyon. It was even more chaotic than what everyone said.

However, the canyon was quite safe at night because cultivators would cultivate. Beasts that pose a threat to cultivators have little value, and almost all of them had been hunted down. Therefore, nothing happened at night. Zhao Hai also started a fire and meditated until dawn. All night, nobody came to cause any trouble.

The next morning, Zhao Hai ate something before heading out. His target was Gale Canyon’s forbidden area, Strong Ape Mountain.

Strong Ape Mountain was the first forbidden area in Gale Canyon. The mountain hosts a group of apes that almost had infinite strength as well as impenetrable defense. Most importantly, the apes lived in groups and some of them were at the Teleportation Stage Strength. Once these apes reach the Teleportation Stage, they gain spiritual wisdom making them as smart as humans. They were all amazingly talented and could defeat humans at the Teleportation Stage. These apes were extremely territorial. Anyone who trespasses their home will be regarded as an enemy. After multiple clashes with cultivators, Strong Ape Mountain slowly became one of the forbidden areas in Gale Canyon.

Fortunately, Strong Apes don’t leave their mountain. Otherwise, the cultivators would have to wage full war against the apes.

Zhao Hai wanted to go to Strong Ape Mountain because the Space didn’t have any Strong Apes. He wanted to seize a couple for the Space.

As Zhao Hai got closer and closer to Strong Ape Mountain, he discovered the vegetation becoming more and more lush. It was evident that only a few people came to this area. Zhao Hai even saw a few medicinal herbs. In the beginning areas of Gale Canyon, this was an almost impossible sight.

Zhao Hai didn’t care about these spiritual herbs. The Space already has a lot of these herbs. Ever since he arrived at the True Spirit Realm, Zhao Hai never stopped collecting herbs. He could even issue missions to collect various herbs and people would flock to complete it.

Because of this, common spiritual herbs no longer have any attraction to Zhao Hai. He just gave them a glance and walked by them.

At this time, a loud explosion was heard from Strong Ape Mountain. Then a roar was heard. Along with the roar was the grunt of a person. It was clear that an ape and a human were fighting.

Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stop when he heard the commotion. Then his expression turned serious. He could hear that the ape was quite strong, at least at the Teleportation Stage.

At the same time, the cultivator fighting the ape was also at the Teleportation Stage. However, his strength was clearly not stronger than the Strong Ape. However, he was still able to contend with the ape for some time. This was because Strong Apes rely purely on their instincts. The human cultivator has techniques and artifacts to help him.

Naturally, this wasn’t the only reason why Zhao Hai was stunned. The reason Zhao Hai’s face became serious was because he felt that the person was familiar. After an analysis of the Space, that person seems to be the black-clothed cultivator from the auction.

The identity of the Black-clothed cultivator from Windrange Auction was still a mystery. Even Ling Dong told Zhao Hai that the intelligence network of the Forbidden Path Sect hasn’t found out who this guy was.

The ability to stay unknown in the Forbidden Path Sect’s domain meant that the black-clothed cultivator’s identity wasn’t simple. Now this person has appeared in Gale Canyon, which surprised Zhao Hai. Why was this person here? Despite the questions in his mind, Zhao Hai continued moving forward. He would soon know if this person was here by coincidence or if it was intentional.

As Zhao Hai got closer and closer to the fight, a roar from the ape followed by a muffled snort was heard. Then the sounds of fighting disappeared. Then Zhao Hai saw a figure fly out of Strong Ape Mountain and shot into the distance.

Another roar spread from Strong Ape Mountain. This time, the roar was especially loud. It was as if the ape was showing its might and warning any intruders. However, it didn’t chase the black-clothed cultivator.

The figure flying in the sky also noticed Zhao Hai. Just as Zhao Hai thought, it was the black-clothed cultivator from the auction. But this time, there was a huge fist print on his robe.
