chapters.title: Chapter 2266: Blood Escape Technique
chapters.body:
Chapter 2266: Blood Escape Technique

The black-robed cultivator also saw Zhao Hai. Naturally, he didn’t recognize him. Seeing Zhao Hai staring at him with a dull expression, he coldly snorted. Then he raised his arm and pointed towards Zhao Hai.

The qi of the surroundings suddenly changed. Bursts of wind and thunder were heard. The black-robed cultivator simply wasn’t pointing, he wanted to kill Zhao Hai.

Seeing the black-robed cultivator make a move, Zhao Hai’s expression couldn’t help but change. Then his eyes flashed a cold light as he coldly snorted and withdrew his blade. Then he slashed towards the man’s finger.

The black-robed cultivator saw the attack and scoffed, “Overestimating yourself!”

Boom! Two attacks collided. The black-robed cultivator was surprised when he saw Zhao Hai split his finger attack. His expression darkened as he pointed towards Zhao Hai once again. At the same time, he shouted, “Windthunder finger, eradicate!” With his voice, Zhao Hai felt the qi of thunder and wind getting stronger. He felt like a tree during a storm, in danger of being blown away at any time.

Naturally, this didn’t mean that Zhao Hai was subjected to strong winds, it was just a feeling. This was a type of spiritual suppression with the strength of the Teleportation Realm behind it. Once a cultivator reaches the Teleportation Realm, their attacks could carry some will of heaven and earth. The black-robed man clearly integrated the laws of the wind and thunder into his attack, giving Zhao Hai the feeling of being in a thunderstorm.

However, the black-robed cultivator was still underestimating Zhao Hai. Capable of slaughtering millions and millions and has become a godlike character, Zhao Hai’s Dao Heart was as firm as it can be. The black-robed cultivator was dreaming if he thought that he could break Zhao Hai with a spiritual attack.

Seeing the additional attack, Zhao Hai coldly snorted and shouted, “Heavenly Demon Seven Killing Blades, Behead!” As Zhao Hai shouted, his blade became as heavy as a sea of stars. The blade flashed a golden light before ruthlessly cutting towards the black-robed man’s finger.

Boom! Another collision was heard, much stronger than the one before. Zhao Hai couldn’t help but take a few steps back. The black-robed man was more miserable. Since he was flying, he was shaken by the collision and was thrown about a kilometer back.

Although the black-robed cultivator managed to stop himself, he still vomited blood. His two eyes radiated with shock. He couldn’t believe that he was thrown back by Zhao Hai.

The black-robed man was truly shocked. This has never happened to him before. Although he was injured in his battle against the ape, his wounds weren’t very heavy. Moreover, he has suppressed his injuries. Moreover, Zhao Hai was only a Soul Fusion Cultivator. Therefore, in his mind, although Zhao Hai looked powerful, he was still two major realms behind. Compared to Soul Fusion Cultivators, Teleportation Experts were simply gods. It was enough for Teleportation Stage Experts to kill Soul Fusion Cultivators with a single finger.

However, not only was Zhao Hai alive after the black-robed man’s attack, he was also able to add to the black-robed cultivator’s wounds. The suppressed injuries have resurfaced.

The black-robed man looked at Zhao Hai as though he had seen a ghost. His face was full of shock. Zhao Hai looked at the man and coldly snorted. Then he waved his hand and shouted, “Heavenly Demon Seven Killing Blades, Behead!” His blade shone once more before he slashed at the black-robed cultivator. The black-robed cultivator couldn’t help but change his expression when he saw Zhao Hai’s move. His injuries were very close to resurfacing. If he continued to clash with Zhao Hai, who knows what would happen.

Thinking of this, the black-robed cultivator immediately moved, wanting to dodge Zhao Hai’s attack. But soon he found out that he was wrong. Zhao Hai’s blade wasn’t only fast, it could also follow the target.

The blade light turned around and chased the black-robed cultivator. And because this was the first time he saw it, he couldn’t dodge the blade and was hit directly. The black-robed cultivator was completely unprepared. The shock of the collision caused him to vomit another mouthful of blood.

Zhao Hai had already suppressed his strength. It was impossible for him to make the black-robed cultivator spit out blood. But since the black-robed cultivator was injured by the Strong Ape, his injuries couldn’t help but worsen.

Zhao Hai looked at the situation and his eyes shone. He wasn’t thinking of killing the black-robed cultivator. If he tried, it would easily expose his strength. Not to mention anything else, just the qi left by the fighting could reveal that he had extraordinary strength. Zhao Hai could clean up the battlefield and remove all residual qi, but it would arouse suspicion. Therefore, Zhao Hai decided to not kill the man.

However, the black-robed cultivator already vomited blood after only three moves, which was enough to show a problem. His injuries looked more serious than he imagined. Zhao Hai naturally wouldn’t let go of this opportunity. Since he didn’t need to expose all of his strength, there’s no need to be polite.

After the black-robed man spat out more blood, his complexion rapidly paled. He looked at Zhao Hai and discovered that he already had his blade high. The black-robed cultivator couldn’t help but shout, “Kid, I’ll remember this humiliation. Just wait.” After that, he spat out a mouthful of blood once more. But this time, it seems like he vomited blood on purpose.

After he spat out blood, the black-robed cultivator moved his hand and drew symbols using the blood he vomited. After a huge array was made, the black-robed cultivator muttered, “Blood Escape Technique.” Soon after, the array emitted a red light. When the red light vanished, the black-robed man could no longer be seen.

Naturally, Zhao Hai’s attack missed, but he wasn’t disappointed. He looked at the direction the black-robed cultivator disappeared and muttered, “Blood Escape Technique? It seems to be the secret technique of the Evil Blood Sect. He’s a devil cultivator? Interesting. A devil cultivator came to the Forbidden Path Sect’s territory and wants to get a Bloodless Command Token. Who knows how the Forbidden Path Sect would react if they knew about this.” After that, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and put away his blade. Then he disappeared after using a movement technique.

Zhao Hai said this because the Evil Blood Sect was a famous devil cultivation sect of the True Spirit Realm. Zhao Hai also heard that the Evil Blood Sect has made great contributions towards the alliance of the Demon and Devil Cultivators.

Now, Zhao Hai found that the Evil Blood Sect wants to get the Bloodless Command Token. If this matter was revealed to the Forbidden Path Sect, someone might get certain ideas.

It wasn’t the Forbidden Path Sect that could enter the Demon Blood Realm. There are also other sects that have quotas to enter. However, all those sects were all demonic sects. There were no evil faction sects among them. Now, the Evil Blood Sects have shown intention on entering the Demon Blood Realm. A rift might appear between the Demonic and the Devil Factions if this news were to spread. ℞άΝo͍BÊṡ

Naturally, Zhao Hai knew that the black-robed cultivator didn’t come specifically for the Bloodless Command Token. Otherwise, he wouldn’t have brought too little money. It must be known that the Evil Blood Sect was a Great Sect. If they really wanted to spend money to get something, they wouldn’t bring so little.

It’s possible that the black-robed man has other business in the Forbidden Path Sect’s Domain and just happened upon the auction and tried to bid. From his resources, the black-robed man should be an inner sect disciple of the Evil Blood Sect.

However, all of this has no relationship with Zhao Hai. He only needs to find an opportunity to have this information reach the Forbidden Path Sect. How the sect reacts to the news is not his concern.

Zhao Hai carefully walked towards Strong Ape Mountain. He knew that this wasn’t the time to enter the mountain. A huge fight just happened, so the Strong Apes should still be very vigilant. It’s possible that he would be discovered.

The Strong Apes don’t have a good impression of humans. It’s impossible for Zhao Hai to communicate with the apes. After all, apes weren’t rocks that had no thoughts. If he uses the infinity technique to communicate with rocks, he might be able to since he was used to it. As for apes, his proficiency still wasn’t good.

Although the Strong Apes weren’t very intelligent, they still had some wisdom. It wouldn’t be easy for Zhao Hai to subdue an intelligent being, especially one that was hostile towards the human race.

Moreover, one shouldn’t forget that Strong Apes have leaders at the Teleportation Stage. Teleportation Stage experts have a very powerful spiritual force. Even if Strong Apes mainly cultivate strength, once they arrive at the Teleportation Stage, their spiritual force will increase by several folds. Otherwise, they wouldn’t develop human-level intelligence.

If Zhao Hai wanted to use the Infinity Technique to communicate with the Strong Apes, the fluctuation of spiritual force would alert the Teleportation Stage apes. Strong Apes at the Teleportation Stage are much stronger than Teleportation Stage humans. Once discovered by them, Zhao Hai would certainly be hunted down. When the time comes, he might be forced to reveal his real strength.

For this reason, Zhao Hai was very careful as he walked around Strong Ape Mountain. When he reached the foot of the mountain, he didn’t dare take another step. This was because he saw some Strong Apes hanging on the trees. These apes weren’t very tall at around two meters. They didn’t look strong either. They looked like ordinary black monkeys.

chapters.title: Chapter 2267: Three Fists Agreement
chapters.body:
Chapter 2267: Three Fists Agreement

Although the apes look ordinary, Zhao Hai didn’t dare underestimate them. Their small figures are hiding a frightening strength. Zhao Hai was certain that these apes have strength comparable to Soul Fusion Cultivators.

Zhao Hai couldn’t help but frown when he saw the Strong Apes defending the borders of the mountain. He didn’t plan on forcefully going up the mountain, so his figure flashed and he found a place to hide.

It must be said that these Strong Apes were also interesting. It seems like they were imprisoned in Strong Ape Mountain and couldn’t leave. If a human offended the Strong Apes, they would chase them down up until the border of the mountain. As long as they can escape the mountain, the humans would be safe.

This was also the reason why the black-clothed cultivator dared to fight Zhao Hai just beyond the mountain. He knew that even if he stopped, the Strong Apes wouldn’t go after him. But that was also under the assumption that he didn’t go too far.

In the past, after finding out that the Strong Apes wouldn’t go out of Strong Ape Mountain, humans stood outside the mountain and attacked the strong apes with talismans. In any case, the Strong Apes couldn’t come out.

This was until tragedy came. Strong Apes unexpectedly walked out of the mountain to kill these people before returning. Then people understood that Strong Apes aren’t forbidden from leaving the mountain, they just didn’t like going out. As for the reason why, nobody knows.

The skies slowly turned dark. Zhao Hai didn’t raise any fire nor did he eat. He just calmly looked at Strong Ape Mountain.

Most of the apes on the mountain have already gone to rest. The Apes might have decided that nobody would come harass them, so they relaxed their defense. Zhao Hai was waiting for this opportunity.

The moon rose in the middle of the sky, plunging Strong Ape Mountain into darkness. But from time to time, light smoke could be seen throughout the mountain. It was Zhao Hai using movement techniques. Unlike his eagle-like moves when he descended the cliff, he was like smoke and mist right now. It was impossible to see his figure clearly.

Not long after entering Strong Ape Mountain, Zhao Hai saw a strong ape lying down. Zhao Hai looked at the strong ape and couldn’t help but smile. Then he waved his hand and a stick of incense appeared. Zhao Hai pressed his hand on the incense and ignited it. A faint fragrance immediately spread to the surroundings.

The strong ape didn’t seem to smell the incense. On the contrary, it slept more comfortably. As soon as he saw this, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but smile. Then he waved his hand and put the incense away. Then he waved his hand once more and sent the strong ape to the Space. Then Zhao Hai’s figure moved and floated straight down Strong Ape Mountain. He got his goal and no longer stayed.

But at this moment, a roar was suddenly heard. The roar was very vigorous. Hearing this roar, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare. Then his complexion changed. He heard this roar before. It was the roar of the Strong Ape that the black-clothed cultivator fought against.

Just as Zhao Hai was about to speed up to escape the mountain, the space in front of him was torn apart. Then a white ape got out from the rift.

The white ape was less than 2 meters tall with short legs and long arms. Its two eyes were coldly glaring with Zhao Hai. Zhao Hai felt a murderous aura from the ape, but at the same time he felt a mental fluctuation from him. The fluctuation didn’t carry any lethality but instead it seemed to contain emotions. It was as if it came here to bargain with him.

Zhao Hai didn’t feel that it was strange. When he was in the lower realms, he would often see beasts that have the wisdom of humans. But the higher their level, the less they communicated. This was because as they get stronger, both humans and beasts start to look down on each other. They wouldn’t dare communicate either, fearing that the other party will attack them while they were off-guard.

While others were afraid, Zhao Hai was not. Zhao Hai’s spiritual force was much stronger than his spiritual qi. Moreover, there was his golden spiritual force. Therefore, Zhao Hai directly used his spiritual force to communicate with the white ape.

Before long, a vigorous voice was heard in Zhao Hai’s head, “Human, I don’t care who you are. Release Xiao Wu, or else I’ll kill you.”

Zhao Hai looked at the Teleportation Stage ape and then replied, “Senior, the kid from your clan, Xiao Wu, I didn’t take him. I just want to invite him over to a place for a while. I can release him right now, but I’m afraid he will still follow me.”

“Human, don’t force me to kill you. Release Xiao Wu immediately.”

Zhao Hai no longer hesitated and waved his hand. The ape that had been brought to the Space was now awake and had appeared beside Zhao Hai. This time, the expression of the ape completely changed. Instead of the cruel and cold gaze that the old ape had, it had respect and admiration towards Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai looked at Xiao Wu and said, “Xiao Wu, this senior wants you to stay in Strong Ape Mountain. Do you want to stay or go with me?”

Xiao Wu jumped up and said, “Of course I’m following you, Young Master. Grandpa, I want to follow the young master. The place he took me to is very fun, I want to go.”

The Teleportation Stage age couldn’t help but stare. He looked at Xiao Wu in disbelief as he said, “Xiao Wu, why would you say that? You want to leave Strong Ape Mountain? Why? Did you forget the order of our Strong Ape Clan?”

Xiao Wu shook his head and said, “Grandfather, I haven’t forgotten. I will never forget the mission of our Strong Ape Clan. But Grandpa, the place the Young Master took me to is very good. My cultivation speed there is faster than here. Moreover, even if I follow the Young Master, if there’s trouble in Strong Ape Mountain, I can return immediately. The Young Master might even help. Grandfather, Young Master is different from other humans.”

The Teleportation Stage Ape looked at Xiao Wu and frowned, “Xiao Wu, you just met this person. Why would you say that he’s different from other humans? Is he deceiving you?”

Xiao Wu shook his head and said, “Grandfather, you don’t understand. The Young Master wouldn’t lie to me. The place the Young Master is taking me to is really different. But Grandpa, I can’t tell you where I went. But don’t worry, I’m fine.”

The Teleportation Stage ape looked at Xiao Wu. He knows that Xiao Wu was really serious this time about not coming back. But what made the white ape feel strange was that on Xiao Wu’s body, he couldn’t feel any spiritual force that was influencing his mind. Ꞧ𝖆₦Ổ฿Ëş

The white ape looked at Zhao Hai and said, “It seems like you aren’t simple. You can make Xiao Wu believe in you in a short period of time. I don’t care what method you used, but you made Xiao Wu decide for himself. If you want to take Xiao Wu with you, take three of my punches. As long as you can take my fists, I’ll let Xiao Wu follow you. If you can’t take them, or die, then Xiao Wu stays.”

Hearing the white ape, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Alright, I agree.”

The white ape thought that Zhao Hai wouldn’t agree. Surprisingly, Zhao Hai quickly agreed. What made the white ape puzzled was Xiao Wu’s reaction. The white ape has seen that Xiao Wu’s heart has completely shifted towards Zhao Hai. With strength at the Soul Fusion Stage, Zhao Hai shouldn’t be able to take a punch from a Teleportation Stage Expert. In this case, Xiao Wu should be stopping him. In addition to Zhao Hai’s response, the white ape was certain that Zhao Hai has special methods to protect himself. The white ape’s expression immediately became serious.

To be honest, the white ape really didn’t want Xiao Wu to follow Zhao Hai. Because of this, he proposed the three punch agreement. If Zhao Hai didn’t accept, he would have a reason to prevent Xiao Wu from leaving. Even if Zhao Hai agreed, he could kill Zhao Hai in three punches, and Xiao Wu wouldn’t be able to leave.

However, Zhao Hai and Xiao Wu’s response made the white ape’s heart feel a bad premonition. But beasts are different from humans. Humans like to betray their promises. Beasts, once they gave their word, will follow through. So, the white ape didn’t think of reneging on his promise. At the same time, he was confident in his strength. He doesn’t believe that a Soul Fusion cultivator could take a few punches from a Teleportation Stage expert.

The white ape looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Alright, prepare yourself. After taking my three punches, you can take Xiao Wu away.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then prepared his posture and said, “Senior, please.”

The white ape nodded. The reason why he was being polite to Zhao Hai until now was first because of Xiao Wu, second because Zhao Hai communicated with him using spiritual force, and third because he has been respectful since the beginning. Therefore, the white ape had a good impression of Zhao Hai.

Zhao Hai was in a horse stance right now, with his two fists at the sides of his abdomen. His two eyes were completely focused on the white ape. This was the most basic defensive stance for martial arts. Anyone who practiced even a little martial arts knew about his stance.

The horse stance that Zhao Hai was using right now was the most fundamental stance of martial arts. But to Zhao Hai, whose foundation was extremely solid, his horse stance was much stronger than the martial arts of other people.

The white ape looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Are you ready? Then I’ll begin.”

Zhao Hai nodded.

Then the white ape drew strength from his body and his physique slowly increased. He looked like an inflating balloon. His less than two meters height instantaneously became five meters. Moreover, his body looked the same as cast steel.

chapters.title: Chapter 2268: Blocking Three Punches
chapters.body:
Chapter 2268: Blocking Three Punches

Zhao Hai was stunned when he saw the transformation of the white ape. He immediately felt a heavy spiritual qi coming out of the white ape’s body. This only appears when a person’s qi and blood were pushed to the extreme.

Any person, as long as they use their strength, will have an effect on the surrounding qi when they use their qi and blood. Just like when a normal person uses all their strength and their faces become red, cultivators will have the same effect when they use their qi and blood.

When body cultivators use their full power, their blood and qi would churn like a river. This churning would provide their body with infinite energy.

The power coming from the white ape was more than a churning river, it was more akin to a raging tsunami. At the same time, his body size more than doubled. Then the white ape retracted their fist and then punched out.

Boom! The punch was so fast that it actually broke air resistance. After a sonic boom, the punch reached Zhao Hai’s chest.

Seeing the white ape’s punch, Zhao Hai’s expression turned serious. He took a deep breath and crossed his arms in front of his chest.

Boom! When the white ape’s punch hit, Zhao Hai’s body was pushed back by some distance. However, Zhao Hai’s stance wasn’t disrupted. He left two deep trenches plowing through the ground.

Boom, boom, crack! Zhao Hai knocked down more than ten trees before he finally stopped.

Once Zhao Hai stopped, he let go of his crossed arms. He didn’t use any technique, just relied on his own strength to block the white ape’s punch. But it was clear that he still underestimated the strength of the white ape. The white ape’s punch shocked Zhao Hai’s arms numb. If it weren’t for Zhao Hai’s physique as well as the trees mitigating the force of the punch, then Zhao Hai would have been injured.

Most importantly, Zhao Hai knew that the white ape wasn’t using his full strength. The first punch was merely a test.

Zhao Hai took a deep breath and slowly stood up. He knew that if he didn’t use his divergent abilities, he wouldn’t be qualified to go against a Teleportation Stage Expert.

Zhao Hai slowly walked back to the white ape and then cupped his fist, “Thank you Senior for showing mercy. Please proceed with your second punch.”

The white ape looked at Zhao Hai and a hint of appreciation appeared in his eyes. Then he said, “You can block a punch with 60% of my strength. Moreover, you knew that I held back. You even asked me for the second punch. That’s rare. Alright, young man. I’ll be looking down on you if I still hold back. Be prepared.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he returned to his horse stance. But this time, he used his earth element divergent ability. His entire person melded with the surrounding land.

As soon as the white ape saw Zhao Hai, his pupils shrank. Then he laughed and said, “Good kid, you already comprehended Earth Intent at such a young age. It seems like I’ll be embarrassed if I don’t do my best.” After that, the aura of the white ape increased once more. At the same time, his height became eight meters.

The surrounding strong apes were stunned when they saw the appearance of the white ape. They all squealed in support. They rarely saw the white ape reveal this much strength. Even when fighting the black-robed cultivator the day before, the white ape’s height was only 6 meters. It was clear that he was being serious this time.

Then the white ape punched alongside a shout. It took no time before the punch was in front of Zhao Hai. This time, Zhao Hai didn’t raise his arm. Instead, he met the punch with his own fist.

When the punch connected, the ground beneath Zhao Hai’s feet seemed to be blown by a thousand pounds of explosives. With a bang, a hundred-meter large pit appeared beneath Zhao Hai. But Zhao Hai himself was fine.

Seeing that Zhao Hai was fine, the white ape appreciated him even more. He laughed and said, “Good, good. You borrowed the strength of the ground to resist my punch. Your meridians are very good, your courage even more so. I was afraid that my punch would shatter your meridians. Good.” After that, the white ape roared louder as his body became ten meters tall. His fist was now as large as a water jar. Then he punched down towards Zhao Hai. 𝘳áℕꝋᛒΕS̩

Seeing this fist, Zhao Hai exhaled and raised his own fist. By this point, Zhao Hai’s fist was very small compared to the white ape’s. It was as if a toothpick was going against a sledgehammer.

Tong! Zhao Hai was like a nail being beaten underground by the white ape. But at the same time, the white ape withstood Zhao Hai’s counter force. His arm shook violently before settling down. Then white ape’s eyes couldn’t help but flash a strange glint. Then he laughed and said, “Good, good kid! You are good. From now on, Xiao Wu will follow you. Remember to take care of him, otherwise you will face my full strength.” Then the white ape moved and disappeared.

At this moment, Zhao Hai jumped up from underground. He cupped his fist towards the direction of the white ape and said, “Senior, thank you for showing mercy.”

Xiao Wu also ran to Zhao Hai’s side at this moment. Zhao Hai patted Xiao Wu’s head, causing Xiao Wu to show a comfortable appearance.

The other strong apes also arrived and surrounded Zhao Hai. They didn’t look at Zhao Hai with hatred, but instead with great curiosity. Naturally, they saw Zhao Hai catching the white ape’s three punches. This made the other strong apes admire Zhao Hai’s strength. Zhao Hai became the first human recognized by the strong apes.

Seeing the strong apes around him, Zhao Hai waved his hand and took out a huge pile of fruits as a gift. Xiao Wu greeted the other apes and told them to take the fruits. The strong apes didn’t hesitate for long and ate all of the fruits in no time.

Once all the fruits were taken, Zhao Hai greeted the strong apes before sending Xiao Wu to the Space and leaving Strong Ape Mountain. The strong apes also accompanied Zhao Hai up until the mountain’s border.

Once out of Strong Ape Mountain, Zhao Hai asked Xiao Wu, “Xiao Wu, your grandfather mentioned about your clan’s mission. Do you know what it is?”

Xiao Wu didn’t hide the truth from Zhao Hai, “Our Clan has a mission to guard Strong Ape Mountain. In fact, my grandfather isn’t the strongest in Strong Ape Mountain. Our Strong Ape Clan has a long history. I heard that we have many strong ancestors in the mountain. I don’t know how strong the ancestors are, but I heard that there are many ancestors that can kill my grandfather with just a finger.”

Zhao Hai stared, he didn’t expect that the Strong Apes stayed in Strong Ape Mountain to protect it. He looked at Xiao Wu and said, “What are you protecting?”

Xiao Wu shook his head and said, “I don’t know. But I heard grandfather say that it is a stone coffin. As for what’s inside, grandfather doesn’t know. I only know that it is our clan’s mission to guard the coffin. As long as the Strong Ape Clan survives, the mission will continue forever. Our clan has been guarding the mountain for generations.”

Zhao Hai raised his brow, “A stone coffin, that’s interesting. People outside only know that Strong Ape Mountain’s strongest is at the Teleportation Stage. They didn’t know that the mountain would have at least a Space Breaker Expert. It seems like your clan really places a huge importance on the stone coffin. Alright, don’t worry, I won’t tell anyone about this.”

Xiao Wu nodded, “Thanks, Young Master.”

Zhao Hai added, “I asked the Space to change the Demon Subjugation Technique slightly so you can practice it. Your Strong Ape clan seems to have its own cultivation method. But it doesn’t seem to be strong. Try practicing the Demon Subjugation Technique to see if its stronger.”

Xiao Wu nodded, “Don’t worry, Young Master. I will practice well.” Zhao Hai nodded. Then he sent Xiao Wu back to the Space to practice on his own.

Zhao Hai’s battle against the white ape wasn’t quiet at all. Cultivators in the surrounding areas have heard it. Some of them found that the battle was coming from Strong Ape Mountain and immediately gave up the idea of taking a look. They knew that they would be unlucky if the strong apes suddenly went crazy.

But there were also people who weren’t afraid of death. They want to take a look at Strong Ape Mountain and find out what made such a big move. If an almighty from Strong Ape Mountain falls, they might be able to get some bargain. After all, Strong Ape Mountain hasn’t been conquered. It still had a lot of treasures. If they can obtain a piece, they would be rich. Therefore, cultivators began dashing to Strong Ape Mountain’s border.

Zhao Hai already discovered these cultivators, but he didn’t show himself. He deliberately avoided them and looked for a place for rest.

While Zhao Hai was looking forward to resting, the other cultivators continued on. They arrived at the foot of Strong Ape Mountain but haven’t seen any strong apes. However, they did discover that there were several destroyed places in the mountain. There was an especially large hole that the white ape had made.

Seeing this, the eyes of the cultivators shone. They couldn’t help but be certain that something significant has happened in Strong Ape Mountain. It might be a powerful expert coming over to the mountain to kill the strong apes.

Thinking of this, the cultivators were excited. Their courage ballooned. They immediately stepped into Strong Ape Mountain to look for treasures. Not long after they entered, they saw several spiritual herbs, they all excitedly yelled.

Cultivators that had not yet entered the mountain saw the harvest that these people made and could no longer hold on. They also ran into the mountain to loot.

At this moment, the resting strong apes were alarmed. They saw humans run up to the mountain and began disturbing the terrain. The strong apes were immediately infuriated. Although they accepted Zhao Hai, it didn’t mean that this sentiment extended to other humans. In fact, they still hated humans. Seeing humans causing trouble, the strong apes immediately turned crazy. They rushed towards the humans to attack them.

Hearing the roars of the strong apes, the humans were stunned. They immediately turned their head to see the strong apes present, they weren’t killed off. Naturally, they were surprised and then immediately turned and ran. However, strong apes were stronger than humans. The strong apes immediately caught up and began tearing humans to pieces. In one night, hundreds of human cultivators were killed. Since then, for a long time, Strong Ape Mountain became a forbidden area. Nobody dared go near a hundred kilometers around it.

Zhao Hai also heard what happened on the next day. He didn’t care about the event. Humans in Gale Canyon were a mixed group. Only a few of them were clean, most of them had dirty hands. Hearing that they were killed by strong apes, Zhao Hai had zero sympathy towards them.

Zhao Hai was now on the road towards the second forbidden area in Gale Canyon, The Valley of the Sacred Elephant.

The Valley of the Sacred Elephant was a large valley within the canyon. The valley was quite sizable. It had pure water and fertile grounds. It had many fruit trees and all kinds of treasures. More importantly, there was an ore called essence gold in the valley. This ore could be refined to get a metal that had only the metal attribute.

Ores having the metallic attribute doesn’t seem special. However, it was actually valuable. Metals have the metal attribute, but it also has other properties, mainly the earth element. After all, ores were extracted from the earth. Even metals that were labeled pure have very small traces of the earth attribute.

In addition to metals having the earth attribute, metals could also contain other attributes. These metals were sought after goods. They could be made into weapons that amplify the power of their respective attributes.

Essence gold was an exception to this. Metals refined from its ores didn’t contain any other attribute. It only has one, which is metal. It doesn’t have even a hint of the earth attribute.

One shouldn’t underestimate this property. Since the metal only has one attribute, it could display the maximum power of the metal attribute. Weapons with essence gold added were far sharper than other weapons. Ordinary weapons that had essence gold could cut through other weapons without damage.

chapters.title: Chapter 2269: Valley Of The Sacred Elephant
chapters.body:
Chapter 2269: Valley Of The Sacred Elephant

Although the Valley of the Sacred Elephant had a lot of good things, it was a rare destination for a lot of cultivators. The valley wasn’t the territory for humans. It had the canyon’s strongest beasts, the Crazed Elephant.

The Crazed Elephants were famous beasts in Gale Canyon. Their race had always lived in the Valley of the Sacred Elephant where water was clear and the land was fertile. This was the most suitable location for their race to survive.

Crazed Elephants have their name because of their fighting style. Their clan also had a lot of powerful beings. Particularly strong crazed elephants could defeat cultivators in the Teleportation Stage.

Although Zhao Hai didn’t know if there were more powerful crazed elephants in the valley, he was certain that the place wasn’t as simple as it seems.

Strong Ape Mountain was known to only have Teleportation Stage Experts, which wasn’t true. The Valley of the Sacred Elephant was also known to only have Teleportation Stage Experts. However, Zhao Hai doesn’t believe that there are no experts that are stronger than Teleportation Stage in the valley.

The Valley of the Sacred Elephant was located in a remote corner of Gale Canyon. Although it was very remote, there were still a few cultivators who went there every year.

Of these few cultivators, all of them went into the valley but a few of them managed to come out. All of them were killed by crazed elephants. Those who manage to leave would never go even to the peripheral areas of the valley. They were all afraid of being killed by crazed elephants.

In the eyes of ordinary people, the Valley of the Sacred Elephant might not be as dangerous as Strong Ape Mountain. At least, you can survive if you enter the early regions of the valley. But as long as you’ve been to the valley, this thinking would disappear. You would think that the Valley of the Sacred Elephant was definitely more dangerous than Strong Ape Mountain.

The inner parts of the Valley of the Sacred Elephant were different as it had the Domain of the Sacred Elephant. Even Teleportation Realm experts wouldn’t dare enter the inner parts of the valley. Even Teleportation Stage experts wouldn’t come out alive if they entered the inner area.

Compared to the outer region, the inner region of the valley would seem like a completely different world. The inner valley had a large number of crazed elephants. And once those elephants became enraged, they were very terrifying.

There were also Diamond Body Realm crazed elephants spotted in the inner region of the valley. No cultivator would dare go there to cause trouble, unless they no longer valued their lives.

Cultivators don’t only think about the strength of crazed elephants. As long as there were no accidents, the crazed elephants also lived longer than humans. The longer they lived, the stronger one could become. Therefore, those with information deemed the Valley of the Sacred Elephant more dangerous than Strong Ape Mountain.

Zhao Hai was now in the outer region of the valley. There were almost no elephants in this region, only other beasts. These beasts were also very strong. They cannot be easily provoked.

There weren’t a lot of cultivators even in the outer regions of the valley. This was because they were afraid of meeting a crazed elephant randomly. Crazed elephants in the Earth Monarch Stage were much stronger than Earth Monarch Stage cultivators. In other words, the majority of cultivators in Gale Canyon were no match to an average crazed elephant.

Zhao Hai doesn’t care about any of this. He stood on a high point in the valley and looked around. In Zhao Hai’s mind, this wasn’t a valley at all, it was a huge plain. There were some trees on the plane, but not a lot. What was present the most were grass.

Looking around and sensing no danger as well as the lack of valuable resources, Zhao Hai proceeded inwards.

The valuable resources that Zhao Hai sought naturally weren’t things like herbs and ores. There were actually plenty of spiritual herbs in the outer region of the valley, at least much more than outside.

However, Zhao Hai didn’t care about those things. There are only two reasons why Zhao Hai was attracted to the valley, the first was essence gold and the second was the large outer region of the valley. With Zhao Hai’s speed, it took more than a day to reach the boundary between the outer and the inner region of the valley. Although Zhao Hai didn’t see any special resource, the inner and the outer region’s terrain was a little special. The two regions were connected like a gourd. The border of the inner and outer region was narrow, like the neck of a gourd.

Cultivators who explored the valley in the past erected a stone stele at the boundary, so Zhao Hai couldn’t be wrong. Zhao Hai looked silently at the stone stele before stepping into the inner region of the valley.

Unlike Zhao Hai’s imagination, he didn’t immediately see crazed elephants once he stepped into the valley’s inner region. What he saw instead was a forest in the distance.

Seeing this, Zhao Hai’s eyes shone. Then he moved and went straight into the forest. He found a few spiritual herbs that couldn’t be found outside as well as special plants. Zhao Hai didn’t hesitate and received all these plants for the Space.

After an hour, Zhao Hai heard rustling sounds. The sound came from a distance. If it weren’t for Zhao Hai’s more than average hearing, he would not have heard this sound.

Zhao Hai knew that there were almost no other beasts in the inner region of the valley. Inside were mostly crazed elephants. But since the crazed elephants were his target, Zhao Hai carefully moved forward.

Before long, Zhao Hai saw several crazed elephants eating. It must be said that the crazed elephants looked very much like elephants found on earth. But they looked closer to mammoths than existing elephants.

The crazed elephants were enormous with heights exceeding ten meters. Their bodies had some fur, but they weren’t very thick. They also had two ivory tusks that curved like scimitars.

Zhao Hai looked at the crazed elephants but didn’t make a move. He knew that elephants are social animals and attached great importance to their offsprings. If he abducted crazed elephants right now, it would definitely cause the entire valley to come after him. He has to find essence gold first.

Essence gold was a special resource in the Valley of the Sacred Elephant. However, the outer region of the valley has been mined out of essence gold. Although cultivators didn’t dare mine essence gold on a large scale, there were still enough cultivators in the outer regions to exhaust the essence gold present. Naturally, this was after numerous searches and battles against both cultivators and crazed elephants.

Now, Zhao Hai’s plan was to find essence gold first and then take a crazed elephant for the Space. So, he just looked at the crazed elephants and moved on. 𝑅а₦оᛒΕs̈

Before entering Gale Canyon, Zhao Hai already had some understanding of it. He knew about the specialties of the canyon. Therefore, he wasn’t in a hurry and slowly searched.

However, the inner region of the Valley of the Sacred Elephant was different than people think. In addition to essence gold, there were also a lot of valuable spiritual plants, but all of these were guarded by crazed elephants. It was clear that these were useful to them. As for essence gold, Zhao Hai has yet to see it.

The day passed and Zhao Hai still hasn’t found essence gold. Zhao Hai looked for a place to rest. Although he could act during the evening, he didn’t do so because the valley would be filled with action during the night. The common beasts in the valley weren’t a threat to Zhao Hai, but he didn’t want his presence to be discovered by any crazed elephants.

Fortunately, Zhao Hai’s abilities are formidable. He was able to go through the night safely and without getting discovered. The next day, Zhao Hai didn’t bother any crazed elephants and continued to look for essence gold.

Three days passed and Zhao Hai still hasn’t found any essence gold. This surprised Zhao Hai. He heard that there is plenty of essence gold in the valley. However, he hasn’t found any after searching for three days.

On the fourth day, Zhao Hai found a piece of dark ore. The ore was placed in a very covert place. If it weren’t for Zhao Hai’s heightened senses, he wouldn’t have found it. The whole ore was the size of a basketball. If essence gold were extracted, it would only be as big as a ping pong ball.

However, this amount was already enough for Zhao Hai. As long as there’s a piece of gold essence present, the Space could produce a mine later on. Then from that point, Zhao Hai would have an unlimited amount of essence gold.

After obtaining essence gold, Zhao Hai’s thoughts returned to the crazed elephants. Elephants are social animals. In the previous group that Zhao Hai spotted, one of them was at the Teleportation Stage. In this case, it would be impossible for Zhao Hai to take one crazed elephant without being detected.

Zhao Hai didn’t act immediately. He observed the crazed elephants first. He looked at their habits to understand them more. Then he would take one crazed elephant when nobody is looking.

After observing for an entire day, Zhao Hai discovered that the crazed elephants weren’t very united. Crazed elephants would eliminate members that were frail.

After going around the valley, Zhao Hai found an old crazed elephant. This elephant was very old with very wrinkly skin. Moreover, its muscles were very thin and it walked slow. The elephant just walked and walked. It did not stop to eat nor drink water. It was as if those things had lost their appeal to him.

Seeing this crazed elephant, Zhao Hai remembered an old tale. It was said that when an elephant was about to die, it would leave and go to an elephant graveyard. Then it would die quietly there. If the crazed elephants were indeed true elephants, then this old elephant was more likely going to the graveyard to die.

chapters.title: Chapter 2270: Blood Qi And Strength
chapters.body:
Chapter 2270: Blood Qi And Strength

Zhao Hai followed the old elephant for three days. In these three days, both had already covered tens of thousands of kilometers. If other cultivators underwent the same journey, they would already met a Teleportation Stage crazed elephant.

But since Zhao Hai has a divergent ability, the crazed elephants were unable to detect him. This allowed Zhao Hai to follow behind the old elephant.

Naturally, one of the reasons why Zhao Hai wasn’t discovered was that the groups of crazed elephants he met weren’t very large. Moreover, the old elephant seemed to know a path to avoid the other elephant groups. They only met a few groups that the old elephant couldn’t avoid. The speed of the elephant doesn’t look fast, but its real speed wasn’t slow at all. Covering around ten thousand kilometers in three days couldn’t be described as slow.

When the sun of the third day set, Zhao Hai discovered a hill with a cave in front of him. The cave entrance wasn’t very big at around ten meters high and five meters wide. It doesn’t look special.

However, Zhao Hai had some thoughts about the cave. He could feel a powerful aura coming out of the entrance. Although the aura wasn’t deliberately controlled, it was still quite powerful.

The aura coming from the cave had the feeling of qi and blood. The aura of qi and blood shot straight to the sky. It seemed like the heavens were going to change color because of it.

At this moment, the old elephant stopped. Then Zhao Hai felt a spiritual force reaching towards him. The spiritual force wasn’t very strong. It was the same thing when the old white ape reached out to Zhao Hai to communicate.

Zhao Hai stared, he immediately understood the old elephant’s intention. Zhao Hai immediately connected with the spiritual force to communicate with the old elephant.

“Young Man, come out. You’ve been following me all this time, isn’t it because you want to find this place? Now that we’re here, why are you still hiding?” An aged voice sounded in Zhao Hai’s head.

Zhao Hai stared, then he moved and appeared before the old elephant. Then he gave a bow and said, “I have seen the Elder. I only followed you because I’m curious. I heard that when elephants are about to die, they will go to a mysterious place. I’m merely curious and have no intentions of stealing the bones of the Crazed Elephant Clan. Elder, please don’t misunderstand.”

The old elephant looked at Zhao Hai and coldly snorted, “If you are just curious, why would you follow me all this time? Do you really think that I don’t have the strength to deal with you now that I’m dying? How can a Soul Fusion stage human like you understand the strength of my Crazed Elephant Clan?”

Zhao Hai quickly replied, “Elder, if you believe me, I can invite you to a place that can restore your health. Although Elder might leave the True Spirit Realm, I can guarantee that you will not die.”

The old elephant’s cloudy eyes looked at Zhao Hai, he looked at him for a long time before he said, “I forgot to tell you, I am a Condensing Spirit Stage Crazed Elephant. I don’t know how many years I’ve lived. I have seen countless humans. All of them are greedy and want everything in their sights. And they all want to find this place. But I don’t see that greed in you. Maybe you hide it well, but I no longer care. I want to believe one last time.”

“I will go with you. But if you dare lie to me, no matter where you bring me to, I will tear through space and come back here. Then you will face the wrath of the entire Crazed Elephant Clan. Young Man, do you still want me to go with you?”

Hearing the old elephant, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Senior, please.” Then he waved his hand, opening a spatial rift beside him. Zhao Hai wasn’t worried that the spatial rift would be discovered. The aura released by the elephant graveyard was so thick that it hid all signs of a spatial rift being opened.

The old elephant glanced at the spatial rift that Zhao Hai opened and slowly walked towards it. The spatial rift promptly closed when Zhao Hai followed the old elephant in. At this time, Zhao Hai heard a prompt, “Hostile being detected by the Space. Pacifying target. Pacifying success. Elephant-type being detected. Genes have evolved almost perfectly. Extracting genes and fusing it to all elephant-type beings in the Space. Fuse success. Elephant being detected to have very weak life force. Asking the host if he allows the being to die.”

Zhao Hai immediately said, “Don’t agree. Don’t make him die.”

The prompt immediately replied, “Denial confirmed. Elephant being will die when the host decides.” Then there were no longer any sounds. Zhao Hai looked at the crazed elephant and said, “Senior, I didn’t lie.”

The old elephant looked at Zhao Hai and sighed, “Thanks, Young Master. Also, your strength is still very low. You can cultivate in the Sacred Elephant Mountain. If you absorb the mountain’s blood qi, you will gain the power of the Sacred Elephant. Your strength will soar through the sky.”

Hearing the old elephant, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but stare. He looked at the old elephant and said, “You want me to practice on the mountain? Isn’t that considered as destroying the mountain?”

The old elephant shook his head and said, “It’s not destroying. Sacred Elephant Mountain contains a large amount of blood qi. This blood qi itself is a treasure. It hasn’t been discovered yet. But if it was revealed, numerous races will come over along with their powerful experts to absorb this blood qi. If that happens, the Crazed Elephant Clan will face destruction. Our clan cannot withstand an attack from all the races in the realm.” 𝖗𝘢ＮＯΒĚ𝙨

“On the other hand, with Young Master’s physical condition, you can absorb the blood qi. Once the blood qi is absorbed, nobody will pay attention to Sacred Elephant Mountain, and the Crazed Elephant Clan will be safe. It would take the clan a long time to accumulate such an amount of blood qi once more. If Young Master absorbs the blood qi, you will be helping the Crazed Elephant Clan.”

Zhao Hai stared, he looked at the old elephant and said, “Is that true? But why don’t the Crazed Elephant Clan absorb the blood qi and allow it to accumulate here?”

The old elephant sighed and said, “Few elephants know about this place. We only come here through our bloodline when we are about to die. Other times, we don’t come here. The blood qi can attract other races, but not the Crazed Elephant Clan.”

Although Zhao Hai was confused, he also knew that the old elephant wouldn’t deceive him. Therefore, he nodded and said, “Alright, I’ll return to the mountain to cultivate. But are you really sure that I can absorb the blood qi?”

The old elephant nodded and said, “Absorb as much as you can. If it were other people, their bodies would explode if they absorbed the blood qi. But the Young Master’s body can take it.”

Zhao Hai nodded, then he waved his hand and sent the old elephant to where the other elephant races in the Space reside. Then his body appeared in Sacred Elephant Mountain.

Zhao Hai didn’t enter the mountain immediately. Instead, he stood outside and studied the entrance. There was nothing special to the cave ahead. However, Zhao Hai’s spiritual force cannot scan the cave. This was because the blood qi in the cave was very thick. It completely flooded the space, blocking any spiritual force coming through.

Zhao Hai slowly walked towards the cave. When he entered, he couldn’t help but stare. In the distance was a large number of white bones. These bones were clear as jade and were as beautiful as ivory.

There were white bones everywhere, all completely preserved. Zhao Hai could feel the blood qi emanating from all the bones. Zhao Hai was certain that if he took these bones and refined them, the result would be a high-grade artifact. Moreover, the strength of the artifact wouldn’t be small. In other words, Zhao Hai was standing in a literal treasure trove right now.

However, Zhao Hai has no plans on moving the bones. Although the bones were good material, they weren’t attractive to Zhao Hai. This was because the Space has same-level materials. If he wanted to make a weapon out of bones, he has plenty to use.

Zhao Hai found a place to sit and began to circulate his spiritual qi slowly. Zhao Hai also added his spiritual force to his spiritual qi. He wanted to see what kind of changes his body would have.

Using his spiritual force, Zhao Hai felt a powerful strength enter his body. Zhao Hai felt his body expanding like a balloon. Moreover, it wasn’t being blown slowly, it was expanding rapidly.

Zhao Hai now understood the old elephant’s words. If an average cultivator, even a Diamond Body Stage cultivator, were to absorb the blood qi in the mountain, they would immediately be filled up and more. The final result would be their body exploding.

However, Zhao Hai’s body was different. After gaining multiple divergent abilities, Zhao Hai’s cells have evolved. Each cell could crystallize, not only increasing their defensive abilities, but also increasing their capacity to store energy. This scale wasn’t merely tenfold, it was a hundred or even a thousandfold increase.

Zhao Hai immediately controlled his body to absorb the incoming blood qi. The blood qi rushed violently into Zhao Hai’s body. Despite this, Zhao Hai’s cells were able to absorb them in a stable manner.

Zhao Hai could feel that his cells were becoming full. Each cell was brimming with strength. As more and more energy was being absorbed into the cells, Zhao Hai’s spiritual qi and spiritual force rapidly increased. However, this increase wasn’t dangerous to Zhao Hai. On the contrary, his strength was increasing at a crazy speed!

chapters.title: Chapter 2271: Earth Monarch
chapters.body:
Chapter 2271: Earth Monarch

There were no traces of abnormality in the spiritual qi of the Valley of the Sacred Elephant. However, the blood and qi present in the Sacred Elephant Mountain has turned into a huge vortex, disappearing at a rapid speed.

Zhao Hai, who was sitting inside the mountain, exuded bursts of blood qi as he absorbed the blessings of the mountain. If other people saw this, they would immediately see that the blood qi has been absorbed by Zhao Hai and turned into strength.

Time passed, and seven days later, the last blood qi in the mountain vanished. At the same time, Zhao Hai’ s temperament underwent a huge change. If there were other people present, they would see that Zhao Hai wasn’t at the Soul Fusion Stage but had become an Earth Monarch. In other words, in seven days, Zhao Hai broke through to the Earth Monarch Stage.

However, Zhao Hai was clearly aware that he wasn’t an ordinary Earth Monarch. Not to mention his spiritual qi density being a thousand times stronger than an ordinary Earth Monarch, his body also achieved unexpected benefits.

Zhao Hai thought that his crystallization ability didn’t need upgrading. This was because the ability was already very powerful. Even in the True Spirit Realm, Zhao Hai has yet to find someone who could break through his ability.

However, Zhao Hai now knows that he has made a mistake. After obtaining the blood qi of the Sacred Elephant Clan, Zhao Hai’s crystallization ability has leveled up. Originally, Zhao Hai’s cells would become small individual crystals when he crystallized. But now it was different. Each crystallized cell could now connect to its adjacent cells along a certain structure. This made Zhao Hai’s crystal body much stronger than before.

Zhao Hai couldn’t help but wonder how strong he became. Zhao Hai estimated that his current strength has increased a hundred times compared to before. If he didn’t use the Demon Subjugation Technique or his Divergent Abilities, he was ten times stronger than normal cultivators. But now, even without using his skills or abilities, his body strength was 20 times stronger than normal cultivators.

Zhao Hai slowly opened his eyes. His pupils became more profound. At the same time, his body exuded the aura of a giant wild beast.

Zhao Hai took a deep breath, then his aura withdrew completely. His whole person returned to being an ordinary human. If others saw him, they would only think that he was an ordinary Earth Monarch.

Moving his arms and feet, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but comment, “Not bad. I thought I’d have to wait a few years to become an Earth Monarch. I didn’t expect to break through right now. There is still a bit more blood qi left in my body. If I manage to absorb it completely, my strength will increase once more. I benefited a lot this time.”

After inspecting his body, Zhao Hai looked around. Then he couldn’t help but be stunned. The jade-like luster on the bones in the cave has disappeared. The skeletons have turned into ordinary bones. Some of the older bones have even turned into dust.

Seeing this, Zhao Hai understood. He already absorbed the remnant qi on these skeletons. It was natural for some of them to completely lose their structure.

Thinking of this, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but think that he had taken advantage of the Crazed Elephant Clan. He gave a deep bow to the skeletons before leaving the cave. Then his figure moved and left the Valley of the Sacred Elephant.

The next moment, Zhao Hai was already back in Gale Canyon. But as he glanced at the canyon, it had completely lost its charm. Zhao Hai’s trip brought huge benefits to his strength. Ordinary Earth Monarchs could not withstand a single punch from him. In this case, it was meaningless if he stayed. The canyon could no longer benefit him.

Thinking of this, Zhao Hai couldn’t help but sigh. He had just met two forbidden areas of the canyon, and his strength already reached this stage. What would have happened if he cleared the entire canyon?

However, Zhao Hai knew that his present strength didn’t allow him to accomplish this. His current strength is enough to stably defeat Teleportation Stage Experts. The majority of Teleportation Stage Experts couldn’t defeat him.

But if Zhao Hai fought against a Diamond Body Cultivator, the result would be unknown. After all, Zhao Hai hasn’t faced a Diamond Body Stage enemy. However, Zhao Hai was sure that his strength couldn’t clear the entire Gale Canyon. It was rumored that deep into the canyon were Condensing Spirit and Space Breaker-level beings. If Zhao Hai went, it would only cause him trouble with little benefit.

Zhao Hai sighed and began walking back to the cliff he came from. Gale Canyon no longer gave him benefits.

Just as Zhao Hai walked around ten kilometers, the sound of broken wind was suddenly heard. Zhao Hai discovered that he had been surrounded. He looked around him and saw that there were ten Earth Monarchs surrounding him. Each of them isn’t weak.

One of the Earth Monarchs looked at Zhao Hai with evil intentions and said, “Kid, hand over your storage items. Then the Ten Winds of Righteousness might let you go.”

Zhao Hai looked at the person and then touched his chin, “Ten Winds of Righteousness? I’m afraid I can’t trust you with that name. It has to be fake. You are just afraid that someone will track you down after leaving the canyon. You look like you came from a gang. Tell me which gang you come from.” Ꞧ𝐀ŊỐΒÊS̈

As soon as they heard Zhao Hai, the ten Earth Monarchs were stunned. They didn’t think that Zhao Hai would guess their methods. The leader of the group laughed and said, “Smart kid. We underestimate you. However, since you’re so smart, why didn’t you just hand over your storage items. Don’t you know that being too smart can kill you? We planned to release you originally, but since you said those words, I’m afraid you can only die!”

After the leader said that, all Earth Monarchs held their weapons and glanced menacingly at Zhao Hai. Their weapons weren’t unified. There were three blade users, two stick users, a person with a spear, and four people with swords. However, all of the weapons were high-quality goods.

Although the weapons varied, Zhao Hai’s spiritual force discovered that the weapons have unified designs. And in a hidden location, the weapons have the character for ‘purple’ (紫).

Seeing this character, Zhao Hai immediately knew who they were. He looked at the leader of the group and said, “I didn’t expect you to be from the Purple Jade Gang. What I didn’t expect more was that people from the Purple Jade Gang would do this. This is eye-opening.”

The expressions of the Earth Monarchs immediately changed when they heard this. The leader of the group said, “We can’t let him live. Otherwise, our status will be tainted. Kill him!” After that, he wielded his sword and attacked Zhao Hai.

The others also brandished their weapons to attack Zhao Hai. Seeing their actions, Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “How boring. With your strengths, you still dared to attack me.” After saying that, Zhao Hai raised his arm and pointed his finger.

Zhao Hai’s finger wasn’t targeting one person, but all ten of them. Just as the ten were stunned Zhao Hai’s finger was already on their foreheads. In no time, they all shuddered and bled profusely from their heads. Ten bodies collapsed on the ground at the same time, with blood and brain matter coming out of their foreheads.

Zhao Hai looked at the ten and muttered, “My strength has been greatly increased. Although they didn’t use all of their power, I still managed to kill them in an instant. I never could have done this before.”

As he said that, Zhao Hai waved his hand and sent the corpses to the Space. He then headed back to Windchase Town. As he walked, “Zhao Hai couldn’t help but smile, “This might have been the shortest trial ever.” As he spoke, he walked into the town and went straight towards the auction house.

Ling Dong heard that Zhao Hai had returned, but because of his status, he didn’t meet him publicly. When the two saw each other, Ling Dong said, “Brother Ling, you’re back from your trial? Huh? You actually broke through to the Earth Monarch Realm. Your strength has improved rapidly.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I rushed over to the Valley of the Sacred Elephant and managed to find a few spiritual herbs. After consuming them, I broke through.”

Ling Dong nodded, he didn’t feel that something wasn’t right. He thought that Zhao Hai was an ordinary Soul Fusion Cultivator. Normally, such people could break through to the Earth Monarch Realm easily as long as they have accumulated enough.

In the True Spirit Realm, there are several stages that are really difficult to rush through. The first obstacle was the border between the Earth Monarch Realm and the Teleportation Realm. This was a true test for cultivators. There are plenty of cultivators who were stuck at this juncture.

Because of this, there are plenty of Earth Monarchs in the True Spirit Realm but not a lot of them break through to the Teleportation Realm. It was also because of this that Teleportation Stage Experts are deemed as minor kings in the True Spirit Realm. The realm between the Earth Monarch Stage and the Teleportation Stage was called the Dragon’s Gate. If you manage to get through this gate, you will turn from a fish to a dragon.

Since the boundary between the Soul Fusion Stage and the Earth Monarch Stage wasn’t that hard to break through, Ling Dong didn’t have much of a reaction when he discovered that Zhao Hai had become an Earth Monarch.

Ling Dong looked at Zhao Hai and said, “What does Brother Ling plan to do now? Do you want to close up, or do you want to return to Demonheart City?”

Zhao Hai looked at Ling Dong and said, “Do you have any news about Demonheart City? Is the Blood Knife Gang doing well?”

Ling Dong nodded, “Rest assured, the Blood Knife Gang is doing well. I have used my influence to look after the gang. Although the gang couldn’t expand, they are safe in the city. There’s no need to worry about them.”

Zhao Hai cupped his fist towards Ling Dong and said, “Thank you, Shopkeeper Ling. I have no matters left in Windchase Town, so I’m planning to return to Demonheart City. This way, once the Forbidden Path Sect opens its gate, I can immediately head over. Windchase Town is still a small town that’s a little far from Demonheart City. If there’s any changes in Demonheart City, it would be better to be there than here.”

Ling Dong nodded, he looked at Zhao Hai and said, “This time, your luck isn’t very good. In the past, as long as you had a Bloodless Command Token, you could join the sect immediately. But because of the recent opening of the gates, as well as the fact that you bought your token with money, the sect will have you join the disciples that pass the tests.”

“This isn’t very fair to you. But at the same time, it shows the attitude of the sect. Others who hold the Bloodless Command Token are geniuses found by the sect, becoming key figures to be trained. But you obtained the token by spending money. Not only would you not receive special care, you might be looked down on. Joining the sect will be the start of your trial. I hope you can survive in the sect.”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “Don’t worry, I can survive. I believe in my strength. Wanting to join the sect while in the Soul Fusion Stage isn’t an impulse decision. I’m already confident then, much less now that I have become an Earth Monarch. Once I join the sect, I will be able to stand firm.”

Seeing Zhao Hai’s confident expression, Ling Dong didn’t say anything. He didn’t plan to quench Zhao Hai’s confidence. He knew very well that the competition inside the sect is much more intense than outside. Geniuses who join the sect would be proud at first, but as time went on, their confidence would vanish. Those who can rise in the Forbidden Path Sect were the true geniuses.

chapters.title: Chapter 2272: Returning To The Tyrant Blade Sect
chapters.body:
Chapter 2272: Returning To The Tyrant Blade Sect

On the transmission formation of Demonheart City, there was a flash of white light before a person appeared. In Demonheart City, not every city has transmission formation. Only the first, second, and third cities have transmission formations, the fourth and fifth city did not.

However, the transmission formation isn’t open to the public. The transmission formation could only be used by the cultivators of the Forbidden Path Sect as well as some powerful gangs in the city.

The transmission formation in the first city isn’t open to the public. Only cultivators from the Forbidden Path Sect as well as members of powerful gangs can use it.

The transmission formations in the second and third city can be used by everyone in Demonheart City. However, most cultivators don’t use the transmission formation, not because they aren’t Forbidden Path Sect disciples, but because they cannot afford to do so. Each use of the transmission formation uses 10 jade essences. Although the amount wasn’t big, it was expensive for rogue cultivators. After all, they can use the jade essences to buy windchasing horses that could service them for more than 10 years. Only when matters are urgent would gangs use transmission formations, otherwise they would just use their mounts.

The person on the transmission formation slowly walked out. He looked ordinary and wore black robes. There was no special point about him.

This person was naturally Zhao Hai. He returned to Demonheart City through the transmission formation installed in Windchase Town’s auction house.

Since it would still take some time before the Forbidden Path Sect opens its gates, Zhao Hai didn’t tell anyone of his return to Demonheart City. He returned to Demonheart City using a different appearance. He believed that nobody would notice him. Everyone knew that Zhao Hai was in seclusion in Windchase Town.

Zhao Hai wasn’t planning on returning to the Blood Knife Gang for now. He knew how many eyes were currently staring at the gang. Although the gang was already warned by Ling Dong, troubles will still come if Zhao Hai appears. Therefore, Zhao Hai was thinking of going to the Abundance Hall instead.

The Abundance Hall was a business of the Long Clan. But the Long Clan has no interest in the Demon Blood Realm. And with the special status of the Long Clan, Zhao Hai should be safe in Demonheart City. Nobody would dare provoke them.

The Abundance Hall was still the same bustling building that Zhao Hai knew. Because the Forbidden Path Sect wanted to open its gates, rogue cultivators began arriving in the city looking for opportunities. Therefore, there were now more people in the city than before. And with an increase in population comes an increase in demand. And with the Abundance Hall’s stellar reputation, it was natural that its business would increase.

And because of the influx of people to Demonheart City, the fifth city, which was sparsely populated before, was now almost full.

At this time, the members of the Blood Knife Gang understood how clever they were in choosing the location of their new headquarters. Although the place was remote, nobody paid attention to it. This made the gang safe despite the increase of people.

Lately, there had been several battles in Demonheart City because of territory. Some gangs stronger than the Blood Knife Gang have already been erased.

Naturally, Demonheart City forbade any violence. Therefore, conflicts between groups of people were settled outside. Even so, there were plenty of smaller gangs that had been expelled from their territories and had to settle outside Demonheart City.

It can be said that the opening of the sect’s gates has reshuffled the power structure of Demonheart City. There were plenty of old but weak powers that had been forced to withdraw from the city.

The Blood Knife Gang didn’t suffer any of these fates. Because of their location, nobody paid attention to them. Naturally, it was impossible for the gang to survive purely because of this. They were also backed by the Abundance Hall as well as Ling Dong’s word. Ling Dong had a few inner disciples in his circle. With their help, nobody dared cause any trouble to the Blood Knife Gang.

Since there were no problems with the Blood Knife Gang, Zhao Hai chose to not worry about them. He was confident that they could survive with their strength.

Just as Zhao Hai entered the doors of the Abundance Hall, a shop assistant welcomed him. Naturally, the assistant didn’t know who Zhao Hai was. He greeted Zhao Hai like the others as he bowed and said, “Welcome to the Abundance Hall. May I know how I can help you?”

Zhao Hai looked at the shop assistant and then smiled faintly, “I have a few items I want to trade. But I have to ask your shopkeeper to see them.”

The assistant stared at Zhao Hai for a moment, then he immediately said, “Alright. Mister, please wait in the other room while I call the shopkeeper.” Zhao Hai nodded and was then escorted to a waiting room. After offering tea to Zhao Hai, the assistant left the room, presumably going to fetch Shopkeeper Yun.

Before long, Shopkeeper Yun arrived at the waiting room. Seeing Zhao Hai, he couldn’t help but show a confused expression. He saw that Zhao Hai looked familiar, but he couldn’t pin who it was. This caused him to doubt.

Although he was confused, Shopkeeper Yun made a small bow and said, “Might I know what items Mister wants to trade? I’m the shopkeeper of the Abundance Hall.”

Zhao Hai looked at the shop assistant and then to Shopkeeper Yun, “Shopkeeper, I have to ask your assistant to leave the room. I want to speak with you privately.”

Hearing this, Shopkeeper Yun’s eyes narrowed. This person knew that his name was Yun. This meant that he knew him. However, he just couldn’t remember who Zhao Hai was. After all, Shopkeeper Yun was very confident in his memory. Ŗ𝙖ΝổβÈ𝙨

After Shopkeeper Yun waved his hand, the shop assistant left. Once they were alone, Shopkeeper Yun looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Mister, can you tell me what you want to trade now?”

Zhao Hai smiled at Shopkeeper Yun before his figure underwent a subtle change. His face also changed form. Before long, Zhao Hai’s true image appeared in front of Shopkeeper Yun. Then he cupped his fist and said, “I hope Shopkeeper Yun can forgive me. I didn’t want anyone to know that I’ve returned, so I disguised myself.”

Seeing that it was Zhao Hai, Shopkeeper Yun couldn’t help but be surprised. Then he happily smiled and said, “Little Hai, it’s you. Haha. What do you mean forgive? I’m happy that you’re back. I heard that you managed to obtain a Bloodless Command Token, is that true?”

Zhao Hai nodded and said, “Yes, I managed to get it at an auction. But because of my special status, I can only become an official disciple once the sect opens its gates. I can’t return to the Blood Knife Gang right now because of the eyes staring at it.”

Shopkeeper Yun nodded, “That’s a good decision. If you don’t want to go back, then don’t go back. What do you plan to do now?”

Zhao Hai smiled faintly and said, “I came here hoping that you can arrange a place for me. I want to go into seclusion for some time. Then once the Forbidden Path Sect opens its gates, I’ll head over.”

Shopkeeper Yun smiled and said, “Not a problem. I’ll arrange a room for you immediately.” Zhao Hai cupped his fist and then turned on his disguise. Seeing Zhao Hai’s face change, Shopkeeper Yun couldn’t hide his surprise.

Sitting in the room arranged by Shopkeeper Yun, Zhao Hai informed the shopkeeper that he would go into seclusion. Then he arranged formations in the room before returning to the Tyrant Blade Sect.

The Tyrant Blade Sect was doing pretty well. The Tyrant Blade Sect was able to recruit more disciples than the Forbidden Path Sect. Even Yanyue Peak has newly moved-in disciples.

In the past, Yanyue Peak has almost been abandoned. It was only when Zhao Hai moved in did the peak slowly gain a bit of vitality. Afterwards, more and more people moved in. Since the peak had been abandoned for a long time, it didn’t have the means to house disciples compared to other peaks.

However, now that the Tyrant Blade Sect has opened its gates to receive disciples, Yanyue Peak gained attention and was repaired. Right now, rookie disciples were sent to the peak to stay. This made the peak’s population no less than the other peaks.

Despite the peak’s increase in population, Zhao Hai’s courtyard was still relatively empty. This was because the Yin-Yang Elders were living there. The two elders have now assumed control over the peak. With such elders present, it was impossible for the sect to send disciples to Courtyard Number 52.

When Zhao Hai returned to his courtyard, the two elders immediately felt his presence and went to meet him. Seeing Zhao Hai, the Yin Elder smiled and said, “Good, good. You broke through to the Earth Monarch Stage. It seems like you haven’t been lazy.”

Zhao Hai smiled and said, “I won’t dare to be lazy. Master, I managed to get a lucky encounter that helped me break through. Moreover, I feel like I haven’t reached my full potential, so I returned to the sect to inquire.”

The Yin Elder nodded, “Let’s head inside.” Then the three went to the living room to sit down.

After a robot offered tea, the Yin Elder looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Tell us what you’ve been up to.”

Zhao Hai nodded. He told the two elders about acquiring a Bloodless Command Token and then recounted his experience in Gale Canyon. He also told them about Sacred Elephant Mountain and absorbing the blood qi inside.

After listening to Zhao Hai, the two elders couldn’t help but sigh at his luck. The Yin Elder looked at Zhao Hai and said, “Don’t you need to go into seclusion to absorb the blood qi? Doing that would be better for you.”

Zhao Hai replied, “I came back this time to report to you. Later, I’ll return to Demonheart Mountain to go into seclusion before joining the Forbidden Path Sect. The Forbidden Path Sect is famous for Body Cultivation. I can use their resources to digest the blood qi from the Sacred Elephant Mountain. When the time comes, my body will be several times stronger than body cultivators. Perhaps I might become a favored disciple of the Forbidden Path Sect.”

Hearing Zhao Hai, the Yin Elder couldn’t help but smile, “It’s good that you have a plan. We won’t stop you. But remember to not go too far in your actions in the Forbidden Path Sect. After all, they are a Great Sect of the True Spirit Realm. They can also resist the Ghost Cultivators.”
